C:
◆ 活动规则 ◆
角色试用活动「锋芒崭露」开启期间，开拓者可使用包含所选试用角色的固定队伍，无限次体验指定关卡。
体验活动关卡时，将无法调整编队中角色、角色等级及角色装备的光锥、遗器。

◆ 活动奖励 ◆
达成关卡挑战后，将可以在活动界面领取试用关卡奖励。各试用关卡奖励在活动期间仅可领取一次。
E:
◆ Event Rules ◆
During the character trial event "Aptitude Showcase," Trailblazers can use set teams that include trial characters to repeatedly experience specific stages.
Team Lineup, character levels, and the equipped Light Cones and Relics cannot be changed while experiencing the event stage.

◆ Event Rewards ◆
Rewards for the trial stage can be obtained from the event screen after completing the stage. Each trial stage reward may only be claimed once during the event.

C:
◆ 简介 ◆
爱德华医生新上架了一枚题材特殊的梦泡，体验过的客人全都好评如潮。究竟是什么内容如此劲爆？只有亲自试过才知道。事不宜迟，马上去找爱德华医生问问吧。

◆ 活动规则◆
● 活动开启后，「浅层梦境」中的「气泡弹珠」关卡会开启；完成该梦泡关卡后解锁下一个梦泡，以此类推。
● 完成「浅层梦境」的梦泡后，解锁「深层梦境」的对应梦泡章节。
● 其中「气泡弹珠」包含5个关卡，「梦境迷钟」包含5个关卡，「小小哈努行动」包含2个关卡，「梦客漫步」包含2个关卡。

◆ 活动奖励◆
● 限时活动期间达成指定活动目标，便可在「自选角色」中领取角色奖励。
● 限时活动期间达成指定活动目标，便可在「限时奖励」中领取活动奖励。
● 活动时间结束后，开拓者将无法获取限时活动奖励。但仍可前往「爱德华医生」处体验活动内容，并获取常驻奖励。
E:
◆ Introduction ◆
Dr. Edward has created a new dream bubble with a unique theme, receiving rave reviews from customers who have experienced it. What makes it so exciting? Talk to Dr. Edward and try it yourself.

◆ Event Rules ◆
● After the event starts, the "Bubble Pinball" stage in the Shallow Dreamscape will unlock. Completing the dream bubble stage unlocks the next one.
● Once you have completed the dream bubbles in the Shallow Dreamscape, new dream bubble chapters in the Deep Dreamscape will unlock.
● Among them, Bubble Pinball contain 5 stages, Dream Ticker contains 5 stages, Hanu's Adventure contains 2 stages, and Dreamwalker contains 2 stages.

◆ Event Rewards ◆
● If you achieve the specified event objective during the limited-time event, you're entitled to claim 1 character reward in the "Character Selection" section.
● If you achieve the specified event objective during the limited-time event, you're entitled to claim event rewards in the "Limited-Time Rewards" section.
● After this event ends, Trailblazers will no longer be able to claim limited-time event rewards. However, they can still visit Dr. Edward to experience the event content and claim regular rewards.

C:
◆玩法规则◆
我，黑塔，在此对「模拟宇宙」的规则进行说明。
● 在「模拟宇宙」战斗过程中，可以获得不同命途带来的强力祝福、遇到随机事件与特殊奇物。
● 在「模拟宇宙」玩法过程中，可以体验到随机出现的迷宫组合，强化后的精英敌人与首领敌人。

◆ 玩法奖励 ◆
● 「模拟宇宙」现有多个世界，新的世界内容将会随模拟宇宙进度与开拓任务进程逐渐解锁，伴随着新的关卡、内容与奖励的更新。
● 首次通关「模拟宇宙」各个世界可获得4星角色「黑塔（智识•冰）」、星琼和星轨通票等奖励。
● 完成「模拟宇宙」可获得积分，累计积分可兑换奖励，积分奖励每两周刷新，刷新时间为当周周一<unbreak>04</unbreak>:<unbreak>00</unbreak>（服务器时间）。
● 在「模拟宇宙」图鉴中解锁祝福和奇物可获得星琼。
● 在「模拟宇宙」的「区域-精英」或「区域-首领」击败敌人可获得额外掉落
● 完成「模拟宇宙」可获得技能点，在技能树中激活强力效果，助力「模拟宇宙」玩法内的探索。
● 从「模拟宇宙•第三世界」开始，击败精英或首领后，将解锁「位面饰品」奖励兑换。
E:
◆ Gameplay Rules ◆
I, Herta, hereby explain the rules of the Simulated Universe.
● As you fight your way through the Simulated Universe, you may encounter powerful Blessings from different Paths, random Occurrences, or special Curios.
● In the Simulated Universe game mode, you can experience randomly-generated maze combinations, enhanced Elite Enemies, and boss enemies.

◆ Gameplay Rewards ◆
● There are currently multiple worlds in the Simulated Universe. New worlds will be gradually unlocked as you progress through the Simulated Universe and Trailblaze Missions, providing new stages, content, and rewards.
● Clearing every world in the Simulated Universe for the first time will grant rewards, including the 4-star character Herta (Erudition: Ice), Stellar Jades, and Star Rail Passes.
● Complete the Simulated Universe to receive points and get rewards by accumulating points. The Point Rewards will be reset every two weeks on Mondays at <unbreak>04</unbreak>:<unbreak>00</unbreak> (server time).
● Unlock Blessings and Curios in the Simulated Universe Index to receive Stellar Jades.
● Defeating an enemy in Simulated Universe's "Domain — Elite" or "Domain — Boss" will earn extra drops.
● Complete the Simulated Universe to receive Ability Points. These are used in the Ability Tree to activate powerful abilities and aid in your exploration of the Simulated Universe.
● Starting from Simulated Universe — World 3, Planar Ornament exchange will be available after you defeat Elite or Boss enemies.

C: 队伍中至少要保留1只奇美拉才能开始工作。
E: At least 1 chimera must be in the squad before work can begin.

C: 你将胜利的消息传达给了下层区居民，缓解了他们的紧张情绪。布洛妮娅也捎来信息，上下层区长达十余年的封锁即将终结。
E: You bring news of your victory to the residents of the Underworld and alleviate their tensions. Bronya announces that the decade-long blockade between the Overworld and Underworld will soon come to an end.

C: 黑天鹅「背叛」了你，将你带到公司使节砂金面前，却也令你领教了另一个足以颠覆美梦的事实——知更鸟在你面前化作了泡影。\n美梦的序曲以一个强有力的休止符作结…好戏即将正式开场了。
E: Black Swan "betrayed" you and brought you to Aventurine, an IPC representative. There, you witnessed another fact that was enough to undo the dream — Robin was reduced to nothingness in front of you.\nThe prelude to the sweet dream comes to an emphatic rest... and the show is about to begin.

C: 托帕与翡翠作为星际和平公司的代表登上了「晖长石号」，参加与苜蓿草家系家主奥帝•艾弗法先生的会谈。狡猾的老奥帝开门见山地抛出了自己的策略——他打算让匹诺康尼集团「自主上市」。面对突如其来的商战攻势，战略投资部的两位代表必须谨慎走出下一步……
E: Topaz and Jade board the Radiant Feldspar as the IPC's representatives and join talks with the Alfalfa Family's head, Mr. Oti Alfalfa. The cunning Old Oti gets straight to the point and reveals his strategy: He intends for the Penacony Conglomerate to "enter the market independently." Facing this sudden trade offensive, the two representatives of the Strategic Investment Department must tread carefully...

C: 你通过了「均衡」的第伍次试炼——宇宙和你都变得更加均衡了。
E: You have completed the fifth trial of the Equilibrium, further establishing the equilibrium between yourself and the universe.

C: 钟表小子没有喝太多。当大家睡去，他一个人坐在窗边，担忧着这次旅途是否会有伙伴离去……
E: Clockie doesn't drink much. Once everyone is asleep, he sits alone beside the window and worries about whether his partners for this trip will leave him...

C: 骗人杯调制了一份令人伤心的谎言，杯中是野狼美人与鳄鱼帅哥相爱相杀的爱情悲剧。\n「滴答，这滴答有点邪门了。」
E: Scammer Cup concocts a hurtful lie. In the cup is the tragic romance of a beautiful, wild wolf woman and a handsome crocodile gent who fall in love and kill each other.\n"Tick-tock, this tick-tock is a little bit spooky."

C: 镜子的光芒略显昏暗，无法照亮整个小镇，但至少为钟表小子指出了一条道路……「滴答，要是我的地图有引导图标就好了。」
E: The mirror's light is slightly faint and isn't enough to light up the whole town, but at least it's enough to show Clockie a path...\n"Tick-tock, I wish I had a map with a nice flashing icon on it to follow."

C: 他们把镜子公主的碎片藏了起来，没有告诉镇民们真相——毕竟这个消息对困境中的镇民来说，还是太残忍了。
E: They hide the fragments of Mirror Princess and conceal the truth from the townsfolk — after all, they are in distress and cannot bear to hear such cruel news.

C: 钟表小子决定暂时退出繁琐的行政工作，亲身投入到拓荒的冒险中。\n「滴答，回归老本行！」
E: Clockie decides to temporarily withdraw from the tedious administrative work and devote himself to the adventure of trailblazing.\n"Tick-tock, time to return to old business!"

C: 但牛仔们的诉求依然没有变化，他们不愿归属美梦小镇，而是想在荒漠上快乐生活。\n「滴答，这有什么不好，大家都开心嘛！」
E: Yet the demands of the cowboys remain the same — they do not want to be part of Dreamville but instead, live happily in the desert.\n"Tick-tock, there's nothing wrong with this. Most importantly, everyone should be happy!"

C: 钟表小子偷偷在防风林中开辟了一条小路，镇民和牛仔们会在这片林子里一起玩耍。\n「总有一天，我们会推倒这片林子！」
E: Clockie secretly opens up a path in the windbreak forest, allowing the townsfolk and the cowboys to play together in the forest.\n"One day, we will tear down this forest!"

C: 钟表小子把美梦小镇的过去拍进了影片，但影片胶卷很快就被没收了。\n「滴答，但真相是没收不掉的！」
E: Clockie made Dreamville's history into a film, but the film reel was soon confiscated.\n"Tick-tock, the truth can never be confiscated!"

C: 不知为何，钟表小子的信到了镇民手中都变成了古怪的笑话，人们都在感叹钟表小子的幽默。\n「啦啦啦，这是音符小姐的自动屏蔽技术！」
E: For some reason, those letters had turned into wacky jokes when they reached the townsfolk. Everyone was impressed by Clockie's sense of humor.\n"La, la, la! Here comes Miss Note's auto-censoring technique!"

C: 钟表小子跟木头老爷表达了自己的想法，两人再次成为了伙伴，一起让美梦小镇成为乐园！
E: After Clockie shared his views with Old Man Wood, the two became partners once again. They would strive to turn Dreamville into a paradise together!

C: 面对强大无比的炸弹头，不擅战斗的镇民与船员们束手无策。要保护这里的镇民，钟表小子必须想出点儿办法……
E: The townsfolk and crew are not fighters, and they're helpless before the might of the Bombheads. Clockie has to come up with a way to help the townsfolk here...

C: 船员们踏上噩梦小镇的街道，目之所及一片荒凉。烈火燃烧着破旧的木屋，饥肠辘辘的鳄鱼游荡在废墟之间……
E: The crew steps out onto the streets of Nightmareville and sees for themselves the desolate wasteland. Flames lick at dilapidated wooden houses, and hungry crocodiles roam through the ruins...

C: 虽然石头老板的工厂解决了镇民的生计问题，但大家生活在压抑阴暗的街区，依然感到闷闷不乐。石头老板决定翻新整个小镇。
E: Despite Boss Stone's factory supplying the townsfolk's livelihoods, everyone still lives in an oppressive and gloomy neighborhood and still feels bored and unhappy. Boss Stone decides to renovate the entire town.

C: 看到大家都赚了大钱，汽水先生也开始摩拳擦掌，他花了大价钱改进了自己的苏乐达，开始到处打广告。
E: Seeing that everyone is making a fortune, Mr. Soda becomes intrigued by the market. He invests heavily in improving the recipe of SoulGlad and launches extensive advertising campaigns everywhere.

C: 钟表小子回到了牛仔的队伍中，大家把钟表小子当作自己的领袖，希望他能让霸道的木头老爷让步。
E: Now that Clockie has returned to the posse of cowboys, everyone regards Clockie as their leader. Many hope that he can persuade the overbearing Old Man Wood to give up his position.

C: 为了感谢钟表小子对美梦小镇的帮助，木头老爷提议把一块大钟表放在宾馆的中间作为纪念……
E: In appreciation of what Clockie had done for Dreamville, Old Man Wood proposed that a large clock be placed in the middle of the hotel as a commemoration...

C: 热情的音符小姐来到了美梦小镇，她的美貌与歌喉让镇民们一见倾心，但这却引起了钢琴大叔的妒忌……
E: The amicable Miss Note arrived in Dreamville, garnering the admiration of the townsfolk with her beauty and mellow voice. However, Uncle Piano was jealous of her popularity...

C: 美梦小镇里有人经历离别，钟表小子问：「滴答，木头老爷，该怎么办呢？」
E: Someone had permanently departed from Dreamville. "Tick-tock, what should we do, Old Man Wood?" Clockie asks.

C: 初探噩梦
E: Nightmare Dip

C: 但行走在安静的街头，钟表小子感到了一丝不安和惆怅……
E: But as he is walking along a quiet street, Clockie is struck by anxiety and concern...

C: 木头老爷的树苗长满大地，藤蔓缠绕着一颗又一颗腐朽的心，半梦半醒的镇民仍沉浸于纸醉金迷。
E: Old Man Wood's seedlings litter the fields, his tendrils wrap around numerous corrupted hearts, with the townsfolk drifting in and out between dream and reality and sunken in luxuriant extravagance.

C: 滴答，一定会有那一天的…美梦小镇的美梦终将醒来，罗盘号的罗盘则会指向他的下一站……
E: Tick-tock, that day will definitely come... Dreamville's dream will one day awaken, and The Compass' needle will point toward his next destination...

The Shield Effect from Dan Heng • Permansor Terrae and "Souldragon" can be stacked, up to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak></color> of the Shield Effect provided by Dan Heng • Permansor Terrae's Skill. Additionally, launches Follow-Up ATK that deals Physical DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#7[i]%</unbreak></color> of Dan Heng • Permansor Terrae's ATK and 1 instance of Additional DMG of the corresponding Type equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#6[f1]%</unbreak><gridfightmod type=backrank index=6 format=f1%></color> of the Bondmate's ATK to all enemies.\n"Souldragon" disappears when the "Bondmate" is knocked down.

C: 于镇妖塔中遍历岁阳经历，提炼妖火。
E: Within the suppression tower, traverse the experiences of the heliobi and refine the Fiendfire.

C: <color=#42a8b9>#鬼话连篇##闲来吹水#</color>楼主是塔拉萨留学生，家里不是很富裕，一直在勤工俭学。最近接到一个日结的零工，金主让楼主帮他贴几个交友广告，说是有缘人看见小广告就会扫码，你们仙舟人都是这样的吗？
E: I'm an transfer student from Thalassa. My family isn't very rich and I've been working on the side. Recently I got a casual gig that pays by the day. My boss wants me to help him put up some adverts looking for friends, saying that those who are destined for him would scan the QR code if they see the ads. Is this how things work with you Xianzhou people? <color=#42a8b9>#GhostTales #JustChattin</color>

C: <color=#42a8b9>#捉鬼小队##十分恐怖#</color>捉鬼小队收了家人们的投稿后紧急调查了金人巷，实际上真相远比<color=#42a8b9>@浮羊肉肉</color> 提到的更加可怕，被附身的并非是白露，而是「蓝色矮个子恶魔」，该恶魔能够有丝分裂，将自己一分为二，吃人越多，分裂越猛烈，金人巷走丢的人越多…捉鬼小队及时通知了十王司冥差，据小道消息说，一半以上的冥差已经殉职了。
E: After receiving submissions from our dear followers, the ghost-hunting squad conducted an urgent investigation in Aurum Alley. The actual truth is far more terrifying than what <color=#42a8b9>@MeatyPufferGOAT</color> mentioned. It turns out, Lady Bailu wasn't the one being possessed, but a certain "pint-sized smurf-colored demon." This demon has the ability to perform mitosis on itself, and the more humans it consumes, the more violent its splitting becomes. With more and more people missing in Aurum Alley, the ghost-hunting squad promptly notified the Ten-Lords Commission's spiritfarers. According to insider information, over half of the spiritfarers have already perished. <color=#42a8b9>#GhostHuntingSquad #BoneChilling</color>

C: <color=#42a8b9>#捉鬼小队##生物入侵#</color>收到家人们的投稿后，捉鬼小队立即赶到了指定地点，发现哭声竟然来自一群鼻行兽！这些鼻行兽不知被谁大量放生，只能偷吃机巧鸟运送的货物，为此甚至进化出了可以飞上天的翅膀，哭声就是鼻行兽飞行时与空气摩擦产生的。现在事情闹得很大，就连云骑军都出动了，各位家人尽量不要外出啊！
E: Upon receiving the submission from the community, the ghost-hunting squad rushed to the specified location, only to discover that the crying sounds were coming from a group of nosewalkers! These nosewalkers had been released in large numbers by unknown individuals and had resorted to feeding themselves on cargo stolen from transport cycranes. To achieve this, they even evolved to develop wings that could carry them into the sky, and the crying sounds were the result of friction between the nosewalkers and the air during flight. The situation has escalated significantly, with even the Cloud Knights getting involved. Fam, please be safe and stay indoors as much as possible! <color=#42a8b9>#GhostHuntingSquad #CreatureInvasion</color>

C:
◆ 规则说明 ◆
● 每8次开箱必有1次为「保障」开箱。
● 「保障」开箱产出的遗器主属性必为目标角色的<color=#f29e38ff>系统推荐主属性</color>之一，<color=#f29e38ff>副属性有效数</color>必大于等于2。
● 「保障」开箱优先产出之前「保障」开箱未产出的遗器部位。
E:
◆ Rules Description ◆
● Every 8 boxes opened will produce 1 "Guarantee" Box.
● The Relic from a "Guarantee" Box will have one of the <color=#f29e38ff>Main Stats matching the system's recommendation</color> for the target character, with 2 or more <color=#f29e38ff>effective Subsidiary Stats</color>.
● "Guarantee" Boxes will prioritize offering Relic parts that were not offered by previous "Guarantee" Boxes.

C: ◆ 「专票特惠礼盒」说明 ◆\n● 上架期间该礼盒限购2次。<color=#eb4d3dff>如果因特殊情况导致重复购买，将直接返还<unbreak>1090</unbreak>古老梦华。</color>\n● 礼盒页面的超值比例表示礼盒总价值相对于售价的倍数，通过【礼盒内所有道具对应的古老梦华价值】与【售价对应的古老梦华价值】计算得出。
E: ◆ Special Pass Exclusive Giftbox Details ◆\n● While on sale, the giftbox will be limited to 2 purchases. <color=#eb4d3dff>If special circumstances result in repeated purchases, Trailblazers will directly receive <unbreak>1,090</unbreak> Oneiric Shards in recompense.</color>\n● The value ratio on the giftbox page represents the total worth of the giftbox relative to its purchase price. It is calculated by comparing the "Oneiric Shard value of all items in the giftbox" with the "Oneiric Shard value corresponding to their purchase prices."

C:
◆ 命途切换 ◆
● 随着游戏深入，部分角色可以开启新的「命途」类型。
● 同一角色被切换至不同命途时，其角色等级和晋阶等级互相继承，但行迹与星魂养成各自独立。
● 同一角色被切换至不同命途时，其装备的光锥和遗器各自独立。
● 在「命途切换」界面，可以切换部分角色的命途，切换后将自动更换其装备的光锥和遗器。
● 部分命途支持在「命途切换」界面提前解锁；不同命途的星魂道具获取方式存在差异，若提前解锁后再完成解锁任务时未提供，会经由游戏内其他途径和后续任务奖励获得。
E:
◆ Switch Path ◆
● As certain characters progress through the game, they can select new Paths.
● When the same character switches across different Paths, they will inherit their respective character levels and character ascensions, but Traces and Eidolons remain independent.
● When the same character switches to a different Path, their Light Cones and Relics will be independent for each Path.
● In the Switch Path menu, you can change the character's Path, after which the Light Cones and Relics equipped will automatically be updated.
● Some Paths support early unlocking via the Switch Path interface. Methods of obtaining Eidolons vary between Paths. If you unlock a Path early and its unlock mission does not provide the Eidolons upon completion, the Eidolons will instead be obtainable through other in-game means and subsequent mission rewards.

C: ◆ 额外掉落说明 ◆\n●在「差分宇宙」的「区域 - 首领」击败敌人可获得额外奖励。
E: ◆ Extra Drops Information ◆\n● Defeating enemies in Divergent Universe's "Domain — Boss" will earn you bonus rewards.

C: 贝洛伯格下层区的医生，也是孩子们的照料者。\n性格温柔可亲、又藏着危险的一面。
E: A doctor from the Underworld and a caregiver of children.\nAlongside her kindness and caring, she also has a hidden dangerous side.

C: 银鬃铁卫的情报官。\n性格认真，深受铁卫成员们敬畏。
E: An intelligence officer for the Silvermane Guards.\nShe has a serious personality and is revered by other members of the Silvermane Guards.

C: 浪迹银河的改造人牛仔，极度乐观、放荡不羁。\n身为「巡海游侠」的一员，为惩奸除恶，可以无所不用其极——\n高调行事的背后，渴望以此引起复仇对象「星际和平公司」的注意。
E: A cyborg cowboy drifting among the stars. Extremely optimistic and unrestrained.\nHe is a member of the Galaxy Rangers who swore to punish the wretched by any and all means...\nHis flamboyant and brash actions were all to draw the attention of the Interastral Peace Corporation — the target of his revenge.

C: 「亲爱的观众朋友们，钟表小子和他的伙伴们又要和大家见面啦！」 「在上一集中，石头老板发现了美梦小镇藏有丰富的资源，开始抢夺美梦小镇的统治权。钟表小子联合哈努兄弟与折纸小鸟，将石头老板和他的可恶下属赶出了美梦小镇。」 「石头老板心有不甘，聚集一帮打手誓要踏平美梦小镇。钟表小子将在这一集中面临史上最大危机！」 「钟表小子会用怎样的计谋突出重围？又会有什么新伙伴加入他的队伍？敬请欣赏最新一集『美梦小镇历险记』！」
E: "Hello, dear viewers! Clockie and his pals have come to see you all again!" "In the previous episode, Boss Stone discovered that Dreamville was sitting on a wealth of natural resources, and moved to seize control over the city. In response, Clockie joined forces with Brother Hanu and Origami Bird, and together, they sent Boss Stone and his goons running from Dreamville." "But Boss Stone isn't going to be defeated that easily, and this time, he's gathered a legion of thugs to fulfill his oath of turning Dreamville into a crater. In this episode, Clockie might just be standing against the greatest threat he ever faced!" "What scheme will Clockie employ to escape from this crisis? And what new friends will join his party? Stay tuned for the latest episode of 'Dreamville Adventure'!"

C: 净庭教会骑士的标准骑士长靴，脚后跟上刻印着简短的单词：「秩序」。
E: Standard boots distributed to the Knights of the Church of Purity Palace, with a simple word carved on their heels: Order.

C: 以漆黑焰晶打造的防护目镜，在镜片之下，激烈的火星迸裂也只不过是斑驳残影。
E: Protective goggles crafted from dark-black fire crystals. Through these lenses, even the flurry of intense sparks becomes a mosaic of dull shadows.

C: 嵌合肌体的仿生手甲。若想狩猎猛兽，就要有比猛兽更锐利的爪牙。
E: A bionic gauntlet integrated with the body. To hunt fearsome beasts, one must possess claws sharper than those of the beasts themselves.

C: 天国@直播间或许不是天国。无数次的聊天框流淌，既能构建辉煌，也能带来崩溃——它从来都不是现实的隔绝，而是现实的延伸。
E: The Tengoku@Livestream might not be heaven. The countless messages flooding the chat windows can build glory or bring destruction, as it was never an isolation from reality, but rather an extension of it.

C: 能在列车的留声机上播放的碟片，是偶然所得，亦是他人馈赠。音律飞旋时，那些笑容、擦肩、触碰，还有战斗时激荡的心绪，都一一涌上心头。或许这就是时代飞速发展向前，却依然有人在收集碟片的原因。\n当前碟片中刻录着《襟怀玉界》。
E: A record that can be played on the Express' phonograph. It might be a chance acquisition or a gift from someone else. All sorts of memories surge up when the music plays — the smiles, encounters, touches, and the excitement of battle. Maybe that is why people still collect records even as society rapidly advances.\nThe current record contains the track "Warden of Jade."

E: Frozen Tides

C: 《烧尽神国之火》
E: Immolation of the Heavens

C: 模仿海豹面相的墨镜，略显滑稽，深受丹恒喜爱。\n\n「戴上以后是不是会变成墨镜海豹？」
E: Sunglasses that mimic the face of a seal. They're a bit silly, but Dan Heng is quite fond of them.\n\n"If I wear these, does that make me a badass seal?"

C: 相互保证毁灭按钮
E: Mutually Assured Destruction Button

C: 一块拳头大小的地髓结晶，反射出靛蓝色的光泽。\n那个叫安东尼娜的女工头也许知道它值多少价钱。
E: A fist-sized geomarrow crystal, reflecting an indigo luster.\nThat supervisor Antonia probably knows how much it's worth.

C: 风干腌制的霜纹鲑肉与面包组成的拼盘，附赠一盅夕红果酱。 如今的霜纹鲑大多是在贝洛伯格城内养殖而成，与壁外渔猎得到的霜纹鲑风味有天壤之别。 「听说生鱼片与面包同服可以有效延迟腹泻发作，真的吗？」 「不知道啊，你去问娜塔莎呗。」
E: A cold platter made from air-fried preserved frostweave salmon and bread, with a bowl of redsunset jam for free. Nowadays, frostweave salmon are mostly bred inside Belobog's walls. Their taste is miles off from the frostweave salmons fished from the wilds outside the city. "I heard having raw fish slices together with bread can delay the onset of diarrhea effectively. Is that true?" "Heck if I know. Go ask Natasha."

C: 可爱到令人不忍下口的蛋糕卷。 得名于蛋糕卷上类似梦貘皮毛的漂亮纹络。 「好可爱！好像梦貘！」 「其实就是用梦貘做的。」 「？？？」
E: A cake roll that is too cute to eat. It gets its name from the beautiful patterns on the roll that resembles a tuskpir's fur. "This cake roll is so cute and looks like a tuskpir!" "It's actually made of tuskpirs." "???"

C: 只有盲眼之人才能够阅读的禁书。据说阅读此书形成了特殊的通感，改变了读者对外界的认知。\n\n「那不是脑内传声，就像是有一个人就在那里一样。」
E: A book readable only by the blind. It is said that reading this text will grant one a special kind of awareness and alter their perception of the world.\n\n"It's not like a sound echoing within your mind, but the actual presence of someone by your side."

C: 偷偷跟踪桂乃芬的狂热粉丝寄来的礼物。\n\n「小桂子你真的好酷，我更喜欢你了！」
E: Gifts sent by Guinaifen's enthusiastic, stalking fan.\n\n"Little Gui, you're really cool. I like you even more now!"

C: 朝露公馆梦境沙盘的入口。 将手放进小小的拱门身体就能缩小，在微缩状态下走出门洞便能恢复原形。 「这东西的外观让我想起一种通过就能使人缩小的隧……」 「如果我是你，就会立刻闭嘴。不该说的话少说。」
E: The entrance to the Dewlight Pavilion's Dreamscape Sandpit. Placing your hand through the small archway shrinks your body, and stepping out through the door in miniature state restores your original form. "The appearance of this thing reminds me of a tunnel that could shrink people with a single pass..." "If I were you, I would immediately shut your mouth. Don't say things that are not meant to be said."

C: 眼熟的照片，印着四位传奇筑梦师的身影，你曾用它打开过「湛蓝爵士」的心锁。
E: A familiar photo bearing the images of four legendary Dreamweavers. You once used it to unlock Dr. Blues' heart.

C: 只属于你的特调，出自调饮师加拉赫之手。 「用这杯『黄金国』向你致意，逐梦客—— 「——敬金色的美梦。」
E: A special concoction tailored exclusively for you by the drinksmith Gallagher. "Raise this glass of 'El Dorado' in your honor, Dreamchaser —" "To golden dreams."

C: 在匹诺康尼，到处都可以找到这样的残片。 它们曾属于一颗颗破碎的心。 「黑色梦中我去安睡，梦中没有错与对。」
E: Shards like this can be found everywhere throughout Penacony. They once belonged to broken hearts. "In the realm of black dreams I sleep, where distinctions of right or wrong are buried deep."

C: 机械的重要组成部分，造型奇妙，目的性很强。 是人类一切发明创造的基石。 「同样的零件，螺丝咕姆能造出一整颗星球和机械生命体，你只能给我一只每天慢7秒的手表。」 「7秒已经非常好了！差一点点就符合天文台标准了！」
E: Essential components of all machines with strange shapes and specific functions. Without them, nothing can be made. "With the same parts, Screwllum can make entire planets and create cyborgs. But you can only make me a watch that runs seven seconds late every day." "Seven seconds is good enough! Just a hair later than the clocks they use in observatories."

C: 雪国冒险奇谭 最终章 天外之境 片段一
E: Tale of the Winterlands Final Chapter: Satelleden (I)

E: The Erudition — Nous

C: 派系总览
E: Faction Overview

C: 生命是一盏灯，开关就在自己手上。
E: Life is a lamp, and you hold its switch.

C: 游泳池在十四层，欢迎您前来体验溺水的感觉。
E: The swimming pool is on the fourteenth floor. You're welcome to experience the sensation of drowning.

C: 想不到吧？梦里的屏幕也会频闪。
E: Betcha didn't think that screens would flicker even in dreams.

C: 《以太战线》中的游戏道具，以太灵配备后可以获得特殊的强化能力。
E: A game item in Aetherium Wars. Aether Spirits will gain a special enhanced ability after equipping it.

C: 你意识深处的种种开拓经历，将其完整回忆后能为游戏提供灵感。
E: The trailblazing memories deep in your mind will provide inspiration to the game once you recall it in full.

C: 银河强手棋中作弊用的骰子。\n\n「当你有机会做出选择的时候，不要让自己后悔。」
E: A die used for cheating in Cosmodyssey.\n\n"When you have a chance to make a choice, make one that you know you won't regret."

C: 很久很久以前，「悲悼伶人」来到雅利洛-Ⅵ，他们不知晓筑城者的存在，只见到满目疮痍。在星球的上方，贡多拉静静飘浮。伶人们在军团发现之前离去，留下一曲无声的哀歌。 后来，贝洛伯格的筑城者们发现了一种美丽的石头，闪烁五彩光华。他们将这种石头混杂地髓建造了一座纪念碑。据说，这座纪念碑至今仍屹立在雅利洛-Ⅵ——贝洛伯格——克里珀堡的中心。 「即使我们失败了，这座纪念碑也会永世长存。未来或许会有新的人类来到这里，他将知道：我们曾经存在过。」
E: The Mourning Actors came to Jarilo-VI a long time ago. They were not aware of the Architects. The only sight they witnessed was the trail of destruction left by the Legion. They rowed their gondolas quietly above the planet and left before the Legion could notice them, leaving behind a silent eulogy. Time flew by, and the Belobog Architects found a type of beautiful stone that glimmered with bright colors. They mixed the stone with Geomarrow and built a monument, which some say still stands at the heart of Qlipoth Fort in the city of Belobog. "Even if we fail, this monument will stand for all eternity. Those who come after will find it and know that we once existed."

C: 铁钎上串着贝洛伯格各色珍味，以大火猛烤熟制而成。 基本无毒无害，是贝洛伯格的极地探险家们最易取得、也是最钟爱的美食。 「真好吃！但这都是什么肉？」 「你不会想知道的。」
E: The steel skewer has all sorts of Belobog delicacies on it, and is barbecued thoroughly using high heat. Its ingredients are mostly harmless. It is also the favorite food of Belobog's adventurers out in the wild, as well as being the most easily obtainable. "This tastes so good! What kinds of meat are in it, though?" "You wouldn't want to know."

C: 经过多道工艺加工而成的熟制食物，肉的来源很可能是猪。 自贝洛伯格肉联厂推出第一款红肠距今已经有百余年，可谓是真正的国民美食。 「红烩味、蒜香味、胡椒味…这个草莓味是什么东西？！」
E: Cooked food processed through multiple processes. The meat used is likely to be pork. It has been more than a hundred years since the Belobog Meat Factory launched the first red sausage, which can be described as a real national delicacy. "Red stew flavor, garlic flavor, pepper flavor... What is this strawberry flavor!?"

C: 据说最初灵感来自于设计者在某次星际航行时的见闻，如今这样的服饰在匹诺康尼的上层圈子里屡见不鲜。穿着者们似乎并不在意其文化意味，仅仅只是为了满足纯粹而无所顾忌的猎奇心理。\n\n「这绝非是值得提倡的行为。但没有人在乎。」
E: Originally inspired by the designer's interstellar voyages, these garments have become commonplace in the upper circles of Penacony. Those who wear them seem more driven by pure curiosity than cultural significance.\n\n"While promoting such behavior is not advisable, it seems no one cares."

C: 这是你在甜品社亲自制作的香蕉派…的量产款。如此一来，你便能与同学们分享你的独特品味——听说评价相当之高。 「这么有纪念价值的甜品，必须封存起来珍藏！」 「你倒是吃掉啊！」
E: This is the... mass-produced version of the banana pie you personally made at the Dessert Club. This way, you can share your unique taste with your classmates — it's said to have received quite high praise. "Such a commemorative dessert must be sealed away for safekeeping!" "Eat it, I dare you!"

C:
给我不认识的朋友：

想必您是为了在下的保险箱而来的，在此之前，我认为你应该对这间房子有所敬畏。

我是一名化外民，妻子生了重病，我花了很多钱在丹鼎司附近购置了这一处房产。我住在这里有很长一段时间了，遇到很多无法解释的现象。有时，像是有人在房间角落里低语；有时，我会感觉到房间温度突然下降；有时，我注意到家具会莫名其妙的移动。

长时间以来，我饱受神经衰弱的痛苦，最后我不堪重负。就在我准备挂牌卖房之后，我又受到中介的刁难，他问我「你是不是住在凶宅里，你的房子卖不了高价，不如低价卖给我」。我从来没跟他提到过「凶宅」的事情…我想您如果足够聪明，肯定已经明白「闹鬼」的原委了。

我是一个怪人，知道真相之后，我决定做一些报复行为——我把房产证留在保险箱里，最后没有将它卖给任何人。就让那个中介去猜好了，我会永远离开仙舟，他会永远得不到这间房。

如果你，我不认识的朋友想要打开保险箱。仔细研究一下我留下的谜题吧！

<color=#f29e38ff>「M」是<unbreak>71839</unbreak></color>
<color=#f29e38ff>「N」是<unbreak>7193</unbreak></color>
<color=#f29e38ff>「V」是<unbreak>183</unbreak></color>

保险箱的密码就在保险箱的便签上。输入正确的密码，打开后，你会看到我准备的惊喜。

<align="right">最诚挚的祝福，</align>
<align="right">雷诺</align>
E:
To my unfamiliar friend,

I trust that you've come for my safe. However, before that, I believe you should become aware of what had transpired within this residence.

As an outworlder burdened with a gravely ill wife, I invested a considerable sum to acquire this property near the Alchemy Commission. I have resided here for quite some time and have encountered numerous inexplicable phenomena. Whispers seem to emanate from the corners, an unexplainable chill occasionally fills the air, and my furniture would move on its own.

These occurrences led me to experience severe nervous breakdowns, succumbing to overwhelming despair. Just as I nearly listed my home for sale, a real estate agent tormented me too. He inquired, "Is your house haunted? A haunted property like this won't fetch a high price. Selling it to me at a reduced rate would be your best option." However, I never disclosed the haunted nature of my home to him... If you are perceptive enough, you might have discerned the true reason behind its "haunting."

I don't do things like other people. Upon discovering the truth, I resolved to seek retribution. I placed the deed within the safe, refraining from selling to anyone and letting that agent wander about the place for all eternity. I shall depart from the Xianzhou for good, ensuring that he never gains possession of this abode.

If you, my unfamiliar friend, wish to unlock the safe, you must solve the puzzle I have left behind!

<color=#f29e38ff>M is <unbreak>71839</unbreak>.</color>
<color=#f29e38ff>N is <unbreak>7193</unbreak>.</color>
<color=#f29e38ff>V is <unbreak>183</unbreak>.</color>

The combination to the safe is written on a note affixed to its surface. Enter the correct combination, and you shall discover the surprise I have prepared for you.

<align="right">Yours most sincerely,</align>
<align="right">Renault</align>

C:
<align="center"><size=28>手丨头</size></align>
<align="center"><size=28>脚丨身</size></align>

<align="center">若要推开过往之门，需先遵循献祭之仪。</align>
<align="center">无眼的雄狮发问，何为万物尺度？</align>
<align="center">宴席上智者答曰：是人之灵魂。</align>
<align="center">于是他蜷缩在祭坛，</align>
<align="center">环抱膝盖，头顶高窗，</align>
<align="center">双眼直视雄狮的尖牙，</align>
<align="center">将自己的灵魂献上…</align>

<align="center">用于劳作的<color=#dbc291ff>双手最先消失</color>，</align>
<align="center"><color=#dbc291ff>之后</color>是丈量大地的<color=#dbc291ff>双腿</color>；</align>
<align="center">直到维持身形的<color=#dbc291ff>躯干</color>破碎，</align>
<align="center">他的<color=#dbc291ff>头颅</color>仍在呢喃。</align>
E:
<align="center"><size=28>Hand | Head</size></align>
<align="center"><size=28>Leg | Torso</size></align>

<align="center">To open the gates of the past, one must first abide by the sacrificial rite.</align>
<align="center">The eyeless lion questions, what is the limit of everything in the world?</align>
<align="center">The wise at the banquet replies: the human soul.</align>
<align="center">And so, he curled up at the altar,</align>
<align="center">Hugging his knees with a high window over his head,</align>
<align="center">He stared at the lion's sharp fangs,</align>
<align="center">And offered his soul...</align>

<align="center">The <color=#dbc291ff>first to disappear were his hands</color> that worked tirelessly,</align>
<align="center"><color=#dbc291ff>Then</color>, his <color=#dbc291ff>legs</color> that measured the earth.</align>
<align="center">Until his <color=#dbc291ff>torso</color> that had held his body together shattered,</align>
<align="center">His <color=#dbc291ff>head</color> continued to murmur.</align>

C:
<align="center">逐火的脚下本无是无物。</align>
<align="center">但若求助于<color=#dbc291ff>高天</color>，</align>
<align="center">无物中亦可窥见前路。</align>
<align="center">勿要独自踏上那征途。</align>
E:
<align="center">The fireseeker stands upon nothing.</align>
<align="center">But if they call upon the <color=#dbc291ff>Heavens</color>,</align>
<align="center">Even emptiness may reveal a path.</align>
<align="center">Do not walk that path alone.</align>

C:
<align="center">在众泰坦列席的宴会上，扎格列斯扮作伶人，献上戏法，</align>
<align="center">它将<color=#dbc291ff>满溢的酒杯</color>端放于公正之秤，试图称量万水的重量；</align>
<align="center">可那酒杯不慎跌落，被<color=#dbc291ff>灰黯的手掌</color>托住；</align>
<align="center">它将<color=#dbc291ff>黄金的蝴蝶</color>绑缚在磐岩之脊，试图阻止情爱的流涌，</align>
<align="center">可那蝴蝶振翅高飞，投向<color=#dbc291ff>爱人</color>的怀抱；</align>
<align="center">它将<color=#dbc291ff>纷争的戈矛</color>投掷向万径之门，试图毁坏诸邦的联结，</align>
<align="center">可那戈矛穿越万千门径，竟回到<color=#dbc291ff>主人</color>之手。</align>
<align="center">众神恼怒于扎格列斯的无礼，便将诸般怒火降诸祂身，</align>
<align="center">看啊，是谁如今<color=#dbc291ff>身无分文</color>？竟是那满腹坏水的<color=#dbc291ff>诡计之神</color>。</align>
E:
<align="center">At a feast where all the Titans were present, Zagreus disguised themself as an actor and delivered tricks,</align>
<align="center">They placed a <color=#dbc291ff>full goblet</color> on the Scale of Justice, and attempted to weigh the huge volume of water.</align>
<align="center">But the goblet unintentionally fell, and was caught by a <color=#dbc291ff>dark, gray hand</color>.</align>
<align="center">They tied a <color=#dbc291ff>golden butterfly</color> to the Pillar of Stone, and attempted to stop the currents of love,</align>
<align="center">But the butterfly flapped its wings and took flight toward its <color=#dbc291ff>lover's</color> embrace.</align>
<align="center">They tossed the <color=#dbc291ff>spear of Strife</color> toward the Gate of Infinity, and attempted to ruin the alliance between states,</align>
<align="center">But the spear passed through the myriad passages and surprisingly returned to its <color=#dbc291ff>master</color>'s hand.</align>
<align="center">The gods were enraged by Zagreus's insolence, and descended their wrath upon them.</align>
<align="center">Look, who's the one that ended up <color=#dbc291ff>without a penny to their name</color>? It's the incorrigible <color=#dbc291ff>god of trickery</color>.</align>

C: 星神迷思的使徒，致力于编造、混淆、破坏、抹消银河中的历史。\n他们以「神秘」为唯一旨意，决心将宇宙笼罩在一片迷雾之中。

E: Using Imaginary attacks to trigger Weakness Break will apply Imprisonment.\nImprison delays enemy's action and reduces enemy SPD.

E: Arbitrators act according to the commands of the Aeon HooH, seeking a zero-sum state of the universe.\nThey are mistaken as gods in many worlds.

C: 罗浮持明族的圣地，承载着波月古海与建木仙迹的洞天。\n行将蜕生的罗浮持明族人都会来到此地，归于海中。
E: Sacred site of the Luofu's Vidyadhara, a delve holding the Lunarescent Depths and celestial traces of the Ambrosial Arbor.\nMembers of the Luofu Vidyadhara who are due for a hatching rebirth will come to this place and return themselves to the waters.

C: 星际和平公司「战略投资部」的高级干部，领导特殊债务纠察小组。\n年纪轻轻便已成为「石心十人」之一，基石为「催讨黄玉」。\n与搭档「账账」一同巡行银河，追究各类影响公司业务开展的债务纠纷。
E: Senior Manager of the Strategic Investment Department in the Interastral Peace Corporation, and leader of the Special Debts Picket Team.\nAlready a member of the "Ten Stonehearts" at a young age, Topaz's Cornerstone is the "topaz of debt retrieval."\nShe and Numby — her partner — are traversing the cosmos together, chasing down various debts and liabilities that negatively influence the IPC's commercial ventures.

C: 匹诺康尼的十二梦境之一，对应时间为「午夜」。\n这里的时间永远停留在0点，第二天不会到来，这一夜的狂欢也永远不会结束。
E: One of the twelve Dreamscapes in Penacony, and its time coincides with midnight.\nHere, the dream's time is forever stuck at <unbreak>00</unbreak>:<unbreak>00</unbreak>. Tomorrow will not come, and this night of revelry will never end.

C: 开幕时间：1月11日 黄金歌剧院 行政区阿丽萨大道 西22号 黄金歌剧院歌剧部门开年巨献 雪国往事 飘雪的深夜，新继位的大守护者在克里珀堡查阅历史典籍， 筑城者们建立贝洛伯格的故事总被一代代的市民们津津乐道， 但在这个深夜，他们从故纸堆中跃然在新任大守护者面前，叙说过去的故事。 从筑城伊始的决心，到不可预料的战役，历史上未曾记载的茫然与压力， 他们的喜怒哀乐，全在这个雪夜一一呈现！ 戈利尔奖最佳歌剧导演奖得主 费加洛 筹备三年的最新巨作 戈利尔奖最佳歌剧指挥奖得主 卡洛拉 诚挚指挥的告别作品 戈利尔奖最佳歌剧乐团奖得主 贝洛伯格爱乐乐团 倾力演奏 戈利尔奖最佳歌剧女歌唱家奖得主 莎拉 领衔出演 【制作人】米歇尔；【选角导演】瑞贝卡；【作曲家】安德鲁 【音效指导】萨宾娜；【造型指导】珍妮特；【舞美指导】泽维尔；【合唱团】欢笑合唱团 【服装造型】布兰登；【布景设计】威尔第；【灯光设计】玛瑞娜；【公关经理】芭芭拉 演员阵容 阿丽萨•兰德——莎拉 斯维特兰娜——菲奥娜 亚历珊德拉——安妮 法茵卡——特瑞丝 米哈伊——尼古拉斯 卡特琳娜——卡罗尔 新任大守护者——艾比 筑城者朵琳——克里斯汀 霍尔斯•歌德——韦伯 拉斯洛•朗道——莱明 演出曲目 序曲 《书页背后的故事》——新任大守护者 第一幕 《守护者们》——阿丽萨•兰德、斯维特兰娜、亚历珊德拉、法茵卡、米哈伊、卡特琳娜 《在贝洛伯格的城墙边》——阿丽萨•兰德、筑城者朵琳 《无畏之歌》——霍尔斯•歌德、拉斯洛•朗道 第二幕 《大守护者咏叹调》——斯维特兰娜 《所有学子的欢声》——亚历珊德拉 《美食、佳酿与稻谷》——法茵卡 第三幕 《平静的贝洛伯格》——米哈伊 《筑城进行曲组曲》——筑城者朵琳、合唱团 《重建者的二重唱》——卡特琳娜、筑城者朵琳 第四幕 《存护的力量在我心中生根》——阿丽萨•兰德、新任大守护者 《这是守护者的必经之路》——亚历珊德拉、法茵卡、米哈伊、卡特琳娜、新任大守护者 《一个忠告》——阿丽萨•兰德、斯维特兰娜、亚历珊德拉、法茵卡、米哈伊、卡特琳娜
E: Opening Date: January 11 The Golden Theater 22 West, Alisa Avenue, Administrative District A magnificent new year offering from the Golden Theater operatic division Once Upon a Snowsieged Country The new Supreme Guardian was checking historical records in the Qlipoth Fort on a snowy night. The history of the Architects constructing Belobog was passed down in every generation. However, on that night, these stories leapt off the page before the new Supreme Guardian to recount past tales. They recounted the resolve when the city was first founded, the unexpected wars, and the confusion and anxiety not recorded in history. Their happiness and troubles were all displayed on this snowy night! Goliards Award for Best Opera DirectorFigaro The latest work, three years in the making Goliards Award for Best Opera ConductorCarola A farewell piece from the sincere conductor Goliards Award for Best Opera OrchestraThe Belobog Philharmonic Promises a Grand Performance Goliard Award for Best Female Opera Singer Sara In the Leading Role Producer: Michel. Casting Director: Rebecca. Composer: Andrew. Sound Director: Sabrina. Artistic Director: Janet. Choreographer: Xavier. Choir: The Smile Choir Costume Design: Brandon. Set Designer: Verdi. Lighting: Marina. Public Relationships: Barbara. C: 您知道吗？80%以上的仙舟人，会在800岁以后遭遇魔阴身的困扰！ 您知道吗？50%以上的仙舟人，没办法意识清醒地渡过900岁生日！ 您知道吗？90%以上的仙舟人，还不知道冥想遗忘疗法可以拯救100%仙舟人的晚年生活！ 魔阴身产生的根本原因，在于无意义记忆的过度累积。 仔细想想吧，您真的需要记住儿时玩伴的名字吗？您真的需要记住过去不愉快的工作经历吗？您真的需要记住每一段失败的恋情吗？ 而这些并不被您需要的记忆，正是魔阴身的罪魁祸首！ 科学研究表明，人的大脑有60%的功能是自己无法控制的，譬如心跳、呼吸、睡眠、代谢，以及记忆与遗忘！ 但事实上，冥想遗忘疗法的传承人康图医士已经向我们证明了，记忆与遗忘是完全可以人为控制的！ 康图医士今年已经3176岁了，他却依然思路敏捷，从善如流。 他对我们这样说： 「我的家族每一代都可以摆脱魔阴身，清醒地活上几千年。这是因为我家祖传的冥想法。」 「家中长辈一直告诫我，绝不可将此中秘密传授给世人。如果仙舟人个个享有万年之寿，并不是什么好事。」 「可是，在目睹了仙舟人遭遇的痛苦之后，我做了一个违背祖宗的决定！」 「现在，只要购买我开发的冥想遗忘治疗仪，就可以轻松忘记所有无用的回忆，还您一个宁静祥和的大脑！」 患者采访 文锦（2434岁）：「自从用了冥想遗忘治疗仪，我忘记了自己学生时代所有尴尬的回忆！不但忘记自己曾经被满脸麻子的恶霸同学胖揍，还忘记了自己喜欢的女孩被低年级学弟告白成功！我全忘记了！心情愉快可也是防止魔阴身的必要条件呀！」 思松（1453岁）：「随着年龄变大，我也开始觉得事事力不从心了…但自从用了冥想遗忘治疗仪，我忘记了那些黄金时代的往事，却觉得自己最为辉煌的时代又回来了！冥想遗忘治疗仪，使我重回人生巅峰！」 花怡（1800岁）：「很多人都说，冥想遗忘治疗仪一定是假的，我的年龄也一定是假的。对于这种质疑，我只想说，请你买一台冥想遗忘治疗仪，亲自试试看！到时候，你的大脑会更清醒，也会更明白自己的质疑有多么愚蠢！」 好消息！好消息！冥想遗忘疗法正在与十王司洽谈合作，成为首批「仙舟魔阴身拯救工程」指定产品！届时，仙舟人将有机会彻底摆脱魔阴困扰，享受健康的永生！ 现在，为回馈广大消费者，康图医士推出限时抢鲜套餐，让您有机会在冥想遗忘治疗仪进入千家万户之前，就体验到它超凡的效果！ 正所谓早买早享受、晚买悔一生，立刻拿起手中的玉兆开始订购吧！前一百名拨入热线的幸运顾客，还将获得宝饵堂米面粮油养生大礼包！ 机不可失，时不再来！ 请认准：冥想遗忘治疗仪！健康长生，直到永恒！
E: Did you know that over 80% of Xianzhou residents over the age of 800 will suffer from being mara-struck? Did you know that over 50% of Xianzhou residents fail to celebrate their 900th birthday in a conscious state? Did you know that fewer than 10% of Xianzhou residents are aware that the amnesic meditation therapy can cure senescence 100% of the time? The root cause behind mara-struck is the excessive collection of meaningless memories. Think about it — Do you really need to remember the names of your childhood buddies? Do you really need to remember dismal work experiences? Do you really need to remember every failed relationship? All of these unnecessary memories are the main culprits behind being mara-struck! Scientific research shows that 60% of the human brain's functions are outside of personal control, such as having a heartbeat, breathing, sleeping, metabolism, and memory management! However, Dr. Kang Tu, whose family has possessed the secret of the amnesic meditation therapy for generations, has proved to us that the removal of memories can be manually controlled! Dr. Kang Tu is 3176 years old, but is still agile of mind and open to new ideas. The doctor told us: "Every generation of my family has avoided being mara-struck and lived with a clear head for thousands of years — all due to the meditation practices passed down through my family." "My elders always warned me not to pass on this secret to the world. It would not be good if all of Xianzhou lived forever." "However, after witnessing so much pain here, I've decided to go against my ancestors' wishes!" "Now, all you need to do is buy my amnesic meditation therapy device, and you'll easily forget all the useless memories of yours — and gain a brain full of peace and quiet!" Patient Interviews Wenjin (2434 years old): "Ever since I started using the amnesic meditation therapy device, I've forgotten all of my awkward school memories! I forgot getting beaten up by that poxy bully, and forgot how the girl I liked back at school ended up dating my junior... I've forgotten them all! A happy demeanor is how to ward off the ravages of mara!" Sisong (1453 years old): "I started feeling powerless in my daily life as I got older... But since I started using amnesic meditation therapy device, I've forgotten those halcyon days of my youth — so I feel I'm living out my golden years now! The amnesic meditation therapy device has brought me back to peak condition!" Huayi (1800 years old): "Lots of people say the amnesic meditation therapy device has got to be fake, and that I fudge my age. All I have say to the doubters and the haters is — buy a device and try it yourself! Your mind will be clearer, and you'll realize how foolish your doubts were!" Good news! Good news! The amnesic meditation therapy device is in negotiations with the Ten-Lords Commission to become the first official product of the Xianzhou Mara-Struck Rescue Project! When that happens, you'll all have the chance to shake free from the shackles of mara and enjoy a healthy, eternal life! Now, to give something back to our customers, Dr. Kang Tu has launched a time-limited pre-order pack. You can have the opportunity to experience the extraordinary effects of amnesic meditation therapy device before it makes it into thousands of Xianzhou households! As the saying goes, first in, first served. Don't miss out! Pick up your jade abacus and place that order, now! The first hundred lucky customers will also score a nutritious bundle of grains, flour, rice, and cooking oils from NutriTreasures! Don't miss out! It's now or never! Please look out for: amnesic meditation therapy devices. Stay healthy forever!

C: 晴柔 「别名」 亦称浮羊、卷娄、天膻根。 「形貌」 盘角，无尾，体毛柔顺，质地松软。 「习性」 群居，性温和。形如绒球，遇害，则纳气入腹中气囊，通体膨胀，漂浮以避捕食者也。成群结队，扶摇上行，若悠游行旅之客。 「传说」 古仙舟人饲之，以其皮毛材料用。因其群而聚之，时人每以长绳系头羊。今见其有高弹性之皮革，亦有坚实耐用之气囊，均可用之于星槎。天舶司规碧空之牧场饲晴柔，使悠哉自由。 「性味」 羊肉：甘、大热、无毒。 羊乳：甘、温、无毒。 羊角：咸、温、无毒。 「食效」 羊肉：开胃健脾，暖中祛寒。 羊乳：温润肝肺，补虚养血。 羊角：平心熄风、清肝明目。 「荐方」 逡巡鲜酱：浮羊肉洗净作脔，置砂锅内，用星葱、芋椒、建杏捣碎腌制。活火煮至骨肉糜烂，取翔鲟鱼肉切片研磨成泥，鲜美无比。 天赐绯羊：选龙泉老窖中的绯曲煮肉，腌制卷紧，以渊境鳞石镇之，深入酒骨淹透，方能取出，切如纸薄乃进。 批注： 笔记中管理羊群的方式过于陈旧，现在已经没有长绳系羊的做法了。
E: Gentle Halcyon [Other Names] Also known as Puffergoat, Floating Ram, and Heaven's Mutton [Appearance] Curled horns, no tail, soft and fluffy coat. [Behavior] A species that lives in flocks and has a gentle demeanor. Shaped like a fluff ball, this animal inhales air into an internal air sac when in danger, inflating its whole body to float upward away from predators. They fly up in large groups, as if they are sightseers. [Legend] The Xianzhou people raised this animal for its wool. As they live in flocks, keepers usually lasso the head sheep. We now know that leather from their skin is very elastic, and their air sac is strong and durable, making all parts of the animal useful for starskiff production. Gentle halcyons raised at the sky farms regulated by the Sky-Faring Commission live carefree lives. [Flavor] Mutton: Sweet, very warm, and non-toxic. Milk: Sweet, warming, and non-toxic. Horn: Salty, warming, and non-toxic. [Effects] Mutton: Good for the spleen, warming and cooling the internal organs. Milk: Warms the liver and lungs, nourishes weaker constitutions, and replenishes blood. Horn: Relieves fevers, clears the liver, and brightens the eyes. [Recommended Recipes] Lingering Sauce: Wash and carve the Puffergoat into small cubes and place into a casserole. Mash star leek, taro peppers, and ambrosial apricots together into a marinade for the mutton. Simmer over an open fire until the meat disintegrates. Add sliced sturgeon, then grind into a paste for a delicious condiment. Divinely Gifted Crimson Lamb: Use the Crimson Melodies wine from the Dragon Spring Brew distillery to cook the mutton. Marinate the mutton and roll it up tightly, then immerse it into the wine, using a Scalegorge stone to weigh it down. Allow the mutton to soak until the liquor has permeated into the bones, then cut the meat into slices as thin as paper. Note: The flock management techniques recorded are rather old-fashioned, and the lasso method has now been lost to the ages.

C: （碑文记录信息有损。） 【以上从阙】 【阙文】（推测为龙师涛然发言）…龙尊…【阙文】…祖宗之法…【阙文】…岂不可笑！ 【阙文】（推测为龙师雪浦发言）…大乱之后，持明一族在罗浮地位低无可低，若不加修补示好，势必会进一步破坏我等与仙舟人的盟谊。而这无疑是各位龙师大人所不乐见的，我就此提议，罗浮持明当暂时摒弃龙尊主政，而改以龙师议政制，以保障【阙文】 龙师涛然曰：雪浦大人，你身为丹枫成长阶段的业师之一，他如今所造祸事与你们这些师长的放纵密不可分。丹枫被囚，是他一人之过，绝无累及「龙尊传承」的理由。我再说一遍，祖宗成法，不容变更。从丹枫身上取走化龙妙法和重渊珠，延续龙脉才是我们这群人万世不易的职责。你妄言龙师议政，其心可诛！ 龙师风浣曰：有些人心里的小算盘，似乎没人敢点破。那只能让我来点破了。龙师议会原本就是龙尊之位空缺或龙尊难以主政时的权宜之计，但我看雪浦的意思很明确，她想趁着【阙文】断绝的机会，用龙师议会彻底取代龙尊的位置。 龙师雪浦曰：我警告你，不要血口喷人。 龙师风浣曰：你误会了。我支持你的看法。龙尊主政本就是过时的制度，将权力交由一位天选之子，因此造成的悲剧在吾族历史上不绝其书。而今丹枫被十王司羁押，这不正是一个还政于民的好机会吗？还是说你们这班老东西已经当惯了臣子，学不会怎么自己做自己的主了吗？ 众龙师哗然之声，叫骂争吵之声，不记录在案。 【阙文】（无法推测发言者身份）…在此处叫骂，成何体统！【阙文】…最好想清楚，这会决定我们未来数千年的命运。 【以下从阙】

C: （二） 在美梦小镇的巷尾角落，哈努兄弟发现了一台奇怪的电视机。 哈努兄弟疑惑地打量着这台电视机。根据他的直觉，这肯定是折纸小鸟和猫头鹰老师的东西——只有他们才会摆弄这么复杂的机器，比起看电视，小镇的居民肯定更喜欢在戏台下听音符小姐唱歌。 哈努兄弟想了想，决定先把这台电视机还给猫头鹰老师。但当他碰到电视机的一瞬间，一股奇怪的电波涌入了他的身体。哈努兄弟意识到大事不妙，但为时已晚，随着邪恶粗犷的笑声，哈努兄弟眼前的景色扭曲起来…… 「哈哈哈哈哈，哈努兄弟，你中计了！我就知道你会忍不住碰这个东西！」 「■■■！所有『鳄鱼』都在往你的方向游！」 「别再前进了，这是陷阱！」 当哈努兄弟重新看清眼前的世界，他发现天突然阴了下来，原本挂在天上的太阳瞬间无影无踪……不对，是有什么东西遮蔽了太阳！ 哈努兄弟抬头一看，一张血盆大口正对着他——那是美梦小镇最大的敌人，石头老板！ 石头老板的确很高大，但它从未变得如此高大，甚至能一脚踩扁哈努兄弟。石头老板张开巨口扑了过来，但身形矫健的哈努兄弟一个翻滚就躲过了这次偷袭，石头老板「哎哟」一声摔在了地上。 剧烈的爆炸、碰撞声 「可恶的哈努兄弟！你给我等着！」 哈努兄弟头也不回地奔跑着。即便他敏锐如狼，一时间也搞不清楚现在的状况：为什么石头老板会变得如此巨大？为什么周围的景色如此陌生？难道自己还在石头老板的陷阱里吗？ 这一切到底是怎么了？ 一声痛苦的*哼*。
E: Chapter Two Hanu stumbled across a peculiar television in the corner of a street in Dreamville. Hanu sized up the television suspiciously. His intuition told him that it must belong to the Origami Birds and Professor Owl, the only candidates who would tinker with such a complicated machine. Compared to watching TV, the other townspeople prefer enjoying Miss Note's performance at the theater. Hanu decided to return the television to Professor Owl after some consideration. However, a strange wave of electricity surged through his body the moment he touched the television. He realized that something was terribly wrong, but it was all too late. Following a sinister and boorish laughter, the scenery before Hanu started to distort... "Hahahaha, Hanu, you took the bait! I knew you couldn't stop yourself from touching that thing!" "■■■! All the 'crocodiles' will be swimming your way!" "Stop going any further! This is a trap!" When Hanu's vision cleared up, he noticed that the sky has suddenly turned overcast. The sun that was shining brightly moments before was nowhere to be seen... Wait a minute. Something is covering the sun! He looked up and finds himself coming face-to-face with a gaping mouth. It belongs to the greatest nemesis of Dreamville: Boss Stone! Boss Stone is very tall indeed, but he's never been so huge that he can easily crush Hanu with his foot. Boss Stone, with his mouth wide open, lunged at Hanu, but Hanu was agile enough to dodge the sneak attack with a roll. With a groan, Boss Stone fell to the ground. (Thunderous sounds of explosions and collisions) "Despicable Hanu! Just you wait!" Hanu ran off without turning back. Even though he was as agile as a wolf, he still found himself bewildered by the situation. How come Boss Stone had become so enormous? Why did the surroundings look so foreign to him? Could he be still inside the trap set by Boss Stone? What on earth is going on? An agonizing grunt.

C:
呦吼——各位读者老爷们！许久不见，甚是想念！上回书说道…<s>诶呀上次编了什么我也想不起来了算了算了。</s>总之，你是否早已经厌倦了无聊的时讯和无趣的消遣？你是否感到即便身处美梦依旧不知餍足？你是否渴求更多新鲜出炉的乐子？很好，我已经听到你们雀跃期待的心声了——那么今天就由我，酒馆知名记者迈尔斯，带老爷们走近隐藏在黄金泡沫背后的真相吧！

<size=28>#谨防骗局！元年苏乐达竟是虚假营销！</size>
不会吧不会吧，难不成现在还有人挤破了脑袋，花高价去抢所谓的「元年苏乐达」？
诶呦，醒醒吧！阿哈在阿基维利的列车智库里都没看到过什么「梦见草」！
说什么「绝迹的梦见草在梦境世界中重见天日」、「曾一度消亡的美味现已重见天日」，不会真有傻子相信吧？
老爷们可千万擦亮眼，别被这种广告宣传给忽悠瘸了啊！

<size=28>#名不副实！苏乐达创始人塌房！</size>
众所周知，苏乐达的创始人苏萨是个监狱星的厨子！
众所不周知，这个厨子既不是「信奉希佩的大善人」，也没有高超的厨艺，进监狱还是因为走私忆质！
而最重要的，诶呦——他甚至不是爆炸头！
本记者对此事件进行了详细的跟踪调查：
赞美伟大的监狱星，只在那里人们才会因为生活所迫，用昂贵的忆质去交换劣质的怪味糖水！
赞美花哨的广告词，只有这样人们才会被资本家蒙骗，对那些虚构史学家的鬼把戏信以为真！

<size=28>#绯闻曝光！老奥帝与艾迪恩秘密私会！</size>
首先声明：我们假面愚者尊重一切个人取向与癖好。
日前有酒馆成员目击苜蓿草家主老奥帝携艾迪恩先生共同秘密前往晖长石号，疑似商业密谈。
就此事件，本记者对家族成员进行了随机采访——
一位路过的无辜橡木表示：「苜蓿草那帮人又打算搞什么幺蛾子？」
一位看热闹不嫌事大的鸢尾花表示：「老奥帝是苜蓿草，艾迪恩也是苜蓿草。这俩必定有染。」
一位不愿透露身份的苜蓿草高管表示：「无可奉告。」
一位态度不太好的猎犬表示：「你再在梦里胡说八道、问些不该问的，就把你拆散了喂给忆域迷因。」

本期放送就到这里，敬请期待更多新鲜爆料！
E:
Hey there, my dear readers! It's been a while, and I miss you all! In our last edition, we talked about... <s>Well, honestly, I can't remember what nonsense I made up last time. So let's just forget about it. </s>Anyways, are you sick and tired of boring news and lame entertainment? Do you find yourself unsatisfied even in your wildest dreams? Are you craving something more exciting and fun? Well, guess what? Today, the one and only Miles, the ultimate Tavern reporter, is here to lead you to the truth behind the golden bubbles!

<size=28>#SCAM alert! Epochal SoulGlad is nothing but false marketing!</size>
Like, seriously? Can you believe there are people out there willing to pay a fortune and willing to kill for this so-called Epochal SoulGlad?
Wake up, people! Aha hasn't seen anything like "Dreamleaf" even in Akivili's data bank on the Express!
I mean, come on! Who's gonna buy into stories like "the extinct Dreamleaf magically revived in the Dreamscape" or "a once-lost delicacy now making a comeback"?
Don't be fooled by these slick ads, my dear readers!

<size=28>#It's ALL FAKE! SoulGlad's founder isn't what he seems!</size>
I believe everyone knows that the founder of SoulGlad, Sousa, used to be a chef on the prison planet!
But here's the real deal: He wasn't a saintly benefactor believing in Xipe or a culinary genius. Nope, he got himself locked up for smuggling memoria!
And most important of all! Guess what? He didn't even have fluffy hair at all!
I've done a ton of digging on this rumor, trust me.
Praise the illustrious prison planet, the only place where they trade expensive memoria for watered-down sugary drinks!
Praise all the fancy wordplay! It's the only way how those sneaky capitalists and History Fictionologists trick us into blindly believing their nonsense!

<size=28>#SECRET relationship! Old Oti and Mr. Aideen's mysterious private rendezvous!</size>
Disclaimer: We Masked Fools totally respect everyone's orientations and desires.
Recently, some Tavern staff caught Old Oti, the head of the Alfalfa Family, and Mr. Aideen sneaking off together to Radiant Feldspar. Looks like a cozy little private meeting.
I went around and asked some Family members about it.
A passer-by from the Oak Family commented, "What shady stuff is the Alfalfa Family up to this time?"
An excited member from the Iris Flower commented, "Oh, there's definitely something spicy going on between Old Oti and Mr. Aideen. They're both Alfalfa peeps, after all."
An anonymous senior member from the Alfalfa Family refused to give any responses regarding this incident.
And a not-so-friendly Bloodhound Family member warned, "Keep spreading this nonsense and asking unwanted questions, and I'll feed you to those Memory Zone Memes."

That's a wrap for this issue! Stay tuned for more fresh scoops coming your way!

C: 案件编号： 1000HEZ058 处理人 学生法庭-学生事务法庭-裁判官 艾蕾娜 处理结果： 内容不实，驳回上诉 学生法庭回复内容： 亲爱的赫尔兹同学： 你好， 非常感谢你对学生法庭的信任与耐心。首先，我们对前57次未回复深表歉意，但也请允许我们在此说明缘由：你的请愿书中包含大量未经证实或已被证伪的信息，不符合《学生法庭请愿公约》，因此我们拒绝受理。 鉴于近期球笼赛事件与「同舟会」阴谋论在校园内讨论度增加，已为相关同学、教职人员带来不必要的困扰，学生法庭决定借此机会公布相关事件的调查结果： 1、经过调查，普蕾玛同学于上月获得的「学院首席车手」参赛资格符合折纸大学校球笼赛（即格拉克斯杯）的参赛准则，并不存在任何形式的违规行为。 2、经过多方核查，目前校方未发现任何证据指向「同舟会」存在的事实。经追溯后发现这一说法最早出现在《匹诺康尼未解之谜》第23期刊登的文章——《16位家主全是同舟会成员？神秘组织的真正目的到底是什么？》。此刊物长期存在大量不实信息，学生法庭倾向视「同舟会」理论为典型阴谋论。 约██年前，格拉克斯校长引入了校园球笼竞速赛，望以赛事促进学院间的交流与友谊，让学生们在竞争中追求卓越。多年来，校球笼赛组委会一直坚持格拉克斯校长的理念，赛事的天平从未倾斜向任何学生、学院或组织。赛事至今已举办数百届，格拉克斯杯仍被视为大学球笼竞赛内的至高荣耀，想必也说明了校内师生对其公正性的高度认可。 此外，跨学院合作在校球笼赛历史上并不罕见，契合格拉克斯校长创办此赛事的初心。我们欢迎广大师生继续监督不公正行为的发生，但也恳请各位对无愧体育竞技精神的选手予以基本尊重。 学生事务法庭 裁判官 艾蕾娜 折纸大学学生法庭对所有判决结果持有最终解释权
E: Case ID: 1000HEZ058 Judge Magistrate Irena, Student Affairs Court, Student Court Verdict: Rejected as unsubstantiated Response from the Student Court: Dear Hertz, I trust this message reaches you well. Thank you for your ongoing trust and patience with the Student Court. Regrettably, we must acknowledge that your previous 57 petitions did not receive replies. However, please allow us to explain this oversight: Your petitions contain a large amount of inaccurate or unsubstantiated information, which contradicted the standards outlined in the Student Court Petition Convention, leading to them being rejected by our courtroom. The recent upsurge in discussions surrounding the Spheroid Race and the Innasemboat conspiracy theory on campus has caused unnecessary concern among students and academy staff. We are taking this opportunity to disclose the outcomes of our investigations into these matters. 1. Our investigations indicate that Prema's achievement of the "Paperfold University Top Driver" title last month aligns with our regulations for the Paperfold University Sphroid Race (a.k.a. The Glaux Cup), with no violations identified. 2. Following thorough investigations, no evidence substantiating the existence of Innasemboat has been found by the university. Further exploration revealed that the concept was first mentioned in an article titled Sixteen Family Heads Identified as Innasemboat Members: Unveiling the Enigmatic Club's Purpose in the magazine Penacony Unsolved Mysteries, Vol 23. This magazine is known for continuously spreading misinformation extensively, and the Student Court is of the mind to view the Innasemboat theory as a groundless conspiracy theory. Approximately ██ years ago, Dean Glaux introduced the Spheroid Race to the university to promote inter-academy communication and friendship and enable students to chase after excellence via competitive sports. Over the years, the Spheroid Race Committee has remained dedicated to Dean Glaux's vision, ensuring that the tournament upholds fairness without favoritism toward any student, academy, or organization. With hundreds of tournaments held to date, the Glaux Cup retains its prestige as the apex of collegiate Spheroid competition, which stands as proof of its universally recognized equitable nature by both students and faculty on campus. Additionally, cooperation between academies has been a common practice throughout the history of the Spheroid Race, aligning with Dean Glaux's original intentions for the event. While we advocate for students to remain vigilant against unfair practices, we call upon all to show respect for all participants who exemplify the spirit of sportsmanship. Magistrate Irena, Student Affairs Court The Paperfold University Student Court reserves the right for the final interpretation in rendering judgments.

C:
雨，自天空落下，汇聚成河，复归大海。既然如此，漫天的雨滴，是属于艾格勒的天空，还是法吉娜的海洋？作为辩论场中最经久不衰的主题之一，这个问题向来缺乏定论。

关于「雨」的归属，最为我们所熟知的，当属原初论。法吉娜的祭司们引经据典，从泰坦诞生的创世史诗中找来论据。当值启蒙世，艾格勒与法吉娜自磐岩之脊，吉奥里亚的呼吸中诞生，自那时起，海洋与大地便永恒对立。受吉奥里亚憎恶的法吉娜无法落入大地，便在天地间遨游，化作永恒不息的大雨，直到塔兰顿的介入，才在地上创造出名为海洋的酿造池。故而，雨从一开始就是受法吉娜管辖的事物。

对于这一论调，神悟树庭的学者们提了果实说作为驳斥。将雨视为法吉娜的眷属，无非出自一种观点，也即，翁法罗斯所有的水，从杯中的佳酿到谷中的河流，都是那位满溢之杯神体的一部分。即使雨滴会从云中落下，也不过是它在狂醉中，误入了艾格勒的神国，又被震怒的它用雷枪赶出天空而已。

可若以此推论，含有水的事物都是法吉娜的一部分，成熟的果实中也带有可口的汁液，那么，树上的果实也是法吉娜的眷属。但就连悬锋城的三岁孩童都知道，大地上的果实皆为裂分之枝的馈赠。因此，雨是法吉娜的眷属一说，显然自相矛盾。

雨在天空是艾格勒的一部分，被草木汲取，则成为瑟希斯的子嗣。倘若任何水体都是法吉娜的一部分，那它必然要为吞噬大地的黑潮承担责任。

在众多争议当中，自不乏诡辩的声音。活跃于纷争世初期的智者戈尔狄克斯，就曾在一场辩论中公开宣称，雨应当是墨涅塔的神体。

世人在雨中，仍能得见天空、大地与海洋，但从未有人见过雨中的蝴蝶飞舞，当蝴蝶出现时，雨便不出现，当雨出现时，蝴蝶则消失无踪。可以推论——雨和蝴蝶，实为双生一体。而黄金的蝴蝶，正是墨涅塔的象征。大雨平等地击打地上所有的存在，令人类和百兽因寒冷伤病，但唯独滋养花草树木，这些受瑟希斯庇佑的生灵。这恰恰从反向证明了，身为瑟希斯伴侣的墨涅塔，正是以雨的姿态，润泽了恋人的身体。

戈尔狄克斯将在场的诸多智者辩得哑口无言，他的命运也因此走上歧路。在连续被九个城邦先后以渎神的罪名流放后，傲慢的智者倒在海边，死在了一场大雨里。据称，有归航的渔民看见无数的海妖卷起巨浪，用潮水接走了已死的戈尔狄克斯。他们说，法吉娜被这位恃才傲物的智者所激怒，将他的灵魂化作一条鱼，让智者永远在身边以笑话取悦自己。

既然世界仍在正常运行，管理世界的众多泰坦，必然是权职分明。但我们的智慧仍不及森林中的一片落叶，故而才无法看到构成翁法罗斯的真理。唯有认清自己的无知，以谦逊的姿态对待疑问，才能进一步接近瑟希斯的理性。戈尔狄克斯的结局，还望后人谨记。
E:
Rain falls from the sky. It gathers into rivers and flows into the sea. If that is the case, then do the sky-blotting raindrops belong to Aquila's sky or Phagousa's ocean? As one of the most enduring topics in the debates at the forum, this question has yet to have a conclusive answer.

Regarding the ownership of rain, the theory that we are most familiar with is the primordial theory. Phagousa's priests cite the classics, finding attribution from the creation epics of the Titans' origins. During the Era Luminosa, Aquila and Phagousa spawned from the Pillar of Stone, born of Georios' breath. From that moment on, the ocean and earth have been locked in eternal odds. Phagousa, despised by Georios, could not descend upon the earth. Thus, they wandered between heaven and earth, turning into inextinguishable rain. It wasn't till Talanton's intervention that the brewing pool named Ocean was created on this land. Thus, from the beginning, the rain was a phenomenon that was under Phagousa's realm of governance.

In response to this argument, scholars of the Grove of Epiphany put forth the Fruit Thesis as a counter-argument. To view the rain as Phagousa's kin was but one perspective — all of Amphoreus' water, from the finest wine in a cup to the rivers in the valley, are all part of the Chalice of Plenty's divine corpus. Even if raindrops would fall from the clouds, it was because they had mistakenly entered Aquila's divine realm in a drunken stupor, and find themselves driven out from the skies by Aquila's enraged, thundering lance.

With this reasoning, any matter containing water would be part of Phagousa. Ripened fruits also contain tasty juices, therefore the fruits on trees were also part of Phagousa. However, even a three-year-old child from Castrum Kremnos would know that the fruits of the earth are gifts from the Bough of Rift. Thus, the proposition that rain is part of Phagousa is evidently highly contradictory.

The rain in the sky was a part of Aquila, absorbed by flora, thus becoming the offspring of Cerces. If any body of water is a part of Phagousa, that Titan would even have to take responsibility for the black tide devouring the world.

Among the many debates, there was no shortage of sophistry. Gordicus, a sage active during the beginning of Era Bellica, once declared in a public debate that rain should be a part of Mnestia's divine being.

In the rain, people can still see the sky, the earth, and the ocean, but none have seen butterflies fluttering in the rain. When butterflies appear, the rain does not. When rain appears, butterflies vanish without a trace. One could posit that rain and butterflies were two halves of a whole, and that the golden butterfly symbolized Mnestia. The rain equally patters down on all that exists, causing cold and illness in both humans and beasts, but it only nourishes flora — lifeforms protected by Cerces. This inversely also proves that Mnestia, as Cerces' partner, nourishes their lover's body in the form of rain.

Gordicus' eloquence left many sages at the forum without retort. His destiny also took a turn with this event. After being exiled on successive charges of blasphemy by nine city-states, the proud sage fell by the coast and died in a huge downpour. It is said that returning fishermen saw countless sirens roiling up huge waves, carrying the lifeless Gordicus away with them in the tide. They said that Phagousa was angered by this prideful sage, and turned his soul into a fish, keeping him by their side as a jester for all eternity.

Since the world still functions normally, the roles of the many Titans governing it must be distinct. However, our wisdom is less than that of even a leaf in a forest — it is only natural that we cannot fathom the truth that constitutes Amphoreus. Only those who acknowledge their own ignorance and approach questions with humility can inch towards Cerces' logic. Gordicus' tale serves as a cautionary reminder for future generations.

C:
委托人：信徒泽洛

待寻之物：其真爱所在处

门径导引：雅努萨波利斯城内，<unbreak>177</unbreak>号房屋。
E:
Client: Disciple Zelos

Item Sought: The place where true love dwells

Path Guidance: In Janusopolis, at Dwelling <unbreak>177</unbreak>.

C:
第一日
两件事，一好一坏。
好消息是，空天都市真的存在。凭这个发现，我们两个回去之后肯定能晋升成祭司！
坏消息是，我们回不去，哈哈。

第三日
我们布置了一堆密径门，也对这个要塞的结构有了初步认知。
那群野蛮的拉冬人，居然和昏光庭院的医师阁下们一样，出身如此高贵？我还是不愿相信。

第五日
找到了一些天空住民遗留的文献，有大量祭祀活动相关的记载。形式细则虽依种族出身有差异，但整体具有通性——一言以蔽之，从天上往下扔东西。
回想曾经听闻的天降粮雨、苍空兵刃等坊间故事传闻，不得不考虑与天空祭仪的关联性。

第八日
我见过狮子，我也听过鸟叫，但没听过狮子学鸟叫。
还有，神驹是木质，不是真的马，别老盯着这边看，我害怕！

第九日
被天马追，行李全掉下去了。
储粮见底，但这铁石要塞根本没有一点生机，饿了要怎么办呢？

第十日
找到办法了。

第十五日
同袍无法忍受天上岁月的折磨，将神识与他的神驹融为了一体。
这是他的选择，我无力干涉。

第十七日
对天空之民历史的调查有了重大进展——阳雷骑士与艾格勒禁忌传说·完整版！
虽然文笔像是写给年轻人看的，还画着渎神的插画，但没关系，史学家们本来就该如孩童般渴求知识。
——应该不会真的只是古人的漫画书吧？

……

第二四日
难以缓解的无聊感。我把周围搜集到的小玩意找了个箱子装一起，摆在神驹的停驻处。
以后说不准会有人发现它们。
我想明白了，迷宫里的宝箱该不会都是这么来的吧？

……

第三三日
大祭司来救我了！赞美雅努斯！！
同袍已成为神驹的一部分，很遗憾，我流下了泪水，但无济于事。
我将此行最重要的发现载于此处，作为结语，愿为后人尽微薄之力。


——神驹的木板，可以充饥，味道还行。
E:
Day 1
Two matters to report, one good and one bad.
The good news is that the city in the sky truly exists. This discovery alone would ensure our promotion to priests upon our return!
The bad news is that we can't go back, haha.

Day 3
We've installed numerous secret passages and gained a preliminary understanding of this fortress's structure.
To think those barbaric Ladonians share the same noble lineage as the esteemed healers of the Twilight Courtyard? I still find this hard to believe.

Day 5
We discovered documents left by sky dwellers with extensive records of ceremonial activities. While specific forms vary by racial origin, they share a common characteristic — put simply, throwing things down from the sky.
Thinking back to folk tales about food raining from the sky and weapons falling from above, one must consider their connection to these sky rituals.

Day 8
I've seen lions and heard birds sing, but never a lion imitating bird calls.
Also, the divine foal is made of wood, not a real horse — so please stop staring at me like that, it's creepy!

Day 9
Pursued by a pegasus, lost all our supplies.
Our provisions are nearly depleted, yet this iron-stone fortress shows not a single sign of life. What will we do when hunger truly strikes?

Day <unbreak>10</unbreak>
Found a solution.

Day <unbreak>15</unbreak>
My companion could no longer endure the torment of sky-bound existence and merged his soul essence with the divine foal.
This was his choice. I was powerless to intervene.

Day <unbreak>17</unbreak>
Major breakthrough in our investigation of Skyfolk history — the complete version of the forbidden legend of the Daythunder Knight and Aquila!
Though written in a style apparently aimed at younger readers and featuring sacrilegious illustrations, it matters not. Historians should pursue knowledge with childlike eagerness.
 — Surely this isn't merely some ancient comic book, right?

...

Day <unbreak>24</unbreak>
The boredom has become unbearable. I've collected various small trinkets from around here, placed them in a box, and left it at the divine foal's resting place.
Perhaps someone will discover them in the future.
I've had a revelation — could this be the true origin of treasure chests in mazes?

...

Day <unbreak>33</unbreak>
The High Priest has come to rescue me! Praise Janus!!!
My companion has become one with the divine foal, which is deeply regrettable. I shed tears, but they were of no avail.
I record here the most important discovery of this journey as a conclusion, hoping to offer some small assistance to future generations.


—The wooden planks of the divine foal can satisfy hunger, and their taste is quite acceptable.

C: 如果把历史的转折比作结绳记事的缠结，那么，在葛瑞迪身上，无疑有着两道缠结。第一道是发明原始的梦泡拍摄技术。第二道，则是撕毁梦泡电影的专利版权。为何放弃带来天价收益的版权？葛瑞迪并未给出答案。 时人盛赞葛瑞迪的无私，但这种赞美也随着越来越多烂片的诞生，日渐变为了对葛瑞迪的声讨。以下是当时的采访记录。 记者：真是令人惊叹，您是出于怎样的想法，才做出了放弃专利的决定呢？ 葛瑞迪：长久以来，梦泡电影的专利权为匹诺康尼的影视创作带来了诸多限制，很多优秀的创作者被迫因其放弃了梦想。随着版权意识的增长，相对应的，许多版权流氓的诞生也让整个创作环境变得乌烟瘴气。我是个恐怖片导演，但我想听到的是观众被吓到后，在回忆时发出的笑声，而非一场场版权悲剧。 记者：另外，许多人认为，是███的死讯，使得您下定决心撕毁了专利。作为对她的纪念，以及送给新生的希米亚影业的礼物。对此，您有什么看法？ 葛瑞迪：███的死，是一场彻头彻尾的悲剧。在几乎所有人都离她而去的时候，她却仍为了那些最弱小的人而歌唱，甚至为此在义演的途中丧生。我们所有人都应当为此承担责任。 记者：您这是在暗指苜蓿草家系和老奥帝先生的行为吗？ 葛瑞迪：不，怎么会呢？苜蓿草历来是娱乐业的天使投资人，鸢尾花家系的许多艺者，也都是在他们的资助下一炮而红。老奥帝先生更是葛瑞迪影业不可多得的合作伙伴。相信在以后，我们也会有更多更深入的合作吧。
E: If historical turning points are like knots in a record-keeping rope, Grady undoubtedly created two significant ones. First came his invention of dream bubble filming technology. Second was his shocking decision to tear up the patent copyright. Why abandon rights to such astronomically profitable technology? Grady never offered an explanation. Contemporary audiences praised Grady's selflessness, but these accolades gradually morphed into criticism as his terrible films flooded the market. Here's an interview from that period: Reporter: It's truly remarkable. What thought process led you to abandon such a valuable patent? Grady: The dream bubble patent has long restricted Penacony's film industry, forcing talented creators to abandon their dreams. While copyright awareness grew, so did copyright trolls, corrupting our creative environment. As a horror director, I'd rather hear audiences laughing about being scared than witness endless copyright tragedies. Reporter: Many believe ███████'s death directly influenced your decision to tear up the patent, serving both as a memorial to her and a gift to the newly formed Himemia Films. What's your comment on this? Grady: ███████'s death was a complete tragedy. When almost everyone turned their backs on her, she still sang for those most vulnerable, ultimately losing her life during a charity performance. We all bear responsibility for what happened. Reporter: Are you suggesting that the Alfalfa Family and Mr. Alfalfa played a role in this? Grady: No, absolutely not. The Alfalfa Family has always been an angel investor in entertainment, helping countless Iris Family artists rise to fame. Mr. Alfalfa remains an invaluable Grady Films partner. I'm certain we'll collaborate even more closely in the future.

C:
本姑娘好像已经搞清楚现状了，
咱现在并非是肉身进入了这个世界。
说不定咱就像是一个幽灵，
名为「粉霞天女」的幽灵，
…希望没有人会被吓到。

这些天，没有人能够直接看到我，
咱也没有办法干涉任何人。
就像是黑天鹅说的「模因」，
不过，本姑娘肯定是留下了痕迹，
…不然他们谈论的「粉霞天女」又是指谁呢？

我记得，咱遇见那红发姑娘的那天，
她正在密室中祈祷——
「我已接过使命，就要启程了……」
想必，那是件非常重要的事吧，
「妈妈…明天见。」
咱遵循着直觉，跟上她的脚步，
果不其然，她被蛮不讲理的卫兵拦住了。

可是我能干什么呢？
…我真想帮助那位姑娘踏上旅程啊。
让我什么都不干？那绝不可能！
「模因」也有「模因」能做到的事——
咱可以是盾牌，咱也可是长矛，
咱还可以是坍塌的石柱……

「难道，泰坦…站在她那边…？」
答错了！是本姑娘站在她那边！
…要是我能真的出现在她眼前，
也许咱还能帮到她更多。

「终于…这道山门背后，就是广袤的天地。」
「我的旅途，将要从这里开启。」
她成功了。
可咱作为「模因」已经精疲力尽了。
…再次醒来时，已经是在别处了。

「她会忘记你，你不会在任何人的记忆中留下痕迹…」
我好像听见了另一个自己的在说话。
我的精神状态还正常吗？
正常的吧！真不敢想象我要是精神不正常了该怎么办……

不过，咱可不算没有留下痕迹。
她可能不记得咱，但是她已经成功启程了。
启程那天，那「不太合理的世界观」便是咱的痕迹。
就像是「粉霞天女」一样，
翁法罗斯不记得咱，但是到处流传着「粉霞天女」的传说。

咱还没到放弃的时候呢，
总有一天，翁法罗斯会知道「粉霞天女」究竟是谁！
E:
Looks like I've got a grasp on what's going on,
I didn't physically enter this world.
I might just be a ghost,
A ghost named "Rosy Celestial Maiden,"
...hope I don't scare anyone.

These days, no one can see me directly,
and I can't meddle in anything either.
Just like a "memetic" entity Black Swan was talking about,
but I must have left some traces behind, right?
...Otherwise, who do they think they're talking about when they mention the "Rosy Celestial Maiden"?

I remembered the day I ran into that red-haired girl.
She was praying in a secret chamber:
"I have accepted the mission. I have to set out..."
Surely, it must have been something very important,
"Mom... see you tomorrow."
Just going with my gut, I followed after her.
Sure enough, she was stopped by unreasonable guards.

But what can someone like me possibly do?
... I want to help her on her journey more than anything.
Just stand by and watch? Not a chance!
Hey, even "memetic entities" have our own special talents!
I could be her shield! Or maybe her spear!
Heck, I could even be a crumbled pillar...

"Is the Titan... on her side?"
Ha! Wrong answer! It's ME who's on her side!
...If only I could actually show up in front of her.
Just imagine how much more I could do for her.

"Finally... beyond this gate awaits a boundless world."
"This is where my journey begins."
She made it.
But as a memetic entity... I'm completely worn out.
...When I came to, I was somewhere totally different.

"She won't remember you. You won't leave a trace in anyone's memories..."
I think I heard another me speaking.
Am I going crazy?
I should be fine! I can't even imagine what it'd be like if I actually lost my marbles...

But hey, I totally left a trace.
She might not remember me, but she successfully started her journey now.
That "rather illogical outcome" on the day her journey began was my mark.
Just like the Rosy Celestial Maiden.
Amphoreus might not remember me, but the legend of the Rosy Celestial Maiden is everywhere in this land.

I'm not throwing in the towel yet.
Someday, everyone in Amphoreus will know exactly who the Rosy Celestial Maiden really is!

C:
致亲爱的灰宝：
 
<align="center">与你一同，我们撕裂了旧神笼盖的天穹，</align>
<align="center">此世的人类迎来了晴空，还有久违的彩虹。</align>
<align="center">这都是因为你的努力。一直要拯救大家的救世主，是你——</align>
<align="center">灰宝，你太棒了！值得最好的礼物！</align>
 
<align="center">我想赠你晨间洒下的曙光，可我担心它太过暗淡，难以照亮幽邃的深空；</align>
<align="center">我想赠你晨间奔涌的清风，可它一旦被装进玻璃瓶，便不会再自由流淌。</align>
<align="center">后来是小伊卡在一旁蹭着我，才让我想到——</align>
<align="center">我要把这枚一直别在腰间的挂坠送给你！</align>
 
<align="center">如果说小伊卡像棉花一样柔软，那这枚挂坠就像一颗…棉花糖？</align>
<align="center">光是看着就让人甜丝丝的，让人记起我们一同度过的时光…</align>
<align="center">所以我想，要是你把它别在腰间，</align>
<align="center">便能一直感受到天空的温暖，我带来的温暖。</align>
 
<align="center">那么，就愿我的礼物在你身边永远摇荡，带来微风与曦光，</align>
<align="center">为你的旅途守护可爱的记忆，还有治愈的铃音。</align>
 
<align="right">雅辛忒丝</align>
E:
To my dearest Grayie,

<align="center">Hand in hand, we shattered the firmament of the old gods,</align>
<align="center">bringing clear skies and a long-overdue rainbow to the people of this world.</align>
<align="center">It was all because of you. You've always been the one to save us, our Deliverer.</align>
<align="center">You're incredible, Grayie! You deserve the most wonderful gift in the world!</align>

<align="center">I wish I could give you the light of dawn, but I fear it would be too faint to illuminate the deep, dark cosmos.</align>
<align="center">I wish I could give you the morning breeze, but it would lose its freedom the moment it is bottled up.</align>
<align="center">It was only when Little Ica rubbed up against me that I had an idea:</align>
<align="center">I'm going to give you this pendant I've always worn at my hip!</align>

<align="center">Little Ica might be as soft as a cotton ball, but this pendant... it's as sweet as cotton candy.</align>
<align="center">I hope just looking at it brings back all the sweet, warm memories we've made together...</align>
<align="center">So please, wear it close to you.</align>
<align="center">That way, you'll always feel the sky's warmth, and mine.</align>

<align="center">So, I hope my gift will forever dance at your side, bringing a gentle breeze and the morning light,</align>
<align="center">and may it guard the lovely memories of your journey, along with its healing chimes.</align>

<align="right">Hyacinthia</align>

C: 状如花萼的奇异造物，金色芯蕊，玄黑花瓣。它似在不停模仿、拼凑着现实存在的元素，试图创成新的事物。
E: A strange creation in the shape of a flower's sepal, with golden stamens and pistils and ink-black petals. It seems to continuously imitate and piece together elements found in reality in an attempt to create new existences.

C: 状如花萼的奇异造物，赤色芯蕊，玄黑花瓣。它似在不停模仿、拼凑着现实存在的元素，试图创成新的事物。
E: A strange creation in the shape of a flower's sepal, with crimson stamens and pistils and ink-black petals. It seems to continuously imitate and piece together elements found in reality in an attempt to create new existences.

C: 专门为VIP设立的豪华沙龙。全宇宙最为显贵的客人们围在桌前，享受来自现实世界的精心服侍。
E: A luxurious salon designed specially for VIPs. The most important guests from across the universe gather the tables, indulging in the most meticulous services available in reality.

C: 连接现实与各个梦境的舶港，由黄金和象牙打造的愚人船。
E: A wharf that connects reality to every Dreamscape with the Fools' ships made from ivory and gold.

C: 老奥帝在这里谈成了很多桩生意，也是这艘空艇上少数适合谈正经事的空间。
E: Many deals were closed here by Old Oti. It is one of the few places to conduct proper business on board this airship.

C: 黎明云崖的入口设有一系列会客设施，元老院的文员们在此地开展日常工作。
E: The entrance to Dawncloud features a series of reception facilities, where clerks of the Council of Elders carry out their daily duties.

C: 裂界中暂时停滞行动的虚影，不去触碰便不会有危险。\n无论细节如何逼真，它都只是现实的影子，是裂界仿造的玩具罢了。
E: A shadow in the Fragmentum that temporarily stays stagnant. It is not dangerous if left alone.\nAs lifelike as it may look, it is only part of the umbra of reality, a toy counterfeited by the Fragmentum.

C: 裂界侵蚀现实后留下的伤痕，通向未知的地方。\n有人说裂界并非单纯吞没了现实，它记录着所有被它吞噬之物的信息。若条件正确，过去的遗物会再度浮现。
E: A bite mark left by the Fragmentum when it corroded the reality, leading to mysterious places.\nSome say that the Fragmentum does not simply devour reality. In fact, it preserves all the information of what was eaten. When certain conditions are met, the relics of the past may re-emerge.

C: 劫夺建木而生的肉体未能长存不坏，那么何处才能寻得下一个希望呢？她怅然退去，如花般剥落遗恨。
E: The flesh born from pillaging the Ambrosial Arbor has not been able to last, so where shall one locate the next bit of hope? She withdrew, her dejection as evident as a fallen petal.

C: 云端文明的旧都残垣，熔金中埋藏着英雄的幻梦。摘取天空的最后一只眼瞳，再度掀开阳雷的传说。
E: Amidst the crumbling ruins of the cloudborne civilization's ancient capital, dreams of heroes lie buried in molten gold. Pluck the final eye of the sky and unveil the legend of the Daythunder once more.

C: 此处曾是贝洛伯格重要的交通枢纽之一。从这里出发，人们可以抵达城市的任何角落。
E: Previously one of Belobog's important transport hubs. From here, one can reach any corner of the city.

C: 进入悬锋斗技场外围的一处窄间，通过有限的视野依然能想象到斗技场那端跨越时空的纷争盛景。
E: Despite the limited view as you enter this narrow room at the periphery of Kremnos Arena, it is not hard to imagine the fierce battles transcending time and space that once occurred in this arena.

C: 闲敞的神殿通路，朝圣者常在此徘徊，或是等候结局揭晓，或是对命运的安排心有不甘，迟迟不愿离去。
E: The spacious temple corridor where pilgrims often linger, either awaiting the unveiling of their fate or grappling with dissatisfaction over destiny's design, reluctant to depart.

C: 商业街道过去的繁华物象在裂界中静滞、崩裂，此处唯一的活物只剩来自裂界的异形。
E: The past prosperity of the business street collapsed and fell into stagnation in the Fragmentum. Now, the only thing breathing here are the strange beings from the Fragmentum.

C: 磐岩镇的地底商店，只收现金冬城盾，不接受信用点交易。出售的商品只能用「神秘」二字形容。
E: The underground shop in Boulder Town only accepts shields — no credits. And everything sold there is mysterious.

C: 获得资格徽章后可以前往隐藏区域
E: Hidden Domain can be accessed after obtaining Mastery Marks

C: 小镇广场最闪耀的大树，折纸小鸟的聚集地之一。
E: The most resplendent tree at the town's plaza. A place where Origami Birds gather.

C: 「你站在广场翻垃圾，装垃圾的桶站在远处看你。」
E: "While you inspect trashcans on the square, trashcans inspect back at you from afar."

C: 拍摄突然出现的扑满，注意跟上它的速度！
E: Take photos of the suddenly appearing Trotter. Keep up with its speed!

C: 工造司匠人随手造就的机巧发明。原本不具灵智，如今却因为某些异变被赋予了短暂的「生命」。
E: An ingenious invention casually made by craftsmen of the Artisanship Commission. These were originally inanimate products, but have now been given a fleeting "life" due to certain abnormal changes.

C: 由「纷争」雕琢的泰坦眷属，流淌着尼卡多利的金血。刚猛的身躯是军阵的盾牌，以坚石之身阻隔敌军，以粗大臂膀搬运战场的口粮，也常被悬锋的士兵当作练武的对象。
E: A Titankin sculpted by "Strife." They are infused with Nikador's golden ichor. Their robust bodies are the shields of the army, and they use their stony corpus to cut off their foes, while their powerful limbs carry rations across the battlefield. They are also used as sparring partners by the soldiers of Kremnos.

C: 通过解析<color=#f29e38ff>「骇入声明」</color>涂鸦模拟银狼的攻击算法，每回合对敌方目标造成量子属性伤害。该伤害无视弱点属性削减敌方全体的韧性，当该伤害击破敌方目标弱点时，会触发量子属性的弱点击破效果。强度等级1。
E: By analyzing <color=#f29e38ff>hacking callcard</color> graffiti and simulating Silver Wolf's attack algorithms, deals Quantum DMG to the enemies every turn. This DMG reduces all enemies' Toughness regardless of their Weakness Type. When this DMG inflicts Weakness Break to an enemy, it will trigger the Quantum Weakness Break effect. Power Level 1.

C: 我方目标在下次战斗中攻击力提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>。
E: Increases all ally targets' ATK by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> in the next battle.

C: 我方发动追加攻击攻击敌方目标后，根据本次攻击的目标数量为【怪诞逸闻】充能。当充能达到<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color>点时，对随机敌方目标造成<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color>次固定数值的伤害。
E: After an ally attacks an enemy target with a Follow-Up ATK, charges "Whimsicality" based on the number of targets attacked. When charged to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color> points, deals a set amount of DMG to random enemy targets <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color> time(s).

C: 敌方受到持续伤害时，为当前生命值百分比最低的我方目标恢复等同于生命上限<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>的生命值，并使其行动提前<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>。
E: When an enemy takes DoT, the ally with the lowest HP percentage will heal for <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of their Max HP, and their action will be Advanced Forward by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>.

C: 我方目标施放战技、终结技后，获得能够抵消等同于自身生命上限<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>伤害的护盾，持续<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color>回合。
E: After an ally uses their Skill or Ultimate, they gain a Shield that can absorb DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of their Max HP for <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color> turn(s).

C: 陷入<color=#f29e38ff>禁锢状态</color>的敌人受到攻击后，若韧性值为0，其韧性会恢复至韧性上限的<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>。
E: When <color=#f29e38ff>Imprisoned</color> enemies are attacked and if their Toughness is depleted, their Toughness will regenerate to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of their Max Toughness.

C: 所有持续伤害提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>。\n在消灭扑满后，有<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>固定概率对敌方全体施加灼烧、风化、裂伤、触电状态。同时使我方全体获得的所有分数提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color>，持续1回合。
E: All DoT is increased by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>.\nAfter defeating a Trotter, there is a <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> fixed chance of inflicting Burn, Wind Shear, Bleed, and Shock on all enemies. Additionally, all points received by all allies increase by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color> for 1 turn.

C: 我方目标连续行动达到<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak></color>次后，在敌方行动前触发【寒冰飞剑】，对随机敌方目标发射<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C1#(+<unbreak>#15[i]</unbreak>)}</color>把飞剑，每把飞剑造成等同于<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C2#(+<unbreak>#12[i]%</unbreak>)}</color>基础伤害的冰属性伤害。我方目标每多行动<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#6[i]</unbreak></color>次，增加<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#7[i]</unbreak></color>把飞剑。
E: After ally targets consecutively act <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak></color> time(s), triggers "Frosty Flying Sword" before the enemy's action and launches <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C1# (+<unbreak>#15[i]</unbreak>)}</color> flying sword(s) at random enemy targets. Every flying sword deals Ice DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C2# (+<unbreak>#12[i]%</unbreak>)}</color> of base DMG. Every <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#6[i]</unbreak></color> additional actions performed by ally targets adds <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#7[i]</unbreak></color> flying sword(s).

C: 我方目标击中敌方目标后有<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C1#(+<unbreak>#12[i]%</unbreak>)}</color>固定概率使其陷入【挫败】状态。敌方目标陷入其他负面状态时也会陷入【挫败】状态。【挫败】状态下的敌方目标受到的所有伤害提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[f1]%</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C2#(+<unbreak>#13[f1]%</unbreak>)}</color>，最多叠加<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak></color>层。层数达到上限时，【虚无的预警】对目标造成等同于<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C3#(+<unbreak>#15[i]%</unbreak>)}</color>基础伤害的量子属性伤害，该伤害对精英、首领目标额外提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#9[i]%</unbreak></color>，同时清除所有【挫败】的层数。
E: After ally targets hit any enemy target, there is a <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C1# (+<unbreak>#12[i]%</unbreak>)}</color> fixed chance to inflict "Chagrined" to the target. When enemy targets are afflicted with other debuffs, they will also be afflicted with "Chagrined." While in the "Chagrined" state, all DMG taken by the enemy target increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[f1]%</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C2# (+<unbreak>#13[f1]%</unbreak>)}</color>, up to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak></color> stack(s). When max stacks are reached, "Nihility's Warning" deals Quantum DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C3# (+<unbreak>#15[i]%</unbreak>)}</color> of base DMG to the target. This DMG additionally increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#9[i]%</unbreak></color> against Elite and Boss enemies. At the same time, all "Chagrined" stacks are removed.
