The only word in the lyrics is "death," nothing else — <color=#f29e38ff>Kafka</color> smiled demurely and sang the whole thing before <color=#f29e38ff>Bladie</color>.

C: 应对策略：在【死亡想要更多的死亡】施放前通过回复生命值解除所有我方单位的【负载生命值】状态。
E: Strategy: Before "Death Wishes For More Death" is used, restore HP to dispel the "HP Overload" state from all ally units.

E: Vessel Enhancement

E: A giant lance of ice created by the guardian. It can unleash a piercing frost wind that sweeps across the field.

C: 为了挽救危局，吞下「赤月」，坠入狂怒的天击将军。\n被往日陷阵厮杀的心魔所夺，飞霄成了不知疲倦的斗神化身。作为她的朋友和眼前的敌人，你们明白，唯一的「解药」…只有坚持鏖战。
E: The Merlin's Claw, who swallowed down the Crimson Moon to salvage the crisis and therefore descended into madness.\nPossessed by the monster within born of yesteryear's unending battles, Feixiao turned into a tireless avatar of war. As her friend and present enemy, you understand that the only "antidote"... is to keep fighting.

C: 「齐响诗班」众愿之多米尼克斯，是为「同谐」希佩的众相化身之一，因「秩序」的干扰展现出不同以往的面貌。作为集群意识对愿望的回应，他指挥的颂歌能依照万千愿望重塑世界，建立新的法则，而所有许愿者都会成为其力量的来源。
E: Dominicus, the wisher of the Harmonious Choir, is one of the many embodiments of Xipe the Harmony. Due to the interferences from the Order, his appearance is different from before. Materialized as the Hive Mind's response to wishes, the hymns he conducts can reshape the world and create new laws per the wishes, and all who made this wish will become the source of his power.

C: 冥河中沉眠的死龙，受炼成召引再度苏醒，化成槁骨腐肉的模样。\n它曾是「死亡」的泰坦，逆溯冥河向上，离开乌有之界于现世搁浅。它曾随冥河潮汐涌上大地，为翁法罗斯的万事万物烙上命定的终局。那些将死的，或已死的存在，皆会因它的归来感受到灵魂深处的颤栗。
E: Netherwing, slumbering dormant in the River of Souls, has been reawakened by an alchemical summoning and morphed into a thing of rot and decay.\nIt once was the Death Titan, swimming upstream in the River of Souls' currents, leaving the realm of non-existence and stranded in the mortal world. Once, they followed the tides of the River of Souls to drown the living lands, branding all things in Amphoreus with a fated end. All the existences that will die or have died will feel a shudder in the depths of their souls with the dragon's return.

C: 伴随黑潮而来、狩猎泰坦火种的无名剑士，无人知晓其真身。\n身负不可思议的力量，剑技也近乎无懈可击。疯狂与执着交织于它的锋刃，神悟树庭与哀丽秘榭皆毁于其手。
E: A nameless swordmaster who came with the black tide and is hunting down the Titans' Coreflame. None knows their true identity.\nTheir power is incredible, and their swordplay is nigh impeccable. Within their sword, madness and obsession entwine, once leading to the fall of the Grove of Epiphany and Aedes Elysiae.

C: 真蛰虫幼体；「真蛰虫」幼体依据生长程度可被划分为「幼蛰虫」与「次蛰虫」。
E: The youngling of a True Sting. Based on their growth stage, young True Stings can be further divided into Juvenile Stings and Lesser Stings.

C: 「星际和平公司」的资深员工，级别至少是项目组的小组长。驾驶的机甲属于公有资产，一旦损坏需要自费赔偿。工资尚可，足够在公司旗下的企业舰上租下一室一厅的单间。
E: An Interastral Peace Corporation senior staff member with a minimal rank of project team leader. The mech they drive belongs to the IPC. If damaged, its repair fees have to be paid out-of-pocket. With a half-decent salary, they can at least afford to rent a one-bedroom apartment on one of the IPC's enterprise ships.

E: Enters the Charging state. The next action uses "Purge Order" on all targets.

E: The Auxiliary Robot Arm Unit explodes, dealing massive Physical DMG to a single target.

E: Summons Auxiliary Robot Arm Unit.

C: 对我方全体造成火属性伤害，使陷入灼烧状态的我方目标受到额外火属性伤害，并有概率使受到攻击的我方目标陷入灼烧状态。
E: Deals Fire DMG to all targets. Targets suffering from Burn are dealt an extra Fire DMG. And at the same time, there's a chance to Burn any targets that are attacked.

C: 大概率使我方全体陷入【噬命】状态。
E: Has a high chance for all targets to become afflicted with Prana-Siphon.

E: Summons Ambrosial Arbor branch "Twig of Glorious Blooms"

E: Uses this ability immediately when there are 2 Lavish Fruits on the field. Deals massive Lightning DMG to all targets. Deals more damage for every Ambrosial Arbor Branch on the field. After the ability is used, removes all Twigs of Lavish Fruits on the field.

C: 处于共鸣状态时施放，对我方全体目标造成风属性伤害，并大概率使受到攻击的我方目标陷入<u>怒噪</u>状态。
E: Use while in the Resonate State. Deals Wind DMG to all targets, with a high chance to inflict <u>Outrage</u>.

C: 对我方全体造成大量风属性伤害并根据剩余未被弱点击破的部位进行强化，每有1个未被击破的部位会使该技能的伤害提高，同时会附带对应部位的强化效果。
E: Deals massive Wind DMG to all targets and Enhances this unit based on the parts that have yet to be Weakness Broken. Every part that has yet to be Broken will increase the DMG dealt by this ability, and this ability will enhance the parts that are not Weakness Broken.

C: 将【课间频道】状态转变为【课堂频道】状态。
E: Switches the "Off-Class Channel" state to the "Classroom Channel" state.

C: 对指定我方单体造成物理属性伤害。
E: Deals Physical DMG to a single target.

E: Every target on the field afflicted by <u>Alien Dream</u> will increase the ATK of "Future."

C: 大概率使我方全体陷入【<u>荒宴醉</u>】或【<u>欢宴罪</u>】状态。
E: High chance of inflicting <u>Carousal of Wantonness</u> or <u>Carousal of Revelry</u> to all targets.

E: Immediately causes all DoT effects currently active on all targets to deal damage 1 time and dispels all DoT effects on all targets.

C: 对指定我方单体造成量子属性伤害。并使自身获得1层【无明火】。
E: Deals Quantum DMG to a single target and gains 1 stack of Obscure Blaze.

E: Randomly summons statues of "Speartip," "The Shield," and "The Honored."

C: 「『齐响诗班』神主日」召唤四个「旧梦的回声」，「旧梦的回声」受到的伤害均由「『齐响诗班』神主日」承受。自身和「旧梦的回声」受到弱点击破时，行动额外延后。且自身每层韧性被击破后，对我方施加【<u>在光明中行</u>】。
E: "Harmonious Choir" The Great Septimus summons 4 "Echoes of Faded Dreams." The DMG dealt to the Echoes of Faded Dreams is completely redistributed to "Harmonious Choir" The Great Septimus instead. When this unit and Echoes of Faded Dreams become Weakness Broken, additionally delays action. For every stack of this unit's Toughness that is broken, apply the <u>Walk in the Light</u> state to targets.

C: 对我方全体造成虚数属性伤害，并使所有可以行动的「旧梦的回声」对我方全体造成虚数属性伤害。技能施放后，恢复「旧梦的回声」的韧性。
E: Deals Imaginary DMG to all targets, and makes all "Echoes of Faded Dreams" that can take action deal Imaginary DMG to all targets. After using this ability, restores Toughness for "Echoes of Faded Dreams".

C: 对指定我方单体目标及其相邻目标造成少量虚数属性伤害。
E: Deals minor Imaginary DMG to one designated target and adjacent targets.

C: 对我方全体造成大量虚数属性伤害，伤害由目标<u>平均分摊</u>。
E: Deals massive Imaginary DMG to all targets. The DMG is <u>distributed evenly</u> among the targets.

C: 【玻吕刻斯】或【哀悯长臂】的技能击中我方目标时，会为我方目标施加不可解除的特殊持续伤害状态，该状态下目标当前生命值百分比越高受到的伤害越高，该伤害<u>【不致命】</u>。
E: When "Pollux" or "The Long Arms of Sorrow" hits a target with an ability, applies a special Unremovable DoT DMG state to the target. While under this state, the higher the target's HP percentage is, the more DMG they take. This DMG is "<u>Non-fatal</u>."

C: 对随机我方3个目标造成量子属性<u>【衰亡伤害】</u>。
E: Deals Quantum "<u>Atrophy DMG</u>" to 3 random targets.

C: 对我方全体造成大量量子属性伤害，伤害由我方全体单位<u>平均分摊</u>。对高于一定生命值百分比的目标，该伤害会转化为量子属性<u>【衰亡伤害】</u>。
E: Deals massive Quantum DMG to all targets. The DMG is <u>distributed evenly</u> among all target units. Against targets with HP above a certain percentage, this DMG converts to Quantum "<u>Atrophy DMG</u>."

C: 抵抗控制类负面状态。当【？？？】再次施放【亡死的黑云】或【将尽的命数】时，若自身曾被该攻击召唤，则与【？？？】一同发起攻击，随后被其吸收。
E: Resists Crowd Control debuffs. When "???" uses "Demise's Storm" or "Fading Fate" again, and if that attack summoned this unit, this unit will attack at the same time as "???" before being absorbed.

C: 对指定我方单体及其相邻目标造成物理属性伤害。
E: Deals Physical DMG to one designated target and units adjacent to the target.

C: 与【残破容器】一同施放【亡死的黑云】或【将尽的命数】，随后吸收【残破容器】。
E: Unleashes "Demise's Storm" or "Fading Fate" alongside "Long-Shattered Vessel," then absorbs "Long-Shattered Vessel."

C: 消耗所有充能。重置【应急模式】的可触发次数。
E: Consumes all Charge. Resets the number of times the Emergency Mode can be triggered.

C: 使自身进入【冰点】状态，之后的攻击可以施放【永冬之雨】，并使自身获得1层【凝晶】效果。
E: Enters the Freezing Point state. Everwinter Rain can be used in subsequent attacks and grants the character 1 stack of Crystallite.

C: 对我方全体设下不能施放战技的【禁令】，施放战技的我方目标将立即受到1次攻击。
E: Your team is imposed with a ban on using Skill. Should anyone do so, they immediately receive 1 attack.

C: 大概率使指定我方单体陷入【噬命】状态。
E: High chance of inflicting Prana-Siphon to a single target.

C: 对指定我方单体造成大量量子属性伤害。
E: Deals massive Quantum DMG to a single target.

C: 对除自身外的敌方全体施加强化状态，恢复该目标的韧性。
E: Grants the Enhanced status to all friendly units except the user, restoring their Toughness.

C: 对指定我方单体造成风属性伤害。
E: Deals Wind DMG to a single target.

C: 对我方全体造成虚数属性伤害。
E: Deals Imaginary DMG to all targets.

C: 对我方全体造成少量虚数属性伤害，并减少我方全体的能量。
E: Deals minor Imaginary DMG to all targets and reduce all targets' Energy.

C: 超级多媒体娱乐系统<unbreak>32</unbreak>
E: Supermultimedia Entertainment System <unbreak>32</unbreak>

C: 那家伙看上去就不太好惹，还是离得越远越好。
E: That guy looks fierce. You won't want to mess with him.

C: 哦，你这糟糕的家伙！我好想把你的头从脖子上给拧下来！
E: Oh, you scoundrel! I want to rip your head off!

C: 故事告一段落后，回到和少女邂逅之处
E: After everything has concluded, return to where you encountered the young maiden by chance

C: 默认解锁
E: Unlocked by Default

C: 在铂金客房外的大厅里找到姆利斯，填补他缺失的情绪
E: Find Mullich in the hall outside of the Platinum Guest Rooms and restore his missing emotions

C: 默认解锁
E: Unlocked by Default

C: 仙舟「罗浮」
E: The Xianzhou Luofu

C: 流萤被忆域迷因一把握住。「忆者」黑天鹅出手相助，将流萤从迷因「死亡」的手中解救出来。
E: The Memory Zone Meme seized Firefly. The Memokeeper Black Swan arrived to help, freeing Firefly from the clutches of "Death."

C: 在加拉赫的带领下，众人回到无名客墓碑前。地面在震动中缓慢上升，最后，一座空中花园出现在你们面前。
E: Following Gallagher's lead, all of you went back to the Nameless' gravestone. The ground slowly rose amidst tremors, and finally, a Hanging Garden appeared before you.

C: 螺丝咕姆到访「黑塔」空间站，艾丝妲率领科员们迎接。
E: Screwllum arrived at the Herta space station, where Asta led the researchers to welcome him.

C: 托帕携账账立于城外雪原，眺望风雪中的贝洛伯格。「雅利洛-VI号，欠债还钱，七百年不晚。」
E: Topaz stood with Numby on the Snow Plains beyond the city, staring into the storm-shrouded silhouette of Belobog. "Jarilo-VI, it's never too late... to pick up the tab."

C: 你睁开双眼。卡芙卡称要把你留在空间站，你的冒险将自此启程。她留下一句叮嘱，<color=#f29e38ff>当你有机会做出选择的时候，不要让自己后悔。</color>
E: You opened your eyes. Kafka explained that you will be left in the space station, as your journey was about to begin. She left a reminder for you: <color=#f29e38ff>When you have a chance to make a choice, make one that you know you won't regret.</color>

C: 你在懵懂中听到桑博与陌生女人的谈话，得知自己和布洛妮娅等人都被带到了贝洛伯格下层区，此处有名为「地火」的组织。
E: In a haze, you overheard Sampo speaking with an unfamiliar woman, revealing that you, Bronya, and the others had been brought to the Underworld of Belobog. There, you learned of a group known as Wildfire.

C: 布洛妮娅回忆起，在被可可利亚收养前，她在下层区孤儿院长大。布洛妮娅认为自己没有尽到守护下层区的责任，希儿鼓励其振作起来。
E: Bronya recalled her past — long before Cocolia took her in, she had grown up in an orphanage deep in the Underworld. She felt she had failed in her duty to protect the Underworld. Seele urged her not to dwell on regret, but to stand tall and move forward.

C: 景元于鳞渊境部署与幻胧的决战，令符玄率云骑军镇守通道，时刻准备接任将军。你们将随景元深入「建木」，仙舟存亡在此一役。
E: Jing Yuan engaged in a decisive battle against the Scalegorge Waterscape deployment and Phantylia. He ordered Fu Xuan to lead the Cloud Knights to guard the path, and prepare to take over as the General. You followed Jing Yuan into the depths of Ambrosial Arbor. This battle will decide Xianzhou's fate.

C: 翡翠坦言公司能够治愈失熵症，但代价不菲。同时揭示<color=#f29e38ff>星核猎手行走于终末命途</color>，并代表石心十人递出合作要求。
E: Jade confessed that the IPC can cure Entropy Loss Syndrome, but at a big cost. At the same time, she revealed that <color=#f29e38ff>the Stellaron Hunters walk the Path of Finality</color> and requested a collaboration on behalf of the Ten Stonehearts.

C: 校长「蕉授」到场，为筑梦蕉师的暴力行径向学生们道歉。「蕉授」欢迎乱破进入折纸大学，学生们将乱破视为反抗蕉师的传奇英雄。
E: The dean, Profnana, arrived at the scene to apologize to students for Dreamweaver BananAdvisor's violent behavior. Profnana welcomed Rappa to Paperfold University, where students saw her as a legendary hero who stood up against the BananAdvisor.

C: 「蕉授」声称，返祖实验是为了让世界变回充满活力的胚胎。乱破出言驳斥，「蕉授」却揭露乱破身世——返祖实验的<color=#f29e38ff>「失败品」</color>。
E: Profnana claimed that the atavistic experiment was meant to revert the world back to a vibrant embryonic state. When Rappa spoke up to refute this, Profnana revealed Rappa's true identity — a <color=#f29e38ff>failed specimen</color> of the atavistic experiment.

C: 你们在权杖中枢收到来自黑塔与螺丝咕姆的讯号。世界内外连通，翁法罗斯内部的时间流速已经完全和现实宇宙同步，决战的时刻到了。
E: You received signals from Herta and Screwllum at the center of the Scepter. The connection between worlds was established. The speed of time within Amphoreus had finally been synced with that of the real universe. It was time for the final battle.

C: 公司投资专家<color=#f29e38ff>托帕</color>向你们表示问候，称赞列车组为封印星核所做的贡献。托帕此行前来，是有一笔「合作」业务要与布洛妮娅洽谈。
E: <color=#f29e38ff>Topaz</color>, an investment expert from the IPC, sent her regards and praised the Express Crew for helping to seal the Stellaron. She had come to Belobog to negotiate a "collaboration" deal with Bronya.

C: 两人开始比试，相约一路斩杀孽物，先到者获胜。彦卿先行一步。
E: Yanqing and Jingliu began their contest, agreeing to slay abominations along the way, with the first to arrive being the winner. Yanqing took the lead.

C: 镜流夸赞彦卿的最后一剑，但她既已出锋，则势必要斩出。于是她邀请彦卿接她一剑，彦卿虽心有恐惧，却仍有胆色迎难而上。
E: Jingliu praised Yanqing's final strike, but said that once a blade is drawn, it must be swung. She invited Yanqing to face her strike. Though fear stirred in his heart, Yanqing met the challenge head-on.

C: 景元、飞霄与怀炎接到传讯，称重犯呼雷越狱脱逃。飞霄调度罗浮云骑展开对呼雷的追捕，而景元将以此布局，「激浊扬清」。
E: Jing Yuan, Feixiao, and Huaiyan received the alert that Hoolay had broken out of prison. Feixiao dispatched the Luofu Cloud Knights to pursue Hoolay, while Jing Yuan decided to use this situation to "wash away the dregs."

C: 一道强有力的攻击自空中降下。在长乐天街道中，留给你与貊泽的，只有无数再起不能的步离人。
E: A powerful attack descended from above, leaving the streets of Exalting Sanctum littered with borisin bodies where you and Moze stood.

C: 你们遇到两名守着升降机的流浪者，正谋划着抢夺矿工的地髓。希儿怒斥其不义之举，要好好教训他们。
E: You encountered two vagrants guarding a lift, plotting to steal Geomarrow from the miners. Seele condemned their injustice and was ready to teach them a lesson.

C: 即使封印了星核，雅利洛的环境也没法一举改变，好在时间已经从敌人变为盟友。你们决定等时机合适，再将这个消息转告布洛妮娅。
E: Though the Stellaron was sealed, Jarilo's wounds would not heal overnight. But for now, time was no longer an enemy, but an ally. You decided to wait for the right moment before passing this final truth on to Bronya.

C: 「持明其耋，独行景景。波月粼粼，沧海沉珠。」凡七百余载后，持明龙裔大限将至，又将再度结成龙卵，眠于古海，静候下一世蜕生。
E: "And as the day is almost gone, return alone to water's song, beneath the waves in silver shell, await new life that time will tell." The worldly limit of the Vidyadhara is reached after seven centuries. They return to the ancient sea and form a shell — awaiting the next hatching rebirth.

C: 与星期日协商解决事情后，你们再度回到前台，准备办理入住。
E: After settling matters with Sunday, you returned to the front desk to finish checking in.

C: 你调查怪物残骸。残骸表面没有任何异样，但当你以手抚之，指尖传来的高热令你如触电般退却，可知其内部有一团剧烈焚烧的火焰。
E: You investigated the monster's corpse. The surface of it appeared unremarkable. Yet as your hand grazed it, the searing heat transferred to your fingertips sent you jolting back. It was evident that there was an intense burst of flame within it.

C: 波提欧正与砂金的远程投影聊天，他们在对抗「市场开拓部」上达成一致。波提欧与砂金祝你在庆典上玩得开心。
E: Boothill was chatting with Aventurine's remote projection, and they'd reached an agreement on opposing the Marketing Development Department. Boothill and Aventurine wished you a great time at the festival.

C: 波提欧曾向乱破描绘「钟表•忍法」的壮绝玄妙，乱破期待亲眼见证你所施展的钟表把戏。
E: Boothill had once described the magnificence and mystery of the "Clockwork Ninjutsu" to Rappa, and Rappa couldn't wait to witness your Clockwork firsthand.

C: 经由面前的梦泡，便可返回梦土「毗乃昆尼」。乱破劝你尽快离开梦土，因为这些猴子邪祟的出现，意味着「御猿•邪忍」在觊觎此地。
E: Through the dream bubble ahead, you could return to the dreamscape "Pinecany." Rappa urged you to leave here quickly, as the appearance of these monkey fiendlings meant Evil Ninja Osaru has had their eyes set on the land.

C: 众人找到会自称为「小女子」的停云分身，判断其思维清晰，可作为调律目标。
E: The group found the Tingyun who seemed somewhat normal, decided that she still could think clearly and could be used as a tuning target.

C: 知更鸟倾诉对那位远行者的信任与牵挂，星期日默默聆听，两人借星空互表心迹。
E: Robin recounted her belief and worries about that person who was now far away. Sunday listened silently. The two of them used the starry skies to express their true thoughts.

C: 你们在房间中看到众多牺牲的角斗士。遐蝶向格奈乌斯表示，她为寻找毁灭尼卡多利的方法而来。格奈乌斯认为找到泰坦便能各取所需。
E: In the room, you found the remains of many fallen gladiators. Castorice told Gnaeus that she had come here to find a way to destroy Nikador. Gnaeus replied that finding the Titan would put both their goals within reach.

C: 大黑塔接见到访的瓦尔特与星期日，得知两位为<color=#f29e38ff>「翁法罗斯」</color>而来。瓦尔特向大黑塔解释了列车组面临的困境，请求天才的智慧援助。
E: The Herta turned her attention to the arriving guests, Welt and Sunday, who had come seeking her counsel regarding the <color=#f29e38ff>Amphoreus</color>. Welt explained the Express Crew's dire situation, asking for the guidance of genius.

C: 欧洛尼斯警告缇里西庇俄丝，不要散播「再创世」的神谕。母亲在求得神谕的当夜坠崖，「负世」泰坦亦于是日陨落。
E: Oronyx warned Tribios not to spread the prophecy of Era Nova. Mother fell from the cliff the night she had gotten the prophecy, and the Worldbearing Titan also expired that day.

C: 你与白厄、缇宁来到卧榻旁，见到缇里西庇俄丝，雅努萨波利斯的圣女，最初的缇宝。
E: Accompanied by Trinnon and Phainon, you arrived in a bedroom in Janusopolis and saw Tribios, the Holy Maiden of Janusopolis. This was Tribbie's original form.

C: 缇里西庇俄丝逃出生天。她呼唤雅努斯，没有得到回应。白厄的疑惑仍未得到解答，但缇宁称回忆还没结束。
E: Tribios escaped. She called for Janus, receiving no answer but silence. Phainon's doubts remained, but Trinnon assured him that this was not the end of the memory.

C: 那刻夏在辩论中占尽上风，迫使元老院在合作中作出诸多让步。来古士观测到阿格莱雅正动身前来黎明云崖，凯妮斯称会妥善处理此事。
E: Anaxa took the upper hand in the debate, forcing the Council of Elders to concede on multiple terms of cooperation. Meanwhile, Lygus observed that Aglaea had set out for Dawncloud. Caenis assured them that the matter would be handled with discretion.

C: 那刻夏聆听前世黄金裔的集会交谈，格奈乌斯与卡吕普索于此等待「负世」半神卡厄斯的回应。那刻夏的猜想得证，凡人能够取代泰坦。
E: Anaxa listened to the conversation between the Chrysos Heirs of the previous generation, in which Calypso and Gnaeus awaited an answer from the "Worldbearing" demigod, Khaos. Anaxa's hypothesis was proven true: Mortals could replace Titans.

C: 玻吕茜亚以「炼金」赋予姐姐第二次生命，并为其打开冥界的大门，送往新世界的故乡。而后，玻吕茜亚独自偿还「等价交换」的代价。
E: Polyxia used alchemy to grant her sister a second life, then opened the gates of the nether realm to send her to her homeland in the new world. Polyxia bore the cost of her "equivalent exchange" alone.

C: 你与遐蝶、赛飞儿在城外会合，即将前往斯缇科西亚。赛飞儿向你索要一枚硬币，你很好奇她将用什么方式将你送去冥界。
E: Accompanied by Castorice and Cipher, you arrived outside the city gates, and were about to head to Styxia. Cipher asked you to give her a coin, and you couldn't help but be curious about how she would send you to the nether realm.

C: 来古士宣布，公民大会决定继续支持逐火之旅。凯妮斯对此恼羞成怒。那刻夏则表示自己只遵从真理，并要求公民们聆听其宣言。
E: With the balance shattered, Lygus decreed that the citizens' assembly would continue supporting the Flame-Chase Journey, leaving Caenis infuriated. Anaxa, on the other hand, stated that he only believed in the truth, and asked the citizens to stay for a moment more. He had an announcement to make.

C: 你于友爱之馆中翻阅书籍，尽情满足自己的阅读趣味。饱览一番之后，你决定去看看白厄与迷迷在看什么书。
E: You spent some time reading through books in the Library of Philia, satisfying your curiosity about various matters. After you finished, you decided to check on what Phainon and Mem were reading.

C: 千年以前，赛飞儿伪装成司铎模样，向奥赫玛全体公民宣布名为「神谕」的谎言——<color=#f29e38ff>黎明机器的光芒永不熄灭，刻法勒的庇佑没有尽头！</color>
E: A thousand years ago, Cipher disguised herself as a priest and told all citizens of Okhema a lie named "prophecy": <color=#f29e38ff>The light of Dawn Device never fades. Kephale's protection has no end!</color>

C: 「学士」拒绝表述心愿，称自己应做的工程已毕，只待「救世主」践行证明。在再创世之后，「学士」将成为新的泰坦神明。
E: The scholar declined to voice a wish, claiming his great work was complete. What remained was for the Deliverer to carry out its proof. After the Era Nova, the scholar shall rise as a new Titan.

C: 此时适逢万敌率领悬锋孤军兵临奥赫玛，要求以一场角斗来为族人争取在圣城平等生活的权利。在阿格莱雅的斡旋下，白厄代表奥赫玛接受挑战。
E: At just this moment, Mydei led the Kremnoan Detachment to Okhema, demanding a duel to win his people the right to live as equals in the holy city. With Aglaea's mediation, Phainon agreed to fight on Okhema's behalf.

C: 天平倾斜，白厄胜出。「救世主」牌承载的不仅是白厄的决心，还有世人呼唤救世主的夙愿。白厄与万敌握手言和，一同加入逐火之旅。
E: The scales tipped in Phainon's favor. "The Deliverer" card bore not only his resolve, but the world's call for a Deliverer. Phainon and Mydei shook hands, making peace, and joined forces on the Flame-Chase Journey.

C: <color=#f29e38ff>第<unbreak>108642</unbreak>次永劫回归</color>白厄与万敌对峙，万敌决意以自身守护「纷争」的火种，在悬锋竞技场与白厄死战。
E: <color=#f29e38ff>The <unbreak>108,642</unbreak>nd Eternal Recurrence:</color> Phainon faced Mydei. Mydei was determined to protect the Coreflame of Strife with his life, and he fought Phainon to the death in the Kremnos arena.

C: 三月七在未知空间中见到「你」与「丹恒」。两人鼓励三月七穿过记忆之门，继续向前，一起去开拓新世界。
E: March 7th saw "you" and "Dan Heng" in the unknown space, cheering her on to go through the Gate of Memory and move forward to trailblaze a new world together.

C: 你与Archer出现在克劳克影视乐园。画外音传来提示，乐园里充满掌管诅咒的恶灵，会将受害者拉入噩梦，无休止地折磨其灵魂。
E: You and Archer landed in Clock Studios Theme Park. The voice-over announced that the park was crawling with curse-wielding spirits that would drag victims into nightmares and endlessly torment their souls.

C: 在光历<unbreak>3960</unbreak>年，「律法」泰坦塔兰顿已经陨落，而继承火种的黄金裔名叫<color=#f29e38ff>刻律德菈</color>。出发前，昔涟想收拾一下行李，请你稍等。
E: In Light Calendar <unbreak>3960</unbreak>, the Law Titan, Talanton, had already perished. The Chrysos Heir who inherited the Coreflame was named <color=#f29e38ff>Cerydra</color>. Before setting out, Cyrene wished to gather her things and asked you to wait a moment.

C: 你发现自己身处一个布满电视机的房间中。
E: You found yourself in a chamber filled with televisions.

C: 你与昔涟随海瑟音到达黎明云崖，众英雄的行宫。海瑟音请你们自由行动，她将在会议召开前来传唤各位。你在此看到阿格莱雅和缇宝。
E: Guided by Hysilens, you and Cyrene reached the Dawncloud, the heroes' residence. Hysilens encouraged you to explore freely and said she would summon you again before the meeting commenced. It was there that you saw Aglaea and Tribbie.

C: 阿格莱雅前来提醒海瑟音，记得为出征前的<color=#f29e38ff>宴会</color>作准备。阿格莱雅好奇自己接过神权后的世界模样，海瑟音将这间浴宫让予你与昔涟。
E: Aglaea came to remind Hysilens to prepare for the <color=#f29e38ff>banquet</color> before the campaign. Aglaea wondered what the world might look like once she had taken up divine authority. Hysilens then offered the bath chamber to you and Cyrene.

C: 来古士建议将你交由他来处置，刻律德菈采纳其谏言，令他先行离席。海瑟音即将解开幻觉，她会为你们争取向刻律德菈献言的机会。
E: Lygus proposed that you be handed over to him. Cerydra accepted his suggestion and instructed him to leave first. Hysilens prepared to lift the illusion and promised to secure you a chance to speak with Cerydra.

C: 卷轴上的内容显示，白厄不愿被铁墓吞并，变成「毁灭」的因子。白厄抗争的动力来自同源的憎恨，但「记忆」驱使他绽放耀眼的金色。
E: The scroll revealed that Phainon refused to be consumed by Irontomb and become a factor of the Destruction. Phainon's power of defiance stemmed from a kindred hatred, yet Remembrance drove him to shine a brilliant gold.

C: 监控拍到了入侵者的模样，果然是星核猎手<color=#f29e38ff>银狼</color>。此处涂鸦是对传输信标一道加密，藉此可以追踪银狼的入侵路径。
E: Surveillance captured an image of the intruder, and it was indeed the Stellaron Hunter <color=#f29e38ff>Silver Wolf</color>. The graffiti turned out to be an encryption on a transmission beacon, which could be used to trace Silver Wolf's infiltration route.

C: 伦纳德为你加油，劝你放心跟着螺丝咕姆进入模拟宇宙。
E: Leonard gave you words of encouragement, reassuring you it was safe to follow Screwllum into the Simulated Universe.

C: 你与玲可、佩拉回到行政区。玲可将先前扑满在营地中留下的软盘交给佩拉，其上写有文字——「佩妮娅•谢尔盖耶夫娜」。
E: You returned to the Administrative District with Lynx and Pela. Lynx handed over to Pela the floppy disk that Trotter had left at the camp, with text written on it — "Penya Sergeyevna."

C: 黑天鹅和桑博发现了<color=#f29e38ff>「金槌府邸安全规范」</color>，上面写道：进出金槌府邸需要通过<color=#f29e38ff>人脸识别系统</color>，未通过该系统者将被当场击毙。
E: Black Swan and Sampo found the <color=#f29e38ff>Goldhammer Residence Security Regulations</color>, which specified: Anyone entering or leaving the Goldhammer Residence must pass a <color=#f29e38ff>facial recognition system</color>. Those who failed would be killed immediately.

C: 银枝承认自己落败。「孤云」悬于众人面前，开始讲述自己的过往。
E: Argenti admitted defeat. Guyun then hovered before everyone and began to recount its own history.

C: 驭空询问飞霄此行原因。飞霄称除了奉联盟所托调查建木灾异之外，她还有另一个目的——探视「呼雷」。
E: Yukong asked Feixiao about her purpose for coming. Feixiao replied that besides investigating the Ambrosial Arbor disaster on the Alliance's behalf, she had another purpose: to visit Hoolay.

C: 丹恒认为，这些「货物」被设计送入幽囚狱，唯一的目的就是劫狱。寒鸦称曜青使者先前来访，其所探视的呼雷可能是劫狱者的目标。
E: Dan Heng believed these crates were deliberately sent to The Shackling Prison with the sole purpose of a prison break. Hanya revealed that the Yaoqing messenger had visited earlier, and the borisin prisoner Hoolay they inspected might be the breakout target.

C: 景元揭示将呼雷囚禁在罗浮的真相：为避免曜青狐人通过研究呼雷来破解血脉中的「月狂」成因，同时也告诫罗浮勿蹈「饮月之乱」的覆辙。灵砂的师父之所以被放逐，是因为她擅自为刚刚蜕生的龙尊施展了恢复前生记忆的医术，因此被革去司鼎职位，流放朱明仙舟。
E: Jing Yuan revealed the truth behind Hoolay's imprisonment on the Luofu was to prevent the Yaoqing foxians from studying Hoolay to decode the cause of "Moon Rage" in their bloodline, while also warning the Luofu not to repeat the tragedy of the Sedition of Imbibitor Lunae. Lingsha's master had been exiled for restoring the freshly-reborn high elder's past life memories without permission, resulting in her dismissal from the position of Cauldron Master and banishment to the Xianzhou Zhuming.

C: 听说本次演武仪典有一位从朱明仙舟来的剑士要挑战彦卿骁卫，观众们正兴奋地讨论着谁更可能获胜。
E: The crowd buzzed with excitement about the Wardance where a swordsman from the Xianzhou Zhuming is going to challenge Lieutenant Yanqing, debating who would win.

C: 藿藿十分想念尾巴，花了很久时间在「罗浮杂俎」中看帖。在众人的安慰下，藿藿终于发现了新线索。
E: Huohuo really missed Tail and spent hours browsing posts on "Ghostly Grove." With the squad's encouragement, Huohuo eventually discovered a new lead.

C: 符玄为你们出了一道沙盘谜题，她认为这一谜题只有唯一的解法，正如人的命运。你会如何「选择命运」呢？给出这道谜题的解答吧。
E: Fu Xuan presented you with a sandpit puzzle. She believed that this puzzle, like fate itself, had only one solution. How would you "choose your own fate"? It was time to solve the puzzle.

E: Trendy Ninja

C: 发火花大火
E: Sparkling Blaze

C: 颁奖典礼的序幕即将拉开，作为备受瞩目的摄影新星，去迎接这个激动人心的时刻吧！
E: The curtain is about to rise on the award ceremony. As a highly anticipated photography newcomer, get ready to embrace this exciting moment!

E: Successfully identified

E: Fyxestroll Garden

E: Vonwacq is full of vegetation.

E: You are assigned a super luxurious room.

C: 都是打工人，用真心换真心。
E: From one employee to another, being genuine is the key.

C: 来一场赌上灵魂的策略游戏吧。
E: Let's play a strategy game where souls are at stake.

C: 人偶们一动不动…
E: The puppets remain completely still...

C: 星海点燃了你，朋友。
E: The seas set you ablaze, friend.

C: 翘班偶遇严厉上司，拼尽全力无法战胜。
E: Skipping work, only to run into a tough boss — try as she might, she could never dodge the bullet.

C: 新一季的《宇宙有天才》开播啦。
E: The new season of Geniuses in the Universe is on!

C: 「救救鼠鼠。」——所以，你出手了。
E: "Help the mouse." — And so you take action.

C: 让鼠鼠帮你清理游戏日常吧。
E: Let the mouse help with your daily missions.

C: 阮•梅把手中的刺绣交给你，请开始表演——
E: Ruan Mei hands you her embroidery. Show her what you've got —

C: 你怎么就管不住这双手呢！
E: What's with these clumsy hands of yours!?

C: 知更鸟都学会打碟了，那星期日也该试试新家伙了……
E: Even Robin's DJ-ing now. Time for Sunday to try something new...

C: 换句话说，你摸鱼摸了整整一天！
E: This means you basically slacked off the whole day!

C: 「俺寻思这玩意能开火。」
E: "I figure this thing can fire a shot or two."

C: 她分享了一段与尾巴大爷的血泪斗争史。
E: She shares her tragic tale of battles with Mr. Tail.

E: Rappa

C: 铁卫禁区正在组织高强度的军事演练。作为临时教官，你必须通过完成一系列挑战来证明实力，提高名望。
E: A high-intensity military drill is being organized in the Silvermane Guard Restricted Zone. As their temporary drillmaster, you have to complete a series of challenges to prove your strength and raise your reputation.

C:
一段理应（不）存在，却无比鲜明的记忆。
一段与曾经的敌（友）人再度重逢的记忆。
当记忆的列车逆行，颠破封闭的命运……
谁人站在窗前，将告别赠予繁星？
E:
A memory that should (not) exist, yet is incredibly vivid.
A memory of reuniting with former enemies (friends).
When the train of memories runs backward, breaking the bounds of fate...
Who stands by the window, bidding farewell to the stars?

C:
「谨遵您的意志。我犯了错，我谎称各个家系心有隔阂，以此流言换取新闻酬劳……」

透过隔窗，家主注意到那名记者目光闪躲，小心翼翼地等待着自己的回应，就像无数次「圣事告解」一样——用铃音般的宽慰令信徒们痛悔罪过。不过此刻他不自觉地侧过头去，欲言又止，任由那金属坠子在耳畔发出清脆的杂音。

「我清楚知道，这实属无稽之谈。寄以神主之恩，家族全体万众一心。这是众多家系成员的愿望，也是家系成员们投身神主怀抱的缘由。」

告罪者对所告之罪痛悔并定改，从谐音中领洗所犯罪过的赦免。家主轻阖双目，宣告圣音——

「很好。向其他家人展现真诚、澄清流言，如此便能与之重修谐音。平安回去吧。」

真言善语又何罪之有？律音铎铎，却沉重如枷。他叹息摇头。

「…请下一位上前。」
E:
"As you command. I committed sins. I falsely claimed that various lineages were divided and exchanged this hearsay misinformation for payment..."

Through the partition, the family head catches the journalist's evasive gaze as the penitent nervously awaits his response — a ritual of confession he had done countless times when his consolations ring out like bells to let the faithful repent for their sins. However, this time he subconsciously turns his head, trying to say something but stopping himself, letting his metal earrings emit a crisp noise next to his ears.

"I'm fully aware that this claim is completely groundless. Thanks to the grace of the Great One, all Family members stand united as one. This is the collective desire of all lineage members, and their reason for devoutly embracing the Great One."

The penitent confesses his sins, resolves to amend his mistakes, and seeks absolution from their evil via the harmonic tunes. The family head closes his eyes gently and utters the sacred benediction.

"Very well. Show your sincerity to the other Family members and dispel those rumors. In this way, you shall be reinstated with harmony. Now, please leave in peace."

What sin is there in speaking truth? His dictates are crystal clear but are burdened like a yoke. He sighs and shakes his head.

"...Next, please step forward."

C: 通过在空间结构上的投影架设出的引力桥梁，被博识学会评为宇宙最无用的一万个发明之一。该装置诞生于虚构史学家「红鼻老人」酒后的一场豪赌，他自称能沿着灯光爬到天上，并为此押上了十分之一的家当。可当距离过远时，在光桥上行走与长跑无异；当距离过近时，维持投影的能耗又远高于架设实体桥梁的成本——这的确是一件创造性的发明，只是不知道该被用在哪里。
E: A gravitational bridge built through projections on spacial structures, judged by the Intelligentsia Guild as one of the ten thousand most useless inventions in the universe. This device was born from a gamble made by the History Fictionologist "Red-Nosed Old-Timer." He claimed to be able to climb into the sky via lamplight and bet one-tenth of his wealth on it. However, when the distance is too long, walking on the light bridge is no different to a long-distance marathon. Yet if the distance is too short, the energy consumption needed to maintain the project far exceeds the cost of building a physical bridge — This is indeed an innovative creation, but it's hard to figure out where it should be used.

C: 谜语博士向来自诩为谜语大师巴德•巴比巴伯•巴拉毕生的宿敌。他用二十八种语法错误和三十六种语义漂变制作出一副奥塔牌，用它们置换掉占卜师们手中的塔奥牌。紊乱的词序和话语化作无序的乱流，最终，由占卜宣判的真实，替代了似是而非的现实。当眼前的一切都迥然不同时，改变的或许并非世界，而是人们看待它的眼睛。
E: Dr. Riddle always styled himself as the archrival of Riddler Baden Babbibalo Bala. Using twenty-eight types of grammatical mistakes and thirty-six semantic changes to create a set of Towat cards, replacing soothsayers' Tawot cards with his invention instead. The chaos from the disarray of word sequences and discourse ultimately replaced the ambiguous reality with the divination's declared truth. When everything becomes jarringly paradoxical before you, it may not be the world that has changed, but the eyes of those who see it.

C: 有一群刻法勒的信徒执着于寻找巨大的脚印，他们声称这是刻法勒在大地上行走过的证明，而人们踩在脚印里也能获得泰坦的祝福。另一群人从中发现了商机，他们会专门寻找那些尚未发现的脚印，然后围绕脚印修建展览馆，信徒们前来朝拜则需要支付费用。这种活动又吸引来第三批人，他们是工匠和商贩，在展览馆周围贩卖脚印模型。也许，促进商贸也是刻法勒赐福的一种。
E: A group of Kephale followers were obsessed with finding giant footprints. They claimed those are the proofs of Kephale once walking on earth, and people would receive the Titan's blessing if they stood in the footprints. Another group smelled a business opportunity from this rumor. They were dedicated to finding new footprints, then building exhibition halls around the prints and charging a fee for pilgrims coming to worship. These activities drew a third kind of people, the craftsmen and businesses that sold miniature models of the footprint around the halls. Maybe boosting commerce is also a form of Kephale's blessing.

C: 「黑塔情商低下，螺丝咕姆则需要学习更多有机生命的常识！」俱乐部粉丝群总对天才们议论纷纷，他们围绕斯蒂芬•劳艾德的真实年龄争论不下，有人认为他是中年男士，有人则坚称他是孩童。纷杂议论中，粉丝提出这样一件趣事：曾有传言称天才俱乐部里的「科学怪人」是位男性，没想到她不仅是位女科学家，并且气质脱俗。于是他们吸取经验，抛出了新的问题：斯蒂芬•劳艾德的性别是真是伪？
E: "Herta's EQ is too low and Screwllum needs to learn more common knowledge regarding organics!" Fans of the Genius Society are always arguing over the various geniuses, and they often find themselves squabbling over things like Stephen Lloyd's actual age. Some believe he is a middle-aged man, while others maintain that he's just a child. In the chaos of their arguments, fans have brought forth an interesting anecdote to note: It is said that the being known as "Mad Scientist" among the members of the Genius Society was once rumored to be a man. No one expected a female scientist, let alone one possessed of refined manners. As such, the fans learned from this experience and posed a new question: Is Stephen Lloyd's gender also a fabrication?

C: 颓唐的自灭者中流传着一个说法：即宇宙万物并无意义，人类在星神眼里亦不值一提。如果星神当真凌驾众生，高高在上，又怎会在乎凡人的爱恨苦乐？沉眠无相者Ⅸ的存在就是明证。为了向自灭者证明星神在乎，混沌医师结合秘学僧侣的巫神术制造了星神火漆，据说盖下这枚火漆，就会遥遥吸引对应星神跨越时空的瞥视——目前还没有成功案例，不过，确实有些自灭者盖下火漆后，重拾了对宇宙、星神及其它一切的信心。
E: There is a saying amongst the dejected Self-Annihilators that the universe has no purpose and humans are nothing in the eyes of the Aeons. If the Aeons truly stand above all lifeforms and rule supreme, then why would they care about the everyday concerns of mortals? The existence of the sleeping and shapeless IX is proof of that. To show the Self-Annihilators that the Aeons do care, the Doctors of Chaos combined the demon god crafts of the occult monks to create the Sealing Wax of Aeons. It is said that stamping with this Sealing Wax will attract a glimpse from the corresponding Aeon from across space and time — There are no successful examples yet, but some Self-Annihilators did regain their faith in the universe, Aeons, and everything else after stamping with this sealing wax.

E: Pursuit's End

C:
你做了一个美梦，和朋友在三颗太阳下举杯对饮，敬伟大的和平！笼罩天空的穹顶将星球拥抱入怀，隔绝刺目的光与热，你设计的杰作，然后亲眼目睹它在天亮时崩裂。

坍塌，尖叫，超新星迸发的伽马射线爆，你的眼睛、双手乃至体内的每一个细胞都在哀嚎，恶徒们点燃了大气，屹立了两百九十个琥珀纪的高塔付之一炬。死亡的病菌在斯梅亚星环的冰晶上跳舞，你发誓，要让它们加倍奉还。

你用笔描绘出燃烧星河的巨舰，炮火将夜幕下的恶毒焚烧，在所爱的一切都变成废墟前，为敌人带来必要的毁灭。
E:
You had a beautiful dream in which you and your friends raised your glasses under three suns, toasting to the great peace! The dome hovering in the sky envelops the planet, shielding it from intense light and heat. It is the masterpiece you designed, and you witness with your own eyes how it crumbles at daybreak.

Collapse, screams, bursts of gamma rays from the supernova. Your eyes, hands, and every single cell in your body wail in agony. The villains set the atmosphere on fire, reducing the tower that has stood for <unbreak>290</unbreak> Amber Eras to ashes. Deadly microbes are dancing on the ice crystals of Ring of Smya, and you vow to make them suffer tenfold.

You sketch the outline of the colossal ship that has ignited the galaxy. The bombs incinerate all viciousness under the night sky. Before everything you cherish turns to ruins, you inflict the necessary devastation upon the enemy.

C:
飞船悄无声息地在拉蒂兰卡降落，这块满是苦痛的土地，不久前才从战乱中赢得片刻喘息。屏幕在舞台周围展开，它们缓缓地悬停在空中，静悄悄地飘向人们的睡梦中，用清晨的歌声将大地唤醒。

你不知道这点微不足道的努力能否帮助数亿人获得幸福，但至少舞蹈与歌唱能在此刻激扬起欢笑，抚慰疲惫的心灵。哪怕只有一点，它们能透过联觉信标，让善意的关注多上些许，也会有数不尽的病痛能得到治愈。

宇宙很大，渺小的你们亦不过虫豸，但看着那些笑容，你也会觉得，自己收获的快乐比宇宙还要大很多。
E:
The spaceship lands silently in Latilanka, a land filled with pain that has only gained a brief respite from war. A screen expands around the stage, hovering in the air, quietly drifting into people's dreams, and awakening the land with morning songs.

You are not sure whether this insignificant effort can bring happiness to the billions of masses, but at least the dancing and singing can elicit laughter and soothe their weary souls right now. Through the Synesthesia Beacon, they can encourage attention to kindness, even if it is just a little, and that can heal countless ailments.

In the vast universe, all of you are as negligible as dust. However, the joy you gain from the sight of the smiles is much greater than the universe itself.

C: 网络的空间无比宽广，以太编辑的法则足以从朋克洛德延伸至热夜之都，人们将口舌和耳朵放进电子屏幕，放纵被压抑的一切。你将意识的幽灵复制又分割，洒进这片浑水里面，他们在热闹的话题下喧嚣，或诱使争吵，或肆意欺诈。\n\n你是优秀的演出家，带来种种笑剧，一个幽灵扮演丑角，一个幽灵发起嘲笑，还有个幽灵在呼唤观众的鼓掌。你们斥骂，观众便跟着鄙弃，你们呐喊，观众便一同咆哮。多么愉快的故事，混乱的声音宛如乌蒂法章鱼的触角！你一头扎进数字的海洋，用水花掩盖齐声的大笑。
E: The expanse of cyberspace is so vast that the laws of aether editing can stretch from Punklorde to the Capital of Passion. People put their tongues and ears into electronic screens, unleashing all their suppressed desires. You duplicate specters of your consciousness and then divide them again, sprinkling them all over the murky waters. They clamor with the buzz under hot topics, inciting arguments or deceiving others.\n\nYou are an excellent performer, presenting various comedic shows. One specter plays the fool, another mocks, and another calls for applause. When you lot criticize someone, the audience despises the same. When you lot scream, the audience roars with you. What a delightful story! The chaotic voices resemble the tentacles of the Ultifa octopus! You dive into the sea of numbers to drown out the united laughter with the splash.

C:
与你的吟唱不同，这是个严肃的话题，事关裁决的标准。
律法为翁法罗斯之根本，不得动摇。
平衡为万事运行之准则，不容僭越。
我们用两把剑替代它的托盘，惩戒一切不公，
以联盟诸邦的审判为依据，代行已陨之神的职责。
你我皆知，受审判者乃无罪之人，
可这并不意味，他不应付出任何代价。
你大可动之以情，晓之以理，但裁决不是公民大会那样的闹剧，
星月不会因诗歌调转方向，律法也不会为死亡流泪。
请走吧，你不是第一个来求情的，也不会是最后一个。
E:
Unlike your idle songs, this is a serious matter, a matter of principle.
Laws and rules have forged the foundation of Amphoreus, so it mustn't waive.
Balance is the way all things work, so it mustn't be distorted.
We replace the scales with two swords, punishing injustice in all forms.
By the judgment of the city alliance, we assume the duty left by gods long fallen.
You and I both know the accused is innocent.
But innocence does not absolve him of consequence.
Persuasion and reason may have their place, but judgment is no farce. We will hold no votes, no referendum, unlike the citizens' assembly.
The stars and moon do not change their course for poetry, and the law sheds no tears for death.
Begone. You are not the first to beg for mercy, and you will not be the last.

C:
请把我的遗体烧成灰烬，装入瓶中，
请在瓶身刻上戏语，丢入海中。
不要在我的葬礼哭泣，法吉娜会笑话你们，
也不要埋怨我的提前离去，我只不过想早点到达目的地。
我活着的时候在海浪里奔涌，
死后也亦当随洋流漂游。
唯一的心事，便是如何觐见法吉娜，
如若两手空空，难免遭她嫌弃，
可我生来便两手空空，此时自然没有东西可以带走。
还好我想到一个笑话，那是我的得意之作，
我要将它作为送给法吉娜的见面礼，
如果你们见到波涛汹涌，那一定代表她很满意。
E:
Burn my remains to ashes and put them in a bottle.
Inscribe playful words upon it, then throw it into the sea.
Shed no tears at my funeral, for Phagousa would only laugh at your grief.
Don't blame my untimely demise, as I merely wished to get to my final resting place sooner.
I rode the waves while I lived,
And now, in death, I shall drift along with the ocean currents.
My only concern is how to secure an audience with Phagousa.
If I come empty-handed, they'll surely scorn me.
But I was born with nothing, so there's nothing I can take with me.
Luckily, I've crafted a brilliant joke, my masterpiece,
I'll share it with Phagousa as a gift upon our meeting.
If you see the waves roaring, it's a sign that they are pleased.

C:
在那信仰塔兰顿的土地，名为利顿特拉图的城邦，
犯罪的惩罚只有两种，无罪和灭亡。
多么严酷的律法，行刑方式却很戏剧化。
或许是这里的公民终生规言矩步，
临死时才能大笑一场。
刽子手扮作小丑，滑稽登场，
仿佛他不是来毁灭你，而是讨你的鼓掌。
他的笑话好笑之极，连将死之人都无法抵抗，
就在囚犯哈哈大笑之际，头颅就已经掉在地上，
那僵硬的嘴角，还保持欢乐的模样。
你说这刽子手到底是歹毒还是心善？
可他只是擦一擦大刀，走向下一个刑场。
E:
In the land where Talanton is revered, there lies a city-state named Lituntrato,
Where justice for crimes knows only two fates: Innocence or annihilation.
How harsh the law! Yet its execution is nothing short of dramatic.
Perhaps it's because the citizens here live their lives by the book,
Only to laugh heartily before they meet their end.
The executioner dresses as a clown, entering the stage with a comical flair,
As if he's not here to end your life, but to win your applause.
His jokes are so hilarious that even those facing their final moments can't help but laugh aloud.
As the prisoner's laughter echoes, their head suddenly rolls onto the ground,
Leaving their stiffened face frozen in a joyful grin.
So, tell me, is this executioner vicious or kind-hearted?
But he simply wipes his blade clean and moves towards the next execution site.

C: 运气是一种能力吗？也许；运气能够被改变吗？黑塔认为能。这位天才发明了「福灵胶」，将它涂抹在眼皮上，将获得整整<unbreak>24</unbreak>个系统时的好运。黑塔太空站的许多人欣喜若狂地试用这项发明，他们全都度过了波澜不惊的一天，这说明在动荡的世界上，能平凡地生活就已经很好运了。
E: Is luck an ability? Maybe. Can luck be changed? Herta believes it can. That genius invented the "Fortune Glue." Just apply it on your eyelids and you would get a full <unbreak>24</unbreak> system hours' worth of good luck. Many at Herta space station were ecstatic to try out this invention. They all had an uneventful day, which shows that it is already lucky to be able to live an ordinary life in a turbulent world.

C: 生命只是一场游戏——对于赛博世界「朋克洛德」的一众黑客，这句玩笑并非戏言。他们游走于网络空间，用名为以太编辑的技术改写现实，将人生编写成一场宏大的游戏。偶有天才之中的天才，得以飞向星球之外，将广袤的银河当作新手村外的第二片舞台。这张卡带记录了某位传奇黑客的故事，他的一生始于朋克洛德的地下水库，终于巡海游侠的簇拥之中。据说那场葬礼安静、无声，只有一张游戏卡带静躺于棺木之上，为一位黑客的结局落下「通关」的注脚。
E: Life is just a game — This sentence is no mere jest for hackers from the cyberworld Punklorde. They traverse the internet and use a technology known as aether editing to alter reality, making life into a great game. Occasionally, the cream of the crop among them gets to soar away from the planet and use the vast Cosmos as the second stage beyond the tutorial area. This cassette tape records the story of a legendary hacker. His life began in Punklorde's underground water reservoirs and ended in the company of the Galaxy Rangers. It is said that the funeral was a quiet one, with only a game cassette silently lying atop the coffin, serving as a footnote of "Finished the Game" at the hacker's final rites.

C: 某日，天才俱乐部#77迷图突发奇想，决定为银河教育事业添上一笔。她用简易力场在克莱因瓶中编织了包括微型虫洞、虚数亚空间场在内的复数空间结构，希望通过这一益智玩具为全宇宙的孩童打开物理世界的大门。这一杰作不出意外迎来了惨烈的滞销，显然迷图认知中的学前教育和大众相比存在着不小的差异。这说明：天才并非在每个领域都是天才。
E: One day, Genius Society #77 Puzzle suddenly wanted to add something to the Cosmic educational effort. She used a simple force field to weave multidimensional structures such as mini wormholes and Imaginary subspace fields in a Klein bottle, hoping to use this educational toy as the first stepping stone to physics for all children in the universe. As expected, this great invention was met with abysmal sales. Evidently, pre-school education as conceived by Puzzle was quite different from the general public's perception of it. This only illustrates that a genius cannot be a genius in every aspect of life.

C: 如何与虫群共生，是摩斯卡人从出生起就要考虑的问题。他们豢养落单的蠹役，利用「繁育」的性质间接获取生物质能源。从衣食住行到尖端科技，虫子充斥着生活的每个角落。多年后，当武装考古学派抵达与外界失联的摩斯卡星时，他们在总统办公室找到了无人接听的电话。它的身体蠕动，迸射出孢子，仿佛随时都将破茧而出。「与其说是摩斯卡人利用了虫群，不如说，是虫群被动寄生在了他们的文明上。」
E: How to co-exist with the Swarm? That is the question that the Moskans have contemplated since the day they were born. They raise straggling bugs in servitude, using the properties of Propagation to indirectly harvest biomass energy. From daily necessities to cutting-edge technology, bugs are dispersed across all corners of their life. Many years later, when the Armed Archaeologists arrived on the planet of Moska — long cut off from the outside world — they found a phone that no one answered in the president's office. Its body quivered and spouted spores, as if it would hatch from its cocoon at any moment. "Rather than saying the Moskans used the Swarm, it would be more accurate to say that the Swarm passively parasitized onto their civilization."
