C: 最近空间站的研究进度受到事故的冲击，有所延后。不少科员捶胸顿足，为辜负了黑塔女士的信任与青睐而自责，请问黑塔女士，您有没有什么话想跟大家说？ 「没有，加油。」  大家都想为黑塔女士您的科研之路出一份力嘛…… 「不用了。」  确实，大家的科研水平远不如黑塔女士，这也是我们被您的智慧与卓见深深折服的原因。请问黑塔女士，您有没有什么科研建议能送给大家，我们也想向您学习学习！ 「没有。」  黑塔女士，您的智力水平与天赋之高大家都有目共睹，可是对于我们普通人来说，实在没办法做到和您一样…您能不能给我们指导指导，比如说我们智力有限，那就应该集中精力在某某领域之类的？ 「那就回家睡觉呗。」
E: Recent research progress on the space station has been hampered by the impact of the accident. Several researchers have been blaming themselves for betraying Madam Herta's trust and preference. May I ask: Do you have anything you'd like to say to everyone? "Nope. Keep up the great work." Everyone wishes to contribute to your scientific research, Madam Herta... "No thanks." Indeed, no researcher could ever hope to match Madam Herta's scientific prowess, which is why we're deeply impressed by your wisdom and insights. Could you please enlighten us, Madam Herta, with some research advice for everyone? We'd love to learn from you! "No." Madam Herta, your intellect and talents are obvious to all, but normal people like us could never hope to be like you... Could you please give us any pointers, such as in what domain we might devote our limited cognitive resources to? "You should go home and sleep."

C: 世人常道：「狐人天生会行商」。若在茶馆「不夜侯」多作盘桓，便能深刻体会到这一事实。 「您有所不知，」那狐人女子一面摇着那柄精美绝伦的聚骨扇，一面盯着眼前将信将疑的男人，「一方水土养得一方生灵。若将苦水之邦的沙枳籽种移栽至翁瓦克的圣壤中，便能结成甜蜜沉重的炽阳橘。那自然是因为翁瓦克四风调和，土壤肥沃。而把塔拉萨的灯鱼苗引入敝邦，交由鳞渊境的持明族悉心培育，则可令灯鱼体长倍增至三尺有余。」 「『鸣火』最近的打算，便是悉心选出最有商业潜力的物种，由商团星槎接力递送，安全无虞。不出旬月，阁下就能获得第一批返货，为塔拉萨渊底水晶宫增色，更能成为贵邦出口贸易的特产。」 有腮的男人喷出几个珍珠般的气泡，在泡语中代表略带犹豫的赞许。随后他以声带发出奇妙的音节：「吾原以为『鸣火』干的都是囤积居奇，买入卖出的生意。你们这是打算撬开运输行当由公司独大的局面吗？说罢，要多少钱？」 「往返费用，十取其九。掮客的生意终归只是左手转右手，我的意思是，左鳍肢转右鳍肢。常言道，『大商无算』。于人有利，方能于己谋利。只要水晶宫的渊主认可，我想换得一纸…咳，一朋长久契约，如何？」 这一日，停云不仅谈成了一笔生意，更为联盟结交了一位长久的朋友。
E: There's a saying: "Foxians are born to do business." Linger a little while at the Sleepless Earl teahouse, and you'll come to appreciate this fact. "There's something you don't know," says that foxian woman, wafting her exquisite reticulated fan as she gazes at the skeptical man before her, "different lands raise their special type of life. If Sandcitrus seeds from the Bitterwater Confederacy are transplanted into the sacred soils of Vonwacq, then they will grow into sweet oranges. This is naturally due to the fertile and balanced soils of Vonwacq. And if the lightfish fry from Thalassa are introduced to my world and raised by the Vidyadhara at Scalegorge Waterscape, they can double in size to over three feet long." "The Whistling Flames' latest plan is to carefully select species with commercial potential, and relay them via trade starskiffs for safe transport. Within one month, you'll get the first batch of goods back. These goods would add to the glamours of the crystal palace at the bottom of the Thalassan abyss, and can even become a unique trading products for your nation." The man with gills blows out a few bubbles, which represents a slightly hesitant agreement in his culture. Then, his larynx pronounces some wondrous syllables: "I thought the Whistling Flames were speculative traders involved in arbitrage. Are you planning to change the current situation in the logistics industry, where the IPC reigns supreme? Tell me, how much do you want?" "For a return service, we take ninety percent. A broker just flips product from one hand to the other. Or rather, from one finned limb to the other. As the saying goes, "Real business talks no profit." Only by benefiting others can we hope to benefit ourselves. As long as the Lord of the Abyss in the Crystal Palace assents, then I'd like to enter into a contr— Ahem, I mean a permanent partnership. What do you say?" On this day, Tingyun not only closed on a deal, but also formed a new friendship for the Alliance.

C: 奇妙的小镇科学狂人、无机生命，以及人偶少女环绕着她。他们分享下午茶、他们共同研究，他们时而聒噪，有时欢笑。 与他们第一次见面是什么时候？她已记不清了，只记得是为了某个项目。她是被迫的——她很确信。她咀嚼着糕点，不慌不忙，参与这一切只为那值得令人付出时间去揣摩的模拟「星神」。 值得付出时间…但并不值得被迫社交。 「天才俱乐部？不关心。」 「很怪的直觉，那名叫『黑塔』的家伙和我有点像。我是说…更深层次一点的地方，有点像。」 她确信自己不会再犯错。因为不再信任，便不再会被辜负，同样…不会辜负任何人。 「生命」的本质是什么…「生命」的终点在哪里？ 答案真的存在吗？ 她寡淡而沉默的面庞上没有表露出丝毫情绪。然而，她的发丝蒸腾着翻滚煮热的香气，她的眼眶微微发红——她在享受这一切。 宇宙纷杂都是干扰。唯有「星神」二字，可令她怦然心动。 多么有趣。 于「温床」上，那「电饭煲」孕育的「生命」恰好出锅，创造生命的手法恰似神迹。 多么浪漫。 她比谁都知道研究「星神」要付出的代价…可她不在乎，她知道！她甚至可以——成为……？！ 时间正好——「项目」的更新又要开启了。 她转身离去。 少女不曾知晓，无论过了多久，外婆的目光一直透过屏幕注视着她，日日皆然。 「阿阮…我的阿阮。再见面时，不知会是……」
E: She is surrounded by an eccentric science fanatic from a small town, an inorganic lifeform, and a puppet girl. They indulge in afternoon teas and collaborate in research. They squabble loudly and giggle from time to time. When did she first meet them? She can't remember, only that it was for a project. She was forced to be there — of that she is certain. With leisure, she munches on the cake. She became a part of this solely for the sake of simulated "Aeons," which are worth her time and efforts. They are worth her time... but not worth being forced to socialize. "Genius Society? I do not care." "This is a strange, instinctive feeling. That one named 'Herta' is rather similar to me. I mean... similar on a deeper level." She is certain that she won't make another mistake. It's because she no longer trusted anyone, so she won't be let down again, and... she won't let anyone else down again. What is the fundamental essence of "life"... Where does "life" end? Do the answers really exist? Not a trace of emotion can be discerned on her impassive and silent face. Yet, her hair is roiling with the heat of boiling and steaming, and the rims of her eyes are slightly red — she is enjoying this. Only the word "Aeon" can stir her heart. Everything else in the universe is a mere distraction. How interesting. On the "incubator," a "life" nurtured by the "rice cooker" popped out in perfection. The method with which life is created is miraculous. How romantic. She knows better than anyone the price one has to pay to study Aeons... but she does not care. She knows! She might even — become...!? The time is just right — The update for the "project" is about to commence. She turns around and leaves. Unbeknownst to the girl, her grandmother has always been watching her through the monitor, day after day for countless years. "A-Ruan... My A-Ruan. When we finally meet again, would it be...?"

C: 离开哀地里亚的那一天，她踏上觐见塞纳托斯的旅途，一场不知终点在何处的征程。 她斥退黑潮造物，挽救衰败的村庄。她不再是哀地里亚的「督战圣女」，却还是刻意与人保持距离，藏起自己的双手。但她不忍孩童闪亮的目光，第一次拿起针线，满足了孩子抚摸玩偶的最后愿望。 在那遍布死亡的战场，她为无法归乡的战士写下寄托哀思的家书，她也曾跟随骄傲的诗人学习，用诗篇为后者送别…… 「死亡是无法逃避的必然」，「死亡是属于战士的荣誉」，「死亡不过是走出时间」…在那漫长的一路，她听过许多或直白或诗意的议论，然而这些答案犹如拂过水面的微风，从未抵达她的内心深处。 「后来…有人说，那黎明照拂的圣城满溢生的希望，我或许能在这里……」 少女欲言又止。 「没事没事，你现在不想说也没事，奥赫玛欢迎你！」红发女孩为她端来一杯热茶。 金发女士颇有兴趣地打量着少女的手套—— 「很有设计感的饰品，也是旅途中学会的么？」 她羞涩地交叉起手指。 「嗯，我想…至少能让告别，更庄重一些。」 奥赫玛的阳光热烈而灿烂，黎明机器永不落幕的宣告许诺了无尽的明天。 从那小屋开始，她小心翼翼地开始第二次人生。 原本空旷的房间在她的装扮下一日日丰盈起来，羊毛毡玩偶，奇美拉抱枕，厚厚的诗集，它们不再是悲伤的象征，而成为赠礼、纪念与祝福—— 那些曾为了逝者而存在的习惯，在奥赫玛的阳光下第一次有了生的温暖和力量。 「从这扇窗中望出去的风景 依然同来时的一样 阳光灿烂，水波温柔 我吹散双手的雪 不让它们太过寒冷、太接近于春天 ……」 ——少女写下的，名为「春天」的诗
E: The day she left Aidonia, she embarked on a journey to meet Thanatos, a journey with an unknown destination. She repelled the creations of the black tide, and saved declining villages. She was no longer the Maiden of War from Aidonia, but she still kept her distance from others deliberately, hiding her own hands. Yet, she was no match for the children's sparkling eyes. When she first picked up the needle and thread, she fulfilled a child's final wish to touch a plush toy. In the battlefield engulfed by death, she wrote letters back to the grieving families of the warriors who could not return home. She even learned from a prideful poet, and used poems to see off the dead... "Death is an unavoidable inevitability," "Death is a warrior's honor," "Death is merely a walk out of time." On that arduous journey, she heard plenty of discussions, some direct, some poetic. Yet, these answers were like a breeze that blew over the water surface, never reaching the depths of her heart. "Then... someone said, that dawn enveloped the holy city's overflowing hope, perhaps there, I can also..." The girl hesitated. "Don't worry, it's fine if you don't want to talk about it now. Okhema welcomes you!"The red-haired girl served her a cup of hot tea. The golden-haired lady examined the girl's gloves with interest— "Such aesthetically designed accessory, did you also learn to make it during your travels?" She shyly interlocked her fingers. "Yes, I wanted... farewells to be more formal." The sunlight in Okhema was parching and radiant, the unending announcement from the Dawn Device promised endless tomorrows. Starting from that small cabin, she carefully began her second life. The originally empty room was decorated with bits and pieces of her daily life, felt plush toys, chimera pillows, and thick collections of poems. They were no longer symbols of tragedies, but gifts, memorials, and blessings— The habits she once had for the dead were able to give birth to warmth and strength for the first time, under Okhema's sunlight. "The scenery outside this window always looks the same. Brilliant sunlight, gentle ripples. I blew off the snow on my hands, so that they wouldn't be too cold, for spring was far too near. ..." — Written by a girl, a poem titled "Spring"

C: 同其他医者一样，女孩许下治愈所有人的愿望。 她想抚慰世界倾覆下凡人的惨痛，可当黑潮将城邦吞没，瘟疫包围重伤的人群，她只能驱散疫病，而无法停止绝望的蔓延。 「或许，一名好的医师，需要的远不止灵验的药草……」 「乳色的窗帘要能透光，床要软硬适中，床头摆好新鲜的花束…这样在房间里也能看到和外面一样的『色彩』……」 她想为末世中的人们带来希望，一缕从未来照入的光。 于是伴着安神的香薰，一位弥留之际的少女在温暖舒适的房间中喃喃自语，尘封许久的记忆慢慢复苏。 「爸爸送我八音盒的那天，外面也下着淅淅沥沥的小雨。我听着叮叮当当的旋律，在滴滴答答的雨声中度过了最美好的生日…… 「我还记得，白玫瑰开满了街道，刮风的时候，就像在下一场香气扑鼻的大雪…… 「还有那片天空，越来越深的蓝色中落着一点橙红…」她回忆着，「然后那些透明的泡泡环绕着我，就像…… 就像现在一样……」 滴答，滴答—— 时针在回忆中走动，叙说的声音逐渐低弱。 那流动不息的雨声中，只余一声满足的叹息。 「嘟嘟……」小伊卡低垂着头，懊丧地趴在小马玩偶旁。 「小伊卡，听到了嘛…她看到了我们创造的天空呢……」 房间的天花板上，夕阳落入海中。 她握着少女逐渐冰冷的手，晶莹的眼泪滑过脸庞。 「以后，我们一定能把它变得更宽广，更温暖……」 「嘟！」
E: Like all healers, the girl made a vow to cure everyone. She wished to soothe the suffering of mortals as the world collapsed, but when the black tide swallowed city-states and plague surrounded the wounded, she could only drive away disease — she could not stop despair from spreading. "Perhaps, to be a good physician, one needs far more than just effective medicine..." "Milky-white curtains should let in the light, the bed should be firm yet soft, and fresh flowers should be placed by the bedside... that way, even inside the room, they can see the same 'colors' as outside..." She wanted to bring hope to those in the end times, a ray of light shining in from the future. Accompanied by the soothing scent of incense, a girl on the verge of passing murmured in the warmth and comfort of the room, as long-sealed memories slowly resurfaced. "The day my father gave me a music box, it was also drizzling outside. I listened to the chimes of its melody, spending the most wonderful birthday amidst the pitter-patter of the rain... "I still remember how white roses bloomed all along the streets, and when the wind blew, it was like a snowfall filled with fragrance... "And that sky, a deepening blue with a touch of orange-red falling within it," she reminisced, "and then those transparent bubbles surrounded me, just like... just like they are now..." Tick-tock, tick-tock... The clock hands moved through memories as the voice telling them grew weaker. In the ever-flowing sound of rain, only a single sigh of content remained. "Du du..."Little Ica lowered its head, dejectedly curling up beside the plush pony. "Little Ica, did you hear that... She saw the sky we created..." On the ceiling of the room, the setting sun sank into the sea. She held the girl's gradually cooling hand, crystal-clear tears slipping down her face. "One day, we'll make it even wider, even warmer..." "Du!"

C: 你睁开眼，发现自己仍在空间站，还好这次不需要再面对什么陌生的天花板。\n刚刚的经历仍在你的脑中盘旋，如果这一切是真的，你希望姬子就在附近。\n你的心中，还有一堆疑问需要她的解答。
E: You open your eyes and find yourself still in the space station, staring at a ceiling that doesn't look so strange.\nYou are living through what just happened. It seems your mind is not playing tricks on you. You wish Himeko was here.\nYou have so many questions to ask.

C:
在这地下的巨大空间中待的时间越长，就越难区分冷峭的岩层与天空的区别。
现在是时候重返地面了…但仅凭你们一己之力是无法实现这一宏愿的——否则你们早就爬上去了，不是吗？
「地火」的诸位代布洛妮娅向你们致意，也表示愿为你们开路…只是不能对向导过于挑剔。
做好心理建设之后就随桑博一道出发吧。
E:
The longer you stay in this giant underground space, the harder it is to differentiate between the cold rock ceiling and the sky.
It's time to return to the surface... But you wouldn't be able to without any help — because if you could, you would've already done so, isn't that right?
The members of Wildfire extends Bronya's greetings to you and are willing to guide you... But you can't be too picky about the guide.
Prepare yourself mentally and leave with Sampo.

C: 告别风雪转霁的贝洛伯格，列车再次驶向星穹深处。\n下一次启航前，乘客们暂得片刻闲暇。有人冲泡咖啡，有人眺望远星，还有人辗转旧梦…\n不如趁这当口，向姬子打听下一趟旅程的目的地了。
E: The Express gallops into the depths of the interstellar sea after bidding farewell to Belobog, where snow had given way to sunshine.\nThe passengers share a rare moment of respite before embarking on the next stage of the journey. Some make coffee, some gaze toward the stars, and some mull over old dreams...\nUse this free time to ask Himeko about your next destination.

C: 突然之间，你和丹恒又取得了联系。简单寒暄几句后，你迫不及待地询问他的冒险经历…
E: Suddenly, your connection with Dan Heng is restored. After some simple pleasantries, you impatiently ask him about his adventure...

C: 追踪星核猎手——你们想象着这桩任务的艰巨危险，猜测卡芙卡会准备怎样的诡计和陷阱。她却悠闲自若地现身，告诉你们已等候许久。一切并不如你们所想的那样。
E: Tracking the Stellaron Hunter — You imagine the gravity and danger of this task and speculate on the tricks and traps Kafka would prepare for you. Instead, she shows up casually and tells you that she's been waiting for your arrival for a long time. It's not at all how you imagined it.

C: 姬子和瓦尔特已经先行一步，前去为列车组众人办理入住手续。和三月七一起前往「白日梦」酒店前台，同他们会合吧。
E: Himeko and Welt have gone on ahead to help everyone check in. Head to The Reverie's reception with March 7th and meet with the others.

C: 流萤向你解释了此处是为何地：黄金时刻的边境，梦境的更深处，家族的建设改造地（换句话说，梦中的工地），她还补充说，自己的「秘密据点」就在深处…只是「家族」眼线密布，两人得偷偷溜进去才行。\n通向深处的道路扑朔迷离，恐怕你得开动脑筋，活用梦境的性质才能继续前进。
E: Firefly explains this place to you: It is the edge of the Golden Hour, the inner depths of the Dreamscape, and The Family's construction and remodeling zone (in other words, a construction site within the dream). She adds that her "secret stronghold" is further on... The only problem is that "The Family" has eyes everywhere, and you will have to sneak in to get inside.\nThe path into the depths is complicated and confusing. You may have to think outside of the box and creatively utilize the characteristics of the Dreamscape to continue onwards.

C: 你们成功找到了出路——是时候继续向酒店大堂前进了。\n希望姬子和三月七已经安全抵达了那里。
E: You successfully found the exit — It is time to continue on toward the hotel lobby.\nLet's hope that Himeko and March 7th have already arrived there safely.

C: 你就不好奇，在你等待列车组期间，匹诺康尼的另一边发生了什么吗？现在你有机会看到了——虽然不是很科学——但好好欣赏吧。
E: Aren't you curious about what took place on the other side of Penacony while you were waiting for the Crew? Now you have a chance to see it — This can't be explained by science, so just enjoy it.

C: 另一边，黄泉——意思是你——和瓦尔特为了挖掘出家族正在隐瞒的真相，孤身潜入至朝露公馆。然而，你们发现本应壁垒森严的公馆里全然不见人影，仅有游荡的怪物四处巡逻。\n究竟发生什么事了？
E: Meanwhile, Acheron — that is to say, you — and Welt have infiltrated the Dewlight Pavilion to bring to light the truth hidden by The Family. To your surprise, the place is empty when it is supposed to be heavily guarded. Only some wandering monsters can be seen patrolling the place.\nWhat's going on?

C: 你的█ ██ ██ █注意力彻底被那█ ███ █埃维金男孩夺去了。他到底是██ █ ██ █ 什么来头？还有时间，或许你可以追上█ ███ ██，问问他究竟是什么██ ███ ██ ██。
E: You are c█m█lete██ ██tranc█d by t█e █vgin boy.██ust who ███he? There█s sti█l tim███Mayb█ you ███ catch up ██ h██ and as█ █im exactly wha█ █████████.

C: 列车组全员再次集合——出人意料的是，这次还有一位洗脱了嫌疑的巡海游侠，黄泉。\n综合多方信息判断，你们认定家族确实在隐瞒某些令人毛骨悚然的真相，而砂金似乎早已察觉其中端倪，并为此费心布置，更将你们暗中选定为他计划的推手。\n远方传来的广播声印证了你们的想法——为了真相，为了死者的公道，为了匹诺康尼的未来，你们必须继续前进。
E: The Crew stands united once more. Surprisingly, there's also a Galaxy Ranger among your ranks who has been cleared of suspicion — Acheron.\nBased on a comprehensive assessment of information from various sources, you confirm that The Family is indeed hiding a terrifying truth. Aventurine seems to have already detected traces of this and spared no effort in making preparations towards it, even secretly selecting you to be the agent to drive his plans forward.\nThe distant broadcast confirms your thoughts. You must push forward — for the truth, justice for the deceased, and Penacony's future.

C: 匹诺康尼的故事再次告一段落——剧目很快就会迎来最高潮了。
E: Once again, the story of Penacony has come to an end. The play will soon reach its climax.

C: 时间回退至你们尚未离开流梦礁的时间点。姬子从黄金的时刻归来，更捎来了一个强有力的推断：「钟表匠」怀中空无一物的梦泡与门童米沙或许有着千丝万缕的联系。\n为了求证，你们携米沙一道，再次进入米哈伊尔的梦泡——如无意外，一切真相就潜藏在这段稚子的长梦中。
E: Time reverses to the point before you left Dreamflux Reef. Himeko returns from Golden Hour with a powerful deduction: There may be some inextricable link between the empty dream bubble that the Watchmaker is holding and Misha the bellboy.\nIn order to prove it, you take Misha back into Mikhail's dream bubble... If everything goes as expected, the truth may be lurking here in this long dream of the child.

C: 好嘛，上次见过的无名客姐们也在这。她的搭子说这有人见过「真正的睡蕉小猴」，你很好奇，这真小猴和假小猴的差别，有没有你跟真正的帕姆差别大。\n八成没有，但你还是去见识见识吧，开枪前多搞点情报不是坏事。
E: So, that Nameless from last time is here, and her pal mentioned bumping into someone claiming to have met the real Slumbernana Monkey. You're wondering if the gap between the real and fake monkeys is wider than the gap between you and the legit Pom-Pom.\nMaybe not, but still, you decide to snoop around and gather some intel. It's always good to have the deets before shooting.

C: 然而，在这场美梦之中，去而复返的，却也并非仅有客人——人们安心地谈论着他，只因故乡于重履此地的男人而言，如今几近死地。\n物是人非，在了解这里的近况时，务必小心谨慎。
E: However, it's not just the guests who return to this beautiful dream... People discuss him without concern, for home is now no more than a deathtrap for this man returning to familiar lands.\nThough the place remains as it was, people have changed. Take great care as you investigate the situation.

C: 我们与被称作黄金裔的翁法罗斯人发生了初次接触，并跟随两位黄金裔进入神殿进行探索。他们声称来此是为了营救难民，但是在难民中似乎发生了冲突。
E: We had initial contact with the people of Amphoreus known as the Chrysos Heirs, then followed two of them into the Temple to explore. They claimed their purpose here was to rescue the refugees, yet there seemed to be tension and strife among the people.

C: 在黄金裔浴场中，阿格莱雅以自己的方式确认了我们的善意，似乎奥赫玛愿意将我们奉为贵宾。希望此次开拓之行真能这般顺利吧。
E: In the Chrysos Heirs bath, Aglaea affirmed our good intentions in her way, and it seems Okhema is willing to welcome us as honored guests. Let's hope this trailblazing expedition continues to unfold as smoothly.

C: 借黄金狮首之口，{NICKNAME}一行人得知疯溃的尼卡多利正在酝酿针对奥赫玛的恐怖袭击。事已至此，唯有继续前进，挫败恶意的源头。
E: Through Chryseus Leo, {NICKNAME} and the party learned that the maddened Nikador is planning a devastating attack on Okhema. With events taking this dire turn, their only option is to press forward and eliminate the source of this malevolence.

C: 为了复现记忆、完成对克拉特鲁斯的承诺，*我们*悄悄来到命运重渊，寻找历经当年岁月的事物。
E: To replicate memories and fulfill the promise to Krateros, we quietly visit the Abyss of Fate, searching for objects that have witnessed those years.

C: 与风堇一同前往友爱之馆，获取能够补充智库的资料，补充对翁法罗斯的认识。\n找找与阿那克萨戈拉斯有关的资料。
E: Head to the Library of Philia with Hyacine to collect materials for the data bank and expand our understanding of Amphoreus.\nLook for documents related to Anaxagoras.

C: 公民大会关于「暂停逐火之旅」的议题也即将迎来尾声，众人也将见证「投票选出的明天」究竟是何模样。\n掌握翁法罗斯命运的最后一枚陶片就在你的手中，你会将它掷于何处？
E: The citizens' assembly on the matter of "Pausing the Flame-Chase Journey" is coming to an end. Soon, everyone will witness what "vote-decided tomorrow" they will experience.\nYou hold the last ceramic shard that will decide Amphoreus's fate. Where will your vote fall?

C: 因为先前的事件影响，我前往树庭，意图调查并记录下这个世界的泰坦神话与相关研究，却在那里偶遇了处理要事的风堇。收集火种的任务已经刻不容缓，所以我决定见证风堇完成天空的仪式，获得前往艾格勒所在之处的手段。
E: Still reeling from recent events, I went to the Grove, hoping to investigate and record the myths of the Titans or some manner of related research. There, I unexpectedly encountered Hyacine, who was dealing with urgent matters. The task of collecting Coreflames could wait no longer, so I chose to witness Hyacine perform the Skyward Rite and gain the path to Aquila's location.

C: 天空一族的传说、风堇所在意的历史空白，「那段往事」。我们思索着翼兽们诉说的未知，不断追逐着艾格勒，试图利用天象画壁将其逼出。
E: The legends of the Sky people, the historical gaps that concern Hyacine — "the past." We pondered the unknown tales shared by the winged beasts, relentlessly tracking Aquila down, trying to force them out using the celestial mural.

C: 天空一族的传说、风堇所在意的历史空白，「那段往事」。我们思索着翼兽们诉说的未知，不断追逐着艾格勒，试图利用天象画壁将其逼出。
E: The legends of the Sky people, the historical gaps that concern Hyacine — "the past." We pondered the unknown tales shared by the winged beasts, relentlessly tracking Aquila down, trying to force them out using the celestial mural.

C: 我以灵水辟出前往创世涡心的通路，风堇将接过艾格勒的神权，与众人告别。而我们则全速赶回奥赫玛支援。
E: I created a passage to the Vortex of Genesis with spirit water. Hyacine will claim Aquila's divine authority and bid farewell to everyone. Meanwhile, we'll rush back to Okhema to provide support.

C: 明牌反派的老奥帝，还有倒戈的音符小姐，接下来的战斗，恐怕不会一帆风顺吧。
E: An obvious villain like Old Oti, and Miss Note switching sides? Something tells you this fight won't be a cakewalk.

C: 人们说，这是一个金血晕染鲜血的残酷时代，这是一个海啸山崩下衰颓的灾难时代，这是一个昏君践踏律法的暴虐时代，这是一个神与信徒都被屠戮的黑暗时代。这就是第一次逐火之旅的时代，这个时代有一颗灼热的太阳，燃烧着令人目盲的光。\n而你要直视它，请它把你要的火点亮。
E: People say this is a cruel era stained with golden blood and crimson, an era of catastrophe where tsunamis rage and mountains crumble, an era of tyranny where corrupt rulers trample the law, a dark era where both gods and their faithful are slaughtered. This is the era of the First Flame-Chase Journey, an era with a scorching sun that burns with blinding light.\nAnd you must gaze directly into it, asking it to illuminate the fire you seek.

C:
船呵，波涛又把你推向海上，
怎么办？毅然停住吧，进港！
难道你没有看见，舷边已没有划桨，桅柱已被强劲的西南风折断，帆杆在嗟怨悲鸣，没有缆绳，船体怎经受得住风浪的猛烈冲击？
风帆已经破碎，神像也已失去。
——你要千万当心呵，不要作风暴的玩具。
E:
O ship, the waves are pushing you back to sea.
What now? Firmly stop. Turn toward the harbor!
Can't you see? The oars are gone from your sides. The mast has snapped in the fierce southwest wind. The rigging groans with sorrow. No ropes remain. How will your hull survive the crashing waves?
The sails are torn, and the divine statue has vanished.
— Beware. Do not let the storm toy with you.

C:
那天，满载荣耀与五百位英雄的大船自斯缇科西亚启航，撞入了迷雾下的巨浪怀抱。数日之后，海面平歇，千年再无风浪。
无人知晓迷雾与浪中的故事。或许，只有海知道——
一颗灼热的野心，点燃满船的柴薪。余虚无的灰，落入海底。
去吧，感受那冰冷的火，滚烫的泪。
E:
That day, a grand ship, laden with glory and five hundred heroes, set sail from Styxia and plunged into the embrace of towering waves shrouded in mist. Days later, the ocean fell silent, and for a thousand years, no wave rose again.
No one knows the story hidden in mist and waves. Perhaps, only the ocean remembers —
A single burning ambition ignited all the timbers laden on that ship. Ashes of emptiness drifted slowly to the ocean floor.
Go now, and feel that chilling flame, and those burning tears.

C:
于天地境界之海完成征服，长眠于涛声中。长眠于涛声中，于天地境界之海完成征服。
她们从未恐惧这预言，甚至，还有几分期盼。
那时，她们站在吕奎亚的海岸边，看着还未熄灭的太阳沉入海中，想着预言兑现的那日。
但她不知道，她所梦的海，并非方寸大的池。她不知道，她所愿的海，并非空无人的岸。
她不知道，她其实无心长眠。她不知道，她其实不恋征服。
她们想着错位的光景，一起看太阳慢慢、慢慢沉进海里，像是永远不会再升起。
E:
Complete your conquest in the ocean at the boundaries of this world, and eternally slumber in the sound of tides. Eternally slumber in the sound of tides, and complete your conquest in the ocean at the boundaries of this world.
They were never terrified of this prophecy. Rather, they somewhat looked forward to it.
Back then, they stood on the shores of Loukas, watching the yet-unextinguished sun sink into the sea, imagining the day when the prophecy would come true.
But she didn't know that the sea she dreamed of wasn't just a small pond. Nor was it just an empty shore.
She didn't know that she had no desire for eternal rest. And what she truly yearned for was never a conquest.
Thinking of the scenes that were so out of place, they watched together as the sun slowly, ever so slowly, sank into the sea, as if it would never rise again.

C: 《如我所书》与这座大墓密切相关，看似「讲故事」的行为，实则是「信息传送」的修饰…这里曾经发生的一切，如今化作往昔的涟漪，仍在回响。\n为了继续访问控制节点，先获取不同扇区的密钥。\n长夜月应该也在那深处的房间里，继续前进吧。
E: As I've Written is closely connected to this tomb. What seems like "storytelling" is, in truth, a veil for information transmission... Everything that once happened here still lingers, echoing as ripples of past reverie.\nTo continue accessing the control node, obtain the encryption keys from each sector.\nEvernight is probably in that room deep within. Keep moving.

C: 烈阳焚毁了神悟树庭之下的祭坛，那是「大地」的封印。在我到达神悟树庭之后，这里俨然已受到了「记忆」的影响，「毁灭」既是偶然也是必然，我必须继续前进，深入迷雾之中。\n在我这副躯体的「记忆」之中的丹枫？若是能助我，不妨与我继续同行好了……
E: The Blazing Sun ravaged the altar beneath the Grove of Epiphany, which was the seal of "Earth." By the time I arrived, the Grove was already warped by the Remembrance. Destruction is accidental, yet inevitable. I must press on, deeper into the mist.\nDan Feng is within the "memories" of this vessel of mine? If you'd lend your strength, then stay your path with me...

C: 多亏了星期日与长夜月的短暂碰撞，得以让潜伏起来的黑天鹅锁定了长夜月的藏身处，并沿着命途的河流逆流而上。\n忆庭决不允许黑天鹅擅自行动，而黑天鹅也不知道自己将面对什么……
E: Thanks to the brief collision between Sunday and Evernight, Black Swan, who had been lurking, managed to lock onto Evernight's hideout and travel upstream along the currents of the Path.\nThe Garden of Recollection would never allow Black Swan to act on her own, while she had no idea what she was about to face...

C: 天外之界的来客背负起世界的命运，用「开拓」为翁法罗斯写下新的起点。哀丽秘榭之外，是所有人愿望中的崭新纪元。\n而今你已抵达黎明，准备好迎接世人的召唤了吗，{NICKNAME}？
E: A visitor from beyond the sky shoulders the world's destiny, writing a new beginning for Amphoreus through "Trailblaze." Beyond the Aedes Elysiae lies a new era that everyone wishes for.\nNow that you have arrived at the Dawn, {NICKNAME}, are you ready to answer the world's summon?

C: 征讨「铁墓」之役关乎银河存亡，各方势力都有基于自身利益的考量。在联军会议之后，或许应与同盟者们展开更深入的交流，凝聚各方力量。
E: The campaign against Irontomb decides the fate of the cosmos, and each faction weighs its own interests. After the alliance meeting, perhaps it is time to deepen ties with allies, to gather strength from all sides.

C: 探索遇到阻碍，十四行代数式屏障将空间隔离。螺丝咕姆提议骇入独立信源终端，通过逆转算力来攻击屏障，开启权杖内核层的封印。
E: Exploration hit a snag. A barrier of quatorzain algebraic expressions has isolated this space. Screwllum suggests hacking into the independent signal terminal and using reverse computation to break through the barrier, unlocking the seal on the Scepter's kernel.

C: 铁墓已经被打败，但永恒之地翁法罗斯的故事还没有结束。或者说，它该迎来怎样的结局，取决于昔涟的选择……
E: Irontomb has been defeated, but the story of Amphoreus, The Eternal Land, is not yet over. Or rather, how it should end depends on Cyrene's choice...

C: 按照阿兰的要求，你拍下了所有照片。\n作为这一切的见证者，阿兰似乎还有什么话要对你说。
E: You snap all the photos as per Arlan's request.\nAs the witness to all of this, Arlan seems to have something else to say to you.

C: 怪物清缴完毕，向艾丝妲远程复命
E: Monster elimination complete, report to Asta remotely

C: 「军团」残党已被清除，现在可以安全地询问阿兰的情况了。\n向丹恒询问有关阿兰个人「修行」的事情，并询问阿兰目前的行踪。
E: The last of the Legion have been cleared out, and it's now safe to ask about Arlan's situation.\nAsk Dan Heng about Arlan's trial and his current whereabouts.

C: 根据三月七的指引，阿兰应该正在独自调查可疑晶体。\n深入探索可疑晶体，寻找阿兰吧。
E: Based on what March 7th said, Arlan should be investigating some suspicious crystals alone.\nGo deeper amongst the suspicious crystals, and look for Arlan.

C: 在螺丝咕姆的帮助下，你得以进入模拟宇宙的回归序列。不出所料，银狼的入侵也已触及这里。\n冥冥之中你有一种预感，一场隐于水面之下的游戏，将在这段冒险的终点决出胜负。
E: With Screwllum's help, you entered the Return Sequences of the Simulated Universe. Unsurprisingly, Silver Wolf's infiltration had reached here.\nYou have a hunch about this game hidden beneath the surface, and it will be revealed and resolved at the end of this adventure.

C: 阿德勒的失踪令事件更加扑朔迷离，但温世玲似乎还记得他失踪前的反常举动
E: Adler's disappearance made the case even more enigmatic, but Wen Shiling seems to still remember his odd behavior before his disappearance.

C: 空间站竟然有隐藏的秘密舱段？！这恐怕是很多科员都不曾知晓的事情。你单独前去调查，里面似乎盛放着许多不可思议的东西……
E: The space station has a secret zone? This might just be something not even most the researchers know about. You investigate alone, and find the space filled with many incredible objects...

C: 没想到在花店还能看到父女情深的情节，这使你的身体在冰天雪地里莫名暖暖的。接下来该将花束带给委托人了，她应该就在黄金歌剧院门口等着。
E: Who would have thought that you'd witness the love between a father and daughter at the Florist? It brings your heart such warmth in this frozen land. Now it's time to take the bouquet to the client — she should be waiting at the Golden Theater entrance.

C: 经过一番折腾，你似乎终于摸到了矿车工助教的门道。\n根据老师傅的说法，他还为自己的徒弟准备了一系列测试题。而向学徒演示如何正确调度矿车，这一重任自然落在了你这位「金牌助教」的肩上。\n不过在那之前，先去问问矿车工老师傅准备得如何了吧。
E: After a series of challenges, you seem to have finally gotten the knack for being a mine cart operator's assistant.\nThe Senior Miner says that he's also prepared a series of questions to test his apprentice. Naturally, the burden of demonstrating the correct way to operate mine carts for his apprentice has been relegated to you, the "Ace Assistant."\nBefore getting started, you should check in with the senior mine cart operator and see how his preparation is going.

C: 一群流浪者发生了冲突，即使你出手制止，也已经为时已晚…费斯曼老爹怎么样了，得赶紧去诊所看看。\n虽然你没有搞清楚前因后果，但是你察觉到了费斯曼老爹始终为着虎克着想，那么他至少是一位好父亲。
E: A group of vagrants clashes with the Moles. You stop them, but it's too late... You hurry to the clinic to see if Daddy Fersman is OK.\nYou haven't figured out what happened, but you can tell that Fersman cares about Hook. At least he is a good father.

C: 虽然桑博和你打过好几次交道，他也自称和你关系不错。但在商言商，他以藏宝图为报酬，委托你帮他寻找两件矿具。现在东西都找到了，是时候去找桑博讨要你的报酬了。
E: You've met Sampo several times, and he claims to be a friend of yours, but business is business. He will give you a treasure map in return for you finding his mining tools. Now that you've retrieved his tools, it's time to ask for your reward.

C: 你接到了邓恩的信息，他声称在你此前解开箱子谜题的位置找到了些有趣的东西。\n去铁卫禁区找他聊聊吧，看看邓恩提供的线索是否能帮助你更了解希莉儿一些。
E: Dunn pings you a message, claiming to have found something interesting back where you solved the box puzzles.\nGo to the Silvermane Guard Restricted Zone and chat with him. See if Dunn's clues can help you understand Cyrille a little better.

C: 娜塔莎与她住在上层区的养父母重新建立了沟通，希望能藉由他们在医界的人脉为下层区的病患谋取资源。\n你挑选好了花束，回去找娜塔莎聊聊吧——希望她能对你的选择感到满意。
E: Natasha has reconnected with her adoptive parents living in the Overworld, hoping that their network in the medical community could help the patients in the Underworld obtain more medical resources.\nYou have chosen a flower bouquet. Go back and talk to Natasha again. Hopefully, she will be satisfied.

C: 希露瓦的行李已经收拾完毕。听听她和她那可爱的弟弟接下来有何安排吧。
E: Serval had finished packing. Listen to what she and her brother have planned for the future.

C: 似乎已经到了与朗道姐弟约定好的时间。根据杰帕德的说法，铁卫这趟下层区之旅没你不行——你觉得这话着实受用。\n既然话都说到这份上了，那就如约前往上层区缆车道与朗道姐弟会合吧。
E: It is about time to meet the Landau siblings. According to Gepard, you are absolutely required for this Underworld trip with the Guards — and you like hearing this.\nAs it is, why don't you go to the Overworld cable car and meet up with the Landau siblings.

C: 手头的事情暂告一段落，但与药王秘传有关的事情还远未结束。那位丹鼎司的天才丹士长正在帮你研究「龙蟠虬跃」的药理，现在还没有回音。先离开工造司，回到城里等待联络吧。
E: The incident seems to have come to an end for now, but the matter with the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus is far from over. That genius chief alchemist in the Alchemy Commission is still looking into the Draught of Draconic Surge's pharmacology for you, but has delivered no findings so far. Better to leave the Artisanship Commission for now and wait for further contact in town.

C: 你们，是的，就你们俩抵达了荒弃已久的绥园。大部分恐怖片里，主角总喜欢不知死活、不问人数多寡地闯进有着闹鬼传闻的荒园。但凡他们停下来思考一番，那之后的种种故事都不会发生了。\n一路上桂乃芬尽职尽责地给你讲起绥园被荒废的历史…顺带拍下不少瘆人的素材。你不禁感慨，网络主播混口饭吃确实不容易，得在这么阴森的地方忍住拔腿就跑的冲动像个采访凶杀案的记者般拍个不停。这儿确实像个会闹鬼的地方，但鬼…鬼在哪儿呢？
E: You two — yes, only you two — arrive at the long-abandoned Fyxestroll Garden. The protagonists in most horror movies always like to brashly break into derelict buildings that are rumored to be haunted, completely disregarding all safety concerns and bringing in only a small party. If only they stopped to think things over, then none of the stories that follow would ever have happened.\nOn the way over, Guinaifen diligently recounts for you how Fyxestroll Garden ended up getting abandoned... all the while shooting plenty of spooky footage along the way. You can't help but feel it's actually quite hard for internet influencers to make a living, especially if they have to keep taking photos while resisting the urge to run away from such an ominous place, like a reporter at a homicide scene. This place really does feel as though it's haunted... Where, then, are the ghosts?

C: 黑天鹅开始收集线索，尝试解开花火留下的谜题。你不禁想，花火如此大费周章，究竟是为了什么？但对于花火这样的人来说，考虑「为什么」大概就落了下乘。不如先和黑天鹅一起，玩玩花火留下的推理游戏吧…也许这其中就隐藏着花火的真实目的。
E: Black Swan begins collecting clues, trying to solve the puzzle that Sparkle left behind. You can't help but wonder why Sparkle would go through all this effort. However, when it comes to people like Sparkle, asking "why" normally means you are on the wrong track. Why not play with Black Swan the logic game that Sparkle left behind... Perhaps Sparkle's true motive is concealed within.

C: 这场奇妙的梦境终于结束了。爱德华医生似乎想听听你的感受，和他聊聊吧。哦对了，别忘了黑天鹅最开始的叮嘱：「这段记忆的性质有些特殊，为了其他顾客的梦境体验，还请不要向任何人透露它的结局。」
E: This wonderful dream has finally come to an end. Dr. Edward would like to hear your thoughts — go and talk with him. Oh, don't forget what Black Swan told you at the start: "The nature of this memory is special. Don't ruin the dreamscape experience for anyone else by spoiling the ending."

C: 按照飞霄的要求，你们踏入幽囚狱留下证词。而她派出的曜青信使将自罗浮仙舟接走关押在此许久的步离人首领，呼雷。\n深入幽囚狱中，你们渐渐察觉到个中之事的诡谲。
E: In light of Feixiao's request, you stepped into the Shackling Prison and left your statements. The Yaoqing messenger that she dispatched whisked away the long-detained borisin leader, Hoolay, who was being held on the Xianzhou Luofu.\nDeep in The Shackling Prison, the abyssal treachery of the conspiracy gradually dawned upon you.

C: 幽囚狱中，来历不明的机械与劫狱者横行无忌，意在救出步离战首。而曜青的使节生死不明。受寒鸦请托，你们不得不深入幽囚狱之底，确认犯人是否依然在押……
E: In the Shackling Prison, unidentified machines and prison breakers wreak chaos with impunity. Their goal is to rescue the borisin Warhead. Meanwhile, the Yaoqing messenger's fate is unknown. At the behest of Hanya, you all have no choice but to delve deeper into the Shackling Prison to confirm if the convict is still behind bars...

C: 受怀炎将军所遣，三月七与云璃登上竞锋舰参与演武仪典。除了要在擂台上争逐胜利，她们还要承担起抵御危机，戍守擂台的职责。只是，初登场的少女剑士难免心怀忐忑……
E: General Huaiyan tasks March 7th and Yunli with boarding the Skysplitter and participating in the Wardance. Apart from striving for victory in the arena, they must also take up the responsibility of defending the arena against potential crises. However, the young swordswoman who will be making her debut can't help but feel anxious at such a prospect...

C: 竞锋舰上，等待的焦灼与悬危的气氛令云璃也坐立不安。她决定在擂赛开始前巡视竞锋舰各处，确保一切安全无虞。
E: Aboard the Skysplitter, the tense atmosphere and anxiety from waiting are starting to make Yunli uneasy. She decides to conduct a thorough patrol of the Skysplitter before the tournament begins to ensure that nothing untoward is happening.

C: 另一边，三月七也察觉到了竞锋舰上的异样，试剑的时刻终于来临。
E: Meanwhile, March 7th has also noticed the unusual events aboard the Skysplitter. The time for her to put her swordsmanship skills to the test has finally come.

C: 空无一物的战场中，新死的顽敌再度现身于眼前。老练的猎手将面对一场特殊的逐猎……而她，已成猎物。
E: On the empty battlefield, a tenacious and freshly-dead foe makes an appearance once more. The veteran hunter is primed to go on a special hunt... but this time, she is the prey.

C: 鳞渊境中潮水涌流不息，一如持明龙师的渴望。丹恒与灵砂的到来，将是决定潮流去向的关键。
E: The tide of Scalegorge Waterscape flows ceaselessly, just like the aspiration of the Vidyadhara Preceptors. The arrival of Dan Heng and Lingsha will be the key to deciding the direction of this flow.

C: 联觉梦境的第一位作者名叫罗伯特。调查他在心绪空间中留下的影像，了解他的故事吧。
E: The first creator of the Synesthesia Dreamscape is named Robert. Investigate the images he has left in the Emoscape and uncover his stories.

C: 竟然有刺客想要刺王杀驾！这太离奇了，怎么会有人对这样一位善良的好人图谋不轨？\n快抓住刺客，保护皇帝陛下的安全吧。
E: Assassins are after the Emperor! Unbelievable, who would do such a thing to such a kind soul?\nFind the assassins quickly and protect Her Majesty.

C: 我知道他们后来是怎么评价我的——荒诞无稽、杀人为乐…他们说错了。\n掌权后，我再也没有快乐过，甚至再也没能睡过一整个晚上。恐惧像深海中涌出的巨型乌贼，将我的心死死缠住，试图将它拖进黑暗的深渊。\n除了不断地清除掉那些恐惧的源头…灰骑士，我又能怎么办呢？我又该怎么办呢？
E: I know what they said about me later — outrageous, murdering for pleasure... But they were wrong. \nAfter gaining power, I've never been happy, neither have I gotten a peaceful night's sleep — the fear surges forth like a giant squid from the abyssal depths, entwining its tentacles around my heart, attempting to pull me back into the black abyss.\nApart from severing the origins of these fears... Gray Knight, what can I do? What do I do?

C: 我知道他们后来是怎么评价我的——荒诞无稽、杀人为乐…他们说错了。\n掌权后，我再也没有快乐过，甚至再也没能睡过一整个晚上。恐惧像深海中涌出的巨型乌贼，将我的心死死缠住，试图将它拖进黑暗的深渊。\n除了不断地清除掉那些恐惧的源头…灰骑士，我又能怎么办呢？我又该怎么办呢？
E: I know what they said about me later — outrageous, murdering for pleasure... But they were wrong. \nAfter gaining power, I've never been happy, neither have I gotten a peaceful night's sleep — the fear surges forth like a giant squid from the abyssal depths, entwining its tentacles around my heart, attempting to pull me back into the black abyss.\nApart from severing the origins of these fears... Gray Knight, what can I do? What do I do?

C: 这里就是「湛蓝爵士」的心绪空间了，不过…为什么会见到那几只折纸小鸟？去问问看吧。
E: This is Dr. Blues's Emoscape, but... why are you seeing those other Origami Birds? Go ask them.

C: 顺着记忆的场景，继续探索奥尔拉的过去吧。
E: Follow the scenes of this memory and keep exploring Orla's past.

C: 罗莎请你与她一起到长廊视察，似乎有些事项在等着你处理。
E: Rosa invites you to inspect the long gallery together. Some affairs seem to require your attention.

C: 你解决了外邦人的粮食问题，却得知苏克提瑞斯被捕的消息。他做了什么，值得如此大动干戈？
E: You solved the issue of the outlanders' food supplies, but received news of Soctires' capture. What has he done? Is this reaction really warranted?

C: 老吉尔伯特希望你能把他推迟退役的消息转达给女儿莉拉。\n你买好了花——现在，把老吉尔伯特的信和花束一起转交给莉拉吧。
E: Old Gilbert wants you to tell his daughter Lila that his retirement will be delayed.\nYou bought the flowers — Now, pass old Gilbert's letter and the bouquet to Lila.

C: 民间科学家雷金希望你能去帮他打探一下教育部的题库储备。\n答错或答对已经不重要了，你已经帮雷金打探到了他想要的消息——去找他回报情况吧。
E: The Civilian Scientist, Regin, wants you to test the Ministry of Education's question bank reserves.\nIt no longer matters if you got it right or wrong. You have already gotten the information he needs. Find him and tell him your findings.

C: 你从「正当权益会社」发布的公告中得知查威发布了委托，想要行使他的正当权益。帮帮查威！
E: You see that Chavez has issued a commission on the Rightful Rights Society's noticeboard and wants to exercise his rightful rights. Go help Chavez!

C: 巡逻的银鬃铁卫在裂界中目击到了幻象回响，它们因夙愿未遂而不得解脱。向它们提供帮助吧。\n悠闲的老人似乎想要修好手机……
E: Some Silvermane Guard patrols spotted illusory echoes in the Fragmentum who are stuck inside due to unfinished businesses. Help them.\nThe leisurely senior wants to fix his phone...

C: 丹鼎司洞天重开之后，鱼龙混杂。仅仅依靠护珠人在海滩巡逻是不够的，他们向善良勇敢的志愿者发出了邀请。\n护珠人跃渊希望你能参与海滩巡逻…真是的，守护这片沙滩的人到底是谁呢？
E: After the Alchemy Commission delve reopened, people honest and crooked walked betwixt each other. As such, the Pearlkeepers alone are no longer enough to patrol the beach. They have offered invitations to brave and noble volunteers for the task at hand.\nYueyuan the Pearlkeeper hopes that you can help patrol the beach... Seriously, though, who's the one that actually protects this place?

C: 翁法罗斯的世界残留着一些常理难以解释的遗存，所谓「黄金替罪羊」就是其中之一。一时兴起，你试图破解其中的奥秘，然而它似乎很快就变成了某种闹剧……
E: The world of Amphoreus left behind a number of relics that seem to defy common sense — "The Golden Scapegoat" being one of them. Curious, you attempted to unravel its secret, but it seems this has quickly become a whole separate issue...

C: 来古士借助树庭装置处理「黄金替罪羊」数据的工作已经结束。是时候询问他本人结果如何了。
E: Lygus has completed analyzing the Golden Scapegoat data with the Grove's devices. Let's hear what he has discovered.

C: 一只想撞飞你的若虫怂恿你通过解谜寻找宝物…奇怪到家了。
E: A nymph eager to send you flying urges you to find treasure by solving puzzles... How strange.

C: 火种匣中并非「余火」，伊来内心情有些低落。打开下一个火种匣试试吧。
E: The Coreflame Casket does not contain the Embers, leaving Alain somewhat downhearted. Try opening the next Coreflame Casket.

C: 夜幕再度降临，云石市集的附近有些骚动，似乎有人遇到了危险，快去看看。
E: As night falls again, there is a commotion near the Marmoreal Market. It seems like someone is in danger, hurry over and take a look.

C: 黑塔要求你以「开拓」的身份进入天才俱乐部制作的「模拟宇宙」，试着从虚拟星神口中套出星神与命途的奥秘。
E: Herta asks you to enter the Simulated Universe created by the Genius Society while pretending to be the Aeon of Trailblaze, and try to glean the secret of Aeons and Paths from the simulated Aeons.

C: 黑塔要求你以「开拓」的身份进入天才俱乐部制作的「模拟宇宙」，试着从虚拟星神口中套出星神与命途的奥秘。
E: Herta asks you to enter the Simulated Universe created by the Genius Society while pretending to be the Aeon of Trailblaze, and try to glean the secret of Aeons and Paths from the simulated Aeons.

C: 帕姆正在调整车厢的灯光，需要你从乘客角度提供一些参考意见。
E: Pom-Pom is adjusting the light intensity in the Express and needs your input and opinion as a passenger.

C: 清理区域内的所有污染。
E: Cleanse all contamination within the area.

C: 利用谛听穿越警戒区，尽可能不要惊扰敌人。
E: Use the Diting to cross the guard zone and try not to alert any enemies.

C: 滴答！快，拨动指针，滴答——！\n人们的内心正待你去探索，为他们寻回真正的自我吧！
E: Tick... tock! Quick, Adjust the hands... Tick, tock!\nPeople's minds await your exploration. Help them regain their true selves!

C: 小贩依旧不肯承认长矛和盾牌都是赝品。没办法，先用普通的武器来检验下盾牌的质量吧。
E: The merchants still refuse to acknowledge that the lance and shield are both fakes. Left with no other option, you decide to test the shield's quality using a regular weapon.

C: 果蔬摊老板德墨忒尔的女儿失踪已久，然而就在昨天，她梦到了自己最亲爱的孩子。或许你回溯记忆的能力能够帮到她。
E: The fruit and veg store owner Demetria's daughter has been missing for a long time. However, she dreamt of her beloved child just last night. Perhaps your ability to rewind memories could be of assistance?

C: 危难时刻，朋友会出手！厄琉斯决定问问市集热心的老板们，或许拼凑的碎片能引出线索。
E: Times of trouble are what friends are for! Aelius decides to ask the helpful shopkeepers in the market, in the hopes of piecing together a clue from the fragmentary information they can offer.

C: 奥赫玛的集市上总有个小女孩跑来跑去，叫卖着不存在的新闻…难道她很缺钱？
E: There is a young girl that is always running around the Okhema market selling made-up news... Could it be that she is in dire need of money?

C: 心软但依旧恪尽职守的守卫提出，你可以在清晨人少时再带希瑞雅悄悄进入云崖……
E: The sympathetic but dutiful guard suggests that you could bring Serena into Dawncloud quietly during the less-crowded morning hours...

C: 阿波罗尼的回应让维吉妮娅有些失落，可今天她的脸上却挂着担忧，去问问发生什么事了吧。
E: Apollonius's reply made Verginia feel rather down. However, today she looks a little concerned. Go ask her what is happening.

C: 晴霓已经知道了那些她想知道的故事，而其中很多，是驭空不想让她知道的。现在，她该为自己的人生做出选择了。正如星核猎手的老朋友曾对你说过的那样：「当你有机会做出选择的时候，不要让自己后悔。」
E: Qingni already knew the stories she wanted to know, many of which Yukong wished to conceal from her. Now it's time for her to make a decision for her own life. Just as an old Stellaron Hunter friend once said to you: "When you have a chance to make a choice, make one that you know you won't regret."

C: 照片中的黑影有些眼熟，应该是磐岩镇中的某样东西……
E: The shadowy object in the photo looks somewhat familiar. It must be something from Boulder Town...

C: 奇怪，研究不是告一段落了吗？黑塔突然又叫你过去，她似乎有些「情报」要与你交换——必须得阮•梅和螺丝咕姆不在场，单独与你商量。你微微一笑，心里似乎有所领悟……
E: Strange. Hasn't the experiment come to a proper conclusion? Herta has suddenly summoned you again, and now she wants to trade some intel with you, and this must be discussed without Ruan Mei or Screwllum present. You grin and get an idea of what this may be about...

C: 大矿区的试炼居然是用机器人引爆「托帕后援团」——当然这只是特效，并不会有人真受到伤害。爆炸乃艺术，不是吗？\n就让这些倒霉蛋化作艺术的一部分吧。
E: The trial of the Great Mine involves blowing up Topaz's Support Squad with robots, though as the explosions are rooted in special effects, no one actually risks getting hurt. Still, blowing things up is a form of art, right?\nSuppose you best incorporate your unfortunate adversaries into this artistic expression.

C: 你们驱除了依附在白露身上的岁阳。接下来该是将这场胜利在「罗浮杂俎」上公之于众的时候了。既要淡化此事的危险，以免引起恐慌，又要吸引眼球，彰显捉鬼小队的胜利，这麻烦程度不逊于方才祓除岁阳啊！
E: After successfully exorcising the heliobus in Bailu, your next task is to publicize this victory on Ghostly Grove. However, you must minimize the public's perception of how dangerous the incident was to prevent panic, while also trying to stand out online to showcase the ghost-hunting squad's triumph. The task of writing a social media post is not any less challenging than exorcising the heliobus!

C: 桂乃芬希望将这个有意义的时刻留下。\n不必多说，去吧，拍下这一刻。
E: Guinaifen wishes to keep this significant moment.\nNo other words are needed. Go and take a photo of this moment.

C: 拍合照太过单调的话，可以带上这些酷炫的涂鸦喷漆。说不定能有意想不到的抢镜效果，为大家带来欢乐……
E: If taking group photos is boring, you can use some of these rad graffiti patterns. Maybe it'll end up having the unexpected effect of stealing the limelight and bringing joy to everyone...

C: 游辞似乎非常想给你讲个故事，听听看吧。
E: Youci seems very eager to tell you a story. Go listen to it.

C: 美食庆典正在进行中！去问问杰伊今日需要什么食材吧。
E: The gourmet carnival is in progress! Ask Jay what ingredients are needed for today.

C: 一些帮忙建设美梦小镇的小鸟被意外困住了，你必须帮助哈努兄弟解救它们。
E: Some of the birds that helped build Dreamville have been trapped by accident. You have to help Brother Hanu rescue them.

C: 这个空间中的「证据」已经被搜刮完了。离开这片错乱的梦境空间，和辛格勒聊聊你们的发现。
E: You have collected all the "evidence" in this place. Leave this chaotic and disturbed dreamscape and discuss your findings with Singler.

C: 进入了淑女的心绪空间。淑女会习惯性地隐藏内心，到底哪边才是它的真实想法呢？
E: You've entered Lady's Emoscape. Lady will habitually hide its heart. What are its true thoughts?

C: 进入了忧郁派的心绪空间。赶快找到忧郁派，让它别再这么沮丧吧。
E: You've entered Melancholy's Emoscape. Hurry and find Melancholy. Stop it from feeling depressed.

C: 为了重新获取怪物们的信任，舒翁邀请你进入她的心绪空间。\n最后的这幅拼图，就交由你来完成了。
E: To regain the monsters' trust, Siobhan invites you into her Emoscape.\nComplete the final jigsaw.

C: 似乎找到了什么了不得的秘密，出去整理整理吧。
E: You seem to have discovered a shocking secret. Get out and sort through things.

C: 《美梦仙踪》的拍摄开始了，按目标完成拍摄任务吧！
E: Filming for Dreamjoy Ascension has started. Complete filming missions according to the goals!

C: 前方传来隐隐的喧闹，准备前往舞台吧。
E: There is a faint noise ahead. Prepare to head to the stage.

C: 第一次选择！你和流萤来到了「戏梦奇战•演技派挑战」的舞台。根据引导员的说法，你们将在这里接受「演技」的考验……\n演技是什么？你完全不理解这个词的意思。对你而言，真诚永远是最强的必杀技。
E: The first choice! You and Firefly arrive at the Dreamplay Fantasia: Acting Challenge arena. According to the guide's instructions, your "acting" skills will be tested here...\nWhat are acting skills exactly? You have no idea. For you, sincerity has always been the ultimate instrument.

C: 再次调查那盘录像带，为电影画上一个句号。
E: Investigate the videotape again and bring the film to a close.

C: 回去和艾迪恩聊聊，他一定隐瞒了什么。
E: Head back and talk to Aideen. He must be hiding something.

C: 你收到了一封来自家族的邀请函——鸢尾花家系的缇娜诚邀你去测试一款名为「折纸小鸟对对碰」的三消对战游戏。\n看起来倒不像是诈骗…那么，去看看也没什么损失吧？
E: You have received an invitation from The Family — Tinah of the Iris Family invites you to test a match-3 puzzle battle game called "Origami Bird Clash."\nIt doesn't seem like a scam... So, go take a look? There's nothing to lose.

C: 按照椒丘的「卑鄙」计划，你们只需要去和斯科特决斗，斯科特必然会因为泻药的淫威倒下。\n看着倒在地上的斯科特，复杂的情绪涌上心头，好好聊聊吧。
E: According to Jiaoqiu's "despicable" plan, all you need to do is show up to the duel with Skott. With the laxatives, you're sure to serve him a gushing defeat.\nSeeing Skott slumped to the ground, you're not sure to feel happy or ashamed. You'll get to chat, at least.

C: 青雀认定斯科特是「过度喜欢上班给他人造成麻烦的人」，她主动请缨，要会会这斯科特。\n青雀打算动之以情，晓之以理。这并不容易，你和三月七得打好辅助。
E: Qingque believes Skott is only causing this much trouble for others because he's a diehard workaholic. And so, she volunteers to meet with Skott.\nQingque intends to appeal to his emotions and logic. Not... exactly optimistic about this. You and March 7th should support her as best as you can.

C: 贝洛伯格近日出现不明生物伤人事件，娜塔莎需要你的帮助，去找她了解下情况吧。
E: Natasha needs your help with the recent cases of an unknown creature attacking people in Belobog. Seek her out to learn about the situation.

C: 尾巴大爷真是太强了！简直是仙舟特供版钟表小子！\n希望他能顺利帮卢卡摆脱战败的阴影……
E: Mr. Tail is so awesome! He's basically a Xianzhou-version Clockie!\nHopefully he can get Luka out of the shadow of defeat...

C: 你成为了「音乐派对」表演乐队的经理。现在，你的乐队需要在校园中央的舞台上完成三场演出。\n万事俱备，该前往此行的「战场」了！
E: You've become the manager of the music party's performing band, and now your band needs to complete 3 performances on the stage in the middle of the campus.\nAll is ready. It's time to head to the battlefield!

C: 桑博即将在店里上架新的宝贝…不过在此之前，他还需要你的帮助。
E: Sampo is about to add some new treasures to the store... but before that, he still needs your help.

C: 拍摄告一段落，和三月七就这幅作品谈谈吧。
E: With the photography session wrapped up, have a chat with March 7th about this work

C: 拍摄告一段落，和三月七就作品谈谈吧。
E: With the photography session wrapped up, have a chat with March 7th about the work

C: 第一场比赛旗开得胜，接下来你需要面对新的强敌——来自昏光庭院的和普赫斯和他的绷带海豹。\n听说高风亮节的参赛者会为对手送上祝福，你衷心地祝愿他能撑到比赛开始的时候。
E: A triumphant start in the first match! Next, you'll face a new formidable opponent — Perhippas from Twilight Courtyard and his Bandaged Seal.\nRumor has it that noble-hearted contestants offer blessings to their rivals, so you sincerely wish him the strength to at least make it to the start of the match.

C: 你顺利闯入了淘汰赛，离奖杯更近了一步…可奖杯呢？\n你决定听听主办方的权威解答。
E: You've successfully advanced to the knockout stage, bringing you one step closer to the trophy... But where is the trophy?\nYou decide to seek an official explanation from the organizers.

C: 瞧瞧这是什么——「折纸小鸟对对碰」游戏公测邀请函？此情此景似曾相识，但发件人换成了公司。
E: Lookie here! An invitation to play Origami Bird Clash on its official launch? This scene feels a bit familiar, but the sender this time is the IPC instead.

C: 你为托帕调制了名为「放松」的配方，想必可以给她死气沉沉的上班生活带来别样的精彩吧。\n这份配方还有另一种功效尚未调制…回到临时吧台准备接待下一位客人，或者按照配方为托帕再调制一杯调饮吧。
E: You've crafted a recipe called "Relaxation" for Topaz, which will surely bring some excitement to her dull work life.\nThis recipe has another effect yet to be mixed... Return to the makeshift bar to serve the next guest, or mix another drink for Topaz according to the recipe.

C: 原以为驮子 / 小地兽 / 大撕垃 / 地宝 / 开拓者二世 / 大奇美拉 / 乌拉诺斯 / 地大地大能够顺利成长下去，实现它的梦想，却没想到，在它身上出现了一种会变小的奇怪症状。据称，这代表它有欧洛尼斯相关的潜质…？那刻夏提出了一个出乎所有人意料的解决方案－让驮子 / 小地兽 / 大撕垃 / 地宝 / 开拓者二世 / 大奇美拉 / 乌拉诺斯 / 地大地大修习欧洛尼斯祷言，进而稳定这一特性。好吧，神奇的第二次养成，开始啦！
E: You thought Beast of Burden / Mini Dromas / Dromasilla / Dromy / Trailblazer Jr / The Great Chimera / Uranus / Dromasmas would grow without a hitch and achieve its dreams, but unexpectedly, it developed a strange condition that made it shrink. Supposedly, this indicates it has potential related to Oronyx...? Anaxa proposed a solution that surprised everyone: Having Beast of Burden / Mini Dromas / Dromasilla / Dromy / Trailblazer Jr / The Great Chimera / Uranus / Dromasmas study Oronyx's Prayer to stabilize this trait. Well, time for a second round of magical nurturing!

C: 没错，{NICKNAME}——和被置入你体内的「星核」是相同的物质。
E: Yes, {NICKNAME} — just like the one that's been placed into your body.

C: 咱们先去吧。对了……
E: Let's head over. Oh, by the way...

C: 还想听听您的看法。
E: I want to hear your thoughts.

C: 不伸手！
E: Arms by my side!

C: 其实远远没那么简单，他的经历可比我要精彩哦。
E: ...But that's only a small part of his story. Believe me when I say he has more experience than I do.

C: 看来贝洛伯格之行真的改变了你很多啊……
E: That Belobog expedition got in your head, huh...

C: 那我先回房间了。
E: I'll head back to my room then.

C: 下个目的地是哪儿？
E: Where's our next stop?

C: 马上！
E: Right away!

C: 这没什么奇怪的吧，游戏里那些长生不死的老怪，不总是等着主角来消灭他们吗？长生也不是什么好事。
E: That's pretty normal. Aren't the immortal bosses in games always waiting for the protagonist to come kill them? Immortality is not always a good thing.

C: 虽然是位于监控室的屏幕，但画面上并没有出现监控画面。
E: Despite this screen being located in the monitoring room, it's not displaying any form of surveillance footage.

C: 停——住口！人醒了！
E: Wait — stop it! They're awake!

C: 「黑塔」原本只是作为奇物和遗器仓库而造的，但黑塔女士允许她的追随者们参与管理和研究，这里就逐渐变成了一座科研基地。
E: Herta Space Station was originally built as a warehouse for rare items and relics, but Madam Herta also allowed her followers to oversee tasks and conduct research. It then gradually turned into a scientific research base.

C: 想了解黑塔。
E: I'd like to learn about Herta.

C: 我问完了。
E: I don't have any more questions.

C: 顺序不对，年轻人。我给你演示一下。
E: Wrong order, kid. Let me demonstrate.

C: 好像没有需要帮助的科员了，回艾丝妲那边吧。
E: Looks like that's all the researchers who need help. Let's go check in with Asta.

C: 嘘，你也来瞻仰星神的伟力与神迹吗？那你过去点，去，那边还有个好位置。
E: Oh, have you also come to witness the power and miracle of the Aeons? Then go over there, there's a good spot right there.

C: 定分枪的眼睛看着寒鸦：「<unbreak>48</unbreak>分！」它宣布。
E: The Rating Pistol gazes at Hanya: "<unbreak>48</unbreak> points!" it announces.

C: 定分枪的眼睛看着云璃：「<unbreak>96</unbreak>分！」它宣布。
E: The Rating Pistol gazes at Yunli: "<unbreak>96</unbreak> points!" it announces.

C: 「奇物编号<unbreak>458</unbreak>：不可承受之重。约特伍德体皇族的桂冠，用来传承知识。」
E: "Curio No. <unbreak>458</unbreak>: Unbearable Weight. It is the crown of the Tottonid royal family, used to pass on knowledge."

C: 「军团」入侵留下的影响尚未消除，这里并未展出空间站所收容的全部奇物。
E: As the after-effects of the Legion's invasion have not been completely removed, not all Curios in the space station are displayed here.

C: 现在的话，只是末日兽姑且还能应付，但如果「毁灭」的令使也来了……
E: Right now, we might be able to handle things if it's just the Doomsday Beast. But, if the Destruction's Emanator were to appear...

C: 别，要严谨：只留一阵子——我做完研究，或者做到一半没兴趣了，这小鬼就得走人。
E: Well, I'm going to have to modify your wording here: This little twerp can only stay temporarily until the research is done. Or maybe I'll lose interest halfway through and they can just beat it.

C: 嗯，这次的入侵似乎只是零星不成气候的骚扰。末日兽倒下后，军团就撤退了。
E: Well, this invasion seems to be nothing more than a random provocation. As soon as the Doomsday Beast fell, the Legion retreated.

C: 不可以，你太危险了。虽然我不在乎，但总得替艾丝妲她们想想。
E: No. You're way too dangerous. I don't mind personally, but I don't want Asta and others to take the risk.

C: 既然她都表态了…我也没有反对的理由啦。不过我要提醒你，{NICKNAME}，如果黑塔女士要对你做什么的话……
E: In that case... I have nothing against it either. Mind you, if Madam Herta was to do something to you, {NICKNAME}...

C: 不能袖手旁观吧。
E: I couldn't just stand by and watch.

C: 你想了解这辆列车？我很高兴，它是我们很重要的同伴。
E: Ohh, you want to know more about the Express? I'm glad. After all, it's an important companion of ours.

C: 每位星神的诞生都意味着一道「命途」的开启；命途的本质仍是个谜，我们只好用凡人能理解的方式进行类比：就是某种哲学「概念」。
E: The birth of an Aeon gives rise to a Path. The nature of the Paths remains a mystery, leaving us to draw an analogy in a way that mortals can understand: It's a philosophical concept of sorts.

C: 关于开拓…
E: About Trailblaze...

C: 哈哈，她是这辆列车的主人——虽说我们管帕姆叫列车长，但大家都知道，姬子才是星穹列车的所有者。
E: Haha, she's the owner of the Express. We joke around calling Pom-Pom the conductor, but everyone knows Himeko is the boss.

C: 我派使者提前传了话，可可利亚大人应该已经知道你们的来头了。跟我走吧。
E: I've dispatched a messenger to send word, Madam Cocolia will be aware of your arrival. Come with me.

C: …所以，不用惊讶。尽管七百年来「筑城者」再未得到过来自星空的消息，但我知道你们的存在。说出来意吧，我听着。
E: ...So, do not be surprised. For seven hundred years, the Architects have received no further communication from the stars... but I knew of your existence. Tell me why you have come.

C: 是我们这儿特产的矿石能源，大到城市供暖，小到手里的计数器，全都是用地髓供能的。
E: It's an ore — a special energy resource. Whether it's keeping the city warm or keeping our counters ticking, everything runs on Geomarrow.

C: 贝洛伯格「上下」？
E: Above and beneath the surface?

C: 哈哈哈，开个玩笑而已，别当真。
E: Hahaha, I was only kidding — just a joke.

C: 换句话来说，筑城者们既是贝洛伯格的奠基人，也是贝洛伯格的救世主。现如今，他们依然在管理着这座城市。
E: Or to put it another way, the Architects are Belobog's founders and saviors. Even today, they are still tending to the city.

C: 来大客户咯，可以长期合作！
E: It's a big customer with bigger pockets!

C: 那就这么定了！事不宜迟，准备好了咱们就出发。
E: That's settled then! There's no time to lose — we should head out as soon as you're ready.

C: 等、等一下！
E: W—Wait!

C: …你们怎么都在这里啊？！
E: ... Why are you all here!?

C: 啊，要是我能像希露瓦小姐一样就好啦。有朗道家族作后盾的话，也不至于这样束手束脚了……
E: Oh, if only I could be like Miss Serval, supported by a family like the Landaus. Then I wouldn't be in so much trouble...

C: 什么什么？那可不行，眼看咱都要离开了，我连像样的照片都没拍过几张呢。
E: Wait, what? No way — we're about to leave and I've hardly got any decent photos.

C: 在你眼里我就这么没心没肺吗……
E: Hey, I'm not that heartless y'know...

C: 最难的不是时刻保持警醒，而是看不到坚持的尽头…不知道自己何时才能放松下来。
E: Staying vigilant wasn't the issue... it was the not knowing whether I'd ever be able to let my guard down again...

C: 假如一直低着头行走，每一步都害怕陷进泥潭…我们的脚步一定会越发沉重，士气也会变得低迷。
E: If you walk with your head down and your heart full of fear, your steps will grow heavier and your spirit will suffer.

C: 好宽敞的大堂啊…
E: What a spacious lobby...

C: 不过，今天来喝下午茶的人可真够多的。恐怕我们俩得站着聊了。
E: ...Looks like we're not the only ones who wanted afternoon tea today though. We'll have to stand up for the time being.

C: 你先别急着答应啊，这事可能比你想的要复杂……
E: Ha, don't get ahead of yourself, this might be more complicated than you think...

C: 欸，别跑！别紧张呀，我只是想问你点事……
E: Wait, don't go! Take it easy, I just wanted to ask you a question...

C: 没记错的话，你、三月还有丹恒，你们是坐那个什么——对了，「星穹列车」——来到贝洛伯格的，对吧？
E: If I remember correctly, you, March, and Dan Heng came here on that train — the "Astral Express" — right?

C: 好吧…我明白了。那我就跑克里珀堡一趟，把真实想法全都告诉布洛妮娅。
E: Okay... I get it. I'll make a trip to Qlipoth Fort and tell Bronya what I really think.

C: 啊，抱歉——刚才只顾着和希露瓦说话，忘了向你解释事情的原委。
E: Ah, sorry, my head's still in the argument. It's like this.

C: 长椅上结了一层冰，怪不得没有人坐。
E: There is a layer of ice on the bench. No wonder nobody wants to sit there.

C: 「你」是一个瘦削的短发男人，在对抗裂界怪物的战斗中失去了听力；
E: "You" are a slim and short-haired man who lost his hearing during a battle against a Fragmentum monster.

C: 这只邮筒似乎没有什么特别之处，但你总觉得哪里不对劲。仔细一看，你发现一只白色信封孤零零地躲在它的影子里。
E: There's nothing special about the mailbox, but you feel like something's wrong. You look at it carefully again, and see a white letter hidden in its shadow.

C: 三：『这封遗书将是我人生的注脚。因此在生命的最末，我希望自己足够坦诚。通俗地来说，我觉得无事可干，活着也没亿忆亦』
E: 3. "I hereby tender my resignation. On this, my final day of work, I wish to be frank. Generally speaking, my job is uninteresting, and therefore has no meening"

C: 或许你已经发现了：是的，这儿的垃圾桶多到超乎想象。曾经也有人提出减少垃圾桶的投放数量，或是开征垃圾税之类的政策。
E: You may have noticed that yes, there are an unbelievable number of trashcans in this city. Somebody did once propose to reduce the overall number, or to initiate some kind of garbage tax policy.

C: 因为{F#她}{M#他}睡着啦，刚刚还嘟囔着说梦话呢…真可怜，一定是非常可怕的噩梦。
E: Because {F#she's}{M#he's} sound asleep — didn't you hear {F#her}{M#him} sleep talking? ...Poor child, sounded like a bad nightmare.

C: 我明白了。
E: I understand.

C: 用不着谢我，治病疗伤是医生的天职。
E: No need to thank me. It's a doctor's duty to heal.

C: 这下层区一大半都是矿民，每天就靠挖这种矿石过活。要是没有「地髓」可烧，这个世界的人早就被冻死了。
E: Most undergrounders are miners, and this is what they mine for a living. Y'know, if we didn't have Geomarrow to burn, this world would have frozen to death long ago.

C: 这前面是流浪者的聚集地，现在入口被封起来了。估计是怕愤怒的矿民报复吧。
E: This area up ahead is a vagrant dwelling, but they've sealed off the entrance. I guess they're afraid that angry miners might try to take revenge.

C: 喂喂，起床啦！再睡下去，屁股上要长蘑菇啦～
E: Hey, wakey-wakey! You'll get mushrooms growing on your head~

C: 几个混混而已，你们没事就好。对了，安东尼娜，你见到奥列格首领了吗？
E: Nothing but a few knuckleheads. I'm just glad you're okay. Antonia, have you seen Chief Oleg?

C: 这个「大佬」…他是在银鬃铁卫被调离以后突然出现的，很快就成了下层区的地方一霸。
E: The boss... He appeared suddenly after the Guards were redeployed, and became a major player in the Underworld.

C: 呣呣呣～那么显眼的一栋房子都找不到嘛？大人真不靠谱！
E: Hmm~ But it's an obvious building, grown-ups are just useless~

C: 哦，{NICKNAME}，想听听咱的地下见闻吗？
E: Oh, hi {NICKNAME}, wanna listen to my thoughts on the underground?

C: 不过，矿民们休息的时候还会来看拳赛，这可比上层区的歌剧院要接地气不少吧。
E: Still, the miners watch fights in their spare time. It's less pretentious than that theater they have on the surface.

C: 当狗也挺好的。
E: Haha! But a very contented lapdog, I should add! Hehe...

C: 「大」饭店…？
E: Grand Hotel...?

C: 听你的，防着防着，毕竟上次在旅店被人捅刀子仿佛就在昨天。
E: Fine, we'll keep our guards up. Our last hotel experience was eventful, to say the least.

C: 然后是医用酒精——哈哈，我在孤儿院囤了不少，因为孩子们经常打架。撤离的时候我没有带走…希望还没过期。
E: Oh! Also, rubbing alcohol. I kept a bunch at the orphanage, since the kids often got into tussles. I didn't bring it with me when I left... I hope it's still intact.

C: 我不像你，总结不出这么多大道理。不过…如果这就是你想看到的未来，我愿意跟你一起造这座桥。
E: I'm not like you. I don't have that many grand plans for the future. But... if that's the future you want, I'm willing to build this bridge with you.

C: 当然了，只是那时候还不懂得这景象有多珍贵。
E: Of course. I just didn't appreciate how nice it was at the time.

C: 我的身世，那些你从来没告诉过我的事…我现在都已经记起来了。我不会再逃避了，守护者大人！请别再用含糊其辞的理由搪塞我了。
E: My entire life, everything you ever kept from me... I remember it clearly now. This time... this time I'm standing my ground, Madam Guardian! And please, stop dismissing me with vague excuses.

C: 一股倦意涌上心头…提醒你已经很久没有休息过了。你坚信，这一次无论多么糟糕的梦境都不可能把你唤醒。
E: A wave of tiredness comes over you... reminding you that you haven't rested in a long time. Even the most terrible dream won't wake you up this time.

C: 虎克懂事了呀。
E: Hook, you are so considerate.

C: 我不是鉴定专家，但这两颗石头的成色…看上去相当不错呢。
E: I'm no appraiser, but these two gems look to be high quality.

C: …老巫婆有没有批评你？
E: ...Did the old witch yell at you?

C: …都说了没什么了。
E: ...It really isn't worth going into.

C: 至于奖励…放心好了，肯定会给你的，不过……
E: As for the prize money... don't worry, you'll definitely get some, but...

C: 不过什么？
E: But what?

C: 拳手们也有自己的追求。
E: They also have their dreams.

C: 怪物身上的东西不嫌脏吗？
E: Isn't it disgusting to wear stuff ripped off monsters?

C: 这衣物的手感…真怀念啊，我好久没触碰过这么细腻的面料了。
E: Oh the fabric... I really miss it, I haven't touched a fabric this delicate for such a long time.

C: 老板说了，您来打比赛那相当于免费给拳手们指导业务，我们巴不得您多来喂喂招儿呢。
E: Boss said you coming to the challenges is like free tutorials for the boxers. We wish you were here more often!

C: 具体规则是什么？
E: What are the rules?

C: 真能立刻安排吗？
E: Can it be arranged now?

C: 娜塔莎，奥列格！久等了啦！
E: Natasha! Oleg! Hope you didn't have to wait too long.

C: 唷，瞧这阵仗！这小诊所哪儿见过这大场面啊？
E: Well, well, well! I don't think our little clinic has ever played host to an occasion like this!

C: 真是…气氛怎么又变得沉重了啊？要不今天就聊到这里？让姐弟俩好好疗养吧。
E: Y'know... we're pretty good at turning a happy reunion into a tear fest. Let's call it a day and give them some room.

C: …没想到这居然是真的。
E: ...I never thought this would be real.

C: 你依稀记得某部电视剧里，街头小子钻进这样的垃圾箱，紧紧捂住自己的嘴巴，等待带着枪的追兵离开。
E: You vaguely recall a television series where a homeless kid hid inside a dumpster like this, tightly covered his mouth, and waited for his armed pursuers to leave.

C: 封路的栅栏总留给你对未来的无限遐想。
E: The road closure barrier always leaves you with an infinite reverie about the future.

C: 你看见十字镐，因其尖头一端状如鹤嘴。也被叫做鹤嘴锄。它是园艺和土石采掘中常用的工具。
E: You see a pickaxe. Its pointed end resembles the beak of a crane, so it is also colloquially called a cranebeak. A common tool used for gardening and mining.

C: 鼓风机呜呜地吹着，可能这就是所谓的「鼓劲」吧。
E: The blower whirrs and drums. Maybe they were trying to cheer for you.

C: 很显然，许多人都曾被这份《拳手招募单》激起了内心的熊熊烈火。
E: It is clear that for many people, this Boxer Recruitment Form had ignited their fighting spirit.

C: 这座垃圾箱给你一种特别的感觉，这与它的位置、形象与气味无关，是一种小心翼翼的避世气质，兼有一丝难言的温馨。垃圾箱的箱口贴着一张皱巴巴的纸条，上面写着<unbreak>81</unbreak>。
E: This dumpster evokes a special emotion in you. Unrelated to its location, appearance, and olfactory triggers, it is a sense of hiding from the world as well as a hint of preternatural coziness. A wrinkly piece of paper is stuck on the lid of the dumpster with the number "<unbreak>81</unbreak>" on it.

C: 晚上好。
E: Good evening.

C: 任何接入心灵通感信标的星球，都可以向公司免费索取由筑城者提供的《星际和平指南》。
E: Any planet with a telepathy beacon can obtain from the IPC free copies of the Interastral Peace Guide written by the Architects.

C: 本次播报到此结束，请在指定时间收听下一周期的星际和平播报。再见。
E: And this is the end of our broadcast. Please tune in for our next episode. Thank you for listening.

C: 众所周知，流光忆庭始终致力于复现众多陨落的文明，为银河留下复苏的火种。
E: As we all know, the Garden of Recollection has always been committed to the restoration of lost civilizations, igniting the spark of revival across the cosmos.

C: 「罗浮」仙舟上，举凡空域、航行和贸易事务，一应由位列六司的「天舶司」主掌。作为最大的港口，星槎海也在我们治下。
E: On the Xianzhou Luofu, anything relating to aviation, navigation, and trade falls within the scope of the Sky-Faring Commission, which is one of the six commissions of the Luofu. As the biggest port on the ship, Starskiff Haven is governed by the Sky-Faring Commission, too.

C: 总之，到这儿就安全了。本该带大家游览一番，让小女子尽尽地主之谊。但眼下非常时期，我们先走一趟司辰宫，向驭空大人禀报各位的来意。
E: Anyway, we're safe now. Normally I'd be a good host and take you around. But these are difficult times. Let's head to the Palace of Astrum first and report your arrival to Madam Yukong.

C: 那个驭空似乎不好对付…
E: That Yukong sounds like a tough lady...

C: 回答若有不慎，很可能换来戒备与敌意，行事也会倍加困难。
E: Careless answers mean distrust and potential hostility, which would make things much harder for us.

C: 是星核猎手委托我们来的！
E: The Stellaron Hunters told us to come here!

C: 嗯？但问无妨。
E: Oh? Let's hear it.

C: 卡芙卡在通讯时拿着伞…
E: Kafka was holding an umbrella in her transmission...

C: 干嘛！辅助一下嘛，十根指头不用也是浪费呀！
E: What's wrong with that? We've got ten fingers, may as well use them!

C: 我、我尽力啦……
E: That's... the best I can do...

C: 我正要赶路去太卜司。
E: I'm on my way to the Divination Commission.

C: 龙女大人？
E: Dragon lady?

C: 这样啊…你不愿多说，也没关系。
E: I see... It's fine if you'd prefer not to discuss further.

C: 已有的单子没什么利润，都得过公司一道，扣个七七八八。只有一笔生意是直接去「方壶」的，兴许有点价值……
E: Most of the deals won't be particularly profitable — the IPC takes the majority. There's only one that might be worth the journey — a direct trade with the Fanghu...

C: 不会，也就多等了半个时辰吧～
E: No, no, only an extra couple of hours~

C: 封锁期间在这说相声…
E: Doing a crosstalk here during a blockade...

C: 下次见到驭空，我一定好好打个报告。
E: I'll definitely be putting in a few words next time we meet Yukong...

C: 我瞧见她了！
E: I see her!

C: 本座不敢妄言。只能说，星核猎手的预言比本座的卜算更准。卡芙卡所求的未来正在一一应验。
E: I wouldn't hazard a guess. All I can say is that the predictions of the Stellaron Hunters were more accurate than mine. The future that Kafka seeks is becoming reality... one step at a time.

C: 你也看到了，对吧！建木重生的样子，嘻嘻，何其壮绝！
E: So you witnessed it too? The Ambrosial Arbor's resurrection, hehe... Magnificent!

C: 丹炉中的烟气…我嗅到了未来……
E: That scent in the elixir crucible... I could smell the future...

C: 信不过本座是吧！
E: Do you not trust me?

C: 可到最后，丹士们仍不满足，开始以操纵生命为乐。对「建木」的研究，就像饮鸩止渴…越深入，越渴望。
E: But in the end, the alchemists grew discontented and began to obsess over the manipulation of life. Research into the Arbor poisoned their minds... the more they pursued it, the more they longed for it.

C: 他来了。
E: He's here.

C: 你…要去哪里？
E: ...Where are you going?

C: 住手！我不想和你生死相搏！
E: Stay your hand! I have no wish to harm you!

C: 加快脚步，帮他们一把。
E: We need to help them, let's go.

C: {NICKNAME}摇了摇头。{F#她}{M#他}不想说话时，谁也没法让{F#她}{M#他}开口。
E: {NICKNAME} shakes {M#his}{F#her} head. {M#He}{F#She} doesn't want to speak. Nobody can get {M#him}{F#her} to open up.

C: 你是列车组的一员，丹恒。赶紧把事情解决吧，我们还要继续旅行呢。
E: You're a member of the Express Crew, Dan Heng. Let's settle this matter as soon as possible — our journey doesn't end here.

C: 按照传统，从此以后，历任龙尊都要重返显龙大雩殿，在这儿引导古海之潮，守望并加固「建木」的封印。
E: According to tradition, from then on, successive high elders were obliged to return to the Dragonvista Rain Hall. They would guide the tides of the ancient sea to guard and strengthen the Arbor's seal.

C: 刚才那头巨兽的脚下踩着一块石板，不知是否和这儿的封印有关…
E: Hmm... Did you notice the flagstone the creature was stepping on? I wonder if it has any connection to the seal...

C: 幻胧，这一击如何？！
E: Had enough, Phantylia!?

C: 还要请各位稍等，太卜大人去去就来。
E: Can you wait a little moment? The master diviner will be here soon.

C: 如果能定位星核深埋在建木中的位置，列车团也许可以帮上各位。
E: If you can locate exactly where the Stellaron is within the Arbor, then the Express might be able to help out.

C: 是的…我还是不愿相信。停云的下落，我一定会用自己的方式去探明。但眼下，我，我……
E: I... can still hardly believe it. I'll use my own methods to locate Tingyun's whereabouts, but at present... I...

C: 可惜仙舟上类似鳞渊春、丹鼎素针之类的名茶早已传承数千载，从外传入的混合茶饮也各行其道，要推陈出新实在很难。
E: Famous brews like Whale-Tide Spring or Vegetations in the Alchemy Cauldron have been around for millennia, and imported mixed teas have also found a niche. Introducing a new product into the industry is really hard.

C: 停云姐姐……
E: Miss Tingyun...

C: 放在宇宙的尺度下，长生种与短生种的生命似乎也并没有什么差别。仙舟住民追寻所得的长生，还不及一颗星星呼吸闪烁一瞬。他们的悲伤也和我们并无区别。
E: From a universal perspective, there is little difference between the lives of long and short-life species. The transcendence that the Xianzhou pursues is nothing compared to the enduring majesty of the stars. And the grief felt here... is no different from our own.

C: 唉，我曾教过很多短生种的徒弟，他们离开罗浮后便再也不回来了，比起路途，时间才是真正阻绝一切的沟壑啊。
E: *sigh* I've taken on many a short-life apprentice — after leaving the Luofu, they never return. Time, not distance, is the true separator of souls.

C: 各位乘客应该都知道了帕？列车此行的目的地是「盛会之星」匹诺康尼。
E: I thought everyone knew! Our next destination is the Planet of Festivities, Penacony.

C: 我会义无反顾地开拓下去。
E: I would blaze a trail without hesitation.

C: 我似乎在哪里见过你……
E: I seem to remember you from somewhere...

C: 实不相瞒，我和各位一样都是客人。匹诺康尼是我的故乡，但长大后我就离开了这里，此次有幸受邀，回来为「谐乐大典」献唱一曲。
E: Truth be told, I am a guest like everyone. Penacony is my hometown, but I left when I was older. I was graciously invited this time to return and sing a song at the Charmony Festival.

C: 这房间是你让给我的？
E: You were the one who transferred it to me?

C: 嗯，都被那穿灰西装的给扣了，所有的礼金，还有存放「基石」的匣子…嗯？你往哪走呢？
E: Yeah, by that gray-suited fellow. All the cash gifts, and the box containing the Cornerstones... Eh? Where're you going?

C: 交给我吧。
E: Leave it to me.

C: 知更鸟对她的兄长微微颔首，随后将那对葱翠的眸子对上了你。她微笑，你见她湖绿色的眼底泛起阵阵涟漪，一道巨大的旋涡随后自潭水深处升起。
E: Robin gives a slight nod to her brother, then locks her emerald gaze with yours. She smiles, and you see ripples shimmering in the depths of her lake-green eyes, followed by a mighty vortex emerging from the depths of the pool.

C: （看地图，那就是「梦境贩售店」了…那是…眼睛？）
E: (According to the map, that is the Dreamscape Sales Store... Is that... a giant eyeball?)

C: 您可以在这里体验到种种新奇有趣的梦境——上至克劳克影业出品、下至私人捐赠，我们应有尽有！
E: Here's where you get to experience all sorts of fascinating dreamscapes — from the top-notch productions of Clock Studios to private donations, we have it all!

C: （抱歉，为了避免某些纠纷，苜蓿草家系只允许这个品牌的饮料出现在预制梦境中。）
E: (My apologies. By order of the Alfalfa Family, delicious, thirst-quenching SoulGlad is the only brand of beverage permitted to appear in recorded dreamscapes.)

C: 伙计们，她还有共犯！
E: Hey, look! She has an accomplice!

C: 下一刹那，女孩温和的面容恢复如初。她向你报以一个恰到好处的微笑。
E: Firefly returns to her warm and gentle disposition.

C: 呀，那有一位游乐设施的管理员！
E: Hey, there's a ride attendant over there!

C: 我的朋友去其他梦境了。
E: My friends went to the other Dreamscapes.

C: 我想过这人是不是你的朋友，但直觉告诉我不是。
E: I wondered whether he was a friend of yours, but my instinct told me he wasn't.

C: 这可不行哪，不能坏了规矩。要是没有认证就请回吧。
E: No, I can't break the rules. Please go home if you don't have the card.

C: 这你就不懂了，制成的梦泡好不好玩取决于你做过的梦——每个人都做过那种醒来后意犹未尽的梦，不是吗？
E: Well, whether a dream bubble is fun or not depends on what kind of dreams you've had. We all had dreams that we wished we could have continued after waking up, right?

C: 再见了，伙计…你可千万别让我失望啊。
E: See you around, pal... Don't let me down.

C: …还不会下雨！我这身行头可娇贵得很哪，禁不起风吹雨淋。
E: ...Also, it never rains here! My outfit is too expensive to be exposed to the elements.

C: 当我没读过匹诺康尼历史么？别想把我卷进你们无聊的办公室政治。
E: Do you think I know nothing about the history of Penacony? Don't drag me into your banal office politics.

C: 他说只有孩子能看到他。
E: He said only children can see him.

C: 呃，可是你看上去比我大吧，只看外表的话……
E: Um, but I think you look older than me in terms of appearance...

C: 他说求我帮帮他…
E: He's begging for my help...

C: 你在和钟表小子说话？…是啊，局面看起来要控制不住了……
E: Are you talking to Clockie? ..Well, it does look like things are getting out of control...

C: 您说得对！在祂的眼中，我们都是一家人！
E: You're right! We're a family to THEM!

C: 是话疗，我用了话疗。
E: Talk therapy. I used that on him.

C: 好漂亮的窨井盖。
E: What a beautiful manhole cover.

C: 「里面」？什么意思？
E: Inside? What does that mean?

C: 好吧，那我们回去。
E: Fine. We'll head back.

C: 一边去一边去，让我一个人静静！
E: Haul yourselves over to somewhere else! I need to be alone!

C: 尝试洞察他的内心。
E: Try reading his inner thoughts.

C: 我准备好了。
E: I'm ready.

C: 滴答！就是那里，就是那里！钟表小子可不会吹牛！
E: Tick-tock! He's there! He's there! See, Clockie does not tell lies!

C: （秘密据点…是咖啡厅？）
E: (Her secret stronghold is... a cafe?)

C: 米哈伊尔，你藏到哪里去了？
E: Mikhail, where are you hiding?

C: 如何，有梦到我吗？
E: How was it? Did you dream of me?

C: 流萤…她逃出来了吗？
E: Firefly... Did she make it out?

C: 我知道你脑袋里有许多问号，别心急。在那之前，先向担心你的伙伴们报个平安吧。
E: I know you've many questions, so please compose yourself. Before that, you should let your friends know you're safe.

C: （哦，是吗？如有雷同，不胜荣幸！）
E: (Oh, really? Well you know what they say — great minds dream alike!)

C: 只有我才该得到它！
E: Only I should have it!

C: 一阵巨响过后，「繁育」的灾祸褪去，世界清净了。那位遭受无妄之灾的桶也回到了他的梦乡。谢谢你，无名客！
E: After a loud boom, Propagation's crisis has ended. The world is once again peaceful. And that trashcan who has endured undeserved ordeals has returned to his slumber. Thank you, Nameless!

C: 「思绪长廊」——酒店的服务人员是这么称呼它的。
E: The Gallery of Thoughts — that's how the hotel staff referred to it.

C: 这位冥火大公是来自陀斐特的火魔，一种元素生命，据说出身还和某位天才有点关系……
E: This Duke Inferno is a Fire Demon from Fetora. He's an energy lifeform, and it's rumored that his birth is related to a certain genius...

C: 巡海游侠神出鬼没，彼此之间也往来甚少，这件衣服太好穿了，只要她不松口，根本死无对证。公司是有办法追查，但也需要时间。
E: The Galaxy Rangers come and go like shadows, and there's little communication between them. Her story is almost too perfect. If she remains silent, there's no concrete evidence against her. While the IPC can investigate, it'll take some time.

C: 我知道你在想什么，很可惜…那姑娘不在里面，这里也不是她的房间。
E: I know what you're thinking, but alas... That girl isn't in there, and neither is this her room.

C: 我会略施手段让你不那么难受。别担心，你的伙伴也很安全，我在入梦前向她们两人各要了一件小首饰，这能让我在忆域中感应她们的存在。
E: I shall use my methods to relieve you. Don't worry, as your companions are safe — I had both of them each give me a trinket before I entered the dream. This will allow me to feel their presence in the Memory Zone.

C: 也不能这么说吧，我只是不知道自己在哪里。
E: Well, not really. I just don't know where I am.

C: 嗯…但愿如此。
E: Mm... I truly hope so.

C: 朋友，不绕弯子了——开门见山地说，<color=#dbc291ff>我想以个人名义同星穹列车达成合作。</color>
E: Friend, let's not beat around the bush here — the thing is, <color=#dbc291ff>I want to reach out personally to team up with the Astral Express.</color>

C: 你你你你你你好。
E: H—H—H—H—Hello.

C: 那就麻烦{NICKNAME}给砂金一个答复吧。各位也趁这段时间，再整理下思绪。
E: Then {NICKNAME}, could you please reply to Aventurine? Everyone, take this time to put together your thoughts.

C: …是个很温和的人？
E: ...She's a very gentle woman?

C: 要我提醒你么？这里是梦境，这座公馆的装潢再怎么豪华，也不会影响匹诺康尼一丝一毫。别在无聊的地方找家族的茬了。
E: Do you need me to remind you? We're in a dreamscape. No matter how grand the mansion looks, it'll not affect Penacony. Stop wasting your time nitpicking The Family here.

C: 嗯，此前教授为你高贵的人格做了保证。他说你们二人的心地一样正直，是家族可以信赖的对象。
E: Yes, the doctor has assured me of your noble character. He considers you, like himself, a virtuous person who can be trusted by The Family.

C: 「此刻，你的基石是否就在这个房间里？」
E: "Is your Cornerstone in this room right now?"

C: 是。
E: Yes.

C: 那你应该也明白，一位合格的学者能认清自己的位置，不会为无聊的尊严丢失更重要的东西。
E: In that case, you ought to realize that a competent scholar knows their position and wouldn't forsake more vital matters for the sake of petty pride.

C: 出发吧，砂金先生，你*自由*了。我会在这里等你报喜。
E: Off you go, Mr. Aventurine. You are free. I will wait here for your good news.

C: 抱歉…酒店没有这个权限。这些信息由猎犬家系统一管理，只有出现具体问题时，才会转到这边。
E: I apologize... The hotel does not have access. This information is managed by the Bloodhound Family. We can only gain access if there's a problem.

C: 抱歉，人命关天，也为了家族的声誉，我们有必要了解详细的案情。
E: Sorry, but human lives and The Family's reputation are at stake. It is imperative we know everything about the case.

C: 那个，{NICKNAME}，他好像有点生气了，咱要不还是……
E: Uhm, {NICKNAME}, he looks kinda angry now. Should we...

C: 并且，这种坏死会传播、扩散，一块拼图的异变最终会导致整座建筑的摇晃、破碎…崩坏。
E: Also, this necrosis will diffuse and spread. One piece of the puzzle's mutation will eventually cause the entire building to shake, break... and crumble.

C: 我不知道他们是否还会打开那金库的门。但在我离开前，我亲眼目睹一位衣冠楚楚的皮皮西从空中跌落，而周围的人依旧穿过了他。
E: I don't know if they would open the vault door, but before I left, I witnessed a well-dressed Pepeshi person plummet from the sky while those around him continued on their way, unfazed.

C: ——是个*不该存在*的令使。
E: —is an Emanator who should not exist.

C: 但你有副不错的皮囊，所以不少客人都把身家押在你这瘦骨嶙峋的小鬼身上。去吧，别让主子失望。
E: But you look good, and that's why many customers are betting their fortunes on a scrawny brat like you. So, go along now, and don't let your master down.

C: 我知道…舒翁肯定觉得我是想借她的名声出人头地。可我想要的，只是她能够回到那里……
E: I know... she probably thinks I'm just trying to ride her fame to get ahead, but all I want is for her to reclaim her place...

C: 啊…我明白了，她不是不愿离开，只是不想再面对那群小人！
E: Ah... I get it now. She's not leaving because she doesn't want to run into them again!

C: 所以，我进一步向各位提问，你们是否想过，为什么家族能容忍「钟表匠」向外界送出这种笑话一样的信息，任凭你们应邀前来，还把这里搞得一团乱？
E: Let me ask you a question: Have you ever wondered why The Family allowed the Watchmaker to send out such a ridiculous message to the outside world, inviting you here and causing chaos?

C: 哼…显然，有人继承了「钟表匠」之名，在暗地里持续进行反抗家族的活动，直至现在。
E: Hmm... Apparently, someone has inherited the title of the Watchmaker and has been secretly working against The Family all this time.

C: 差不多就这些了。
E: That pretty much sums it up.

C: ——让开！我要找舒翁！
E: Stay out of my way! I'm looking for Siobhan!

C: 砂金…那另一位呢？
E: Aventurine... What about the other set?

C: 这不难，但没有意义。
E: Not difficult. But definitely pointless.

C: 我是在做梦，还是彻底疯了？
E: Am I dreaming, or have I gone completely insane?

C: 「公平」…呵，好像你的对手对你多公平似的。局势明明对你不利，你为什么还能这么游刃有余？那假面愚者的话究竟点醒了你什么？
E: Fair... Heh, you assume your opponents would fight fair in the first place. The odds are obviously not in your favor, so how are you just breezing by? Did that Masked Fool's words awaken something in you?

C: 明明那样你就能和姐姐过上一阵子正常人的生活了。回过头看，那才是更好的选择。
E: You obviously could've lived a normal life like Big Sis that way. Looking back, that was the better choice.

C: 永远。我们会和你一起，永远留在这片梦中。
E: Forever. We'll be with you, forever in this dream.

C: 你可以叫我钟表小子。
E: You can call me Clockie.

C: 非常感谢。
E: Thank you, I'm grateful.

C: 你、你、你，还有你…所有人都将死去——而这一切都因为你，「星核」{M#先生}{F#小姐}……
E: You, you, you, and you... All of you are going to die! And it's all because of you, {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} Stellaron...

C: 看来我的死亡已经注定。
E: It seems that my death has already been determined.

C: …我有什么理由这么做？
E: ...Why would I do this?

C: …从这场<color=#ff3a3e>梦</color>中醒来，去你应去的地方吧。你的赌局…尚未结束。
E: ...Wake up from this <color=#ff3a3e>dream</color> and go to where you should be. Your gamble... is not over yet.

C: …也得偿所愿。
E: ...And got what he wanted.

C: 梦与梦之间的狭缝。你已见过我了，星核猎手萨姆。
E: A crevice between dreams. You've met me before — I'm Sam — a Stellaron Hunter.

C: 这些也都是「剧本」？
E: Is that also part of the script?

C: 你是谁？
E: Who are you?

C: 什、什么鬼！小心我敲你！
E: Me!? A ghost? Don't make me hit you!

C: 天环族少女…？
E: A Halovian lady...?

C: 据说像流梦礁这样的地方，在阿斯德纳的忆域中不止一处，就像大海里的小岛，在家族到来前，它们就已经存在了。
E: I heard that places like Dreamflux Reef are scattered throughout the Memory Zone of Asdana, like islands in the ocean. They existed before The Family arrived.

C: 欢迎来到天堂…
E: Welcome to paradise...

C: 「拉扎莉娜」，还有…「铁尔南」。
E: Razalina and... Tiernan.

C: 远方有渡鸦的叫声…看来梦主马上就要到了。
E: I heard a raven cawing in the distance... It seems the Dreammaster will arrive soon.

C: 我们的约定与你无关，愚者。赶紧离开，否则别怪家族不客气。
E: Our paradise is none of your concern, Masked Fool. Leave now, or The Family won't tolerate you anymore.

C: 星期日，知更鸟，我看着你们长大，深知你们的秉性。现今的你们，确可称为{RUBY_B#同谐}祂{RUBY_E#}最虔信的传颂者…我已知晓你们的决心。
E: Sunday, Robin, I've watched you two grow up, and know your dispositions like the back of my hand. Both of you right now, can surely be lauded as {RUBY_B#Harmony}THEIR{RUBY_E#} most devout advocates... I already know your resolve.

C: 这叫争取正当权益。
E: It's called "standing up for your rights."

C: 「同谐」向其他派系发出邀约本就不同寻常，况且还有公司和愚者参与其中，如果你口中的「虚无」令使也确有其事，匹诺康尼当下的形势…有些过于复杂了。
E: It's unusual for the followers of the Harmony to invite other factions, let alone the IPC and the Masked Fools... If what you said about the Emanator of the Nihility is true, the situation in Penacony is... a little complicated, to say the least.

C: 初次见面，丹恒先生，我在其他人的记忆中见过你。而波提欧先生…我们也算初次见面，希望你喜欢那瓶阿斯德纳白橡木。你真会点些不好找的酒。
E: Pleased to meet you, Dan Heng. I've seen you in others' memories. And as for Boothill... This is our first face-to-face meeting. I hope you enjoyed that bottle of Asdana's White Oak. You sure have a refined taste.

C: 某一天，我因繁重的劳作不慎晕倒，被苏萨先生的饮料救活一命。那甜美的味道从此便烙印在我的脑海里，驱使着我创造了如今的苏乐达™！
