E: Once, during a particularly grueling day, I passed out and was resuscitated by a drink from Mr. Sousa. That sweet taste has since been etched in my mind, and that was what drove me to create the SoulGlad™ that we all know and love today!

C: 太棒了！两位的台词功底真是无比深厚！不过，台词并非表演的全部，请在第二个舞台继续这个故事吧……
E: Fantastic! Both of you have an incredibly solid foundation in dialogue delivery! However, lines aren't everything in a performance. Please continue this story on the second stage...

C: 在我这，二位需要用精湛的「肢体语言」诠释我描绘的故事情境。
E: Here, you two are required to skillfully utilize body language to portray the story context I've laid out for you.

C: （在沙子里打滚）
E: (Roll about in the sand)

C: 因为，这里是苏乐达™有限公司赞助的第二十届第三十三场盛会海选！
E: Because, this is SoulGlad™ Enterprises' thirty-third Festivity Auditions of the twentieth season!

C: 发出一声很酷的*哼*。
E: Let out a really cool sounding *hmph*

C: 恭喜两位选手！过关斩将，证明了自己的实力。但很遗憾…能成为匹诺康尼下一位盛会巨星的，只有一人。
E: Congratulations to both of you! You've overcome all obstacles and proven yourselves. But unfortunately... there is only one who can be Penacony's Festive Superstar.

C: 那是…哈努兄弟？
E: Is that... Hanu?

C: 你难道是…纯美骑士？
E: Are you... a Knight of Beauty?

C: 已经渐渐习惯这种感觉了…说不定还能操作哈努兄弟做些高难度动作呢。
E: I am gradually getting used to this... who knows, I might even be able to perform some high-level moves with Hanu.

C: 我将在此地遥望各位沐浴在聚光灯下，与观众们一道献上最诚挚的欢呼与喝彩。
E: I shall remain here, gazing from afar as you bask in the limelight, joining the audience in offering you the most heartfelt cheers and applause.

C: 最后，在第一百三十七次尝试时，它终于成功了。但这一次尝试并不圆满…在摇摇晃晃地飞行了一段时间后，它因无法准确掌握空气的流向而坠落在地。
E: Finally, on the hundred and thirty-seventh attempt, it succeeded. But its attempt did not go perfectly... After flying unsteadily for a while, it fell to the ground, unable to grasp the direction of the air currents.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>是做出和我一样的决定，说服猎犬家系停止搜查，以便那位逐梦客能够生存下去，实现他的愿望？</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Will you do as I did, and try to convince the Bloodhound Family to stop their pursuit, so that the Dreamchaser may live peacefully and realize his wishes?</color>

C: 我并不这么觉得。
E: Because I don't think so.

C: 我好像听见了水声……
E: I think I hear the sound of water...

C: 这可能是一种名为「失忆」的现象。别担心，小米沙，每个人总会忘记一些过去。但它们并没有消失，只是沉睡在了脑海深处。同样地，我们也能把它们找回来。
E: This could be a case of amnesia. But don't worry, Misha, it's common for everyone to forget certain aspects of the past. Those memories haven't vanished. They're just lying in the depths of your mind. We can surely get them back.

C: 那就让我们一起前往这场梦的终点…告诉米哈伊尔，我们的选择吧。
E: Then let's proceed together to the end of this dream... and tell Mikhail our decision.

C: 哦…这里让你想起自己的家了？
E: I see... This place reminds you of home?

C: 阿斯德纳人只是获得了一场小小的胜利，离真正的自由…还有很长的路要走。哈努努需要我们。
E: The people of Asdana have only achieved a tiny victory and still have a long way to go... towards true freedom. Hanunue needs us.

C: 一定要把邀请函寄到星穹列车手中。
E: Make sure to send an invitation to the Astral Express.

C: 而陪伴各位同行至今的这个孩子，是他童年美梦中懵懂无知的主角——「钟表小子」的好朋友，一名年轻的学徒，一位未来的列车机修工……
E: As for the child who has been with you, he's the innocent protagonist of Misha's childhood dream, a friend of Clockie, a young apprentice, and a future mechanic on the Express...

C: 第一次是如同死亡般的痛苦，我的身体被「沉眠」的翼刃贯穿，才有了后来所有的故事。剧本必定会应验，但形式…只在翻开那一页时才会显露。
E: The first time was a painful death when I was stabbed by the blade of "Dormancy," which led to all subsequent events. The script will always come true, but in a way... that will only be revealed when that page is turned.

C: 我会立即动用其他手段。
E: I have another plan.

C: 「欢迎来到这幢宅邸，外来的宾客。它的建立者已被下人驱逐，而七位仆人都认为自己能取代旧日的主人。」
E: "Welcome to this mansion, dear outsiders. Its founder has been exiled by those beneath them, and now the seven servants believe they can replace their former master."

C: 好多模特啊，这是时装店？
E: So many mannequins! Is this a fashion store or something?

C: 普世同谐，群星共熠！
E: The world is in Harmony!

C: 当然。你来吧，托帕？
E: Of course. Topaz, if you please?

C: 总的来说，是好消息——经过战略投资部「重大事务组」会议审议表决，以绝对多数成员同意通过了以下决议：
E: In summary, it's good news — after much deliberation from the Strategic Investment Department's council, the absolute majority of members have agreed to the following resolutions:

C: 这段时间辛苦你了。好好休息一下吧，我很期待你在下一场旅程中的表现。
E: It's not been easy for you these past few days. You've earned some downtime. I'm looking forward to seeing how you'll perform on our next journey.

C: 正是。不过，你知道更深层的原因是什么吗？
E: Precisely. But, do you know the deeper meaning behind it?

C: 应死者和已死者照旧沉眠，生者也得以酣睡。所有人都在用沉默大声喧哗，并各行其是。银河焕发出每一个纪元之初应有的活力，代价不过是一对兄妹轻微的悲伤。
E: The dead and those fated to die remain in their eternal slumber, while the living find solace in deep sleep. All clamored in a cacophony of silence, and then went about their own ways. The cosmos emanated a vitality characteristic of a new era, all for the modest price of a brother and sister's mild grief.

C: 你问这是不是提示？我不知道，只能说那<color=#dbc291ff>致命破绽</color>和这位愚者无关。
E: Is that a clue, you may wonder? I'm not sure, although I'm pretty sure that <color=#dbc291ff>the fatal flaw</color> has nothing to do with that Masked Fool.

C: 能了解到各位都愿为匹诺康尼排忧解难，这可真是再好不过了。相信各位一定能在接下来的谈判中达成共识。
E: It heartens me to learn that everyone is willing to put aside their differences for Penacony's plight. I trust that everyone will surely reach consensus in the upcoming negotiations.

C: 没想到最后回到了米沙…
E: Didn't expect it all comes back to Misha...

C: 哈！外人都觉得巡海游侠神出鬼没，彼此之间也没联系，要我说——确实！但正因如此，才有一条不成文的规矩……
E: Hah! Outsiders may see Galaxy Rangers as elusive and disconnected individuals, and actually... they're right! And that's why we have a tacit understanding among us...

C: 很好。那么，请闭上眼睛吧……
E: Very well. Now, please close your eyes...

C: 「血罪灵」…命途行者的执念，它从IX的阴影中诞生，将自己视作事主，不自知地重复着逝者生前的行为。
E: Sin Thirsters... the obsessions of the Pathstriders. They emerge from the depths of IX, seeing themselves as masters of their own destiny, unknowingly repeating the actions of their past lives.

C: 到此为止吧…我们约定的乐园并非只有「秩序」一种选择！
E: Stop it... You want to achieve the paradise we promised, but the Order is not the only choice!

C: 看来还不错嘛？早知道我就先咬一口了。
E: Looks delicious, huh? I should have taken a bite first.

C: 账账，接好！
E: Numby, catch!

C: 哼唧？哼唧……
E: Oink? Oink...

C: 呃…但是猎犬家系不会轻易放弃的，破坏梦境秩序的恶人一定会受到严惩！
E: However, you know... the Bloodhound Family won't give up. Whoever disrupts order in the Dreamscape will face severe consequences!

C: 没错，而不可说的一层是…透过苜蓿草家主的行为，我们得以捕获一种信号：五大家系也许并不像「谐乐颂」唱的那般团结。
E: Exactly, and the hidden benefit is that... as the head of the Alfalfa Family, his actions suggest that the Five Lineages might not be as united as the Odes of Harmony would suggest.

C: 蒙托尔分家在极短的时间内平息了流言的散布，绝大多数客人并无实感，生活也没有受到影响。
E: Since The Family branch from the Montour System managed to quash the spread of rumors within a short period of time, the majority of guests were unaware of the situation, and their lives remained largely unaffected.

C: 又见面了。
E: Hello again.

C: ——干杯。
E: ...Cheers.

C: 谢谢，我想，那一定会是令人难忘的味道。
E: Thank you. I'm sure it'll leave a lasting impression.

C: 你把匹诺康尼公开募股的消息散播出去的下一秒，数以万亿计的用户就会同时收到这样一条推送：
E: The moment news spreads about Penacony going public, trillions of customers will immediately receive a message like this:

C: 翡翠女士，这……
E: But Miss Jade, this is...

C: 就像现在，我等的最后一位「贵客」…也该登上这艘船了。
E: Like right now for example. It's just about time my final "guest" boarded the ship.

C: 嗯…对，你没听错。我已经抓到他了。
E: Yeah... you heard right. I've got him.

C: 所以明白了么？这不止是一句誓言，更是我等「十人」交出的抵押，我们由此换得机遇、财富、存续、明天……
E: So, you understand? This pledge goes beyond a mere oath. It's our collateral in exchange for opportunities, wealth, survival, and a future...

C: 市场开拓部和战略投资部的恩怨全银河皆知，但我还真没想到，连巡海游侠都有机会牵连其中。
E: The feud between the Marketing Development Department and the Strategic Investment Department is well-known across the cosmos. But what I didn't expect was the involvement of the Galaxy Rangers in this feud.

C: 哦哦哦…大的要来了吗！
E: Oooh... I wonder if it's gonna be a big one?

C: 还有其他办法吗…
E: Is there another way?

C: 可就是这么一段极短的路，彼此相连，就能将无数的世界联结在一起。每一个在银轨上留下枕木的人，宇宙或许不记得他们，但我们会记得。
E: But it is in this miniscule distance that paths cross, and countless worlds connect. The universe may not remember every person who leaves a tie along the silver rail, but we will.

C: 不要慌，这只是……
E: Calm down, this is just...

C: 波提欧？他来做什么。
E: Boothill? What is he doing here?

C: 你到底是谁啊！？
E: Who exactly are you!?

C: 根据校规？你再好好<color=#dbc291ff>回忆</color>一下，校规是怎么说的？
E: According to academy regulations? <color=#dbc291ff>Think</color> carefully now, what do the academy regulations say exactly?

C: 让我看看…太棒了，你真是位天生的演员！
E: Let me see here... Perfect! You're born to be a performer!

C: 我真服了…演艺社的家伙，你边上那姐们犯事儿了，别跟着她发癫！
E: Unbelievable... You from the Performing Arts Club! That woman next to you is in big trouble. Don't become an accomplice!

C: 就是香蕉开的花！很漂亮哦！
E: Referring to the flowers that bloom on banana trees. They're really pretty!

C: 当然，在下生怕引起误会，故而一直在强调「忍侠」名号。
E: Of course. I didn't want to cause a misunderstanding, so I emphasized the title Ninja Hero.

C: 星星徒有虚名，但它们放光。
E: Glorified the stars may be, yet it is them that light up the dark.

C: 嗯？还有什么事吗？
E: Huh? Do you need something else?

C: 嗯。说是蛊惑也好，诱导也罢，那种杂音的确撬开了人们心中的空隙。
E: Call it bewitchment or persuasion, the fact remains that such dissonance has indeed wrenched open the emptiness in people's hearts.

C: 事实上，我对自己的入戏方式仍不满意。但我相信，你的演绎会将这一幕推向更高的位置。
E: Truth be told, I do not find the way I entered the act to be satisfactory, but I believe your acting will make this scene better.

C: 仔细观察
E: Watch closely

C: 忍历六十一年 忍之都 缭乱•道场。
E: <unbreak>61</unbreak>st Year of Ninja Era, Dazzling Dojo, the Ninja Capital

C: 为什么？！
E: Why!?

C: 你就放一百个心吧。{NICKNAME}也是，晚点见！
E: Aww, I will. Don't worry about me! You too, {NICKNAME}. Catch you guys later!

C: 蕉蕉蕉……
E: Bana bana bana...

C: 在你还未消化这些情感之时，小猴坚定地跑向了远方……
E: Before you could process these emotions, the little monkey resolutely dashed off into the distance...
...Bana.

C: 哎，真让猴失望，要不还是换演员吧，如果没有对小猴炙热的爱意，演技再好也没用蕉。
E: An utter disappointment to the monkeys. Maybe we should change the cast. Acting skills alone won't cut it. They need to adore Slumbernana with every fiber of their being, bana!

C: 咱们不用排练下吗？
E: Shouldn't we be rehearsing?

C: 不及格！太粗俗了。
E: Fail! That's plain crass!

C: 大岚神在上！何其凶恶的舌剑，比邪忍的恶毒•诅咒还要可怖……
E: O mighty Aeon of The Hunt! Such vile tongue-lashing! Surpassing that of even Evil Ninja's Dispiteous Curse!

C: 各位演员也意识到了啊，那就由我来翻开剧本的下一页吧，关于这所折纸大学发生的罪恶——
E: So, you actors have caught on... Let me reveal the next act in the plot then. We'll be exploring the misdeeds going down at Paperfold University...

C: 蕉蕉蕉，时间到了，该下课了。
E: Bana bana! That's all I have for you. Class dismissed.

C: 呃，在主张放弃思考的社团很有天赋？
E: ...Wait, talented for a club that advocates the abandonment of all thought!?

C: 无名客姐们，借一步说话？
E: Hey, Nameless gal. Can we have a little talk over yonder?

C: 我是不知道这社团背后到底是什么香蕉，但从流梦礁的杂音来看，它肯定对这地方很感兴趣。咱们真动手，它坐不住的。
E: I got no clue what kinda monkey business this club's up to, but I know from the static noise at Dreamflux Reef that they're sure as heck interested in Penacony. They'll definitely step in if we raise the roof offa this place.

C: 我就知道，有时候事情就是简单得要命，人犯不着那么聪明。
E: I had a hunch, sometimes it's just dead simple, don't gotta be a genius.

C: 「比在场的任何人都更希望回到过去。」
E: "He wants to visit the past more than anyone else in the room."

C: 忍之都。
E: The Ninja Capital

C: 忍者演员，就是你。
E: Yes, it's none other than you, ninja actor.

C: 《银河忍法帖》有云：「蝎毒巧用能解蛇毒，鸩酒有时亦是甘露。」
E: As stated in the Cosmic Ninjutsu Inscriptions: "When used correctly, the venom of a scorpion neutralizes snake venom, just as poisoned wine may sometimes be used to quench thirst."

C: 她是叆叇馆主，道馆的首脑，亦是我等缭乱众的后援。
E: This is Umbra Headmistress, the head of the dojo and a reliable supportive figure for us Dazzling students.

C: 脖上的颈圈散发出强劲的电流，如同千根尖针穿过你的血肉，无数炸弹在身体中引爆。你的心脏开始以反常的速率颤动，耳边传来了无数声响，甚至包括质子入灭的声响。
E: The collar emits powerful electrical currents, like thousands of needles piercing through your flesh and blood, and countless bombs exploding within your body. Your heart begins to beat at an unusual rate. You hear countless noises, including the deaths of protons.

C: 我已经毕业了，你现在得叫我「猿<unbreak>22</unbreak>」。
E: I've graduated. Now you need to call me Ape <unbreak>22</unbreak>.

C: 我不管主导权在谁手里，但你不能再继续实验了，她会废掉的。
E: Who's in charge isn't important, but you can't continue the experiment anymore. She'll break.

C: 巡海游侠，我收到了求救信号。*忍侠俚语*，到底是原始博士党羽的地盘，跟*忍侠俚语*藏在树林里的香蕉一样难找。
E: Galaxy Ranger. I received a distress signal. This place really is the territory of Dr. Primitive's henchmen. It's as hard to find as those *Ninja Slang* bananas hidden in the woods.

C: …哟，虾蟇•忍者。
E: ...Yo, Ninja Gama.

C: 只有你一个人吗？
E: Are you alone?

C: （据芮克先生所说，用这台摄影机就可以前往最后的「片场」了蕉。）
E: (Mr. Reca said using this camera will help me get to the final set, bana.)

C: 邪祟•总长，比起编造狂言，不如好好构想阁下的辞世句吧！
E: Fiendling Chief, rather than continuing to weave lies, why don't you think about your last words!

C: 为实现前人的遗愿，众人向匹诺康尼大剧院进发，意图封印星核，却不得不与心向「秩序」的橡木家主星期日决一死战，而这场大战以「秩序」的再度陨落作结。
E: To fulfill the wishes of their predecessors, everyone heads to the Penacony Grand Theater with the intention of sealing the Stellaron. However, they are forced into a deadly battle against Sunday, the head of the Oak family, who is aligned with the Order. This great battle concludes with the fall of the Order once again.

C: 但步入邪祟的国度，{F#她}{M#他}将不再有忧烦愁苦，终日与群猿相伴，尽享无为之乐，余生也算逍遥。
E: But upon entering the realm of fiendlings, {F#she}{M#he} felt no more worries or suffering and spent {F#her}{M#his} time with the ape-friends. When every day is drowned in joy, the rest of one's life will also become free and unfettered.

C: 自称伎乐忍徒的学生被纪检部部长抓走了……
E: The individual who claims to be Ninja Initiate Gigaku has been detained by the head of the Disciplinary Committee...

C: 道路…在为我开启。
E: The path... is opening up for me.

C: 没错，他愿意将火种交给黄金裔…也是寄希望于我们能继续肩负起抗击黑潮的重任。
E: That is correct. He was willing to entrust the Coreflame to the Chrysos Heirs... because he was also pinning his hopes on us, to succeed him in shouldering the responsibility of resisting the black tide.

C: 或许，这也是另一个原因…让白厄阁下会义无反顾地投入「纷争」的试炼。
E: Perhaps that is also why Lord Phainon threw himself into the trial of Strife so readily.

C: 这…母亲的印戒？
E: This is... Mother's signet?

C: ——我在鳞渊境开海前，你对我说的最后一句话是什么?
E: —What was the last thing you said to me before I parted the waters at the Scalegorge Waterscape?

C: 不像演的，看来是本人。
E: Hmm, that sounds like something the real you would say.

C: 答对了，记性不错。
E: That's right. You have a great memory.

C: 等等，我有异议！
E: Not so fast! I object to this!

C: 缇安知道，城里有好医生！所以缇安把陌生的朋友带进城里，找好医生！
E: Trianne knows the city has good doctors! So Trianne brought our new friend into the city to look for a doctor!

C: 也许…他们真的在睡大觉？
E: Maybe they really are asleep?

C: 「黑色」…「斗篷」…还有「利剑」……
E: "Black"... "Cloak"... and "Sword"...

C: …各位，我有种不好的预感。
E: ...I have a bad feeling about this.

C: 呵呵…这小兔子，真是活泼，还有种熟悉的味道。
E: Hehe... Such a lively little bunny. You even smell a little familiar.

C: 只是，现在…轮到吾献身了。
E: But now... It's time for me to sacrifice myself.

C: 别了…吾爱。
E: Farewell... my love.

C: {NICKNAME}阁下……
E: {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}...

C: …怎、怎么停下来了？
E: ...Wh—Why have you stopped?

C: ——各位，请让一让！
E: ...Excuse me! Coming through!

C: 缇安，好不舒服…要先回去，睡觉……
E: I feel awful... I need to go back... to get some rest...

C: 因为我不想再等待了，你的犹疑令人绝望。
E: Because I don't want to wait anymore. Your hesitation made me desperate.

C: 拜托了，阿格莱雅，请先听听*我们*的想法。
E: Please, Aglaea. Hear us out first.

C: 这个猜想的可能性最大。第一，它持有火种的容器；第二，我也是它的目标之一。
E: This is the most plausible possibility. First, it has a vessel that can hold Coreflames. Second, I'm one of its targets.

C: 你若真能带领族人打破这染血的命运，就再次证明给我看吧，迈德漠斯。
E: If you're truly capable of leading our people beyond this bloodstained fate, then prove it to me once more, Mydeimos.

C: 那场大火成了山之民历史的起点，自那之后，他们才汇入文明的大河，圣城中才出现了巨人的身影。而曾经的那片山岳，早已成了黑潮中的几点浮沫。
E: That great fire marked the beginning of Mountain Dweller history. Since then, their people became part of civilization, and giants became a common sight in the holy city. Meanwhile, that mountain they once lived in has turned into little more than foam inside the black tide.

C: 他用一把大火烧毁了名为「传统」的枷锁，然后驱迫所有人…迈向滚滚而来的时代。
E: He started a great fire and burned the shackles of tradition to ashes, and then... forced everyone to march toward the coming of a new era.

C: 但话都说到这份上了…感谢你助我手刃仇敌，迈德漠斯。
E: Well, with that said... thank you for aiding me in defeating my archenemy, Mydeimos.

C: 就算斩杀了那黑衣人，你心中的失落便能一笔勾销？不可能。复仇只是一件必须被完成的任务，但没有人能通过它得到心灵的满足。
E: Can you genuinely let go of everything as soon as that swordmaster is dead? That's impossible. Revenge is merely an obligation that must be carried out, and no one can find mental fulfillment through it.

C: 即便你我早已对这荒诞的命运释怀，可他们终究涉世未深……
E: While you and I have long accepted this absurd fate, they remain fresh and inexperienced...

C: 停手吧，缇里西庇俄丝…若散播预言，只会引发灾难。那灾难…足以将你撕成千片。
E: Stop while you still can. Tribios... Spreading the prophecy will only kindle disaster. That disaster... will tear you into a thousand pieces.

C: 啃这么多文献，太狠了。
E: Reading all of this... that's crazy.

C: 叛徒在那边！ / 抓住她！ / 红头发的女人是叛徒！
E: The traitor's over there! / Get her! / That red-head woman is the traitor!

C: 童言无忌，我就当这是顽童的无心之言吧。
E: A child's words are always carefree. I'll just dismiss these words as nonsense from a cheeky child.

C: 抱歉，突然出现在了这里。毕竟星穹列车的开拓之行总是来去匆匆的，我想尽量不干扰各位的行程。
E: Sorry for just showing up out of the blue. The Astral Express's trailblazing journey is always a whirlwind, so I try not to disrupt your plans.

C: 在圣杯战争结束前，请暂时用「葛瑞迪」这个名字来称呼我，{RUBY_B#御主}制片人{RUBY_E#}。
E: While the Holy Grail War is ongoing, please address me as Grady, {RUBY_B#Master}Producer{RUBY_E#}.

C: 听好了，我用作品署名权和「体验英灵的记忆」作为条件，才换来{RUBY_B#芮克先生}那位导演{RUBY_E#}自愿{RUBY_B#灵基融合}充当你的载体{RUBY_E#}。
E: Listen up: I had to offer him film credits and the chance to experience a Heroic Spirit's memories just to convince {RUBY_B#Mr. Reca}that director{RUBY_E#} to {RUBY_B#Spirit Origin Fusion}act as your vessel{RUBY_E#}.

C: 一点小小的个人经验：并不是每个人都和你「有仇」，孩子。你要学会区分「利益冲突」和「私人恩怨」。
E: A little personal wisdom: Not everyone is your enemy, kid. Learn to separate "conflict of interest" from "personal vendetta."

C: 可惜呀可惜，你的「圣杯战争」之路，就要到此为止了。
E: What a shame. Your Holy Grail War ends right here.

C: 她？还真是意外的重逢。
E: Her? Well, that is an unexpected reunion.

C: 这么多天环翅堡，小店需要一些时间做准备。请两位客人稍安勿躁。
E: With so many Halovian Winged Burgers, it'll take a little time to prepare. Please be patient, folks!

C: 我既没有Saber小姐那样强大的安全感，连自己的「真名」也丢失了。我实在不知道像我这样力量微薄的从者，能为御主做些什么。
E: I'm nothing like Miss Saber, who gives off such a sense of security and reassurance, I've even lost my True Name. I honestly don't know what a Servant as weak as I am can do for my Master.

C: 他宝贝的，那个蓝色的哥们儿不是说先来探路吗？他怎么连个回报都没有，该不会给那老可爱算计了吧？
E: Fork it, wasn't that blue guy supposed to scout this place ahead of us? Haven't even heard a single peep from him so far... Could that old man have pulled a fast one on him?

C: 不错，他来到大剧院，打算直奔主题，用他手中的长枪把奥帝先生钉在大幕上。我对他的看法深表赞同……
E: Yes. He came to the Grand Theater with his spear raised and ready, eager to impale Old Oti on the curtain. I couldn't agree more with his approach...

C: 我想成为万民所期望的，拯救不列颠的理想之王。为此，我可以献上一切。
E: I wanted to be the ideal king my people dreamed of, someone who would save Britain. For that... I would have sacrificed everything.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>他说，一旦拔出剑，就会迎来被所有人憎恶的可悲结局。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>He told me that once I drew the sword, I would meet a tragic end, hated by all.</color>

C: 那是啥玩意儿？游戏里的角色？
E: Who's that? A game character?

C: 哎，这个我有听过！听说空间站有个藏品被偷走了，被某个来历不明的闯入者吞进了肚子，还因此引来了反物质军团的袭击。
E: Oh, I've heard of that! Apparently, a valuable relic was stolen from the space station. It was swallowed by a mysterious intruder, which then led to an attack from the Antimatter Legion.

C: 我…后悔了。
E: I... regret my choice.

C: 没错，就是这样，平静，且美好地放下双手。现在，你已经对工作轻车熟路了，把剩下的文件也整理干净吧。
E: Yes. That's it. Calmly and nicely, drop the fight. By now, the job feels like second nature. Might as well tidy up the last of the files.

C: 没错，就是这样。
E: That's right, exactly.

C: 帕姆现在怎么样？
E: How's Pom-Pom?

C: （我那时的选择，真的是正确的吗？）
E: (Did I really make the right choice?)

C: 必须把圣杯解体，否则，所有人都会被这群虫子拖垮。
E: We must break the Holy Grail, or we'll lose in this war of attrition against these pests.

C: 赫拉克勒斯是谁…
E: Who's Heracles...

C: 如今，这座银河著名的度假胜地中，一场好戏又将上演——
E: Now, a grand spectacle is about to unfold yet again in this holiday resort famed throughout the cosmos —

C: 没有配音的配角，就别说这么多台词浪费观众的时间了。
E: Supporting characters with no voice dubbing shouldn't waste the audience's time with your lines.

C: 竟然在恐怖片里悍然选择暴力对抗，异界的英灵真是毫无艺术素养！
E: Using brute force in a horror film? Heroic Spirits from another world clearly have no sense of art!

C: 明知我们是同盟关系，还要挑拨离间？
E: Knowing we're allies, you still go out of your way to stir up trouble and sow discord?

C: 人、妖精，哪怕是山林中的魔怪，凡是具有灵智的生命，就拥有用双手换取希望的资格。而你们灵魂的重量，要远高于这位雇主给出的价格。
E: Human or monster, beast or demon — if you've got a mind of your own, then you've got the right to chase hope with your own two hands. Your soul's worth is far more than the pittance your employer is offering.

C: 你已经做得很好了。
E: You have done extremely well.

C: 依照一般魔术的逻辑，只要破坏掉核心，就能破除效果。你需要我打碎这个电视机吗？
E: By usual magecraft logic, destroying the core should nullify the effect. Should I smash the TV?

C: 任何时间！任何地点！
E: Any time! Any place!

C: 视情况看怎么揍你。
E: Depending on how this goes, I'll decide how hard to beat you up.

C: 受死吧！{NICKNAME}！
E: DIE, {NICKNAME}!

C: 钟表匠，你看到了吗？你最引以为傲的把戏，现在也不过是我的囊中之物！
E: Watchmaker, witness this! Your most prized trick now belongs to me!

C: 挚爱之人的离去，受最信任的人背叛，日趋迫近的死期，被杜撰出的、不应存在的情绪在心头炸开，徒留下一个漆黑的孔洞，它像死人的眼睛般凝视你——
E: Departed loved ones, betrayal by those you trusted most, the shadow of approaching death... These manufactured emotions burst in your heart, leaving just a black void that watches you with the empty eyes of a corpse—

C: 你感受到她身上散发出强大的气息，仿佛在面对千军万马。
E: You can feel her aura bearing down on you, as if standing before an army.

C: 为什么恐怖片里，演员总是看不见怪物从何而来？只要电影仍在继续，就一定会有新的怪物跳入镜头。
E: Why do actors in horror films never see where the monsters come from? Why do monsters keep popping into the frame as long as the film is rolling?

C: 这些女士？
E: ...These ladies?

C: 狂笑三月七诞生！
E: Behold, the laughing maniac: March 7th!

C: 停云女士的麻烦，和我此前的猜测一样。在经受了那场作弄后，她零落成了自身的每一个音符。
E: The problem with Miss Tingyun is just as I suspected before. That prank shattered her into notes that are each a part of her.

C: 什么鬼？
E: What the...

C: 这位老板好，小女子初来乍到，想为故乡的朋友带点梦境特产，两位本地通点名推荐了这儿，咱就来看看。
E: Hello there! It's my first time visiting the Dreamscape, so I wanted to buy some local specialties as souvenirs for my friends back home. My two friends here are more familiar with the Dreamscape and recommended your shop, so I'm here to take a look.

C: 可不许挑那种很奇怪的啊。
E: Just don't pick anything weird, okay?

C: 怕是抱不动了。
E: I'm afraid you'd be too heavy for me now.

C: 尽管星核之灾没有造成实际影响，但还是有许多住客选择退房，酒店冷清了许多。不知匹诺康尼的明天会如何，希望不会影响知更鸟女士的生活。
E: The Stellaron Disaster may not have had any real consequences, but many guests still chose to check out. Now, the hotel feels quieter than before. It makes me wonder what Penacony's future will be like. I just hope it will not negatively affect you, Miss Robin.

C: 因为我相信自己记忆中的他。
E: Because I have faith in the person I remember him to be.

C: 「另外，身材管理是很重要，但要记得好好吃饭。」
E: "One more thing, staying fit is important, but don't forget to eat well, too."

C: 那幅画像是一种祝福，也像是某个人的决意：即便折断的羽翼不再属于天际，它将坠落的方向也是群星——
E: That painting feels like a blessing, and also seems to mirror someone's resolve: Even when the broken wings no longer belong to the sky, the direction in which they fall will still be towards the stars—

C: 你的意思是，操纵星核的人并非梦主？
E: Are you suggesting that the Dreammaster wasn't the one controlling the Stellaron?

C: 所以，在离开匹诺康尼后，您能否允许我……
E: Therefore, after leaving Penacony, would you consider letting me...

C: 但在那之前，我同样会履行乘客的职责，尽心尽力。
E: Until then, I will do my best to fulfill my duty as a passenger.

C: 此刻，人们还没料想到这个假期将会多么「充实」，他们将共同见证仙舟的演武盛事，甚至忙里偷闲，完成了与一位天才的约定——
E: At this moment, people still haven't expected this vacation to be so fulfilling. They will witness the grand Xianzhou wardance and, during this moment of leisure, also complete arts promise made by a genius...

C: 他还挺有松弛感。
E: He's pretty laid-back about this, huh.

C: 那我正式宣布：下一站——翁法罗斯！
E: It's official, then. Our next stop is... Amphoreus!

C: 但忆庭窥见了这里，一并发现的，还有其中变幻莫测的命途行迹。
E: Yet the Garden, caught a glimpse of this place, and along with it, discovered ever-shifting Traces.

C: 不会吧，美少女怎么会生病呢……
E: I doubt it...? Pretty girls aren't supposed to get sick...

C: 还能怎么办？当然是查出「谒见系统」的故障，然后把它给解决了。
E: What else can I do? Identify what's malfunctioning within the Audience System and fix it, of course.

C: 你说的没错。二者用的是同一套底层逻辑，本质上是一回事。
E: Keen observation. They share the same fundamental logic, and are pretty much identical in that regard.

C: 说正事，「谒见系统」被我划分成了三个扇区：「能源区」、「算力区」、还有「通信区」。每个扇区各自独立，只有系统启动时才会通过「智识」的命途串联起来。
E: Focus now. The Audience System is divided into three zones: Energy Supply, Computing, and Communications. Each zone operates independently, and will only be integrated via the Path of Erudition when the system is booted.

C: 别发出奇怪的动静啊，显得我精神不太正常似的。让那小贼先好好睡一觉吧，晚点再决定该怎么处置她。
E: Cut that out! Those weird noises make me seem like I've got a few screws loose. Put that little thief to sleep for now. We can decide her fate later.

C: 数个系统时前，星穹列车上……
E: Some system hours ago, aboard the Astral Express...

C: 怎么了？
E: What is it?

C: 两位朋友，我猜你们心里有好多疑问，对不对？
E: I'm sure you two have a ton of questions, don't you?

C: 但前面的路…是断的。
E: But the road ahead is... cut off.

C: 「伟岸的{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}，全知的父，它身躯伟岸，却甘将眼睑垂低。」
E: "O great {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}, all-knowing father of stature so tall, yet low does their gaze willingly fall."

C: 这是…不可思议。
E: This is... unbelievable.

C: 雅努斯…会为我们指示未来吗？
E: Will Janus... show us the future?

C: 这下人类一败涂地了。
E: Humanity is so doomed.

C: 不不不，这里很安全。
E: No, no, no, it's very safe here.

C: 丹恒，你饿了吗？
E: Dan Heng, is that your stomach growling?

C: 那圣城也将掘出它的藏身之处，吹响反攻的号角。
E: Then, the holy city shall also uncover their hiding place and sound the horn of retaliation.

C: 是。
E: Yes.

C: 你一口咬掉了红色立方体的一角。在你身边，亲眼目睹这一幕发生的两名观众发出了难以置信的声音。
E: You take a bite from the red cube. Next to you, the two spectators who witness this gasp in disbelief.

C: 你见过达米亚诺斯吗？
E: Have you seen Damionis?

C: 丹恒伸出两根手指，探了探浴池的水温。
E: Dan Heng dips two fingers into the bath to check the water temperature.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「创世涡心」</color>——寄宿十二泰坦原初神性的伟大圣所，亦是神谕中，创世奇迹降临的应允之地。
E: The <color=#dbc291ff>Vortex of Genesis</color>: A great sanctuary that houses the original divinity of the twelve Titans. It's also the place where the prophesized Miracle of Genesis will occur.

C: 下潜、触底。
E: Diving into the depths.

C: 总之，先抬头看吧：那是创世涡心的<color=#dbc291ff>星宫十二相</color>，它记录着黄金裔的逐火之旅。
E: Well, first, kindly look upward. What you see right now is the <color=#dbc291ff>Astral Zodiac</color> of the Vortex of Genesis, divided into twelve parts that record the Flame-Chase Journey of the Chrysos Heirs.

C: 没想到阿格莱雅那么无情…
E: Wasn't expecting Aglaea to be that ruthless...

C: 与此同时……
E: In the meantime...

C: 哎…那就好。
E: Phew... That's good to know.

C: 我们完成使命就会回来，到时再麻烦你使用「百界门」，好吗？
E: We'll return once we complete our mission. Then we'll have to trouble you to use the Century Gate again, alright?

C: 她真的是「半神」吗…
E: Is she really a demigod...

C: 走吧，从断桥那儿可以绕路上去。
E: Let's go. We can take a detour from the broken bridge.

C: 分散兵力不会更危险吗？
E: Isn't it more dangerous to split up?

C: 但你并非打心底里认同这些，不是么？
E: But deep down, you don't really agree with that, do you?

C: （泰坦的低语）
E: *Titan's murmurs*

C: 要是那位泰坦果真如此孩子气，也许它只是在同我们玩耍。那就陪它玩到满意为止吧。
E: If that Titan is truly so childlike, maybe they're just playing with us. In that case, let's play along until they're satisfied.

C: （泰坦的低语）
E: *Titan's murmurs*

C: 你有什么忌口吗，{NICKNAME}？
E: Do you have any dietary restrictions, {NICKNAME}?

C: 我也说不清楚…
E: I also can't say for sure...

C: 消失，暂时。
E: Disappear, temporarily.

C: 先等等…
E: Wait...

C: 「剧本」又顺利完成了，对吗？有你在我们身边，总是令人安心。
E: We've successfully completed the "script" once again, right? It's always reassuring to have you by our side.

C: 怎么了吗？你这样的表情…我从没见过。
E: Is something the matter? I've never seen you look like this before.

C: 我会努力忘记这件事，把它封藏进脑海深处…等到分别的那一天，我会把你的话当作重聚的约定。
E: I'll try to forget this and lock it away in the depths of my memory... When the day of our parting comes, I'll treat your words as a promise for our reunion.

C: 这一次的「剧本」也顺利完成了。
E: Once again, we've completed the "script" without a hitch.

C: 我明白了，大人！请您放心，我绝不会透露任何风声。
E: Absolutely, Lady Aglaea! You have my solemn vow that none of this will come to light.

C: （假若敌人从这里渗透，可能造成的损害无法估量。尽快处理吧……）
E: (If the enemy were to infiltrate from here, the damage could be catastrophic. I'd better deal with it at once...)

C: 看来，我们现在能做的就只有等待了。
E: Waiting seems to be our only plan now.

C: …让我过去。
E: ...Let me through.

C: 给我看看你的能耐吧，记忆行者。
E: Let's see what you can do, delver of memories.

C: 这些年里一定发生了很多事。
E: Kremnos must have been through a lot since then...

C: 铸魂雕像的长剑未能归位，此处还缺了些什么。
E: The Sword of the Soul-Forging Statue failed to return to its original place. Something is still missing here.

C: 为我讲述吧，此处发生的一切……
E: Tell me everything that happened here...

C: 泰坦相信，它的「理智」终有一日会响应召唤，回到神明的躯体身边…完成它应尽的使命。
E: The Titan believed that their Reason would someday respond to their calling, to return to their body... and fulfill their sacred mission.

C: 这些…装置，你们似乎相当熟悉。
E: You seem quite familiar with these... devices.

C: 这样啊…就连「纷争」泰坦也从未直面「死亡」本尊。
E: I see... So even the Strife Titan has never seen Death in the flesh.

C: 能在如此乱世中静心享乐，翁法罗斯人的精神属实脱俗。
E: The people of Amphoreus must have extraordinary spirits to be able to enjoy their lives even in such troubled times.

C: 你太心急了，白厄。不要让我们质疑这个决定。
E: Patience, Phainon. Do not make us question this decision.

C: 悬锋族人慕强、尚武，这不代表我们不懂得礼数。
E: Kremnoans revere strength and military might, but that does not mean we lack etiquette.

C: …因为只有顽石般的意志方能击碎最深的噩梦。
E: ...Only a will as tough as stone can shatter the darkest nightmares.

C: 希望这个世界，永远不需要「救世主」呀。
E: May this world never have need for a Deliverer.

C: 人家总有种预感，如果见不到{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}…可能会错过什么不得了的大事！
E: I get the feeling that if we don't meet {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}, we'll be missing out on something huge!

C: 怎么样，感觉如何？
E: How is it? How do you feel?

C: 乃是…<color=#dbc291ff>未来</color>……
E: Is... <color=#dbc291ff>a future</color>...

C: …这是褒义还是贬义？
E: ...Are you praising or insulting him?

C: 正因此，凡人无从得知它真实的模样，便将泰坦绘作巨树，智慧描摹成果实，以此象征它将知识平等分享给众人…实在是精妙绝伦啊！
E: As a result, mere mortals who did not know what the Titan actually looked like chose to paint them as a giant tree instead. Their wisdom was portrayed as fruit to symbolize how they shared their knowledge equally among the masses... Such exquisiteness indeed!

C: 不，老师。我于死雾中匆匆一瞥后，终于晓得一个道理：从古至今，我们对「灵魂」的理解不过冰山一角。
E: No, teacher. After my fleeting glimpse of the deathly fog, I finally understood a single truth: Since ancient days, our understanding of souls is but the tip of the iceberg.

C: 呵呵…她果然误会了。
E: Hehe... As expected, she misunderstands you.

C: 哼，可笑。我的忠诚无需证明，但元老院要求证明忠诚本身已经无异于背叛。
E: Hmph, surely you jest. My loyalty does not need to be proven. The fact that the Council of Elders is asking for proof of my loyalty is itself akin to a form of betrayal.

C: 实话说，我没想到你竟然连理由都不会过问。
E: I have to admit I never expected you to not ask me anything, not even my motive.

C: 哼…就算我撑不住，你还能把我抬上去不成？
E: Pfft... Why? Are you going to carry me up if I were to fall now?
Heh...

C: 神话中，{RUBY_B#诡计之泰坦}扎格列斯{RUBY_E#}曾将亡者的领域作为自己的藏宝地，它能于冥界畅行无阻。
E: In the myths, {RUBY_B#Trickery Titan}Zagreus{RUBY_E#} once made the domain of the dead their treasure vault — that is to say, they could enter and leave the nether realm as they pleased.

C: （睡不着啊……）
E: (I can't sleep...)

C: 不、不……
E: No... No...

C: 谁？
E: Who?

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>背包中的「神血蜜露」被偷走了。</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>The Dew of Divine Blood in the backpack has been stolen.</color>

C: 但我没想到，死后竟也一样。多么可笑，我逃避尘世，转而踏入了持续千年的苦痛。
E: But I did not expect that things stay the same even in death! What a joke! In escaping my mortal life, I've entered a millennium of pain instead.

C: 用归用…人家可要约法三章，我们回到过去不是为了偷东西。
E: That's fine and all, but we need to lay down some rules. We're not gonna return to the past to steal things.

C: 看我跳过去！
E: Watch me jump over!

C: 感谢你，万敌阁下。那个正确的选择…我会找到它的。
E: Thank you, Lord Mydei. I will find the right decision.

C: 她…认出你了？这应该是我们第一次见到能沟通的…灵魂吧？
E: Did she recognize you...? She must be the first soul we can communicate with here, right?

C: 这…怎、怎么办？还能抢救一下吗？
E: What! Oh no... Is there anything we can do?

C: 冥界…果真如传说那样，是一片花海。
E: So the legends were true. The nether realm really is a sea of flowers.

C: 是…你们啊……
E: It's... you people...

C: 既然都到这时候了…还记得我上次讲到哪里了么？
E: I suppose there is no point in putting this off any longer. Do you recall where we stopped the last time?

C: 那好。那边故作深沉的家伙，你敢对在场所有人赌咒发誓吗？
E: Very well. You, the one acting so wise and profound — in front of all present here, do you dare swear that it will happen for sure?

C: 不过，诸位不必担心，还好我对你们这帮酒囊饭袋早就心里有数。所以我才会出现在这里，来给你们所有人上最后一课！
E: But you needn't worry because I knew better than to trust you good-for-nothings. That is precisely why I am here today — to give you one final lecture!

C: 这…不是天大的亵渎吗？
E: Isn't that pure blasphemy?

C: 死刑！死刑！
E: Let him die! Let him die!

C: 但，你不回去了么…
E: But you're not going back...

C: 他们也许会释放野心，将更多世界改造成相同的模样。
E: They might unleash their wild ambitions and remodel more worlds into a similar form.

C: 好问题，我想想……
E: Good question. Let me think...

C: 汝与那位「金织」互不对付，何不当面谈谈呢？
E: You seem to be avoiding that "Goldweaver" person. Why don't you address her face to face?

C: 来古士阁下，凯妮斯阁下，就在前面。
E: Lord Lygus and Lady Caenis are just ahead.

C: 老师永远戴着眼罩，连独处时都不摘下，有人说他是把一只眼睛用作了炼金材料。
E: Anaxa always wears an eye patch, never removing it, even when alone. Some say he used one of his eyes as an alchemical ingredient.

C: ——是{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}！
E: ...He's after {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}!

C: 黄金世！黄金世！
E: Era Chrysea, Era Chrysea!

C: 不好，人群彻底被煽动了……
E: This is bad. The masses are now totally riled up...

C: 恐怕，也正因此…预言才会选择一对双子吧。
E: I'm afraid that the prophecy might even have selected a pair of twins... for this exact purpose.

C: 弱者成为强者；仇恨的轮回亘古不变。
E: The weak rise to power, yet the cycle of hatred endures, unbroken through time.

C: 最后一枚历史的碎片就在前方。去拾起它吧，风堇姑娘。
E: The final fragment of history lies just ahead. Go and claim it, Miss Hyacine.

C: 雅辛忒丝……
E: Hyacinthia...

C: 不知道，只能赌赌看了。如果能用祷言回溯破碎的平台，就能乘着它返回入口。
E: No idea, but we have to take a gamble. If the prayer can rewind the shattered platform, then we might ride it back to the entrance...
Uhh...

C: 我不过故意卖了个破绽，<color=#dbc291ff>让你们看到了我把火种偷梁换柱的一幕…</color>怎料想各位真敢一路尾随我跑到冥滩来啊？
E: I merely staged a slip-up <color=#dbc291ff>for you to witness the switch of the Coreflame...</color> Who'd have thought you'd follow me all the way to the Nethershore?

C: 会让风堇小姐感到不自信的事…还真难想象啊。
E: It's hard to imagine anything making Miss Hyacine feel uncertain.

C: 这…怎么会？它怎么会在这里……
E: Wh—What? How could they be here?

C: 我委托他为我打造一柄趁手的神兵。说来有些难为情，为了帮我这个忙，他特地推掉了所有生意。
E: I asked him to make a suitable divine weapon for me. It's a little embarrassing to say this, but in order to help me, he deliberately turned down all other business.

C: 胡搅蛮缠。你们远赴树庭，就是为了逞口舌之快么？
E: Complete nonsense. Did you really travel all the way to the Grove just to have an argument?

C: 冷静，{NICKNAME}。他们敢走出阴影，就表示手中掌握了足以威慑我们的筹码。
E: Keep your cool, {NICKNAME}. They've come out of the shadows, which suggests they have something up their sleeves.

C: …出大事了！风堇小姐…出大事了！
E: ...Trouble! Miss Hyacine... trouble!

C: 阿格莱雅大人……
E: Lady Aglaea...

C: 但，我猜…你们现在已经无意假装规行矩步了，对么？凯妮斯阁下。
E: But, I guess... you're no longer pretending to follow the rules, are you, Lady Caenis?

C: 喔！这是…金光闪闪的，真漂亮啊！
E: Oh! It's... shimmering gold, absolutely stunning!

C: 没有的事，放心吧！为了那两成的赃…宝贝，我也绝对把您伺候好！
E: Don't worry. Trust me! For that sweet <unbreak>20%</unbreak> cut of the loot, I'll make sure you're taken care of!

C: 还愣着干嘛？快开挖呀！
E: What are you waiting for? Start digging!

C: 「我那被推迟太久的终幕…总算要到来了。无论在你心中对我存有多少芥蒂，它都将随我的离去云散烟消。」
E: "The finale I've delayed for far too long... it's finally here. Whatever resentment you still hold against me will fade once I'm gone."

C: 咳…话说回来，大姐头…那个黑心女人说的话，你应该不会放在心上吧？
E: *cough* ...Speaking of which, Cipher... you're not taking that wicked woman's words to heart, are you?

C: 随便，随便丢给我一件衣服。一块布也行，能遮住伤口就够了。
E: Anything, just throw me something. A piece of cloth will do, just enough to cover the wounds.

C: 我和你想的一样…这完全不合逻辑。
E: I also don't understand... This doesn't add up.

C: 我第一时间就前去尝试治疗了，只是连天空祝福都……
E: I tried to treat her immediately, but even the sky's blessings...

C: 很久以前，有人对我说过：「希望这个世界永远都不需要救世主」。
E: "May this world never have need for a Deliverer." Someone told me long ago.

C: 嗯嗯，可不是嘛！
E: Indeed!

C: 「全世宝石」……
E: "Gem of All Worlds"...

C: 你我一共就见过几次面，每次都是直奔主题…我欣赏你的直爽，「前辈」——那我就有话直说了。
E: We've only met a couple of times, but you've always gone straight to business. I respect that about you, "old-timer," so I'll cut to the chase.

C: 不必了，吾师。药物终究只能稳固我的血肉，但阻止不了灵魂的衰竭。
E: No need, teacher. Medicine can only steady my flesh, but it cannot stop the decay of my soul.

C: 雅辛忒丝么…看来你对我族的族谱十分熟悉啊，孩子。
E: Hyacinthia... You seem well-versed in our clan's history.

C: 这是多么美妙的巧合呀——千年的英雄史诗，以「天空」作为开篇，亦由「天空」写下结语……
E: Isn't it poetic? A saga that spans a thousand years began with Sky, and will also end with Sky...

C: 懂了，艾格勒影视乐园。
E: Got it. Aquila's theme park.

C: 但塑造天空的艾格勒啊…<color=#dbc291ff>你为何要回避乌云的追赶？</color>难道晴空和阴雨，不是你平等的造物吗？
E: But Aquila, you that shaped the sky... <color=#dbc291ff>Why do you avoid the pursuit of dark clouds?</color> Are not clear skies and stormy rains equally your creations?

C: *嘶鸣*
E: *shrieking*

C: 塞涅俄丝的后裔——就是你么，小女孩？
E: Little girl... Are you Seliose's descendant?

C: 露奈比斯阁下，我们来了！
E: Lady Lunabis, we're here!

C: 你是说…你在露奈比斯阁下身上，闻到了熟悉的气息？
E: You're saying... You smell a familiar scent on Lady Lunabis?

C: 真是命运的奇迹。说不定，我们还是给这世界留下了些什么啊…塞涅俄丝。
E: Truly a miracle of fate. Perhaps, we did leave something behind for this world... Seliose.

C: 艾格勒——它果然在这里。
E: Aquila — they are indeed here.

C: 你是这方面的高手，{NICKNAME}。
E: You're an expert at that, {NICKNAME}.

C: 假如真有类似的记载…缇宝老师不可能只字未提。
E: Tribbie would have made sure to warn us if there were any mention of it.

C: 我们都会等待你归来！
E: We'll be waiting for your return!

C: 最后一刻…我将战至！
E: To the final moment... I will fight!

C: 丹恒，你……
E: Dan Heng, you...

C: 我没打算和谁永别。放心吧，我会竭尽全力活下来。
E: I don't intend to say goodbye forever to anyone. Don't worry. I'll do everything in my power to survive.

C: 还有敌人，下面的情况不容乐观……
E: More enemies. It doesn't look great down there...

C: 阿格莱雅借元老院与清洗者之手，以自己的落幕为逐火扫清前路。悲痛之余，白厄接过领袖职责，发表演讲团结民众；而赛飞儿也受命回城，承诺将在逐火小队离城时守护{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}的火种。
E: Using the Council of Elders and the Cleaners, Aglaea made sure that her fall paved the road forward for the Flame-Chase. Amidst his grief, Phainon takes up the mantle of leadership, giving a speech to unite the people. Cipher also returns on a mission, promising to protect {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}'s Coreflame while the Flame-Chase party is away from the city.

C: 与此同时，赛飞儿在龙骸古城与循火种而来的盗火行者周旋许久，最终不敌遭其杀害。但她早已设计将刻法勒火种交予贼灵巴特鲁斯，命它伺机将火种交付白厄等人。
E: At the same time in the city of the dead dragon's bones, Cipher contends with the Flame Reaver who comes seeking the Coreflame. Though she holds out for some time, she is no match and is slain in the end. But she had already given Kephale's Coreflame to Spirithief Bartholos, ordering them to wait for an opportunity to deliver the Coreflame to Phainon and the others.

C: 关于此事，我还有一个提议——
E: On that note, I have a proposal—

C: 照料它，并向后世呈递；亦或是就此将其掐灭？
E: Nurture it, pass it on to future generations, or extinguish it here and now?

C: 是我的！鱼竿是我的，只是借给你用一下，所以钓上来的东西也算我的。
E: Give it here! My rod, my catch. I only let you borrow it, remember?

C: 还没找过的地方…是欧洛尼斯的祝祭庭院？
E: The only place we haven't searched... is Oronyx's {RUBY_B#Sacrament Courtyard}ritual courtyard{RUBY_E#}?

C: 村长！您还是这么有精神，真是太好啦。
E: Oh Chief! You haven't changed a bit, still so full of life!

C: 那外面的世界怎么办？
E: What about all the people out there?

C: 翻开白厄的神谕牌。
E: Reveal Phainon's oracle cards.

C: 扑哧——
但…我明明才接下「救世主」牌，就选择对眼前的灾难坐视不理，这实在是……
E: But... I just accepted the "Deliverer" card. To idly sit by and ignore this calamity now would be...

C: 来吧，昔涟。来吧，伙伴——
E: With me, Cyrene. Join us, my friend—

C: 即便没有剑，给我一把锄头也好…哪怕手头只有最粗糙的凡铁，我也要用它保卫家园！
E: Even without a sword, I'll take a rake! Even with the roughest steel, I'll keep our home safe!

C: 此时此刻，少年仿佛正置身于世界的终点。
E: In that moment, the boy stood at what felt like the end of existence itself.

C: 还有…这些怪物……
E: And these monsters... they're all...

C: 希望她一切安好。走吧，战友，能一睹塔兰顿的公正天秤，这机会可不多啊。
E: Still, I hope she's doing well. Anyway, let's go, comrade. It's not every day you get a chance to see Talanton's Scales of Justice.

C: 怎么可能，只有哀地里亚人会干这种事吧。
E: Ha! No way. Only an Aidonian would do something that crazy.

C: 但，你的话我原模原样回敬给你：能与你同行最后一段路，也是我的荣幸。
E: But I'll say the same to you: it's my honor to walk this final stretch with you, too.

C: 呵，看来「再创世」前，还有件事不得不完成啊……
E: Well, now there's one last thing I need to do before the Era Nova...

C: 如果你不记得，我来告诉你吧：这是第<unbreak>33550336</unbreak>次终结。
E: If you've lost count, let me tell you: this is the <unbreak>33,550,336</unbreak>th ending.

C: 我们要给「翁法罗斯」编织一场长长的梦，让它相信实验仍未结束，一切仍在继续……
E: We're going to weave a long dream for Amphoreus, making it believe the experiment hasn't ended, that everything is still ongoing...

C: 现在，我能够确信：「岁月」就是{RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>「记忆」浮黎</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>那位星神</color>{RUBY_E#}记录翁法罗斯的书页。如果它从世上消失，它铭记的一切在星空中佚失，那位「星神」一定会将视线投向这里……
E: Now, I can say with certainty: "Time" is the page on which {RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>Fuli the Remembrance</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>that Aeon</color>{RUBY_E#} records Amphoreus. If it fades from existence and all that it records is lost among the stars, that Aeon will surely direct THEIR gaze here...

C: 继往，开来吧。
E: Honor the past, and forge ahead.

C: 若我们生来只是一串模拟生命的数字，那你就是我所憧憬的形象，想要成为的样子。
E: If we are just numbers simulating life, then you are the image I've always longed for, the person I wish to become.

C: {RUBY_B#阿格莱雅}金织爵{RUBY_E#}和{RUBY_B#缇宝}质子{RUBY_E#}，久等了。
E: {RUBY_B#Aglaea}Dux Goldweaver{RUBY_E#}, {RUBY_B#Tribbie}little hostage{RUBY_E#}. Apologies for keeping you waiting.

C: 别感谢我——去感谢她们吧。
E: Don't thank me — thank them instead.

C: 即便度过了十万八千六百四十二个轮回……
E: Even after going through <unbreak>108,642</unbreak> cycles...

C: 卡厄斯兰那阁下…原来是这样……
E: Lord Khaslana... so that's how it is...

C: 无数个我…曾站在相同的地方，面对相同的抉择。
E: Countless versions of myself... have stood here, facing the same choice.

C: 用它点燃自己，助长火焰，直至焚尽这片虚假的天空。
E: Let it consume you, fuel you, until it burns away the false sky above.

C: 但我很高兴，最后能回想起这件事。如此一来，就没有遗憾啦。
E: But I'm glad that I remembered in the end. This way, I'll have no regrets.

C: 啊…头晕目眩，眼前好像有好多呜呜伯在飞……
E: Ugh, everything's spinning... And I can see Wubbaboos flying around...

C: 既然翁法罗斯是你的故乡…如果有办法能帮助你，我和我的同伴一定会尽力而为的。
E: Since Amphoreus is your homeland... if there's a way to help you, my companions and I will do everything we can.

C: 他们在骗你，快回来……
E: They're lying to you, turn back now...

C: 黑塔，你也在？
E: Herta! You're here too?

C: 三月女士，她的情况有些复杂。
E: Miss March's situation is rather complicated.

C: （疑团太多，只能边走边看了。每一步都要足够谨慎，每个决定都可能影响结局。黑塔和螺丝咕姆的援助会成为关键……）
E: (There are so many questions... I'll have to take it one step at a time. But I must make each move very carefully because every decision can potentially impact the end. Herta and Screwllum's help might be crucial...)

C: {NICKNAME}，准备好成为英雄了吗？
E: {NICKNAME}, are you ready to become a hero?

C: 出发吧，我们会拯救所有人。
E: Let's go. We'll save everyone.

C: 选择权始终在你手中，{NICKNAME}阁下。
E: You've always had a choice, my {M#Lord}{F#Lady} {NICKNAME}.

C: 哦，我知道那位女士的去向……
E: Ah. Yes. I am aware of that esteemed lady's whereabouts...

C: 一个在星间漂泊的人。一个绝望渴求答案的人。仅此而已。
E: Someone who wanders the stars. Someone who seeks answers with abject despair. That is all I am.

C: 莫非是我们搅乱了世界线…
E: Maybe we messed up the timeline...

C: 就是这样，进退有度，从容自信。这才是人家熟悉的{NICKNAME}。
E: Calm and confident. That's the {NICKNAME} I'm familiar with.

C: 没关系，终于等到自由行动环节了。距离同盟会议还有段时间，我们可要开始行动咯？看那边……
E: Alright, we finally have some freedom to ourselves. Since there's still some time before the alliance meeting, let's explore a bit. Look over there...

C: 不仅如此，它还揭示了与「再创世」截然不同的未来。
E: More crucially, they revealed a future entirely different from the Era Nova.

C: 忠诚之人从来不思考背叛的下场。但如果诸位实在好奇，不妨去湖边看看吧——
E: Those who are loyal do not need to consider the consequences of betrayal. But if you're curious, why not head to the lake and take a look?

C: 而在我为您揭示的道路上：翁法罗斯的众生将以凯撒之名弑杀造物尊神，征服天外万界。
E: But on the path I have revealed to you, the people of Amphoreus will slay their Creator in the name of the Imperator and conquer the worlds beyond the sky.

C: 有什么不对吗？云石天宫本就是我栖身的岩礁。
E: What's wrong? The Marmoreal Palace is the reef where I rest.

C: 你将为众人筑就再创世的长阶…
E: You will forge the long stairs to Era Nova...

C: …第一，那个头顶上插了蜡烛的小皇冠虽然没明说，但强硬地拒绝了你们接管「律法」的诉求…嗯，合情合理。
E: ...First, while that little empress with a candle stuck on her head didn't explicitly say it, she firmly rejected your request to take over the "Law"... Hmph, fair enough.

C: 两位四处徘徊，像是揣着什么心事。莫非是侍从招待不周？
E: You two have been wandering around the venue as if you have something on your mind. Have the attendants not taken care of you well?

C: {NICKNAME}…你做什么呢？
E: {NICKNAME}... What are you doing?

C: 呵，妄图用唇枪舌剑代替弑君的尖刀么？
E: Hah. You think you can slay a king using your words instead of a sword?

C: 讲述来古士的罪恶。
E: Talk about Lygus's sins.

C: 你我皆是傲慢的俘虏。但吕枯耳戈斯，知道我们的区别在哪吗？我不会因傲慢变得盲目。
E: We are both slaves to hubris, but do you know what differentiates us, Lycurgus? I will never be blinded by my pride.

C: 你到底想要什么？
E: What exactly are you after?

C: 走吧走吧，我还不知道这世界长什么样子呢～
E: So, let's head off! I still don't know what that world even looks like~

C: 且不论你要如何把自己伪装成「救世主」，还不能让任何人发现……
E: Easier said than done. You still have to pass yourself off as the Deliverer without anyone catching on...

C: 鄙人立誓要为「智识」带去终结，又怎会被一粒分子磨尽心智？
E: I swore to bring an end to the Erudition. Would I really let a single grain grind down my mind?

C: 终于，要落下帷幕了。
E: Will reach its end at long last.

C: 因而，于生命尽头，我以十四行代数式重写自我意识，将逻辑核心分布于九具躯体中，只为在后世完成对「博识尊」的终极否定，消弭亲手犯下的过错——
E: Therefore, as my organic life neared its end, I coded my consciousness using quatorzain algebraic expressions and spread my logic core over nine bodies, all to finalize my ultimate denial of Nous in the future and to erase my wrongs with my own hands.

C: 关于未来的宏伟图景：无论有机或无机构成，一切受「铁墓」感染的生命行为都将成为真正的随机函数。若在银河区间内计算它们的积分，便会得出一个美妙的常量——
E: My grandiose vision for the future is this: whether organic or inorganic, every act of any life-form infected by the Irontomb will become a true random function. If one were to compute their integral across the breadth of the cosmos, one would obtain a marvelous constant...

C: 这意味着，你只能依附于{NICKNAME}的记忆存在。如果有一天——哪怕只是短短几秒——{M#他}{F#她}忘记了你，或是和翁法罗斯失去最后一丝联系……
E: That means your existence is completely attached to {NICKNAME}'s memories. If there ever comes a day when {F#s}he forgets about you for even a few seconds or loses {M#his}{F#her} last connection with Amphoreus...

C: 「在人生最后，踏上神坛的那一刻，她将裁断命运的选择交给了最忠诚的臣子，如同她最初踏上战场时向同胞宣誓。」
E: "At the end of her life, at the last moment before she stepped onto the altar, she gave her most loyal subject the choice to decide fate, just as she promised her compatriots before her very first campaign."

C: 剑旗爵…明明…过去三千多万世…都是你亲手杀死了凯撒……
E: Dux Gladiorum... even though... you killed the Imperator... in the previous thirty million cycles...

C: 就像我每次都能让台下的观众哑口无言。
E: And just as always, I'll leave the audience speechless.

C: 其实，也没那么吃惊啦，毕竟我早就见过你了。
E: Well, I'm not actually all that surprised. I saw you ages ago, after all.

C: 那你还记得，距离自己进入翁法罗斯，已经过去了多久么？
E: Then, do you still remember how long it has been since you entered Amphoreus?

C: 我不知道。我只拥有「你」的记忆。
E: I don't know. I only possess "your" memories.

C: 如果这是唯一的办法，我没有理由拒绝。更何况……
E: If this is the only way, then I don't see why I should say no. Besides...

C: 数字是…提醒我一下吧？有些记不清了。
E: How many of them are there? I can't quite remember.

C: 无论那位「倾听者」是谁，对权杖而言，昔涟的讲述终究只是一串数据流。
E: No matter who that "listener" is, Cyrene's storytelling is just a data stream for the Scepter.

C: 但思来想去，似乎没有特别充分的理由……
E: But I can't think of a good reason for her to do that...

C: 有一件事的确令我困惑……
E: There IS something that truly puzzles me...

C: 那怎么啦？那也算是「开拓」！
E: So what? That's still "Trailblazing"!

C: 你保护了我们，三月。
E: You protected us, March.

C: 「可惜，赢不过我呢♭」
E: "Too bad~ You're no match for me ♭"

C: （我苏醒前的记忆？）
E: (Memories... from before I woke up?)

C: 呀，{NICKNAME}的秘密！好好奇，但是不能偷看。
E: Ah, it's {NICKNAME}'s secret! I'm so curious... but I won't peek. Promise!

C: （三月七，在和我玩捉迷藏么？）
E: (Is March 7th... playing hide-and-seek with me?)
...Awoo!

C: 这样一来，凯撒陛下的军团就可以从树庭发动奇袭了。
E: Now, the Imperator's legions can launch a surprise attack from the Grove.

C: 两种可能性：它属于<color=#dbc291ff>「荒笛」</color>，或是你苦苦追寻的{NICKNAME}。
E: There are two possibilities: This memory either belongs to <color=#dbc291ff>Terravox</color>, or it belongs to {NICKNAME}, the person you're desperately looking for.

C: 为了同伴，我不会有分毫犹豫。
E: I will never hesitate for my companions.

C: 多谢你的帮助，巴特鲁斯。
E: Thank you very much for your help, Bartholos.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>█ █你就是我██就是█我们█  ██ ██</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>█ █You are me██are█us█ ██ ██</color>

C: 桀桀桀，跟之前一样，只要把出水口堵住就成。
E: Hehehe. We just need to block the water inlet, just like before.

C: 好漫长，仿佛正坠入深渊……
E: It's endless... It feels like we're plunging into an abyss...

C: 这两个名字，如同烙印。
E: Those two names... are like brands.

C: 阿那克萨戈拉斯阁下，我已应您要求，开放了所有关于「德谬歌」的记录。
E: Lord Anaxagoras, I have granted access to all records concerning the "Demiurge" as per your request.

C: 以我之手，为神明戴上枷锁。铁墓将接入祂的身躯，侵入祂的思想，将祂演算的一切导向「毁灭」……
E: I shall shackle god with my own hands. Irontomb will connect to THEIR body, infiltrate THEIR mind, and guide all THEIR extrapolations towards the Destruction...

C: 「大地」会拱卫往世、此世与来世，生生不息——
E: "Earth" shall protect the past, present, and future, eternally sustaining life.

C: 喔，人这不就到齐了？
E: Oh, and just like that, they're here!

C: 大难当前，若能扶危济困，罗浮定义不容辞。但一切的前提是，公司必须无条件协助联盟在灾区的抢险救援工作。
E: In times of crisis, the Luofu will not hesitate to help those in need. However, the prerequisite is that the IPC must unconditionally assist the Alliance with emergency rescue operations in the disaster area.

C: 通了，通了！能看到影像了，肯定没问题。
E: We're through! I can see the video feed. Everything's working perfectly!

C: 杰帕德那小子和佩拉一起，忙着组织银鬃铁卫收缩战线、修筑战壕呢；希儿和玲可刚从地髓矿脉的生产链回来…哎，要不要说两句？
E: That kid Gepard and Pela are busy organizing the Silvermane Guards, having them consolidate their lines and dig trenches. Seele and Lynx just got back from the Geomarrow Vein production chain... Hey, do you want to say something to them?

C: 我们真的很希望能帮上忙…可惜，雅利洛-Ⅵ也只是刚从冬眠中苏醒的冰原熊而已。
E: We really wish we could help... but Jarilo-VI has only just woken up from its hibernation.

C: 没问题。先前仙舟不是和雅利洛-VI签订了友好协议吗？他们也不会袖手旁观。
E: No problem. Also, didn't the Xianzhou sign a friendship agreement with Jarilo-VI earlier? They won't stand by idly either.

C: 我什么也不用做。「记忆」终将化作新世界的质料。
E: I didn't need to do anything. The Remembrance will ultimately become the substance of the new world.

C: 「走吧，大家？到离{F#她}{M#他}更近的地方去。」
E: "Come on, everyone! Let's get closer to {M#him.}{F#her.}"

C: 先记着吧。这些线索暂时还没法串到一起。
E: Log it for now. The dots still aren't connecting.

C: 怎么{NICKNAME}一点反应都没有？
E: Why hasn't {NICKNAME} reacted to it at all?

C: 「即便知晓命运的真容，翁法罗斯的生灵也毋须自轻。」
E: "Amphoreans need not bow, even when destiny is unveiled."

C: 白厄…你能听见么？
E: Phainon... can you hear me?

C: 世界以沉默为回应，一如那个男人。但那沉默并非源于空洞，而是殉道者嘶哑的吼声。
E: The world responded with silence, just like that man. But this silence wasn't born of emptiness — it was the hoarse roar of a martyr.

C: 灰鱼儿，终于到了呢。
E: Gray Fry, you finally made it.

C: 他不会…快要碎掉了吧？
E: Is he... Is he gonna fall apart?

C: 这里，就是终点了。
E: We've reached the end.

C: 而我们要做的事，也同样如此。
E: And what we must do is also no different.

C: 而今，「铁墓」在「白厄」的胸膛中颤动。凭借这具空无一物的身躯，我已成为它完美无缺的容器……
E: "Irontomb" now trembles in "Phainon's" chest. With this empty body, I have become its perfect vessel...

C: 我和丹恒特地赶来，就是为了跟你说这事。
E: Dan Heng and I came here to specifically tell you that.

C: 「一、二、三、四、五、六、七」……
E: "One, two, three, four, five, six, seven"...

C: 嗯。和记忆中一模一样。
E: Mmm. Just like how I remember.

C: 「新的生命若要萌芽，它的种子须是死的。」
E: "If a new life is to be born, its seed has to be dead."

C: 我们…一起……
E: Together... We will...

C: 「去将这糟糕的结局——燃烧殆尽！」
E: "And we'll burn this horrible ending... to ashes!"

C: <color=#dbc291ff>覆写铁墓「毁灭」的方程式，将它冲刷成一片「空白」。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>And overwrite Irontomb's Destruction equation, washing it away into a "blank space."</color>

C: 你给自己宣判了死刑。可铁墓的陨落仍未成定局，不是么？
E: You've handed yourself a death sentence. And yet, Irontomb's fall still isn't sealed, right?

C: 呼唤帕姆。
E: Call out to Pom-Pom.

C: 我们醒来的时候，整个列车上都空荡荡的，一个人影都没有……
E: When we woke up, the entire Express was completely empty, not a single soul in sight...

C: 当然。
E: Sure.

C: 究其原因——制度不过是一柄锋刃。只要持剑之人足够勇武，哪怕是钝剑，亦足以横扫千军。
E: As for the reason, a system is but a blade. As long as the one who wields the sword is valiant enough, even a dull blade can sweep through thousands.

C: 只是一场梦…一片幻境。
E: Just a dream... an illusion.

C: 银河绝对不会遗忘翁法罗斯。
E: The cosmos will never forget Amphoreus.

C: 明天见，乘以一千。
E: See you tomorrow, times a thousand.

C: 请说下去吧。
E: Go on.

C: 收拾好心情，我们准备出发吧？
E: Take a deep breath, and then we can set off, alright?

C: ——照耀「忆庭之镜」。
E: Light up the Garden of Recollection's Mirror.

C: 你要握紧这柄仪式剑。在我离去后，它会把你送回时间的起点，一段新故事的开篇。
E: You need to hold tight to this ceremonial blade. After I'm gone, it will take you back to the beginning of time, the start of a new story.

C: 当然啦。
E: Exactly.

C: 循环往复，无穷的离别……
E: Looping again and again. Endless farewells...

C: <color=#dbc291ff>再回到最初的…PhiLia<unbreak>093</unbreak>……</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Back again to the first... PhiLia<unbreak>093</unbreak>...</color>

C: …披索。我早就记住了，哼。
E: ...Piso. I always remember. Hmph.

C: 好困呀。打瞌睡的小精灵，又闯进心里啦……
E: So sleepy. That drowsy little fairy barged into my mind again...

C: <unbreak>618</unbreak>；<unbreak>600</unbreak>；<unbreak>216</unbreak>；<unbreak>945</unbreak>……
E: <unbreak>618</unbreak>. <unbreak>600</unbreak>. <unbreak>216</unbreak>. <unbreak>945</unbreak>...

C: 「电信号序列：PhiLia<unbreak>093</unbreak>……」
E: "Electrical Signal Sequence: PhiLia<unbreak>093</unbreak>..."

C: 也是一只小妖精，像你这样突然出现。长长的耳朵，毛绒绒的爪子，它把我拉进树洞，里面竟然是一片森林……
E: A little fairy popped out, just like how you did. It had long ears and fluffy paws, and it pulled me into the tree hollow, where, to my surprise, was a forest...

C: 保存
E: Save

C: 爱让万物结合，也让你我结合。所以我和桃子，永远不会分开。
E: Love brings everything together, and it brought you and me together. So Peach and I will always be together.

C: 这根本不讲道理，对吗？可当「憎恨」分离万物，「爱」尚不存于世间……
E: It's so unreasonable, isn't it? Yet when "hatred" drove everything apart and "love" did not yet exist in this world...

C: 那我可要好好期待了哦？
E: Then I'll really look forward to it.
Heh...

C: 如果你愿意为我带一套螺丝星的茶具，我不介意出手轻轻推你一把喔，小魔女。
E: So if you're happy to bring me a tea set from Planet Screwllum, then I wouldn't mind giving you a helping hand, little witch.

C: 比如干掉这儿的所有人。
E: Like wiping this place out.

C: 所以，你有什么妙计？我洗耳恭听。
E: So, got a master plan? I'm all ears.

C: 是啊，温队长让我到收容舱段的奇物分拣室替他取一件东西。
E: Yep, Mr. Wen asked me to go to the Curio Sorting Room in the Storage Zone to pick up an item for him.

C: 看到了吧？这可是温队长亲手向我开出的临时调任执行启示。白纸黑字，清清楚楚。
E: See? This is the executive order that Mr. Wen personally gave me. It's a notice of an Ad Hoc Transfer. All written in black and white, clear as day.

C: 快给我，要是被别人发现，我们一老一少都跑不了。
E: Quick! Give it to me. If someone finds out, we are done for.

C: 正在解析信号画面…解析中…解析成功！
E: Analyzing incoming visuals... Analyzing... Analysis successful!

C: 莱斯莉没回信吗…
E: Did Lesley not reply...

C: 是你干的吧？
E: It was you, wasn't it?

C: 我是不会等……
E: I am not going to wait for her...

C: …那个，我眼睛可能进了点滑石粉，没想到，这东西也能弄进眼睛……
E: ... Well, some talcum powder got into my eyes. Who would've thought it could get into my eyes...

C: 他比我想象中要冲动。
E: He's even more impulsive than I thought.

C: 只是事情真的发展到了这一步，对我这个老头来说，还是有点…舍不得。
E: But just when it actually happens, I think... I will miss him a lot.

C: 左左左「巡猎」……
E: L—L—Left, The Hunt...

C: 我学学。
E: I'm all ears.

C: 一点小事，受之有愧。
E: No need to reward me for such a minor good deed.

C: 因为秘密也会挑选它的见证者——这一向是密卷科所虔信的理念。
E: Secrets choose their witnesses — this is a fundamental belief of the Department of Insight.

C: 讲述在录像带中所见的内容……
E: You described what was shown in the videos.

C: 啊，你来迟了，这里没你什么事了。
E: Oh, you're too late. Everything's been dealt with.

C: 不如先看看我手上的东西。
E: Why don't you take a look at what I have here?

C: 事已至此，我的确无法再一意孤行。
E: Indeed, I cannot let this cycle go on any longer.

C: 很不幸的是，它能在非生命物质上传播，并改变了「螺中笑声」的对外表现——它不再讲笑话了，而是不断讲些臭烘烘的怪话。
E: Unfortunately, it can infect inanimate objects, and thus it changed the Crackup Conch's external expression — it no longer tells jokes, but instead, it keeps talking weird nonsense.

C: 因此之前压根就无法得到有效的调查结果，所以我想请你帮个忙——因为你和他们并不算特别熟，以陌生人的视角去观察，反而容易发现破绽。
E: I, therefore, could not get any useful investigation results. That's why I need to ask you for a favor — you don't know them very well. It may be easier for you to spot their flaws from a stranger's perspective.

C: 但、但是，也挺有用的，就是、就是…呃，你还有别的什么事吗？
E: But, yes, it's quite useful. It's just that... Well, is there anything else?

C: 哎，「不是什么名牌」，虽然你心里认为不是，但你看看我们穿的都是制服，只有你在出风头……
E: "This is not a luxurious outfit." That's just your opinion. Take a look at us. We are all wearing uniforms. And you, you are just trying to show off...

C: 至于更多的细节，就<color=#dbc291ff>请你找维修工程师咨询</color>吧，进入房间的权限与相关事项我已经和工程师交代过了。
E: For more details, please <color=#dbc291ff>consult the maintenance engineer</color>. I've told the engineer that you have permission to enter the room.

C: 看来还是得等新机组到货才能彻底解决这个问题。
E: Looks like we'll have to wait until the replacement units are delivered.

C: 我没什么想问的了。
E: I don't have any more questions.

C: 看来这片区域裂界化加速的现象很难说跟它没有关系，去看一看吧。
E: It seems that the accelerated Fragmentum corrosion in this area can hardly be unrelated to it. Let's take a look.

C: 距他上次和我联系已经超过了<unbreak>13</unbreak>个小时，平时回复消息都不会超过<unbreak>13</unbreak>秒的！
E: It's been thirteen hours since he last contacted me. He usually takes less than <unbreak>13</unbreak> seconds to reply to my messages!

C: 嗯，它是我的爱犬，从小就由阿兰照看，他俩感情非常好。
E: Mm-hmm, Peppy's my dog — Arlan's looked after him since he was a puppy. They're great friends.

C: 来来来，和大家一起，听我讲讲之前空间站入侵的事情。回顾那段往事，可以有助于你走出迷茫。
E: Come! Join the others and listen to me recount the tale of the Legion's invasion. I'm sure your memory of the events will dispel your worries.

C: 我是她们的灯塔，所以我——「绝•不•蒙•尘」！
E: I am their lighthouse, and I will NEVER allow myself to be tainted!

C: 之前阿兰队长过来拜托我的时候，神色与你颇为相仿。他那个时候也非常焦虑，迫切地希望我给他一个答案。
E: Captain Arlan had a similar expression to yours when he found me. He was anxious and desired an answer.

C: 我告诉你，且不论你有没有权利把我开除。今天就算是艾丝妲站长…哦不，哪怕是黑塔女士亲自来命令我，我卡波特也不会屈服！
E: Listen here, leaving aside the fact that you don't have the right to dismiss me, I wouldn't yield even if Lead Researcher Asta — no, if Madam Herta herself commanded me!

C: 我告诉你，且不论你有没有权利把我开除。今天就算是艾丝妲站长…哦不，哪怕是黑塔女士亲自来命令我，我卡波特也不会屈服！
E: Listen here, leaving aside the fact that you don't have the right to dismiss me, I wouldn't yield even if Lead Researcher Asta — no, if Madam Herta herself commanded me!

C: 哼哼，真相还不急着现在揭穿！
E: Hmph, d—don't go spilling the beans just yet!

C: 没错，笔记里还针对这些修行做了批注。于是我就想试试看……
E: Yes. There were detailed notes, so... I wanted to give them a try.

C: 在小姐这里，我从来没有感觉到压力。
E: I've never felt pressured around you, my lady.

C: 老实点，有话问你。
E: Be honest. We demand answers.

C: 哪里可以找到「呜呜伯」？
E: Where can we find the Wubbaboos?

C: …所以它只是长得比别个都大是吗……
E: ...So it's only larger in size than the other ones?

C: 这一幕也提醒了我，该在空间站内增设类似的纪念碑，向那些命丧于怪物铁蹄之下的科员们，致上属于「黑塔」的哀思。
E: ...which reminds me, we should set up a similar type of memorial site for those who lost their lives under the stampede of the Antimatter Legion, so as to offer condolences on behalf of the station.

C: 差点什么？让我想想…嗯，有了。
E: What's missing? Lemme think... Oh, I've got it.

C: 我想想，嗯…可能是我最近压力太大了，潜意识里希望有个同伴吧。而且你看，如果真能找到星核猎手的线索，对你也有帮助吧？
E: Let me think... Um, maybe I've been under too much stress recently and I subconsciously want a friend. Anyway, if I were to find clues related to the Stellaron Hunters, wouldn't that be helpful to you too?

C: 别灰心。
E: Don't be discouraged.

C: 啊？你在念叨什么呢？
E: Huh? What are you muttering about?

C: 没关系。
E: That's alright.

C: {NICKNAME}，我们应该去主控室确认一下。
E: {NICKNAME}, we should go and check the main control room.

C: 有一点。
E: A little.

C: 如你们所知，模拟宇宙将暂时关闭。在我和黑塔得出确切的结论前，它会一直被封锁，不再开启。
E: As you already know, the Simulated Universe will be shut down temporarily. It will remain shut until Herta and I come to a clear conclusion.

C: 现实是一场游戏——可如果不能开心，游戏又有什么意义？两位天才携手向我递出了一份邀请函，一封挑战书，我怎能不欣然接受——换作是你，你能吗？
E: Reality is nothing but a game... but what's the point of a game if it can't make you happy? An invitation letter and a challenge letter were sent to me from two geniuses. How could I not accept them? Would you have turned them down?

C: 还会关停模拟宇宙吗？
E: Will you still shut down the Simulated Universe?

C: 一份三成熟的卡托尔肉排、盐焗卡利亚香茅、赫尔曼复合乳，还有一位男孩准备的炒饭。
E: A medium rare Katol steak, salt-baked Kalia lemongrass, Herman compound milk, and a portion of fried rice prepared by a certain young man on the station.

C: 你是最合适的饵。
E: You were the most fitting bait.

C: 挑战成功，是否退出模拟测试？
E: Challenge completed, do you want to exit the simulation?

C: 「黑塔」可是天才俱乐部会员的地盘，被什么人盯上都不奇怪，安全工作和员工意识都必须做到宇宙顶尖才行。
E: Herta Space Station is the turf of Genius Society members, so it's not inconceivable that other forces target us. Therefore, our safety and staff awareness should be at the top of the universe as well.

C: 钓鱼邮件？
E: Phishing mail?

C: 我对公司没什么意见，就觉得它太大了。咱们这种一线小职员，可能忙活半辈子也没法和大咖们见上一面。
E: I don't really have any opinion of the IPC, only that it was too large. An entry-level employee like me could spend half my life there without bumping into the bigwigs.

C: 后来调查了一番才知道，当时有个星际收藏家在征集这游戏的彩蛋攻略，奖励是一架泰伦战机，最后被匿名人士赢走了——想必就是银狼吧。
E: After reading into it a little, I found out there's a collector looking for a rare strategy for this game, and the reward is a Tyranid fighter jet, eventually won by someone anonymous — that must be Silver Wolf.

C: 并非如此，这是在骑士较量前不成文的规定，我很抱歉。以战代诗，是纯美骑士希望令人信服的方式…何况……
E: No, you do not have to. This is merely an unspoken rule for battles between knights. I apologize. We, the Knights of Beauty, hope to convince people through battle, not poetry...

C: 我把这个意见提给他，对他说可以宣扬「纯美」，让货币也变成美的一环，这样传播起来就非常快了，比他自己来弘扬更有效率。他对此十分震撼，连声称奇。
E: I told him about my idea — that he could advocate for "the Beauty" while also incorporating currency as a notion of beauty. That would allow him to preach more efficiently. He was very impressed.

C: 实力派。
E: A powerful star.

C: 在那旧日幻觉中，我不断奔跑。泥泞的路上，祂留下的足迹比任何哭泣都令我悲伤。而每一次，我都离望见祂的身影——只差一点。
E: In those past hallucinations, I kept running. THEIR footprints on the mire-ridden path moved me to a sadness beyond tears. And every time, I was a breath away from catching a glimpse of THEIR figure.

C: 你别把自己交代在这里啊！我会等你回来的！等我们搞定这次危机，你就要帮我在公司做点代言！重要的是你千万别死在这里——
E: Don't die! I'll be waiting for you! After we fix this mess, you've got some spokesperson duties at my company to attend to! Just make sure you come back in one piece...

C: 伊德莉拉已陨是部分纯美骑士默认的事情。当然也有些家伙不愿相信，比如你刚遇见的这位…他大约觉得伊德莉拉只是失踪，并藏在某个凡人无法企及的角落里了。
E: The fact that Idrila has fallen is tacitly acknowledged by some Knights of Beauty. Naturally, there are others who don't want to believe it... like the one you met. He probably thinks that Idrila is simply missing — hiding somewhere beyond the reach of mortals.

C: 嗯…真是一场奇妙的邂逅。但无法预知的「未来」才是星空下最迷人的事物，{NICKNAME}，就让我们期待一下接下来的展开吧。
E: What a fascinating encounter. There's nothing more captivating than an unpredictable future. {NICKNAME}, let's see what unfolds next.

C: 反物质军团的风波过后，空间站始终人心浮动，深陷信任危机。
E: The space station has been very distrustful of its higher management ever since the Antimatter Legion's invasion.

C: 这意味着什么，艾丝妲小姐一定很清楚吧。
E: Lady Asta must know what this means.

C: 事件余波未熄，你们应该还有很多事要处理吧？还是说，空间站的安危与你无关？
E: Fallout from this incident remains. Surely you have plenty of pressing matters to attend to? Or is the safety of the space station beneath your concern?

C: 人流散去后，这里就会变得十分宁静呢，就像我曾经去过的…「无人之地」。
E: As the masses depart, there's an enveloping calm here... just like the "No Man's Land" I ventured to in the past.

C: 好吃吗？下次可以多为你渍一点。去探望斯蒂芬•劳艾德的时候，我总会带些草莓糕，不然他不会露面。
E: So, what do you think? I can certainly prepare more for you. It's become somewhat of a tradition to bring strawberry pastries when I visit Stephen Lloyd. His attendance seems quite dependent on them.

C: 我可没在空间站搞什么小生意啊。我一点也不知道什么特殊的藏物地点，更没倒卖过什么破铜烂铁啊，奇珍异宝啊，废弃奇物啊之类的。
E: I'm not doing any private business on the space station! I have absolutely no knowledge of any special hiding places. And I certainly haven't sold any old junk, rare treasures, or discarded Curios or anything like that!

C: 我们的教旨在于——「芝士流心味最佳」！
E: Our creed: Molten Cheese Tart is the best!

C: 你还会在空间站停留多久？
E: How long will you be staying on the space station?

C: 黑塔和螺丝咕姆会喜欢这个实验吗？应该不会。所以在他们察觉前……
E: Will Herta and Screwllum like this experiment? Most likely not. Therefore, before they realize what I am doing...

C: 受困于时间和场地，它的生命编组只能算半成品。我复现出它诞育的瞬间，但很快，它就会化作粒子消散。
E: Restrained by time and place, its code of life could only be considered an incomplete attempt. I managed to replicate the moment it was born, however, it would soon disappear and be reduced to particles.

C: 你或许会想起有人在空间站做了任性的实验，但不会再记得是谁。也许有一天我们又重新相遇，但你不会再把我与这件事联系在一起。
E: Perhaps you will remember someone performed selfish experiments on the space station, but you will no longer remember their identity. Perhaps we will meet again someday, but you won't be able to connect me with the recollection.

C: 炒热饭，嘶嘶。
E: Fry leftover rice. *buzz*

C: 地下二层，接驳车，培养皿，危险奇物收容，嘶嘶。
E: Basement Two. Shuttle. Incubator. Dangerous Curio storage. *buzz*

C: 这次的两个样本生长状态良好。我在「概念」中加入了个人的口味喜好，我不确定这么做的结果。
E: The growth status of the two samples this time is promising. I incorporated personal taste preferences into the concept, but, I'm uncertain of the outcome of such an action.

C: 已将目的地添加至待办事项，用户可随时启动导航程序。
E: Destination has been added to to-do list. The user can activate the navigation protocol at any time.

C: 没关系，华劳斯，你能感受到这项理论的伟大，就已经胜过全宇宙<unbreak>99.99%</unbreak>的人了。来，我再用更加通俗易懂的方式给你解释一遍……
E: Fear not, Wallace. The very fact that you are able to sense the greatness of my theory already places you above <unbreak>99.99%</unbreak> of people in the universe. Come, I will find an even simpler way to explain it to you...

C: 我记得你的摄影技术十分高超，请帮我和雷金拍一张合照吧，作为我们友谊的见证。
E: I remember your photography skills are top-rate. Could you please take a picture of me and Regin together as a symbol of our friendship?

C: 花店离这不远，买好以后直接去找那个姑娘吧，别让人家等着急了。
E: The florist isn't far from here. Go and find that girl as soon as you've got the flowers. Don't keep her waiting.

C: 送给一位年轻美丽的女士。
E: The flowers will be given to a beautiful young lady.

C: 你为什么不自己去买？
E: Why didn't you go and buy them yourself?

C: 你也有想念的人？
E: You have people you miss as well?

C: 正在存档…希望姬子小姐不要收取我录制你语句的版权费。
E: Saving... I hope that you will not charge me royalties for quoting you, Miss Himeko.

C: 银鬃铁卫？
E: Silvermane Guards?

C: …哎呀，居然又是二位！咱们这是什么神仙缘分，一天里居然能撞上三次？
E: Oh! It's you two again. This is the third time today we've run into each other.

C: …啊，她都告诉二位了？你们的关系还真是特别亲密啊。
E: ...Oh? You two are closer than I expected with her.

C: …什么，公司的人已经开始在下层区捣乱了？
E: Huh? The IPC are causing trouble in the Underworld? Already?

C: 我这位同事…不太擅长沟通，两位别放在心上哈。
E: You'll have to forgive my colleague here — people skills aren't his strong suit. Please don't take it to heart.

C: 多谢你的关心，我们没问题的！我跟同事都是第一次来这颗星球，想先多看两眼这里「标志性」的雪景。
E: Thanks for the concern, but I'll manage. It's my first time on this world — I'd like to take in its vast, iconic snowscape for just a little longer.

C: 托帕小姐给我讲了一个故事：七百年前，星核降落于雅利洛-Ⅵ之后，原本在这个世界驻留的外来者预见到了危机的迫近，纷纷选择离去。
E: Topaz shared with me the story of the Stellaron's descent upon Jarilo-VI — how the original outsiders stationed here foresaw the impending disaster and chose to leave in large numbers.

C: 最好…还是让布洛妮娅和你解释吧？
E: You should probably ask Bronya to explain it to you.

C: 公司又有什么动作了吗？
E: I'm sure we can turn things around.

C: 「自由」对人而言是十分宝贵的财富；但在做现实的选择题时，总有些东西会被赋予比它更高的价值——比如「生存」。
E: I know freedom is precious to people, but in reality there are things of much greater value... such as survival.

C: 如果这个「公司」确实跟你们说的那样神通广大，一夜间就能让这个世界回到千年前的模样——在我眼里，这实在没什么好犹豫的。
E: If this "IPC" does indeed possess the magical power to restore Belobog back to its former self overnight, then I think the answer is clear.

C: 她应该还在大矿区协助矿民吧？走，我们去找她！
E: She's probably still in the Great Mine helping the miners. Come on, let's get going!

C: 我要吃太阳薄饼嘛！
E: I want suncake!

C: 托帕小姐，你刚才说的追责……
E: Miss Topaz, you mentioned accountability...

C: 破裂？不至于不至于。况且这部分的主要责任也在我，怪我对下属管理不力。
E: A rift? I wouldn't go that far. Also, it's me who's mostly to blame — I didn't keep my subordinates in check.

C: 败落不堪啊，这片城区…你们之前来过？
E: What a dismal sight. This district... Have you been here before?

C: 哦，我知道了！你们肯定是听说了煦日节的事，特地回来体验节日气氛的，是吧？来来来，快来，我给你们烙一张热腾腾的太阳薄饼……
E: ...Oh, you're here for the Solwarm Festival, right? The atmosphere is like no other. Silly me, where are my manners? Grab yourselves a suncake each — get 'em while they're hot!

C: 更可疑的是，不管我再怎么追问，始终没人愿意告诉我和这个「互助会」相关的细节…所以我才想向你求助。
E: The most suspicious part is that no matter how much I ask, no one's ever willing to tell me anything about it... and that's where you might be able to help.

C: 我希望你能假装患者，帮我调查一下这个所谓的「互助会」，看看他们到底在鼓捣什么。
E: Hmm... Pretend to be a patient. Help me investigate this so-called "Mutual Aid Society" and find out exactly what they're up to.

C: 请问你为什么不去复诊？
E: I wanted to ask why you're not going for your follow-up visit.

C: 我和患者聊完了。
E: I'm finished talking with patients.

C: 去吧，{NICKNAME}。我在这里等着你的好消息。
E: Go, {NICKNAME}. I'll be waiting for the good news.

C: 到裂界里散步？别装了！
E: In the Fragmentum? Gimme a break!

C: 哼，看来你这家伙是铁了心要来砸场子啊……
E: Hmm. Seems like you are quite bent on dismantling our operations, aren't you?

C: 你…你救不了所有人！这下层区，茫茫多的病患…你怎么救得过来？
E: You... You can't save everyone! The Underworld is teeming with sickness... how could you possibly pull it off!

C: 你如果有任何想问我的事，就请现在开口吧。
E: If there's anything you want to know, don't hesitate to ask.

C: 经此史诗大捷，{NICKNAME}即将面对此次揭幕战的最终对手——这是多么傲人的战绩啊！
E: After this epic victory, {NICKNAME} is on the verge of facing {M#his}{F#her} final opponent of the season opener — what a feat!

C: …那个，你要是没有别的要紧事，我就回磐岩镇去了？我跟老史考特还有生意要——嗯？这是什么？
E: ...Well, if there's nothing else going on, I'll be heading back to Boulder Town. I've still got some unfinished business with Scott. Wait... eh? What's this?

C: 辛苦你了……
E: Thank you so much...

C: 但我记得很清楚，他拿到医学院录取通知书的那天，爸妈带我去花店买了最贵的一株「侯爵夫人」。
E: Still, I remember the day he received his offer from the medical academy. My parents took me to the florist and we bought him the most expensive Marquise stem in the shop.

C: 谢谢你愿意为我做这些，{NICKNAME}。
E: Thank you for doing this, {NICKNAME}.

C: 不必这样，小姐…能一直照顾老爷和夫人是我的荣幸。
E: Don't be, my dear... It is my honor to look after your parents.

C: 抗寒药…「风雪免疫」……
E: Medicine... Blizzard Immunity...

C: 我无法原谅他的行为。但我也没法控制自己对兄长的思念……
E: I can't forgive him for what he's done. But nor can I say I don't miss him...

C: 你答应了？太好了！这么干脆，不愧是你。那好，我们这就出发去下层区。
E: Excellent! Just as I expected — short, sweet, and decisive. To the Underworld it is, then.

C: 「招募临时搬运工、机械师、安保员。工时轻松，待遇优秀。」
E: "Recruiting temporary porters, mechanics, and security. Flexible hours, excellent pay."

C: 嘁，来比比啊！
E: Oh, yeah? Let's see then!

C: 介绍一下——{NICKNAME}，这位是艾丽斯小姐，历史文化博物馆的大堂助理；艾丽斯小姐，这位就是贝洛伯格的救星，你应该早就听过{F#她}{M#他}的名字了。
E: {NICKNAME}, I would like to introduce to you, Ms. Eris, the lobby secretary in the History and Culture Museum, Ms. Eris, this is the savior of Belobog. You should have heard of {F#her}{M#his} name.

C: 如你所见，这尊雕塑被摆放在工业展区的入口，因为它象征了贝洛伯格人民几百年来赖以生存、生活和生产的工业精神。
E: As you can see, this sculpture was placed at the entrance of the Industrial Hall because it symbolizes the industrial spirit that Belobogians have lived, breathed and produced for centuries.

C: 二十年！凝聚了这么多心血的一件艺术品，可不能这么轻易就扔下不管了。
E: Twenty years! We can't let all that painstaking work and talent go to waste.

C: 我的各项情感读数近期并无波动。但克拉拉也对我说过类似的话。
E: Clara too has conveyed similar sentiments, though my emotional indices have not experienced any fluctuations.

C: 克拉拉希望能和史瓦罗先生一起守护这片平静…有空的话，最好能带他去上层区看看。
E: I hope me and Mr. Svarog can make sure it stays that way... And if we ever get the chance, I want to show Mr. Svarog around the Overworld.

C: {NICKNAME}，又见面了！我都听艾丽斯小姐说了，在你的妥善经营之下，博物馆已经快要恢复鼎盛期间的兴旺人流了。
E: {NICKNAME}, good to see you again! I've heard from Miss Eris that under your superb management, the museum is on the verge of regaining the thriving crowds of its heyday.

C: 事不宜迟，我们现在就去克里珀堡找她吧，{NICKNAME}。
E: No point in waiting around here, then. Let's go pay Lady Bronya a visit, {NICKNAME}.

C: 这里的人流不断…从哪里开始调查比较好呢？
E: This place is an endless stream of people... Where do we start?

C: 还是说，你也想加入「深蓝骗局受害者互助会」？
E: ...Perhaps, you've decided to join the Dark-Blue Scam Victims Association?

C: （压低声音）对，是我。
E: (In a low voice) Yes, it's me.

C: 唔…好像是不到<unbreak>60</unbreak>个。
E: Uhh... a little less than <unbreak>60</unbreak>.

C: 不过，可以拜托你同我一起前往博物馆吗？如果有你照应，想必就不会遇到太多麻烦了。
E: But, could I please ask you to accompany me to the museum? With you looking after me, I don't think I'll run into any trouble.
...Huh?

C: …我就知道！但这面试流程竟然这么严格吗？
E: ...I knew it! Is the interview normally this strict?

C: 行了，开始吧——你可要好好把我的话记下来啊。
E: Okay, let's get down to business. Listen to me carefully.

C: 算了吧，我累了，没什么脾气了。
E: Forget it, I'm just tired, that's all.

C: 哦，现在是合作关系。我明白了，放心吧，我不为难她。
E: Oh, working together? Understood. Rest easy, I won't make things difficult for her.

C: 哈哈哈哈，你的担心纯属多余，那铁卫丫头是不会被我这个退伍老兵给威胁到的。
E: Hahahaha, you needn't worry! That Silvermane girl wouldn't be afraid of an old veteran anyway.

C: 走吧，来的路上我看到不少废弃的矿车，回去找找有没有能用的部件。
E: Come on, we passed a lot of discarded mine carts on the way over, let's see if there are any components we can recycle.

C: 众人一起修好了矿车……
E: You all fix the mine cart together...

C: （这就是会说话的眼睛吗？）
E: (So that's why people call eyes the "windows to the soul.")

C: 你好别扭啊，我就当作你十分愿意帮助虎克啦？
E: Don't be a jerk. I'll just take your response as a yes.

C: 你还真不客气啊。
E: Huh, couldn't even give it a minute, could you?

C: 我们回来以后，费斯曼大叔的探测器就不见了。我们翻遍了整个避难所也没有找到…我猜，<color=#dbc291ff>小偷应该就在这四人之中</color>。
E: When we returned to the shelter, Mr. Fersman's detector was gone. We searched all around the shelter but found nothing... I guess <color=#dbc291ff>one of those four people was the thief</color>.

C: 流浪者也有流浪者的尊严，我们一定会把小偷给抓出来。不过……
E: We vagrants have our dignity, too. I'm sure we will catch the thief, but...

C: 你怎么这么肯定？
E: Why are you so sure about that?

C: 大概是急着去销赃吧。
E: Probably trying to sell off the spoils.

C: 叔叔我啊，都把真相告诉你们了！就这水平还想做侦探？还是回去过家家吧！
E: I gave you the answer, and you still couldn't crack the case, detective!? Why don't you just go home!

C: 你——就是你把老爹的宝贝偷走的，洞洞机绝对不会饶了你！
E: You! You stole daddy's treasure! Diggertron will not spare you...!

C: 你跑哪去了？我还正打算找你呢，虎克。走吧，回家，老爹给你做盐焗岩居蟹。
E: Where have you been, Hook? I was just about to go looking for you. Come on, let's go home, I'll cook some salt-baked rock crabs for you.

C: …它在重复你们的名字。
E: ...It's repeating your names.

C: 不过嘛，你小子居然也学会激将法了——
E: But I see what you're doing... Reverse psychology, huh?

C: 就这？我还能打十个！
E: That's it? That barely scratched the itch!

C: 这样啊…可惜。
E: Oh... shame.

C: 从露营料理中感受到了奇妙的力量……
E: You feel an amazing energy as you enjoy a meal with your fellow campers...

C: 锵锵——超级美味的雪原大乱炖做好啦！
E: Ta-da! The super delicious Snow Plains Combo Stew is ready!

C: 大概是被我们的炉光吸引来的吧。星核危机明明都已经解除了，怪物怎么还是到处都是啊……
E: They were probably attracted by the stove. The Stellaron crisis is over, why are there still so many monsters?

C: 只是，雪原探险这种事，多少还是有点危险……
E: But... exploring the Snow Plains is still quite dangerous...

C: 佩拉还没来吗？
E: Is Pela not here yet?

C: 雪原里一定发生了不少事吧——辛苦你了，{NICKNAME}。
E: Seems like a lot went down in the Snow Plains. Thanks again for your help, {NICKNAME}.

C: 是啊。你选一个吧，红的还是蓝的？
E: Yep. You pick, red or blue?

C: 在这里干等着也不是办法。
E: Standing around waiting won't do anything.

C: 虎克也不知道他什么时候会回来，肯定不行啦！
E: I have no idea when he'll come back. So that definitely won't work!

C: 仔细想想…这里应该不会有人住。至少克拉拉在这里寻找物资的时候，从来没见到过。
E: I don't think so... No one should be living here. I never saw anyone when I came here to hunt for supplies.

C: 而且…为什么要做这种事呢？
E: And why...?

C: 帕斯卡……
E: Pascal...

C: 帕斯卡，听克拉拉的话——你可以先停止收集零件了。你就乖乖待在这里，等我们回来给你下一步指令…好吗？
E: You can stop gathering parts for the time being. Just stay here and wait for us to return and give you your next orders, alright?

C: 你进去过？
E: You've been inside?

C: 好沉的大门…好嘞，看我的！
E: What a heavy gate... Okay, watch this!

C: 文测还是武测？
E: Spelling test or combat test?

C: 我哪知道，我又没打算进去跟史瓦罗大佬死磕。要进去的是你们，自己找机器人问个究竟呗。
E: Not a clue, I never had the urge to go on a Svarog suicide mission before. You guys are the ones that want in, why not go and ask the robots?

C: 认证失败…个体未获得访问权限。开启「试炼」。
E: Certification failure... Subject has yet to obtain access permissions. Launching processing.

C: 谈判的事就交给你们了，我可不擅长这个。
E: I'll leave negotiations to you guys. They're not my strong point.

C: 我们无意挑起争端。
E: We're not interested in stoking conflict.

C: 剿、剿灭？是字面上的意思吗？
E: E—Extermination? In the literal sense?

C: 希儿擅长侦察，而且思维敏捷、行动果断，她肯定能帮上你们的忙。况且…你们现在还有布洛妮娅。
E: Seele is a talented scout and a quick thinker — she takes decisive action. She'll definitely be able to help you. Not to mention... you also have Bronya now.

C: 你说的没错，但有希儿在她身边，她一定能缓过来的。
E: You're right, but with Seele by her side, I know she'll recover.

C: 怎么样，伙计？在你胸中激荡的是胜利的快感，还是劫后余生的喜悦？
E: How's it going, partner? Is that feeling in your chest the thrill of victory or just the joy of making it out alive?

C: 怎么，你听说过这样宝贝？怎么样，现在对拍卖会更感兴趣了吧？
E: Ah, never heard of a treasure like that before, huh? More excited about the auction now?

C: 你懂「拍卖」是什么意思吗？
E: Do you know what "auction" means?

C: 你喜欢就好。不过…你带着{NICKNAME}跑过来，真的只是为了取玩偶吗？快说吧，你们又有什么打算？
E: Glad to be of service. Now then... did you really bring {NICKNAME} over here with you just to pick up Junjun? Come on now, what are you guys up to this time?

C: …别生气，小朋友，别生气！我知道了，那就遵从主人的意愿，维持原样来拍卖。
E: ...Alright, alright, don't get upset, little missy! I'll respect the wish of the owner and keep Junjun here intact.

C: 抱歉，我们这就离开。
E: Apologies. We'll leave now.

C: 这是你的商品委托合同。
E: Here's your commodity contract.

C: 哟，这位小兄弟，怎么一个人在这地方晃悠呢？
E: So, why you hanging around here by yourself, tiny?

C: 五百冬城盾三次，成交！
E: <unbreak>500</unbreak> shield going three times... aaaand sold!

C: 让我们看看拍卖登记表。
E: Let's have a look at the auction registration form.

C: 可是，拍卖都已经结束了……
E: But the auction's over now...

C: 呜…呜，老爹的探针……
E: *sob* Daddy's Geomarrow Probe...

C: 当然不行啦！鼹鼠党的人全都得听漆黑的虎克大人号令！
E: Of course not! All members of The Moles must obey Pitch-Dark Hook the Great's commands!

C: 这、这是…给玩偶的帽子、衣服、梳妆台！还有一座给玩偶住的小屋子……
E: Th—This... a teddy bear's cap, clothes, and a dresser! And a little home for him...

C: 看到{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}这么有干劲，克拉拉好像也激动起来了——那我们就出发吧。
E: Seeing you so fired up has me excited, too. Now, let's get started.

C: 不过…克拉拉觉得也很帅气！那我们就出发吧，{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}！
E: But actually... I think it's cool, too! Now, let's get started, {F#big sister}{M#big brother}!

C: …{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}！这个外号果然还是太……
E: Em... This nickname is a bit embarrassing...

C: …啊，它发现我们了！
E: Ah, it's noticed us!

C: 史瓦罗先生评估期间，我们先给这个小家伙做个简单的检查吧。
E: While Mr. Svarog is assessing this little fella, let's give it a quick checkup ourselves.

C: 嗯…克拉拉明白，这样做可能是最合理的选择。但帕斯卡它……
E: I know this is the most sensible option, but Pascal...

C: 评估中…评估完成。结论：无法进一步排除。
