E: Assessing... Assessment complete. Conclusion: Search results cannot be narrowed down any further.

C: 但这仅仅是一种模拟，不代表自动机兵拥有真正的情感智能。
E: This, however, is only a simulation, and it does not mean that the automatons have actual emotional intelligence.

C: 但，帕斯卡，不动！健康，恢复！
E: But, Pascal, not—move! Recover, health!
...Huh?

C: 这几个是我的助手，我们要把这里的设备都检修一遍。
E: These guys are my assistants. We need to overhaul all the installations here.

C: 太残酷了。
E: That's terrible.

C: 啊？啊…我回忆一下…「老姐，禁区的能源管线出了故障，吃干饭的外包维修商根本查不出问题」——大概就是这样吧……
E: Huh? Oh, uh... Let me think... "Hey sis, the energy supply lines in the restricted zone have malfunctioned. Those useless engineers can't find the problem." Something like that...

C: 我知道自己在做什么，邓恩！你让开吧。
E: I know what I'm doing, Dunn! Step aside.

C: 好了，我要解释的就这么多！至于你信不信，才不关我事！反正老姐我一直都这么任性。遇到讨厌的事或人就要站起来反抗…该坚持的事就绝对要坚持到底！
E: I've said my piece, whether you believe it or not is up to you. Regardless, you should know by now your sister's never been one to back down. If there's something or someone you can't abide, you should stand up and resist... and if there's something you uphold, you should uphold it to the very end!

C: 你们，站住！
E: You, hold it right there!

C: 哈？你哪个部门的？
E: Huh? Which department are you from?

C: 那接下来你要怎么做？
E: So what are you going to do next?

C: 这、这又是什么情况？！
E: Wh... what happened!?

C: （一眨眼的功夫，那些箱子就又出现了——和在边缘通路遇到的情况几乎一模一样。）
E: (In the blink of an eye, the boxes reappear — just like how they did at Backwater Pass.)

C: 可可利亚大人，怪物正向这边涌来！这里…这里太危险了！
E: Madam Cocolia, the monsters are surging this way! ...It's too dangerous here!

C: 不妙……
E: Bad sign...

C: 谎言永远是谎言…
E: A lie will always be a lie...

C: 目睹誓言「存护」的家园在眼前逐渐消逝…是种折磨。再加上那挥之不去、扇惑人心的低语……
E: To see the home we vowed to preserve wither away... That in itself is torture. Not to mention the haunting whisper of temptation...

C: 明明只要让机巧测速，然后开出罚单就行了，为什么还要有人来监督呢？
E: Why do we need someone to supervise when we could just deploy an ingenium to measure the speed and issue a ticket?

C: 没问题，再来一次吧。
E: No problem. Let's do it again.

C: 捡到的所有笔记。
E: I picked up all of them.

C: 别着急干活，先养伤吧。
E: Don't rush back into work. Get some rest first.

C: 这写的是我呀？
E: That's me!

C: 想一想，你会作为陶德•雷奥登的合作伙伴被载入学会的教材，被银河中每个历史学讲师频繁提起。这样的条件对你有没有吸引力？
E: Just think about it. You will be listed in the Guild's textbooks as Todd Riordan's collaborator, and frequently mentioned by every history lecturer in the cosmos. Does this sound attractive to you?

C: 可我还有很多事要忙。
E: But I've got other things to do.

C: （询问陶德所要的药材一事）
E: (Ask about the ingredient Todd wants)

C: 我回来了。
E: I'm back.

C: …这、这不会都要找回来吧？
E: Y—you can't be serious about getting them all back, can you?

C: 我是诗人，我不是什么导航软件。
E: I am a poet, not some piece of navigation software.

C: 陌生的女子仔细确认了照片，最后放心地将手机又还给了你。
E: After scrutinizing the photo, the unknown lady returns your phone to you with relief.

C: 哦哦哦，我人到罗浮，刚下星槎，可让你拍着了。
E: I see. I just arrived on the Luofu and got off the starskiff when you took my photo.

C: 「至交友人各奔东西」。
E: "The parting of close friends."

C: 呜呜呜…我又失败了…蘑菇，你还有更好的诗吗？
E: *sniffle* I failed again... "Mushroom," do you have a better poem?

C: 新衣服，新首饰？什么都好，但只要是他送我的，我一概不会收下。
E: New clothes and jewelry? Still, I won't accept them if they are from Cong.

C: 我已经说了三遍了，「这个人是你，又不是你」。这就是占卜的结果。
E: I've said it three times. "It's you, but it's not you." That's the result of my divination.

C: 现在你是蘑菇了？
E: Are you a mushroom now?

C: 几乎没有。仙舟的航线并不固定，因此旅程和通讯多多少少不是那么便捷啦。
E: Almost never. Xianzhou's route is not fixed, so travel and communication would not be the easiest to manage.

C: 这种反常实在让我有些担心…所以我做了些小小的调查，发觉他最近沉迷着仙舟罗浮上的私人情感咨询服务「美丽狐仙聊天」。
E: His uncharacteristic behavior worries me... so I probed into it a little. Recently, he has been obsessed with the Foxian Beauty Chat, a private romance counseling service on the Xianzhou Luofu.

C: 对吧对吧——等等，你怎么知道……
E: Isn't it, isn't it— Wait, how do you...

C: 好的。
E: Sure.

C: 而且我们…也没有拆开礼物窥探隐私呀，只是确保它被准确送到「狐仙小姐姐」手上，这有什么问题吗？
E: Furthermore... we are not going to open up the gifts. We're just making sure that it is correctly delivered to the foxian beauty. How would there be any problem with that?

C: 见不到狐仙小姐姐，我该怎么办呀……
E: What will I do if I can't see the foxian beauty...

C: 良心发现…不能骗你的钱，想趁着上层不知道，把钱还给你。
E: Her conscience... telling her not to cheat you out of your money and trying to return your money to you without the higher-up knowing.

C: 我觉得你有问题。
E: I think you have a problem.

C: {NICKNAME}手机上的照片不就是一般的狐人姑娘吗，估计是随便找了个路人吧。
E: Isn't the photo on {NICKNAME}'s phone just a regular foxian lady? Maybe the scammer chose a passing foxian girl at random.

C: 还是用优厚报酬侮辱我吧…
E: Please humiliate me with a handsome pay...

C: 我拍摄时没看到有标记啊…
E: I didn't notice it when I took the pictures...

C: 我就知道你足够机灵，听一遍就会。
E: I knew you were smart enough to get what I meant right away.

C: 抱歉，药力过去了，我的关节又开始疼起来了，好像有人撒了一蓬针在里面。我实在挪不动了。
E: I'm sorry. The effect of the pill is waning, and my joints are hurting like there are needles inside. I can't walk anymore.

C: 捡起笔记本。
E: Pick up the notebook.

C: （这些标识似乎都是残缺不全的，看来在附近仔细找找缺失的部分了。）
E: (These markings seem incomplete. I should probably look for the missing parts nearby.)

C: 我对长生不老没兴趣。
E: I'm not interested in immortality.

C: 最终我也许会像持明一样变成一枚卵，也许会重新成为人类的胚胎——毕竟我并不是持明族。
E: In the end, I might even become an egg again, just like the Vidyadhara. Perhaps I could become a human embryo once again — I mean, I'm not Vidyadhara, am I?

C: 您接着说。
E: I'm listening.

C: 爽快。
E: Great!

C: 出现魔阴身的仙舟人总是很早就被十王司的冥差判官带走了。我心想，若能在他们上路前，让他们不必那么痛苦，让他们能体面离开……
E: When symptoms strike, the mara-struck are quickly taken away by the spiritfarers and judges of the Ten-Lords Commission. I just want to reduce their suffering and let them leave with dignity...

C: 刚才我就注意到了，这附近有好多药王秘传的爪牙。
E: I caught sight of a lot of disciples in the area just now.

C: 我还要到处去吃吃喝喝，不要把我带走了呀，我不要回去！我不要回去——
E: I still wanna play! I'm hungry! Don't take me back — I don't wanna go back! I'm not going back!

C: 半夏费劲地想要将盔甲从身上取下来，但是盔甲却像是和她长在了一起。
E: Banxia is trying to take the armor off but failed. It sticks to her so tight as if it's part of her body.

C: 半夏…半夏姐姐她……
E: Miss Banxia... she...

C: 不知道呀。
E: I have no idea.

C: 我无意动摇白露的地位。
E: I have no intention of threatening Bailu's position.

C: 然而丹枫的仪式失败了，他的力量留在了我的身上…却不知为何，也造就了你。
E: However, Dan Feng's ritual failed, and his powers remained within me... And yet for some reason, it also created you.

C: 丹枫的朋友或者爱徒吗？也许吧。
E: A friend or disciple of Dan Feng? Maybe.

C: 自从上次调查结束之后，在行医市集附近偶尔也会发生隐身怪物出没的情报。
E: Since the last investigation ended, there have been occasional sightings of the invisible monsters near the Healer's Market.

C: 我已经将之前抓捕扑满的行动记录在案了，可以随时调阅。
E: I've documented the previous operations to capture the Trotters. The report can be accessed and reviewed at any time.

C: 还是算了。
E: Forget it.

C: 半晌，净砚拿着一个卷轴匆匆走来。
E: After a while, Jingyan hurries over with a scroll.

C: 您说的是哪位？我瞅一眼……
E: Which one? Let me see...

C: 所以，我们需要自行理清他们的顺序？
E: So we have to clean up and reorder the footage ourselves?

C: 他该不会是把谁给装到棺材里偷偷抓走了吧？
E: Do you think he captured someone and put them in the coffin?

C: 罗刹穿过街道，走进了一个奇怪的角落。那里看起来很危险，但他似乎满不在乎，只拿着一把剑就踱步走了进去。
E: Luocha crossed the street and turned into a strange corner. It looks dangerous there, but he didn't seem to care at all. He paced in with nothing but a sword in hand.

C: 小三月可能有点激动，忘记了地衡司最早关注的疑点——是否有人将「危险品」带入了罗浮。
E: Let's not get ahead of ourselves. We're forgetting that the Realm-Keeping Commission was initially investigating whether someone brought a "dangerous object" onto the Luofu.

C: 这个钱我们不能收，你辛苦看店，赚点钱也不容易。
E: This is your hard-earned money. Looking after a bookshop is no easy task.

C: 不过，请不要把这件事告诉西衍先生…虽然平时不怎么出现，但他算是我们店的掌柜。要是被他知道了，我一定会挨骂的。
E: It'd be best if Mr. Xiyan didn't find out about this... He doesn't show up very often, but he's the manager here. I'll be in big trouble if he finds out what happened.

C: 他和长成这样的人恩怨很深吧…
E: I reckon he must have bad blood with the other "Luochas..." he mentioned.

C: （等一下，这条路太顺了。）
E: (Hold on... this would've been too quick a route.)

C: 这样吧，我们还是去现场看看吧，也许到了现场，很多谜题就迎刃而解了。
E: You know what? Time for some fieldwork. Maybe the answers to our questions are waiting for us at the scene.

C: 纸花？叠得真好看。这是罗刹叠的？
E: A paper flower? It's beautiful... Did Luocha make this?

C: 但你答应过我的，晴霓！…这件事咱们回家再说。
E: You promised me, Qingni! ...We shall discuss this when we return.

C: 就当是回报你的苏打豆汁了。
E: Our way of saying thanks for the mung bean soda.

C: 有劳将军，用这样的琐事占用你的时间，真是抱歉。
E: Thank you, general. We apologize for taking up your time with such triviality.

C: 事情的经过我了解了…晴霓啊，驭空大人不让你做飞行士，我知道你心有不甘，可她也有她的顾虑……
E: I see... Qingni, I know Madam Yukong's position on you becoming a pilot is tough for you to accept, but she has her own concerns...

C: 我明白了。晴霓…对不起，我不能支持你的愿望，因为我已对另外一人发过誓言。
E: ...I understand now... I'm sorry, Qingni... I cannot support your dream because I made a promise to someone else.

C: 晴霓，再坚持一下！我们这就来救你！
E: Hold on, Qingni! We're coming to get you!

C: 因为我要来当面说「不」。
E: So I could say "no" to your face.

C: 谢谢。在这仙舟上…我能拜托的只有你了。
E: I'm grateful. On the Xianzhou... you're the only one I can turn to.

C: ——别急，还有时间。你可以先想想，再回到这里来。
E: Don't rush, we still have time. Think about it first and ask when you're ready.

C: 因为那颗星核是被修改过的，黑塔捕获了它之后，对它做了许多研究，那是多宇宙里唯一一颗不会污染人类的星核。
E: The Stellaron in question was modified. After seizing it, Herta conducted a lot of research — it's the only Stellaron in the universe that doesn't contaminate humans.

C: 我没有「恐惧」这种机制。我的头脑和内心里存在着一个空洞，虽然连我自己都意识不到。所以这种改变，我自己是做不到的。
E: I have no mechanism for "fear." There's an empty space in my mind and my heart, but I'm unable to perceive it. Changing that part of myself isn't something I can do alone.

C: 这个大家伙就是「玉界门」吧。
E: Is that the Jade Gate? It's huge!

C: {M#俺也一样！}{F#我也一样！}
E: {M#Same!}{F#Same!}

C: 「尊姓大名」…太客气了吧，我叫三月七，这位是杨叔，不对，瓦尔特•杨先生。还有这位——
E: Illustrious names? ...Uhh, sure. I'm March 7th, this is Mr. Yang — oh — Mr. Welt Yang, and this is—

C: 离开流云渡吗？
E: Leave Cloudford now?

C: 小弟弟，不如再来一次上回的比试如何？让我瞧瞧你引以为傲的剑术又有几分进展。
E: Hmph. Young man, why don't we continue our previous contest? Show me whether the sword techniques you are so proud of have improved.

C: 好嘞，让我瞧瞧，安神草和壮气散都在。回去吧，可不能让病人久等。
E: Alright, let me make sure nothing's missing... Excellent, the calming-valerian and qi-strengthening infusions are here. Let's head back — never make a patient wait too long.

C: 那些曾经降临在敌人身上的剑招，如今刻在这副可憎的躯壳上，而我只能看着自己的血肉不断抽动、愈合、复原……
E: The swordplay used to slay our enemies of old is still engraved on this despicable shell. All I can do is watch my flesh become severed, healed, and restored...

C: 以短生种的寿数，便是躲进休眠舱里也拖延不了太久。就算他还活着，怕如今也是个垂垂老人了。
E: Hmph, even the cryo capsules wouldn't be able to extend the life expectancy of a short-life species for long. If he is still alive, he must be ancient.

C: 谛听没有理会你的无理请求。
E: Diting ignores your unreasonable request.

C: 景元的影子看向你。你不确定这究竟是某种自动答录影像，还是他本人随时回话的远程投影。
E: Jing Yuan's apparition turned to you. You are not sure whether this is some kind of automatic audio-visual answering technique, or a real-time remote materialization from himself.

C: 就算你很久没来罗浮，也该在外听说过景元将军的威名吧？虽然将军总说自己不擅用剑，技艺生疏…但每次教起我来，他总是起劲的很。
E: I know you haven't visited for a long time, but surely you've heard of General Jing Yuan? He says he has no affinity with the sword — that his skills are getting rusty... Well, if that's true, I never noticed from his training.

C: 你根本不是盲人，对不对？
E: You're not blind at all, are you?

C: 来吧，谛听，顺着气息找一找。
E: Here Diting, let's follow the scent!
You...

C: 我必须加快脚步了……
E: I have to pick up the pace.

C: 放心好了，神策府不会亏待任何一个为我们做出过贡献的人。
E: Don't worry, the Seat of Divine Foresight always rewards those who contribute to our efforts.

C: 我叫绿芙蓉。此番来到长乐天，就是希望能邂逅到像你这样的有缘人，和我同登长生仙道。
E: My name is Green Hibiscus. I came to Exalting Sanctum in hopes of a fated encounter with one such as yourself — one who is also on the road to immortality.

C: 你赢了是好事。这家伙穿着云骑制服就跑来说要入教，说话没头没脑的，真要是他赢了，我还有点担心他是不是真的可信呢。
E: I'm glad you prevailed — that Cloud Knight waltzed straight up to us in uniform and asked if he could join — hardly a convincing spectacle. I doubt I ever could've trusted him.

C: 我需要查一个包裹…
E: I'm looking for a package...

C: 没什么事。
E: Nothing, I'm fine.

C: 你还有什么问题吗？
E: Do you have any questions?

C: 不必紧张。吾已对照了幽囚狱的绘影图形名册，并无匹配。
E: Don't be nervous. I ran your facial profile against the records in The Shackling Prison just now. Indeed, there were no matches to be found.

C: 再来。
E: Once more.

C: 罢了，眼下不是置气的时候。
E: Forget it, now is not the time for losing one's temper.

C: 过去的事情都过去了，伤感什么！今朝有酒今朝醉，明日愁来明日愁嘛。不许伤感了～
E: The past is in the past! What is there to feel sad about? Live every day as if it were your last. Don't be sad~

C: 太卜大人？听得见吗？糟了…一定出了什么麻烦！
E: Master Diviner? Can you hear me? Darn it... Something must have gone wrong!

C: 确实。
E: ...Sure.

C: 不过恐怕那位花火小姐又会辩称：「我们是『假面愚者』，又不是『假面天才』！」…哈哈。
E: But I'm afraid that Miss Sparkle would argue: "We're Masked Fools, not Masked Geniuses!" ...haha.

C: 你会抢走别人的剑并熔断它？
E: Wait, you take people's swords by force and melt them down?

C: 先说好，我会守在这里，趁守卫不备把魔剑拦下来，接着在所有人反应过来之前就把它给熔了！你拦不住我的，没人能拦住我。
E: Just so you know, I'm here just waiting for the perfect moment to snatch that sword. And once I have it, I'll melt it down before anyone can react! Don't even think about stopping me. No one can stop me.

C: 说重点，她人往哪儿去了？
E: Let's cut to the chase. Where did she go?

C: 将岁阳铸进剑中，固然能令武器传递经验，克服恐惧，甚至代替人做出判断。但武器与别的工具不同，它的唯一用途只有杀伤敌人。
E: By infusing heliobi into swords, he managed to forge weapons that could grant their wielders strength and valor, and even make decisions for them. However, weapons are different from regular tools. They are meant to kill, plain and simple.

C: 云璃向我承诺过不会偷剑。
E: Yunli promised me she wouldn't steal the sword.

C: 有没有可能是使团偷了剑？
E: Could it be that someone from the delegation stole the sword?

C: 只是今天早上到工造司来一瞅，怎么就只剩剑匣了？除此之外，老夫什么都不知道，你问我也是白问。
E: But when I went back this morning, all that was left was the case. I don't know anything else, so asking more questions won't help, I'm afraid.

C: 作为骑士决斗代理人，银枝，向您发起挑战！
E: As a representative in this duel, I, Argenti, challenge you!

C: 但是，我要你们为我建立一座石碑。一定要够大，够坚固，要将那怪物的遗骸牢牢压住，万世不移。这是你们欠我的债，你们必须做到，明白吗？
E: But that's not all. I need you to construct a stone monument for me. It must be large and sturdy enough to seal the remains of that demon forever. This is a debt you owe me, and you must fulfill it. Do you understand?

C: 虽然你已听不见了，老友，但我会尽我所能，结束这个世界的战斗。
E: Even though you can't hear me anymore, my old friend, I'll do everything I can to bring an end to all conflicts in the world.

C: 那就拜托你了，云璃。
E: Then I'll leave it to you, Yunli.

C: …真是的，我又不会真的对她做什么。
E: ...Really, I wouldn't do anything to her.

C: 就这点「证物」？这叫人怎么答题嘛……
E: Is that all the evidence? How are we meant to solve this with so little to go on...

C: 别按！黑天鹅大人，千万别按！
E: Don't push it! Lady Black Swan, whatever you do — don't push it!

C: 那…这是为什么呢？
E: Okay... Why?

C: 请黑天鹅大人开始调查吧！案发现场留下了许多线索，一定能帮助您锁定真凶。
E: Please begin your investigation, Lady Black Swan! There are lots of clues at the crime scene that are sure to help you apprehend the real culprit.

C: 首先是店员阿佑，他是个皮皮西人，身高还不到花火大人的腰，这一点常被人取笑，令他变得有些阴暗。
E: First of all is the shopkeeper, Wright. He's one of the Pepeshi people and only stands as tall as Sparkle's waist, which is often a source of teasing for him. He can get pretty salty about it.

C: 这次怎么不是命案了？
E: No murder case this time around?

C: 既然你以这幅姿态站在我的面前，那我猜…答案是「垃圾桶」，对吗？
E: Seeing as you're right here in front of me like this, then I guess... the answer is "a trashcan," right?

C: 这都什么乱七八糟的……
E: What the heck was that jibber-jabber...

C: 在我看来，这二者并无本质区别。循着水面上的细微波纹，使用一些能力和技巧，不断深潜，触及人心中最深的秘密，将其打捞，悉心保护……
E: In my opinion, there is no difference between the two. Follow ripples along the surface of the water. Use some abilities and tricks to keep diving deeper, and touch that secret deep inside people's hearts. Salvage it, and protect them carefully...

C: 走吧——不能让女孩子久等呀。
E: Let's go — can't keep a girl waiting, can we?

C: 另外，那位忆者不想挑战的密室杀人事件，若诸位有兴趣也可试着推理一番。花火好不容易想出来的谜题，可别浪费了！
E: Also, if you're interested in the locked-room case that the Memokeeper ignored, you can try out your powers of deduction. I put lots into coming up with the puzzle, so don't let it go to waste!

C: 没什么问题。
E: No questions.

C: 这么看来，凶手也只能是阿佑了——有点简单啊。咱们把答案告诉捕头，看看它是什么反应吧。
E: By process of elimination, it seems that only Wright could be the murderer. That was easy. Let's tell the constable our answer and see what he thinks.

C: 收到。
E: Good enough.

C: 只不过，由仙舟拿下公司的通缉犯，于我个人私心而言大为快慰，哈哈。
E: Still, it's a pleasure for me to be able to say that the Xianzhou has captured a criminal wanted by the IPC, haha.

C: 这又是什么怪东西？看起来像是个门楼子成精。
E: What the heck is this? It looks like a walking gate...

C: 是吗？陨落星神的故事有很多呢。
E: Is it so unthinkable? There are many stories about fallen Aeons.

C: 至于列车团的诸位…如今我正大光明地邀请各位加入封印星核的行动。
E: As for our Astral friends... I hereby formally welcome you all to join our operation to seal the Stellaron.

C: 不坏…？先祖们曾经也是这么想的。但是能赐予长生的神迹，不过是一厢情愿的美梦罢了。
E: Oh...? Our ancestors once thought so too, but the miracle of longevity was nothing more than a vain dream.

C: 先贤将这截枯木置于众目睽睽之下，故意令它显得毫无紧要，实则以洞天之术层层封锁。即便向着「建木」前进，也永远无法抵达。
E: Our ancestors placed the stump in full view of the people precisely to make it seem unimportant, but in fact, they sealed it behind layers upon layers of delve enchantment. Even if one travels toward the Ambrosial Arbor, one will never reach it.

C: 你是说…太卜？
E: You mean... the master diviner?

C: 来不及啊。那紧要关头，恨不能把手当脚用，再凭空多生出几条腿来。
E: We didn't have time — we were scrambling for our lives! If I had an extra pair of arms, maybe I could've tried.

C: 那还坐什么星槎？
E: Then what do you need starskiffs for?

C: 然后，点火。以火克木，必然无往不利！
E: And then, ignite. Fire beats wood — there's no way we can lose!

C: 哈哈哈哈！这化外民真笨，都不知道咱们「罗浮三少」是干什么的！
E: Hahahaha! What a doofus! Who hasn't heard of the Luofu Trio?

C: 老什么大！快扶我起来！
E: Argh, stop yelling and help me up already!

C: 那个孩子的父母因为丰饶民战争而离世了…收留她的亲戚也和她不甚亲近。我为她看病时，常常成了她倾诉的对象。
E: Her parents passed away in the Denizens of Abundance Wars... The relatives who took her in aren't close to her, and whenever I treat her, she often confides in me.

C: 并非全部的「天缺」都是不治之症。在下的这只机巧臂就还算是活动自如。因为它不涉及任何侵入性的手术，只是在皮肤表面接收生物电讯号来运转。
E: Not all incompletions are without remedy. Take my ingenium arm, for example — it doesn't require any invasive surgery and operates by detecting bioelectric signals on my skin.

C: 没有更多问题了。
E: I don't have any other questions.

C: 服下「餐云承露丹」，你就能切身体会到慈怀药王为血肉之躯带来的无限自由。
E: Upon ingesting the Brumedew Concentrate Pellet, you will feel the limitless freedom of the form bestowed upon you by Merciful Medicus...

C: 是你欺骗我在先。
E: You were the one who lied to me first.

C: 是有什么问题吗？
E: Is there a problem?

C: 虽然{NICKNAME}打死了冬妮娅放生的狼，让一桩善举泡了汤。但现在{F#她}{M#他}有意将功赎罪，加入「放生帮」，未来自然是功德无量。
E: Although {NICKNAME} has killed the wolves released by Tonya and ruined those kind efforts, {F#she}{M#he} intends to redeem this error by joining the Unshackled. They'll do a lot of kind deeds in the future.

C: 那不成，你打死了我的狼，不管入不入会，你都要贡献等量的功德善举，才能让我不计较这事儿。
E: That won't do. Now that you have killed my wolves, you must contribute the same amount of merits whether you join our group or not. That's the only way I'll forgive you.

C: 哈哈哈哈哈哈，他们信了，他们真的信了。哎呀不行了，笑得我肚子疼。
E: Hahahaha, they bought it! They really bought it! Oh no, I'm about to die laughing!

C: <size=36>好好说话！</size>
E: <size=36>Be serious!</size>

C: （我应该再好好观察一下这附近的情况，也许能打破现状。）
E: (I need to look closely around this place again... Maybe I can break out of the cycle.)

C: 喂喂喂，难得别人好心为你，你还是看看那边的线索吧。
E: Hey, hey! I'm trying to help you. Go and look at the clues.

C: 巧了，我刚把现场直播时录下的视频剪辑完，正好能作为证据给你瞧。
E: Lucky for you, I just finished editing my stream — it's all the proof you need...

C: 我相信世界上真的有鬼！
E: I believe!

C: {NICKNAME}，星穹列车乘员，神策府的客人，帮助云骑平息了建木灾厄，是联盟的朋友。
E: You are a passenger on the Astral Express and a guest of the Seat of Divine Foresight. You assisted the Cloud Knights in resolving the Ambrosial Arbor calamity and are a friend of the Alliance.

C: 尾巴…大爷？
E: Mr. Tail...?

C: 哎呀，真是个奇怪的小姑娘，明明就是为了拍摄灵异鬼怪而来的嘛，怎么真见到了反而大呼小叫起来了……
E: What a strange girl. Here to film ghosts, yet terrified when she lays eyes on one...

C: 你是谁？你有什么目的？
E: Who are you? What do you want?

C: …也许在这里的是其他判官你就得救了，怎么会是我呢？
E: ...If I were any other judge, you'd already be saved...

C: 哟，怪老子咯？当年你要是乖乖地让本大爷吃了，还用得着烦恼成这样？
E: Oh, so it's all my fault? If you'd just let me devour you at the start, I could've spared you the trouble!

C: 浮烟在迷障里帮了我们，说不定…也许…可以暂时相信它？
E: Cirrus already helped us in the illusion maze. Maybe... we can trust them for now?

C: 藿藿，别让她靠近！
E: Huohuo, get her away from here!

C: 岁阳只会被判处一种刑罚，永远关押。他们杀不死我，却也不可能放走我。
E: Heliobi are faced with only a single punishment — eternal imprisonment. They can lock me up, but they can't kill me.

C: 把我们困在这里的岁阳一定不清楚雪衣大人与寒鸦大人是同胞双生的姐妹……
E: The heliobus that trapped us here wouldn't know that Madam Xueyi and Madam Hanya are twin sisters...

C: 去调查其他铜镜。
E: Investigate other mirrors.

C: 之前…我只是一时受到了刺激，没想到自己居然忘了那么多的事情。您看，我现在已经完全恢复…可以正常工作营业了。
E: Back then... I was just momentarily shocked. I never thought I had forgotten so many things. Look, I'm all recovered... I'm able to work just like before.

C: 不，从事音乐相关的工作。
E: No, I wish to work in something related to music.
...Sure.

C: 记住…给自己留下一颗种子…留下一朵…未来的玫瑰……
E: Remember... to leave a seed for yourself... to leave a blooming... of a future's rose...

C: 你感到了柔软光滑的硬质材料滑入手心，上面还带着另一个人淡淡的体温。
E: You feel something made from a soft, smooth, and solid material sliding into your palm, the warmth of another person lingering on its surface.

C: 他…还安全吗？
E: Is he... safe?

C: 正如她的心灵在沉默中珠残玉碎。
E: Just like her heart shattering mutely among splintered pearls and jade.

C: 抓住柯柯娜的手。
E: Grab Cocona's hand.

C: 那就放声歌唱吧。
E: Go forth and let loose your voice then.

C: 我…我明白了。我会试试看！
E: I... I got it. I'll give it a try!

C: 「鸟儿会在落日时分歌唱吗？」
E: "Will birds sing at sunset?"

C: 如果您有需要，我们可以安排新的店员为您服务——不必担心服务质量，我们的每位店员都十分专业，保证能带您找到最中意的商品。
E: If you wish it, we can arrange for a new staff member to service you. And don't worry about the quality — each and every staff member is immaculately professional. I promise you'll be able to find what you want.

C: 很抱歉，各位。我现在突然感觉…说不上来…有些糟糕。
E: My apologies, everyone. I suddenly feel... I do not know how to put it into words, but... I feel terrible.

C: 我们接着看下去吧，{NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}。
E: Let's keep watching, {F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}.

C: 我…该嘱咐的话之前都和您说过了呀。现在…到了这个节骨眼，我也不知道还能说些什么了。
E: I... I've told you everything I needed to. Now... At this crucial juncture, I'm not even sure what to say...

C: 我在想，是不是有可能……
E: I was wondering, would it be possible...

C: 亲力亲为，就别招人了吧…
E: Nothing better than doing it myself — I don't think hiring a first mate is necessary...

C: 由于合同条款的限制，<color=#dbc291ff>确定聘用当前大副后，不可更换大副人选。</color>除非大副犯有严重过失，否则随意解雇将面临高额的赔偿费用。这请您注意。
E: According to the clause's restrictions imposed by the agreement, <color=#dbc291ff>once you employ the current first mate, you are prohibited from changing your selection.</color> Unless the first mate commits an act of gross misconduct, the unprofessional dismissal of your first mate will incur a massive compensation fee. Please take note of that.

C: …我也没有别的选项啊。
E: ...You make it sound like I had a choice to begin with.

C: 您觉得呢？
E: What do you think?

C: 你有什么好的建议吗？
E: Do you have any good suggestions?

C: 您是船长，以您的喜好为重，您可有喜欢的人或事？最好是什么萌宠、吉祥物之类，男女老少都会喜欢的形象？
E: You're the captain, so it's all about what you like! Do you have a person or thing that you like? Best if it's a cute pet, or a mascot, something everyone will like.

C: 那么，就把这艘空艇重新起名为<color=#dbc291ff>「飞翔时针号」</color>吧——继承钟表小子的意志，我们将从上空捍卫美梦小镇的和平！
E: Then, we'll rename the airship to the <color=#dbc291ff>Soaring Clock Hand</color>! Inheriting the spirit of Clockie, we will defend the peace of Dreamville from the skies!

C: 哎哟，这模样可真俊啊，都赶得上真人了。
E: Oh-ho, this look is outstanding. Almost like the real deal.

C: 让那群一头雾水的贵宾尝尝你独家的待客之道，老板！
E: Give those confused VIPs a taste of your special hospitality, boss!

C: 嗯？你在犹豫什么，我的朋友？
E: Hm? What are you hesitating for, my friend?

C: 雅利洛-Ⅵ……
E: Jarilo-VI...

C: 等、等等，您是…之前那位大堂经理？
E: Wait... Wait a minute. Are you... that lobby manager?

C: 「…让我把鲫鱼煎成饼？」
E: "...You want me to make a pancake with carp?"

C: 抱歉，都怪我没有在短信里仔细说明。
E: Sorry, I didn't explain properly in my message.

C: 听好了，等你休养好了，记得带着剑来朱明找我。到时候我会给你打一柄好剑作为赔礼…不过嘛，规矩你懂的，你得与我以剑相会，堂堂正正地赢下它。怎么样？不许不来！
E: You listen to me. Once you've finished resting, bring that sword to the Zhuming and find me. I will forge a good sword as apology... However, you know the rules. You must meet me with steel and win the sword fair and square. Got that? It's a promise!

C: 不过那柄宝剑，彦卿把它带了过来，想在这临别时刻……
E: But I brought the awesome blade over to use in this moment of farewell...

C: 这份手稿，就先由我拿着了，毕竟要是我空手回去，那我不就成了你的挂件了嘛。
E: I'll keep this manuscript for the time being. After all, I'll be outshined by you if I go back empty-handed.

C: 我现在根本没有办法去想别的事。就让我仔细看看星槎，然后彻底死心吧。
E: I'm simply incapable of thinking about anything else. Take me to see the starskiffs close up, and maybe I'll have some closure.

C: 在制造星槎的流水线上有着许多形似圆拱门的「培养液注射器」，为的就是在星槎培育的不同阶段，对星槎成型有对应的微调。
E: There are many cylindrical "culture medium injectors" at various phases along the starskiff assembly line to make fine-tuned adjustments to it as it grows.

C: 你要是处理完之后叫我啊。
E: Come find me once you take care of everything.

C: 师傅真是太厉害了！
E: Your master was a genius!

C: （钟型机动）
E: (Bell maneuver)

C: 还能差到哪里去？
E: How bad can it be?

C: 安全模式启动，立刻清除航线威胁！
E: Security mode is activated. Threats on the route are to be eliminated immediately!

C: 我想要和已经去世的莱恩师傅说上话，请太卜大人、判官大人帮帮我。
E: I'd like to meet my master, Master Ryan, who has passed away. Please help me.

C: 按十王司律条，魂魄进入因果殿便不得重返阳世。
E: According to the law of the Ten-Lords Commission, souls that have entered the Hall of Karma can never return to the world of the living.

C: 在老师您离开以后，我一直不敢面对这份手稿…直到最近，我才鼓起勇气将这份手稿当作是「最后的试卷」，想要造出图纸中的星槎。
E: I'd been avoiding the manuscript since you passed away... It was only until recently did I muster up the courage to treat the manuscript as the last test from you. I decided to have the starskiff drawn on the manuscript.

C: 放心吧，娜塔。
E: Don't worry, Nat.

C: …不重要的细节我就省去了。总之，后来我说服了店主，让那个红毛小子停下他不喜欢干的工匠活，跟我学些技能。
E: Anyway, I convinced the shopkeeper to let him come with me.

C: 噢，抱歉，我每次讲这故事都有点儿忘乎所以，哈哈哈。
E: Oh, sorry, I get a little carried away when I tell this story, hahaha.

C: 检索「大奔」的系统信号中……
E: Scanning for signal from Big Ben...

C: 算是吧？小孩子们丢了东西总会来找我。
E: Seems like it. Kids always come to me when they lose stuff.

C: 我会记住这场战斗。
E: I will remember this fight.

C: 原来如此…
E: So that's why...

C: 听起来确实有点意思。那我们就去你们说的「绥园」啦～之后咱也许能在绥园再见！
E: It does sound interesting. Let's go check out Fyxestroll Garden! Maybe we'll bump into each other there!

C: 只听天舶司的驭空大人说，曜青发来的战报上回回「大捷」，令人印象深刻。
E: But Madam Yukong from the Sky-Faring Commission mentioned that the Yaoqing always sends back reports of great victories, which is quite impressive.

C: 炎老不仅是帝弓的将军，亦是工造司的百冶；戎马倥偬之外，更擅长百般工巧。如此人瑞，在天将中亦是独一无二。
E: Elder Huaiyan is not only one of the Arbiter-Generals but also the Furnace Master of the Artisanship Commission. Besides his martial skills, he excels in forging various weapons. Such talents are unique, even among the Arbiter-Generals.

C: 什么叫「抢走」？说了多少遍，这是安全检查。
E: What do you mean by "snatched"? I've told you a million times. It's a security check.

C: 听好了，小子。我不介意把时间再拖上几日，反正引擎一旦修好，运输船就会离港，你们也就没有理由再进行检查了。
E: Listen up, kid. I don't mind delaying this transport for a few more days. Once the engines are repaired, our ship will leave immediately, and you won't have any reason to inspect the cargo.

C: 匠人先生，请与云骑同去，向判官说明情况。
E: As for you, Mr. craftsman, please go with the Cloud Knights and explain the situation to the judge.

C: …灵砂小姐是罗浮本土人士？
E: ...You're a Luofu native, Miss Lingsha?

C: 再等等？
E: Let's wait a moment.

C: 在我看来神策将军是想借演武仪典「示众以强」，证明罗浮在建木灾异之后的局势太平无恙，欣欣向荣……
E: It appears that the Divine Foresight is using this Wardance as a show of strength to convince everyone that the Luofu is prospering after the Ambrosial Arbor Crisis...

C: 我听说罗浮有个「闭目将军」，所以我也给自己起了个同样谦逊的外号：「三无将军」——无虑，无悔，无敌。
E: I heard there's a Dozing General on the Luofu, so I came up with a humble nickname for myself: The "lacking general" — lacking in worries, regrets, and rivals.

C: 对元帅而言，她很清楚景元召开仪典的用意，也知晓他所面临的局势。她这么提，显然是认为二者并重。
E: The Marshal is well aware of Jing Yuan's purpose in holding the ceremony and understands the situation he is facing. She mentioned it because she believes both issues are important.

C: 能让大名鼎鼎的天击将军等我这么久，可算是赚足了面子。好久没见了，飞霄将军。
E: The illustrious Merlin's Claw waiting for me, and for so long, too? It's quite an honor. It's been a while, General Feixiao.

C: 我本想拉{NICKNAME}下水，{F#她}{M#他}不肯。我又想拉丹恒下水，彦卿师父不肯。
E: I tried to drag {NICKNAME} into this, but {F#she}{M#he} refused. Then I tried to rope Dan Heng in, but Master Yanqing wouldn't have it.

C: 其中一位是之前咱们曾见过的彦卿小弟弟。另一位，则是朱明将军怀炎的徒孙女，云璃。
E: One of them is Yanqing, the boy we've all met before. The other is Yunli, the granddaughter of General Huaiyan from the Xianzhou Zhuming.

C: 可疑的狐人
E: Suspicious Foxian

C: 放心吧，我改写了舵航计划表。你们俩，跟我来。
E: Don't worry. I've changed the shipping schedule. You two, come with me.

C: 百闻不如一见，星穹列车的客人。我是曜青仙舟的将军，飞霄。
E: I am glad to finally meet you in person, guests from the Astral Express. I'm Feixiao, the general of the Xianzhou Yaoqing.

C: 其一，药王秘传在罗浮内部不断壮大，六御却无所察觉，任其滋长，是为「失职」。
E: First, the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus grew uninterrupted on the Luofu, yet the Six Charioteers were not aware of it. That was a dereliction of duty.

C: 天击将军，这是你的意思…还是「十王」的意思？
E: Merlin's Claw, is this your line of thinking... or the Ten Lords'?

C: 呼雷是狐族世仇，由狐人镇压看守也合情合理。飞霄将军信任罗浮的处置，罗浮自然也对将军的处置报以信任。炎老认为如何？
E: It makes sense to have the foxians keep an eye on their arch-nemesis. Since you trust my judgment, I'll repay that trust. What do you think about all this, General Huaiyan?

C: 你真的相信我们吗？
E: Do you really believe us?

C: 不必担心我。
E: Don't worry about me.

C: 你在看什么？
E: What are you looking at?

C: 探视的申请已有批复。吾将是此行的引路人。
E: Your visit request has been approved. I'll be your guide for this trip.

C: 这头恶兽的种种妖异之处，便是所有规矩存在的意义。话说到这儿，两位明白了吗？
E: The complex rules are there because of his abnormal characteristics. Do you understand now?

C: 真的吗，丹恒？
E: Is that true, Dan Heng?

C: 「青鸟开道，冥灯照路」。助我点亮这些灯座，通往幽狱之底的前路自会显现。
E: "The blue bird paves the path, and the Stygian Lanterns illuminate it." Help me light up these lanterns, and the way to the bottom of the Shackling Prison will reveal itself.

C: 有勇无谋的计划，蠢货！就算有船，我们能逃出去的机会也比狐人逃过我爪子的机会要少得多！
E: What a reckless plan, you idiot! Even if we manage to get the ships, our chances of escaping are slimmer than a foxian slipping through my claws!

C: 「饮月之乱」。
E: The Sedition of Imbibitor Lunae.

C: 其三，能为潜伏的步离人伪造官方的身份，显然非身居高位之人无法办到。
E: Moreover, forging official identities for the undercover borisin would require someone with significant authority.

C: 先知「蟒古思」…她想做什么？
E: This Prophet Mangas... What does she want?

C: 你敏锐地嗅到了眼前这个飞行士打扮的狐人身上有股熟悉的味道。
E: You sniff a familiar scent on the foxian pilot.

C: 准备星槎的同伙没有回音，这应该会让他们有所警惕。
E: Losing contact with their accomplices preparing the starskiff will surely put them on guard.

C: 士兵，你有任务在身，给我集中精神！
E: You're on duty, soldier. Stay focused!

C: 希望？步离人早就遗忘了「狼之古训」！软弱的野兽将希望寄托于强者庇护，强大的野兽则会自己挣杀出一条血路！
E: Hope? The borisin have forgotten the Wolf's Creed! Weak creatures put their hope in the strong, but the strong fight their way out!

C: 果然又冷场了…你们理解笑点了吗？「浪」和「狼」同音，令人忍俊不禁。
E: Another awkward pause, I knew it... Do you get it? "Wolves" sounds like "waves." It's a funny pun.

C: 你说什么？
E: What did you just say?

C: 就像曜青人宴饮时爱玩的游戏：用几个碗盖住一样物什，移来换去，最后要你猜猜东西藏在哪个碗底下。
E: It's like that party game that the people of the Yaoqing love to play: They hide an object under one of several bowls, then move the bowls around, and have you guess which one the object is underneath.

C: 但长乐天和金人巷似乎还陷入苦战中，我这就准备星槎——
E: But it seems that there are fierce battles being waged at both the Exalting Sanctum and Aurum Alley. I will prepare a starskiff—

C: 刚才那是怎么回事？
E: What happened just now?

C: 戳一戳。
E: Poke...

C: 古怪，这附近怎么一个人都不见了？
E: Strange, why is there no one here?

C: 彦卿小弟，你想要猎的狼，此刻正站在咱们头顶上演武仪典的擂台里，挑战云骑……
E: Yanqing, the wolf you are hunting is standing above us in the Wardance ring at this very moment, facing the Cloud Knights...

C: 这场「演武仪典」的实况不会出现在仙舟人们的眼中，它也不是什么点到为止的剑斗。这是一场没有荣誉，只有凶险的死斗。三月，你准备好了吗？
E: This "Wardance" will not be seen by the people of the Xianzhou, nor will it be just a ceremonial sword fight. This is a battle to the death that offers no honor, only mortal danger. March, are you ready?

C: 咱们一起，让他屁股向后，狗头着地！
E: It's time for us to put this dog down!

C: 七百余年过去，我本以为自己能有破解之法。但我终究还是…爪牙迟钝了。你们赢了，小子。
E: Over seven hundred years have passed, and I thought that I would have a way to overcome it by now. But in the end... my fangs and claws were too slow... You won, child.

C: 我们所有人都能逃出去！我们会得到自由，然后把它分给更多的窟卢兄弟姐妹！
E: We will all be able to escape! We'll win our freedom and then share it with our koolur brothers and sisters!

C: 很可惜，当我带着她重回故地，想要解放窟卢的同伴时，我看到大地上只留下一个望不见底的深壑。
E: Unfortunately, when I led her back in order to free my koolur companions, there was nothing left there but a bottomless pit.

C: 说的是。司鼎大人送来请柬，龙师哪有不赴约的道理。
E: Indeed. When the Cauldron Master extends an invitation, it's only proper for the Preceptors to attend.

C: 那张勾了线的地图则是「幽囚狱犯人逃亡的路线图」。持明巧匠曾为幽囚狱建造出谋划策，想必涛然先生手中也藏有一份同样的地图。这药丸——
E: That marked-up map is a map of prisoners' escape routes. Vidyadhara craftsmen once made blueprints for the prison's construction, so I imagine, Mr. Taoran, you have a similar map in your possession. This pill —

C: 联盟的解救之道，就藏在「化龙秘法」中！
E: The Alliance's path to salvation lies within the secret of dragon transmutation!

C: 幸好{NICKNAME}他们找到了重伤的椒丘，他失血太多，需要好好静养。他和貊泽都身负重伤，被妾身狠狠地关了禁闭，一个都别想离开丹鼎司。
E: Thank goodness {NICKNAME} and the others found Jiaoqiu. He lost a lot of blood and needs to rest properly. He and Moze are seriously wounded. I've had to forcibly confine them to the Alchemy Commission.

C: 丹鼎司留我查验身体状况，花了不少时间，待确认无事后他们才将我放了回来。
E: The Alchemy Commission detained me for some time for a health examination. They released me only after ensuring I was in good condition.

C: 倒是「演武仪典」该怎么说？虽然猎狼计划顺利完成，竞锋舰上的事无人知晓。但步离人袭击闹市的消息一定会不胫而走。
E: But, what about the Wardance? While the wolf-hunt mission was a success, the events on the Skysplitter remain a secret. However, the news of the borisin's attacks on the streets will spread like wildfire.

C: 仪典中断，就务必重开。至于目击袭击的观众，我们不仅要多加安抚，也要让他们看到仙舟云骑的舍生忘死。
E: The Wardance was interrupted, so it must be reconvened. As for the people who witnessed the attacks, beyond placating them, we also need to show them the Xianzhou Cloud Knights' fearless dedication.

C: 你还没从震惊中缓过神来，就看到一名女子带着谄媚的微笑从酒吧里走了出来。
E: You've barely recovered from startlement when you see a woman with a fawning smile sashaying out of the bar.

C: {F#她}{M#他}是随朕一起处理公务的热心臣民。你有没有在附近看到个喝醉的男人，在街上高声歌唱？
E: {F#She}{M#He} is a compassionate subject out on official business with me. Have you seen a drunken man nearby, singing loudly along the street?

C: 被猎犬家系抓走了…那可就有点麻烦了。
E: Detained by the Bloodhounds... This is going to be a little troublesome then.

C: 并不随便，朕只封赏心怀善念的「好人」。「好人」并不多见。
E: Of course not. I only reward those with goodness in their heart. Good-hearted people are a rare find.

C: 朕本以为，这匹诺康尼姑且算是个文明开化的地方，最多只是有几个宵小之辈不懂得要尊敬皇帝。
E: I've always considered Penacony was, at the very least, a civilized place. That at worst, there would be meager riffraff who disrespected the Emperor.

C: 蒂索克二世一溜烟跑出了你的视线，大概完全忘记了自己还身处危险之中。
E: Tizocic II runs out of your line of sight in an instant, probably forgetting that she's still in dire danger.

C: 又不会真的死！只不过给她些刺激，让她想起来自己做过什么罢了！
E: It's not like it's a real death! It'll just give her a jolt. Maybe she'll remember what she did, and that's all!

C: 呵…灰骑士，殿下让你这贱民活得太久、爬得太高了。
E: Heh... Gray Knight, Her Highness has let a commoner like you live for far too long, and rise too high.

C: 我死之后，你会公开宣布，导致这场灭门惨剧的是过甚的外戚权力…然后你会逼议会通过法案，重新确立皇权。
E: After my death, you will announce that the fiery tragedy was a result of consolidated authority among your relatives... And then you will force the council to pass a vote to reinstate your imperial authority.

C: 朕本以为，只要杀光了这些政敌，自己就会安心。
E: I thought that I would be safe if I just slayed my political enemies.

C: 我会忠于我的皇帝。
E: I am loyal to my Emperor.

C: 不能。
E: No.

C: 啊…你身上的确带着些「神秘」的气质。
E: Hmm... You do have an enigmatic air about you.

C: 可惜，尽管我的内心无比渴望，但我们恐怕不能在此长谈…他们来了。
E: As much as I want to keep this conversation going, I'm afraid I can't... as they're here.

C: 感觉他的身份不一般。
E: I think he's no ordinary guy.

C: 为什么…我不觉得自己是个爱好暴力的人。我不愿那么想……
E: Why... I don't see myself as someone who finds pleasure in violence. That's a dreadful thought...

C: …隔墙恐怕有耳，有些事不便于此讨论。猎犬的听觉可是相当灵敏的。
E: ...Let's talk about this elsewhere in case someone is listening to our conversation. The Bloodhounds have excellent hearing.

C: 放心，这个问题已经解决了。
E: Don't worry. That problem has been solved.

C: 那些东西是…真蛰虫？！
E: Are those... True Stings!?

C: 不按起爆按钮。
E: Do not press the button.

C: 啊…我明白了。你害怕背上骂名，对吧？
E: Ah... I get it. You're afraid of taking the blame, aren't you?

C: 我们很多年没见了，查德威克博士。请原谅，我无法由衷地对您道出「我很遗憾」——因为我知道你早就预见了这个结果。
E: We haven't seen each other for years, Dr. Chadwick. Please forgive me for not telling you that I feel sorry for your plight. I know you have long seen it coming.

C: 请你…接受……
E: Please... accept...

C: 呃，为什么？
E: Err, why's that?

C: 不仅如此，那副折纸的身体下好像装着另一个灵魂……湛蓝爵士，或许它不是普通的折纸小鸟？
E: Not just that, it seems like there's another soul inside that paper body... Maybe Dr. Blues is no ordinary Origami Bird?

C: 这张照片就暂借给你吧。希望你能够探明这背后的往事。
E: I'll lend you this photograph for now. I hope you can unearth the history behind this matter.

C: 上面没有你吗？
E: You're not in it?

C: 上一个这么大胆的同事还躺在医疗室里呢。
E: The last person who was that brave is still lying in the clinic.

C: …「隐夜鸫」。他们想要整个「隐夜鸫」，我同意了。
E: ...Nightingale. They want the entire Nightingale, and I agreed.

C: 时间又过去了很久…他的身体先等不下去了，于是爱撒谎的家犬为他虚构了新的身体，那是「钟表匠」为筑梦师画下的肖像——一只天蓝色的折纸小鸟。
E: A long time passed... His body was unable to withstand the test of time, so that compulsive liar of a Hound made a new body for him — a sky-blue origami bird that the Watchmaker painted as a portrait for the Dreamweaver.

C: 你不在我可就要乱讲了。
E: If you're not there, then I'm gonna start spewing nonsense.

C: 没问题！
E: No problem!

C: 这样的话，湛蓝爵士也能常常见到我们的样子了啾。
E: This way, Dr. Blues can always see our faces, tweet!

C: （筑梦师聚集的地方…去筑梦边境问问看吧。）
E: (The place where Dreamweavers gather... Let's ask around bat the Dream's Edge.)

C: 「十二时刻梦境建设进入尾声。橡木家系家主歌斐木表示：『五大家系联合一心』，隐夜鸫家系或将并入『家族』？」
E: "Construction of the Twelve Hours of the Dreamscapes is almost near its end. The Oak Family Head Gopher Wood declares the "unity of the five major lineages." Will the Nightingale join The Family?"

C: 你这老板都不让驮兽歇口气，连续工作一年不休息，就是山之民也吃不消啊。
E: An owner like you — working your beasts of burden to the bone without a day off — even mountain dwellers would be hard-pressed to keep up.

C: 这…我要是不给，大家又会说我吝啬，给外邦人不给自家人，生意不就更差了吗！
E: I... If I didn't, they would just call me miserly, offering bread to outlanders but refusing my countrymen... Business would be even worse then!

C: 这种局面当然不能来者不拒，所以外邦人想进入圣城，必须在抽签中获得资格才行。
E: We can't turn them away of course, so if the outlanders wish to enter the city, they'll have to draw lots to qualify.

C: 而且我相信，经过这次接触，我们对外邦人的了解也会更进一步。
E: And I believe that with this interaction, we understand the outlanders' plight better.

C: 我的腿…它还在吗？我有些…没知觉了……
E: My leg... Is it still there? I can't... seem to feel it...

C: 这个商贩似乎是一夜间冒出来的，你不记得自己在集市上见过她。
E: This shopkeeper appears to have popped up overnight, since you don't remember seeing her at the market.

C: 我看看…钱数没错。稍等，我帮你打包一下。
E: Let's see... This is the right amount. Hold on, I'll help you pack the food.

C: 不止你有这份疑惑：作为公民，为什么我要冒着失去一切的风险，去帮助一群陌生人呢？
E: You're not the only one with this question: As a citizen, why did I risk everything to help a bunch of strangers?

C: 在一片沉默中，门口的卫兵走了进来。
E: The cell's guard enters, cutting through that thick silence.

C: …小灰毛，我原以为你身为外邦英雄，在诸位公民面前必有高论——没想到，竟然如此胡搅蛮缠！
E: ...Gray Hair, you're supposed to be an outlander hero who must have something grandiose to say before the people. I never figured you for a jabbering troublemaker!

C: 哼，众所周知，偷盗犯法，何况是把管控品倒卖给外邦人——这怎么能算善举呢？明明是罪加一等才对。
E: Hmph, as everyone knows, theft is a crime, let alone selling regulated goods to outlanders. How can this be considered a benevolent act? There should be another charge slapped on top of his crime.

C: 拉莱德放着狠话，公民们却陷入了沉思。说到底，这不过是在衡量得失罢了，没人愿意见到双输的局面。
E: Liluder's harsh words hang in the air, but the citizens are deep in their own thoughts. Fundamentally speaking, it is but a matter of evening out loss and gain — no one wishes for a lose-lose situation.

C: 破坏社会风气？他也干了。
E: Undermine societal values? He has done so already.

C: 帕里斯？奥赫玛城中确实有过这样一位城民，应该是戍卫队的一员。
E: Paris? There is indeed no citizen of Okhema by this name. I imagine they are a member of the garrison.

C: …什么玩意儿？
E: ...What the heck?

C: 不用谢我，帕里斯。若不是你挽回了我险些断于黑潮的命运之丝，我的这份善良也无处可施……
E: No need to thank me, Paris. If you had not saved my thread of fate from being cut off by the black tide, this kindness would have already been lost...

C: 嗨，梅塔涅拉婆婆，最近生意还好吗？
E: Hey, Granny Metanella. How's business?

C: 这次能来点有效信息吗？
E: Will we get any information this time?

C: 蜕生金丝……
E: Golden Thread of Rebirth...

C: 姑娘，离愁时快到了，走吧！
E: It's almost the Parting Hour, girl! Come on!

C: 我早就听说这小子玩得花，原来还有这种癖好，嘿嘿嘿……
E: I had always heard that guy was a playboy. So, he's into that stuff too, hehehe...

C: 战争的孩子，为何对此熟视无睹？快快迈入这沙场，无论投身哪一边——
E: Child of war, why do you turn a blind eye? Join in the battle. It matters not for what side...

C: …我在卡拉培先生的书上学了炊事。我能做出迷倒人类的食物，能为帕里斯烹饪美味的佳肴。
E: ...I learned to cook from Mister Calpe's books. I can create dishes that humans love and prepare delicious recipes for my Paris.

C: 姑娘她，怎么会…我们明明约好了……
E: That girl, she... How could... We made a promise...

C: 在记忆的更深处，传来了枷锁的碰撞声……
E: From the depths of the memory comes the clash of shackles...

C: 答得漂亮！你已经成功把自己的大脑变得晕晕乎乎的。根据等待第二定律，你对时间的感知将会加快到光速的<unbreak>99</unbreak>％。
E: Nice answer! You managed to get yourself all dizzy. According to the Second Law of Waiting, your perception of time will be accelerated to <unbreak>99%</unbreak> the speed of light.

C: 这里的字都快绕成一圈了，头好晕……
E: The writing on this page is practically swirling in circles. I'm so dizzy...

C: 沉睡的欧洛尼斯时常会将命运藏在呓语中，它们穿过天帷，成为常人无法捕捉的声音。我能听到它的梦呓，并从中解读出谕示。
E: The slumbering Oronyx often conceals fate within their murmurs. The murmurs traverse the celestial veil and become sounds beyond the reach of ordinary people. I can hear their murmurs and glean prophecies from them.

C: 那座天上的圣城，就连站都站不稳的你们，要如何抵达？
E: You all can barely stand on your two feet. How will you reach the holy city that's high above?

C: 原来是这样解决的吗？
E: Is that how it was resolved?

C: 但无论如何，我仍想找到那位眷属，从它的口中得到答案——我挣脱了命运吗？还是连挣扎本身也是命运的一部分？
E: But no matter what, I am determined to find that kin and seek the answer — Am I truly free from my destiny, or is my struggle for freedom itself a part of my destiny?

C: 唔，好刺耳…你也小心一点为好。
E: Ugh, it's hurting my ears... You should be more careful too.

C: 嗯！如果真有那一天，我会像翁法罗斯的英雄们一样挺身而出，保护磐岩镇的大家。
E: Yeah! If that day ever comes, I'll stand tall like the heroes of Amphoreus and protect everyone in Boulder Town!

C: 翁星翻覆千轮事，《如我所书》见真章。欲知后事如何，请听下回分解！
E: Through countless cycles of upheaval, As I've Written reveals the truth of Amphoreus. Want to know what happens next? Stay tuned for the next chapter!

C: 你知道的，匹诺康尼是一座被糖浆包裹的国度。我担心对于梦里的人们，英雄史诗太过沉重。
E: As you know, Penacony is a realm wrapped in syrup. I worry that epic tales of heroes might be too heavy for those living in dreams.

C: 拜托…呜呜，同伴，危险危险，呜——！！
E: Please... Wooo... Danger! Woo!

C: 而我刚制作出来没多久的原型机<unbreak>159</unbreak>…虽然我已经限制过她自主思考的权限，但她的学习能力与速度还是远超常人。
E: And I just made Prototype <unbreak>159</unbreak>... Although I have limited her capacity to think independently, she learns better and faster than most.

C: 但总感觉大家并没有把我当成他们的同类…而他们说的很多话题，我也不知道该如何参与进去，只好站在旁边把自己想象成空气。
E: However, I got the feeling that they did not see me as one of them... and they spoke about a lot of things that I had no knowledge of. All I could do was stand there and pretend I don't exist.

C: 啊？你教我？但我看你……
E: Really? Coach me? But you look...

C: 你可真是个大聪明。
E: You really are a smartypants.

C: 我今晚有个研讨会，其他科室的人都会过来…那个…我忘词的话，还是得麻烦你远程协助协助我了！
E: I've got a workshop tonight, and people from other departments will be coming over... Um... If I forget something, can you please help me remotely? Okay?

C: 是这样的——
E: It's like this—

C: 算了，你直接说一下刚刚的情况，我看看究竟是怎么回事。
E: Never mind. Just tell me what happened, and I'll see what might be the cause.

C: 我最近在收集空间站怪谈——由于空间站奇物众多，且科员研究思路多变，二者碰撞之下，产生了许多…奇怪的实验。
E: I've been collecting ghost stories from the space station... We have lots of Curios in the space station, and our researchers are constantly changing their research directions. When these two clash, they can result in many... odd experiments.

C: 有一天夜里…我的这个朋友听到了科室防盗门发出奇怪的声音……
E: One night, this friend of mine heard the department's security door make this weird sound...

C: 呃？我在等我们科室的人来开会，可你…看着不像我们科室的人呀，你是不是认错人了？
E: Huh? I'm waiting for people from my department to turn up for a meeting. But you... You don't look like you're from my department. Did you find the wrong person?

C: 我想看看，在空间站的灯光下这两种发色是什么效果，哪种发色会更适合我…唔，麻烦你帮个忙吧。
E: I want to see what these colors look like under the space station's lights, and which color would suit me better... Hmm, could you please lend a hand?

C: 乖乖你来了，上次那个染头发的事真的很抱歉……
E: Ohhh, there you are. I'm so sorry about that business with my hair last time...

C: …但如果不买，我就只能戴着这副框架眼镜去聚会了，这样又太老气了。
E: ...However, if I don't buy it, I'll have to wear this pair of wired glasses to the party. That's too old-fashioned.

C: 啊，我确实有件事想找人帮忙来着……
E: Ahh, I do have something I want help with...

C: 我能看出来，你的探险经历很丰富，对吧？如果可以的话…我能委托你去城郊雪原寻找野生动物留下的痕迹吗？
E: I can tell that you have a lot of experience adventuring, right? If possible... Could I ask you to head to the outlying Snow Plains and find traces of wild animals?

C: 雪原上留下了和狗相近的脚印，一直向前，几乎没有改变方向或者步伐。数量上应该是两到三只。
E: There are footprints in the snow, similar to that of a dog. The footprints continue forward without changing direction. From the looks of it, there are two or three of them.

C: 短期来看，我似乎有机会一跃进入上流社会！但是莱家树敌无数，在政坛缺乏根基。一旦莱家失势，或者华劳斯被莱家抛弃……
E: In the short term, I'd be in with a chance of joining the upper classes! But the Limesteins have so many enemies, and no real foundation in political circles. If they were to lose their influence, or if Wallace were to be discarded by his family...

C: 我欣赏你的自信。
E: I admire your confidence.

C: 照片？什么照片？给我看看……
E: Photo? What photo? Let me see...

C: 不愧是贵族家的少爷，真是含蓄又不失优雅的表达方式啊…我等不及要和他见上一面了！
E: Mr. Wallace is indeed different. He uses a subtle and elegant way to convey that message... I can't wait to meet him!

C: 我想知道他是谁，从何而来，又经历过什么。至少，我想明白自己与对方的鸿沟落在哪里……
E: I want to know who he is, where he comes from and what he has been through. At least I want to understand the gap between us...

C: 结果，街道上到处都是飞散的纸条。收到这么多信件，我当然很高兴啦，但也很担心会给大人们添麻烦。
E: As a result, there are now pieces of paper flying around the streets everywhere. Of course I am happy to get so many letters, but I'm also worried that this may become a problem for others.

C: 阿丽娜不想看到大家挨罚。拜托了，{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}，可以在娜塔莎姐姐发现之前，帮我找到那只「信鸽」吗？
E: I don't want people to be punished. Can you please find that pigeon before Natasha finds out?

C: 喂，{NICKNAME}！快过来——安静点，别发出声音！
E: Hey, {NICKNAME}! Come over here — don't make any sound!

C: 向你致敬，尤利安队长！
E: Hats off to you, Captain Julian!

C: 好，就先送它了！哎，明天又要腰酸背疼了……
E: Well, I'll deliver this one first! Ugh, my back is gonna hurt tomorrow...

C: 好了好了，动嘴不如动腿，咱们快去「地火」的地盘上探探情报吧！
E: Alright alright, that's enough chat. Time to go to Wildfire's turf and gather some intel!

C: 你应该懂吧？派送这活需要消耗大量的人力，光凭我手下的那些人，就算日夜连轴转也没法保证整个下层区的物资供应。
E: You get it, right? Delivery requires a lot of hands. Even if my people work <unbreak>24</unbreak>/7, they couldn't guarantee the supply of the whole of Underworld.

C: …好啦，这样就行了。希望他醒来以后能记得把包裹带上……
E: ...Okay, this should do it. Hope he still remembers he has a package when he wakes up.

C: …怎么说我也是铁卫的后勤官，居然要被你这种小年轻嘲笑，唉……
E: ... As the logistics officer of the Guard, I can't believe I am actually laughed at by a young {F#lady}{M#man} like you, alas...

C: 原来如此，是要送给一位年轻的女士啊……
E: I see...

C: 当然！我这就帮您挑上几株……
E: Sure! One moment, please.

C: 开个玩笑而已，别生气嘛。既然你帮我做了这么多事，那这次就算我雷金错了！是我不好，对不起！
E: We're just kidding around, so don't get mad. You've done so much for me, and this time it's my bad! Y'hear me? I'm sorry!

C: 喔，靠谱！快给我讲讲，他们这次出了什么题刁难你？
E: My word! Tell me then, what questions did they throw at you this time?

C: 我想接受测验。
E: Yeah. I wanna take the quiz.

C: 考我。
E: Test me.

C: 那我当然不能让您失望。正好，我这边准备了一些进阶的测验题目，您要不要试试？
E: Then I absolutely cannot let you down. I just so happen to have some advanced quiz questions right here with me. Would you like to give them a try?

C: 我义不容辞！
E: Then I will do my best!

C: 没问题。
E: No problem.

C: 哈哈，公益组织不就是义务为人做好事嘛。
E: Hahaha, aren't charitable organizations all about doing good deeds for free?

C: 加入之后有什么好处？
E: What are the benefits of joining?

C: 不加入的话，你会放我走吗？
E: Are you going to let me go if I refuse to join?

C: 但…还是请你帮忙问问看吧。兴许他发现不了呢！
E: But... please ask your friend for a favor anyways! Maybe the chief editor won't notice!

C: 他说他写不出来，交不了稿。
E: He says he's having trouble writing and can't hand in the manuscript.

C: 好啊，但为什么？
E: Okay, but why?

C: 哈哈，先拍照吧，拍完我就告诉你。
E: Hahaha, just take the photo. I'll tell you afterwards.

C: 拍完了？多谢！那就来让我看看……
E: You're done? Thank you! Let me have a look...

C: 嘿，要的就是你这种反应。其他社员一听我要请喝茶，都以为我是想趁机推销呢，全都拔腿就跑……
E: Aha, that's a reaction I like. The other members all ran away when they heard I wanted to treat them to tea... They thought I'm trying to sell something to them.

C: 嗯…工作是工作，生活是生活嘛。其实……
E: Mmm... Well, life is different from work.

C: 在那之后，便陆陆续续能够收到贝洛伯格银行的传信…似乎是那小子为我挣的生活费，嚯嚯嚯。
E: I periodically get letters from the Bank of Belobog... Those seem to be money sent to me by my son, hahaha.

C: 那你摆个姿势吧，要拍了哦——
E: Well, do a pose then. Here I go~

C: 难道说——我变成裂界里的怪物了吗？但不对呀，照片里好像不是我站着的地方……
E: Did I... become a Fragmentum monster? No. This place in the photo isn't where I was...

C: 总之——谢谢你啦，{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}！
E: Thank you anyways!

C: 据我目测，这套护具的防护效率应该远高于我们现有的制服…可能有两倍不止！
E: As far as I can tell, the protection offered by this gear is much higher than our current uniform... Maybe twice as much!

C: 总之，麻烦你去海滩上走一遭了。
E: Either way, please do another patrol across the beach for me.

C: 你写了一封感人至深的书信，教会了一个人如何在困境中汲取力量。有时候，一句打动人心的话语，能远远胜过物质上的援助。
E: You write an inspiring letter about harnessing power from adversity. Sometimes, a heartfelt word can be far more impactful than material assistance.

C: 哎，如果你又发现了类似的情况，<color=#dbc291ff>你可以自己处理掉，或者你不放心的话，仍然可以交给我们。</color>
E: Ahh. Well, if you come across anything similar, <color=#dbc291ff>you can deal with it yourself, or hand it over to us, should you feel uneasy.</color>

C: （将捡到的信交给阿浮）
E: (Hand the letter you picked up to Fulie)

C: （这就是跃渊巡逻的区域，<color=#dbc291ff>要是发现了放生帮就去威慑他们，要是发现了放生对象就处理一下</color>…真是的，守护这片沙滩的人到底是谁呢？）
E: (This is Yueyuan's patrol area. <color=#dbc291ff>Drive away The Unshackled and take care of the things they release</color>... Honestly, who is protecting this beach?)

C: 你别管我，我偏要扔进海里！
E: Stay out of this. I WILL throw it into the ocean!

C: …但前面只是轻描淡写而已……
E: ...That's an understatement, if anything...

C: 如此天地精华，却被囚禁在这口小腹大的坛子里！我决不允许！只要我能将这五谷精华还于天地，那必然是大大大大功德一件啊！
E: This miraculous essence has been sealed away inside these tiny vessels! I cannot allow it! If I can just return this essence of grains to the world, it would be a great great GREAT merit!

C: 我没有什么兴趣，直接带走。
E: Not interested. I'll bring it along with me.

C: 说真的，我就只是想摆烂而已。
E: Honestly, I just want to stop working.
You...

C: 不可能，你身上又没有过敏反应。
E: I don't think so. You're not showing any allergic reactions.

C: 这「烈焰浓茶」新品，已经按照你先前的建议，保证「燃」味十足。
E: This is the new flavor for Flaming Potent Tea. I've followed your suggestions from last time, and this one is sure to lift your spirits with its spicy kick.

C: 你耐着心观察了片刻，确认的确没出现什么异样。
E: You wait patiently for a while to make sure you're not experiencing any abnormal side effects.

C: 抱歉是我打嗝了嗝嗝。
E: Nothing. I just *burp* hiccuped. *burp* *burp*

C: 由此无数的哲思涌现，其精妙媲美「理性」之源。
E: The philosophies that stemmed from these moments are almost as intricate as the source of reason.

C: 从此他看见天上有两个太阳。
E: From this day, he saw two suns in the sky.

C: 在这里——一切造物的中央，我们竟胆敢倾听、言说、探讨，
E: Here, at the center of all beings, we dare to listen, speak, and deliberate,

C: 有何贵干？
E: Is there something I can do for you?

C: 哦。
E: Oh.

C: 我来观晓命运如何黯淡。
E: I am here to see just how bleak fate is.

C: 事到如今，想要通过它的试炼竟还要借助<color=#dbc291ff>扎格列斯之手</color>，实在是讽刺。
E: It's quite ironic to think that even now, to overcome its challenges, you need the <color=#dbc291ff>Hand of Zagreus</color>.

C: 歌耳戈的长矛与欧利庞的长剑锋刃相接，如同两尊尼卡多利的分身沙场角力，血尘四散。
E: The spear of Gorgo and the blade of Eurypon clashed, and they struggled against each other on the battlefield like two clones of Nikador, as blood and dust streaked through the air.

C: 你记住了「激烈的修辞学论辩与那座看不见的城邦」
E: You remembered "The Intense Rhetorical Debate and that Unseeable City"

C: 「我只不过想把自己力所能及的事做好。」或许这份谦逊，就是那位庭院主人最值得被大家夸耀的骄傲。
E: "I'm only trying to do what I can within my limits." Perhaps this humility is the master's most admirable pride.

C: 耳畔仿佛传来了这样的低语：远道而来的开拓者啊，你能抵挡住登上王位的诱惑吗？
E: A faint whisper seems to echo in your ears: Oh, Trailblazer from afar, can you resist the temptation of ascending to the throne?

C: 「只懂得作战的莽夫，天谴之矛，尼卡多利；困于回忆的怯懦者，永夜之帷，欧洛尼斯；作茧自缚的大愚者，裂分之枝，瑟希斯……」
E: "Combat-brained brute, Nikador, the Lance of Fury. Coward shackled by memories, Oronyx, the Veil of Evernight. Great Fool trapped in the cocoon, Cerces, the Bough of Rift..."

C: 不错，这才是求学该有的态度。等着我的论文发表吧，你会在其中找到你的名字的。我保证！
E: Good choice. This is the attitude every true seeker of knowledge should have. Watch for my paper's publication — you'll find your name in it, I promise!

C: 哎呀，原来如此，你做这个小八音盒，就是想偷懒，让妈妈给你讲更多故事，对不对呀？
E: Ah, so that's what you're up to. You were making this music box to slack off so mommy would read you more stories, right?

C: 答应你的密道完工在即。若有朝一日他们发难，你尽可带着孩子逃走，我会暗中掩护。
E: Work on the secret tunnel that I promised you is almost complete. If they attack soon, you will be able to escape with your children. I will cover you from the shadows.

C: 唉，我们大家差不多都是这样。
E: Ah, we all feel much the same.

C: 别说话了，姐姐！你可是黄金裔啊！
E: Don't talk like that! You're a Chrysos Heir, remember?

C: 看来，不应该对你使用诱导式的提问。
E: Looks like I shouldn't have given leading questions.

C: 你坐下，群星般的光芒在你面前荡漾，水波璀璨，空气中仿佛有阵阵回响。
E: As you sit down, the light of the stars begins to ripple before you, the waves shine, and the air seems to resonate with echoes.

C: 嗯…有位织者爱开玩笑。金丝带来消息，它正扒在<color=#dbc291ff>某个房间的帷幕上</color>，假装遇险吓唬人玩呢。
E: Hmm... there's a Weaver who loves to joke. The golden threads bring word that the Weaver's hanging on <color=#dbc291ff>a curtain in a room</color>, pretending to be in peril just to startle others.

C: 果然，真正的英雄不需要预言也能找到自己的路。您真是帮大忙了，贵客！
E: As expected, true heroes don't need prophecies to find their own path. You've been a great help!

C: o((='ω´= )っ「秘酿虽好，也不要贪杯欧！」)∋
E: o((='ω´= )っ "Ambrosia's all well and good, but everything in moderation!" )∋

C: 逃避失败的灵活身法。
E: Mad skills in dodging failure.

C: o((◣'ω´◢ ╬)o「那我问你！你是小海豹还是人类…」)∋
E: o((◣'ω´◢ ╬)o "Lemme ask you first! Are you a baby seal or a human?" )∋

C: 我怎么又来看冠军赛了。
E: Why am I here for the finals again?

C: 上好的武器，我带来了。保卫奥赫玛，我与诸位勇士一同。
E: Fine weapons, I've brought them here. To protect Okhema, I stand with the brave warriors.

C: 你是最温柔最伟大的医师！
E: You are the most gentle and magnificent healer ever!

C: 给我留个彩虹桥吧，还想见你。
E: Save me a rainbow bridge, I still want to see you again.

C: 吞食大地的蛆虫，别用你们的触足玷污天空！
E: Earth-eating worms, don't soil the sky with your limbs!

C: 生生世世，世世代代，为何仍在岁月的溪流里踽踽独行。
E: ...life after life, age after age, why still wander alone in time's river?

C: 面朝大海，春暖花开…旁边还摆着不知谁人的钓竿。
E: Facing the sea, the flowers bloom in spring... and someone's fishing rod lies waiting nearby.

C: 你闭上眼睛，等待了好一会儿…什么都没有发生。
E: You shut your eyes and wait... and wait... but nothing happens.

C: 「吟风爵」维吉妮娅，生于光历<unbreak>3853</unbreak>年，逝于光历<unbreak>3960</unbreak>年。
E: "Dux Carminum" Verginia. Born Light Calendar <unbreak>3853</unbreak>. Deceased Light Calendar <unbreak>3960</unbreak>.

C: 因为现在树庭的学者们正在气头上，打算把那刻夏老师吊起来。
E: Because the scholars of the Grove are currently very upset and are planning to hang Professor Anaxa.

C: 「或许是恐惧造物可能优于造物主，泰坦才吝于为它们增添智慧，却不知那憨钝可爱的个性正铸成了大地兽较之泰坦更为高尚自洽的品格……」
E: "Perhaps out of fear that their creations might surpass them, the Titans withheld wisdom from their creatures. Little did they know that such simplicity and charm would forge a nobler, more harmonious spirit in the dromas than in the Titans themselves..."

C: 希望我没有让你们等太久。
E: Hope I didn't keep you waiting too long.

C: 如今贴身陪伴着黄金裔们的，不过是她神性的碎片罢了。
E: What now accompanies the Chrysos Heirs are just fragments of her divinity.

C: 看来你注意到了，应星手上的游龙臂鞲跟你手上的出自同一名工匠，是*同一对*。
E: So you noticed. The Roaming Dragon Bracer on Yingxing's arm and the one on yours were made by the same craftsman. They're a matching pair.

C: 在我醒来时，它和「击云」、玉佩一同伴身，我想它应该对我有过特殊的意义。
E: When I woke up, it was there alongside Cloud-Piercer and the jade pendant. I suppose it must have held some special meaning to me.

C: 我始终潜藏在「记忆」的黑色瀑流之后看着你们，注视着你们行进中的「开拓」。
E: I've always been lurking behind the dark torrents of "Remembrance," watching all of you, observing your "Trailblaze" as you progress.

C: 此路不通哦…
E: This is a dead end...

C: 不要紧的，如果大家找不到，我还有别的办法…虽说花费在这种事上有点遗憾，但总不能让列车长一直烦恼下去啊。
E: Don't worry, I have another way to deal with this if no one can find anything... It's just a little wasteful to use it on something like this. But we can't let it continue to stress the conductor either.

C: 噢，还没有自我介绍……
E: Oh, I haven't introduced myself yet...

C: 所以我想还是和你打声招呼比较好！我注意到你还接受过「窃忆者」的概念——忆庭可不希望你把我们当成小偷或窃贼！我们所做的一切，都是为了崇高的目的。
E: That's why I thought it'd be best if I introduced myself to you! I noticed that you've also received the concept of Memosnatchers... The Garden of Recollection wouldn't want you to mistake us for thieves or crooks! Everything we do is for a higher purpose.

C: 我们要让宇宙不会因「毁灭」而遭到忘却。
E: We want to prevent the universe from being forgotten because of the Destruction.

C: 哼，那我就只好封锁了他们的这段记忆——抱歉，但我没得选。
E: Hmph, then I'll have to seal this portion of their memories — I'm sorry, but I don't have a choice.

C: 是啊。我只能借着人们的记忆活动。我的每一次出现，移动，消失，都是在读取某人的记忆啊。
E: Yes. I'm only able to move around due to the memories of others. Every time I appear, move, or disappear, it means I'm reading someone's memories.

C: 为什么我的记忆很宝贵？
E: Why are my memories precious?

C: 进入「忘却之庭」。
E: Enter the Forgotten Hall.

C: 关于之前的演练…
E: About the previous drills...

C: 行动的目标和上次一样…扫、扫荡残响回廊，击败所有徘徊的敌人。
E: Our target is the same as last time: Ch—Charge the Corridor of Fading Echoes and defeat all the enemies lurking there.

C: 噢，你们是说我那个灰扑扑的罐头吗？
E: Oh, you guys are talking about that dusty gray can of mine?

C: 查到「管家」的下落了？
E: You've found the butler's whereabouts?

C: 管家大人，这是真的吗？
E: Mister Butler, is this real?

C: 我生而高贵，有阮•梅女士对我的赞赏就够了！
E: I am high-born, and it is enough that I receive praise from Miss Ruan Mei!

C: 我就算倒下了，门禁系统也不会让你过的。
E: Even if I am down, the access control system will still not let you pass.

C: 你怎么偷看我？
E: Why are you peeking at me?

C: 哇…是新同伴的故事吗？那位很像是…很像是什么的学士……
E: Wow... Is this the story of the new companion? That one who... looks like a scholar of some kind...

C: 宿敌。
E: Archenemies.

C: 人家在消食，想找你去散步呢。中午的阳光很好，你试试就知道，特别舒服！
E: I'm digesting my meal right now, and I was hoping to invite you along for a walk. The midday sunshine is lovely — C'mon, try it, you'll see how comfy it feels!

C: 被掌控！难道我们现在也…呀，如果是因为被掌控才遇到了{NICKNAME}，那人家倒是不讨厌被掌控呢！
E: Controlled!? Could it be that we're already...? Ah, if it's because I was controlled that I met {NICKNAME}, then I suppose I wouldn't mind being controlled!

C: 故事总有句点。
E: Every story has a conclusion.

C: （一声赞赏的*哼*）
E: (Let out an appreciative grunt)

C: 今天还有武器测试吗？
E: Are there weapon tests today?

C: 可是我深表怀疑——毕竟它实在是太丑了。
E: But I doubt it. After all, they are too ugly.

C: 将穷人的钱聚集起来赌运气？
E: So it's pooling together money from the poor to gamble?

C: 稍等，我还有点事。
E: Just a moment. I have something else to do.

C: 有什么事吗？
E: What's up?

C: 真的吗？我不信。
E: Oh yeah? I don't believe you.

C: …可恶。
E: ...Darn you.

C: 可以，但是我的奖励呢？
E: Sure, but where's my reward?

C: 准备好了么，我们继续下棋吧。
E: Are you ready? Let's resume playing.

C: 最近，我试图解读这些预言，发现它被一股未知的力量遮蔽了起来，仅凭我自己无法解开。所以，我需要你的协助……
E: I've tried to interpret these prophecies recently and discovered they were obscured by an unknown force, which I can't unravel alone. Therefore, I need your assistance...

C: 嗯…有位织者想要成为雅努斯的祭司，为此潜心修炼。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>看台的环形装饰边上</color>，练习穿墙呢。不知道它能否成功。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who aspires to become a priest of Janus and trains diligently for the role. The golden thread brings tidings: They now stand <color=#dbc291ff>by the ring decorations in the bleachers</color>, practicing the art of wall penetration. I wonder if they have succeeded.

C: 金丝在人台周围凝聚，构成了一个包裹它身体的茧。
E: The golden thread solidifies around the mannequin, creating a cocoon that envelops it.

C: 再见，期待你的好消息。
E: Goodbye, I await good news from you.

C: 我奈何不了你…但是塔兰顿一定会惩罚你！
E: I may not be a match for you... but Talanton will surely punish you!

C: 您要是想装出一副同情我的模样，再假惺惺地劝我从良，那可大可不必。
E: If you're thinking of pretending to empathize with me, then pretentiously persuading me to turn over a new leaf, you can save it.

C: 献出片刻生命，本身就有价值。
E: Every sacrifice, even the briefest moment of life, carries meaning.

C: 欸，您这说的什么话！我巴特鲁斯当然是真心被您折服，只愿从今以后服侍您棒前球后！
E: Come now, such suspicion! I, Bartholos, am genuinely in awe — eager to serve at your command!

C: 啊…好可怜哦…（无动于衷）
E: Ah... poor thing... *Shows no sympathy*

C: 您就拿着这卷纸考究去吧，我去掏掏那帮朝圣者的兜好了。像{RUBY_B#诡计之泰坦}扎格列斯{RUBY_E#}老祖说的——
E: You take this scroll here and go investigate, and I'll go rifle through those pilgrims' pockets. Just like venerable old {RUBY_B#Trickery Titan}Zagreus{RUBY_E#} said:

C: 他们原本被元老院的某些人骗来和刻律德菈阁下作对；但由于那几个元老已然被抓住处刑，这些人突然之间成了一群无家可归的流浪者。
E: They had been tricked by a few members of the Council of Elders into going up against Lady Cerydra. But those elders were captured and executed, and the mercenaries suddenly became lost homeless people with nowhere to go.

C: 无妨，若是什么时候有兴趣了，回来找我就行。
E: That's fine. If you ever feel interested, come back and find me.

C: 哦？辅祭也有欲寻之物？当然可以。你知道的，提出委托本应经过层层审批——
E: Oh? Does the acolyte also have something to seek? Of course, you know that submitting a request usually requires several approvals —

C: 这东西就别放在火种匣里了！
E: Why even bother keeping this in the Coreflame Casket!

C: 我就是为了不上战场才来当祭司的，这些事情…对我来说果然还是太勉强了。
E: I became a priest so I wouldn't have to fight on the battlefield. This... This is just too much for me.

C: 我明白，事态紧急，{NICKNAME}阁下一定有更重要的事去做。愿天父庇佑您！
E: I understand. The situation is urgent everywhere. You must have more pressing matters to attend to. {NICKNAME}, may the sky father guide you!

C: 啊，这是！！！
E: Ah... This is—!!!

C: 总之，这是一次筹划已久的版本升级：更长的流程，更多的内容，更好的奖励，以及更诡异的难度曲线——所以做好准备，再回到「模拟宇宙」去吧。
E: In a nutshell, this is a long-scheduled version update with longer gameplay, more content, better rewards, and a more bizarre difficulty curve — so get ready and prepare to get back into the Simulated Universe!

C: 因为战斗是最能展示命途倾向的行为。只有通过与命途的连接，才能把我们设计好的虚拟「星神」召唤出来。这些家伙虽然没什么本事，麻烦程度上却一点不比本尊逊色……
E: Because combat is the best way to demonstrate which Path one is likely to walk. We can only summon those simulated Aeons we designed when there's a connection to a Path. Those creatures don't have any special powers, but are as much a real pain in the butt as the actual gods...

C: 「喂！怎么回事——」黑塔的声音传来，「你的脑波有点不对劲，喂——」
E: "Hey! What's going on..." You hear Herta's voice. "There's something wrong with your brainwaves. Hey..."

C: 正式版本体验怎么样？你要是觉得简单，可以去挑战下个世界。
E: How's your experience with the official version? If you find it easy, you can go challenge the next world.

C: 它没准能给你测试模拟宇宙带来一些帮助和动力…但也可能有点多余，我说不好。
E: It may help and motivate you with your test of the Simulated Universe... But it could also be a bit redundant. Well, I'm not sure.

C: 寒气浮上背脊，一层烟雾罩住你的眼睛——异象并不陌生，它来自「记忆」的星神浮黎，但这一次没有停留。星神好像没有注意到你，祂的消失与出现同样毫无征兆。
E: Cold air creeps up your back, and a layer of smoke covers your eyes — This is a familiar scene from Fuli, the Aeon of Remembrance, but this time THEY did not stop. The Aeon doesn't seem to notice you, and THEIR disappearance is just as mysterious as THEIR appearance.

C: 好吧，再见黑塔。
E: Alright. Goodbye, Herta.

C: 准备好了就按这个按钮，机器会将你传送到第一世界。
E: Press this button when you're ready and the machine will teleport you to World 1.

C: 我感觉越来越像游戏了…
E: This is feeling more and more like a real game...

C: …祂为何而诞育？
E: ...Why were THEY born?

C: 「这是在做什么？」她皱眉，「我培育的宇宙土壤十分稳定，我想<color=#dbc291ff>毁灭不可能会出现在这里</color>。」
E: "What are you doing?" Ruan Mei frowns. "The soil of the universe I cultivate is very stable. I believe <color=#dbc291ff>Destruction will never appear here</color>."

C: 你静待在原地，渴望觐见神的到来。但时间缓慢流逝…什么也没发生。你感觉自己的头发在脱落，生命在流逝…你的脑内开始浮现这样一种场景：由于祂的哺育，你稀疏的头发开始疯狂生长，缠绕住你的手腕与脚脖……你近乎得意地大笑起来。
E: You wait in place, eagerly hoping to meet the god. However, time goes by slowly, and nothing happens. You feel hair starting to fall, and your life is passing away... A scene pops up in your mind where your thinning hair starts growing wildly and becomes long enough to wrap around your wrists and ankles as a result of the Aeon's nurturing... You nearly laugh out loud in elation.

C: …也许我还可以问问阮•梅。
E: ...Maybe I can ask Ruan Mei about it.

C: 在曼德勒岛上的医院，你的耳朵被聒噪的啼哭充斥…新生儿的数量达到有史以来的峰值；此后几日，它们冲出孤岛，于是大拉铂尔星各地的天空中都开始出现「虫潮」。
E: At the hospital on Mandalan Island, your ears are filled with raucous cries... The number of newborns has peaked at an all-time high. In the days that follow, they rushed out of the isolated island, and as a result, Swarms emerge in the skies all over Lapole Major.

C: 血腥味钻进你的鼻腔——你突然惊醒！你发现自己身处一场前所未有的大屠杀中，这是一切的伊始，如果现在停下还来得及。可惜，没有人会按下暂停……
E: The scent of blood pierces your nostrils, jolting you awake! You find yourself amidst an unprecedented massacre and the onset of all that was to follow. If only everything could halt at this instant, but regrettably, no one can freeze the passage of time...

C: 你以为你能置身事外？别做梦了！你总得学会自保…无论是在战场上，还是在人生中。
E: You think you can stay out of this? Think again! You must learn to defend yourself... both on the battlefield and in your life.

C: 它在遇到你前有着幸福的一生。
E: It had a happy life before it met you.

C: 之后你就可以正式探索「寰宇蝗灾」了。
E: Then, you can start exploring the Swarm Disaster.

C: 「他的生意会有人接管。」法恩莎说，「不会影响我们与无机生命的交情。」
E: "Someone will take over his business. My relationship with the inorganic lives won't be affected," Farnsha says.

C: 认知拓宽：「受难的*慈父*」•其二
E: Broadened Cognition: The Suffering *Father* (II)

C: 继续战斗。
E: Keep fighting.

C: 比邪恶更纯粹，比恐怖更直接，你亲吻这片星辰，你曾经效忠的帝国，为他们带来无与伦比的美妙体验。
E: Purer than any evil, and blunter than the fear itself, you kiss the stars. This empire that you once served — time to bring them an experience unparalleled in its beauty.

C: 送给他崩解的笑。
E: Flash him a disintegrating smile.

C: 没准儿是恶作剧。
E: This may just be a prank.

C: 毁灭铭记了一切。
E: Destruction will remember everything.

C: 你将意识变得比肉体更轻，向更高处飘去。阻断逃逸的引力锁住你的躯干，撕裂你的心脏。而你终于瞥见了那道伤痕，毁灭的爆炸撕裂的漩涡。
E: You allow your consciousness to grow lighter than your body and ascend to greater heights. Gravity stops your escape as it locks down your trunk and pulls apart your heart. Then, you finally glimpse the scar, the vortex torn into being from the explosion of Destruction.

C: 像一根银针。
E: Like a needle.

C: 这是你的第一百二十七次醒来。你抬起手，细密的鳞片提醒你这次的物种身份。学者哼着歌谣走向你——「每天早上一醒来～有个角色在等待～F<unbreak>0078</unbreak>，今天感觉如何？」
E: This is your <unbreak>127</unbreak>th awakening. As you raise your hand, the tight network of scales that cover it allows you to identify the species you have been assigned this time. The scholar hums as they walk towards you: "A new character awaits every time you awake~ F<unbreak>0078</unbreak>, how do you feel today?"

C: 你的族群信仰一个传说，所有个体都诞生于混沌，直到「博识尊」说要有光，于是便有了光。
E: Your race believes in a legend, that all things were born from chaos. It was not until Nous said that there should be light that light was born into the world.

C: 当你想预测<unbreak>013</unbreak>文明的终点时，「权杖」失灵了。它给出的未来是一团乱码，如果使用权杖去解密这团代码，运算将会陷入衔尾蛇悖论。
E: When you try to predict the end of Civilization <unbreak>013</unbreak>, the Scepter malfunctions. The future it predicts is a mess of code that, if you try to decipher with the Scepter itself, the calculations will cause a paradoxical loop.

C: 我没见过。
E: I have not.

C: 这次你没有说话，但沉默也是一种回答。
E: This time, you allow your silence to answer for you.

C: 「宇宙缺少恒星，就像人丢掉心脏。不过别担心，这只是因为光线绕过了这片能量密集区。」学士看出了你的紧张。
E: "A universe without stars would be like a human without a heart. But fear not, this is just because the light bypasses this area of dense energy." The scholar notices your nerves.

C: 你的通讯仪响了，是技术研发部的通知，公司高层已经决定建造第二座巨帆。
E: Your transmitter sounds, and it is a notification from the Technology Department. IPC's higher-ups have already approved the construction of a second sail.

C: 倒一杯黑葡萄牛奶。
E: Pour a cup of blackcurrant milk.

C: 判定「自我认知」 - 我是无机体。
E: Determining "intra-cognition" - I am inorganic.

C: 只要有利可图，他们可以把红定义成蓝，白定义成黑。如若如此，那每个人都应有定义知识的权力！
E: As long as it benefits them, they can say that red is blue and black is white! If that's the case, then everyone should have the right to define what knowledge is!

C: 鲁珀特二世死了，自我加冕走向了终结。如果他思考继续下去会怎样？走出知识圆圈，创造出一个<color=#dbc291ff>知识奇点</color>，改写宇宙知识定义的反生命方程……
E: Rubert II died, and his self-appointed reign came to an end. What if his thought had continued? If he had left the Circle of Knowledge and created a <color=#dbc291ff>Knowledge Singularity</color>, rewriting the antilife equation that alters the definition of universal knowledge...

C: 帕提维娅趴在地上，发疯似的寻找能刻下公式的地方，她攥住生锈的铁片，刨开花簇，拼命在金属上留下脑中转瞬即逝的奥秘，那道涟漪。她无法通晓公式的含义，只是凭借仅剩的记忆，在精疲力竭前，将它们写满坟场的每个角落。
E: Patavia lies face down on the ground, maniacally searching for a place to carve down the formulae she had seen. She grabs a rusty iron sheet, peels open the bouquet of flowers, noting down the truths that are escaping out of her mind by the second, that wave of ripple, as if her life depends on it. She cannot grasp the meaning of the formula. She is merely relying on her lingering memories to scrawl them across every inch of the graveyard before succumbing to exhaustion.

C: 一个人的死亡，成为帝皇战争的导火索。一个变量的疏漏，反有机病毒将学派战争推向崩溃的边缘。一颗粒子的变化，爆炸湮灭了改变世界的灵感。只要施加一个微小的变量，未来就会截然不同，宇宙的面貌将幡然变改，群星将成为造物大锅中的混沌汤。
E: The death of one person becomes the spark for the Emperor's War. The oversight of one variable means the Anti-Organic Virus pushed the Scholars' Strife to the brink of destruction. The change in one particle causes an explosion that obliterates an inspiration to change the world. As long as an infinitesimal variable is added, the future would become vastly different, the face of the universe becomes radically altered, and the stars turn into a chaotic soup in the great cauldron of creation.

C: 「现在，你们还有什么把戏可玩？」波尔卡姿态闲适，面向你。尽管你的视线无法穿透遮覆其五官的面部认知滤网，但她轻轻的哼笑似乎出卖了心情。
E: "Now, what other tricks do you have up your sleeve?" Polka faces you with a relaxed posture. Although you cannot penetrate the facial recognition filter that's hiding her features, her muffled scoff seems to betray her mood.

C: 继续进食。
E: Continue feeding.

C: 你望向舱壁外，垂垂老矣的资助者，他甚至没有力气与你四目相对。
E: You look outside the pod at the aged man funding the operation. He doesn't even have the strength to look you in the eyes.

C: 不死是祝福，也是诅咒。
E: The blessing of immortality is also a curse.

C: 转圈圈！
E: Time to twirl!

C: 零分！
E: Zero points!

C: 「会唱生日快乐的莲花。共同的童年回忆，它无数次出现在梦里。」
E: "A lotus that can sing the Happy Birthday song. As a feature in everyone's childhood, it appears countless times in people's dreams."

C: 你相信，你的人生不需要探险。…当然更重要的是，你害怕在虫巢里直面塔█伊兹█ ██育█罗█ █斯██ 的█ █子嗣███ ████……
E: You believe your life doesn't need adventures... More importantly, you dread to face Tay█zzy█ ██ro█n█ █th██'s █ █childre███ ████...

C: 「闯进我的切片概率极小，高兴一些吧，我会给你些东西。」她说。「厉害的东西，但不免费。」
E: "The chance of breaching into my slice is slim, so you should be happy about this. I'll give you some things," she says, "good things. But they don't come for free."

C: 就在你思考是否要制造一个如同*信标着色剂*般鲜艳的醒目标识自救时，你听到了一阵古老而优美的歌谣——那声音犹如澄澈雨雾，仿若蜜茶浇灌着你。
E: As you are contemplating whether to save yourself by making an eye-catching sign as bright as the *Beacon Coloring Paste*, you hear an ancient and beautiful song - The song, as refreshing as the clear rain, soothes your soul like a pot of honey tea.

C: 骑士将圆盾给予你。
E: The knight gives you the round shield.

C: 「愿你信仰伊德莉拉。」纯美骑士虔诚地说。
E: "I hope you believe in Idrila," the Knight of Beauty says reverently.

C: 「带一个咕咕钟回去体验吧！」咕咕钟狂热爱好者说，「我保证你也会爱上咕咕钟。」
E: "Bring a cuckoo clock home and try using it!" The cuckoo clock fanatic says. "I'm sure you'll fall in love with cuckoo clocks."

C: 哼…你翻阅着星际和平手册对公司大人物的介绍。在*在田*的领导下，传统项目部已被嘲笑为「养老院」。*姆托尤因•拉杰•扎扎德*？她只会让「人才激励部」的家伙制作点小恩小惠的计划…你越来越猖獗、自信…「P<unbreak>-35</unbreak>」？不！你甚至觉得自己终有一日可以挑战「P<unbreak>-48</unbreak>」*疤眼夫人*！
E: Hmph... You flip through the overview of the IPC's big shots in the Interastral Peace Handbook. Under Arita's leadership, the Traditional Project Department has been mockingly dubbed the "retirement home." Mtooyin Raj Zazzad? She only knows how to come up with plans that award employees in the Talent Motivation Department with petty benefits... You become more and more audacious and confident... P<unbreak>-35</unbreak>? No! You believe you can even one day challenge level P<unbreak>-48</unbreak>, the *Madam Scarred Eye*!

C: 你站起身，发现自己掉在一个巢穴入口前。你拨开这个巢穴的门帘，认出了这些「鏖兜虫」：它们作为地面作战单位，以牺牲飞行能力为代价，获得了沉重的身躯与刚硬的甲壳。
E: You get to your feet and find yourself landing before the entrance of a lair. You draw the curtain open and recognize the Combatobugs. As ground combat units, they traded their flying abilities in exchange for heavy and rigid exoskeletons.

C: 你不慎一脚踏入高科技流线的悬空矩阵中——你相信这是斯诺星最*新式作风*的猎人才会使用的陷阱。
E: You accidentally step into a high-tech, streamlined suspended matrix — a trap you believe to be used only by the most cutting-edge hunter on the Planet Snowland.

C: 「一只陷入*自我*主义中的机械昆虫。」咔戎收起剪刀，悲哀地说，「快把它忘了罢。倒是有些它收集的宝石会遗留下来，赠予理发馆，挑一个纪念品带走吧。」
E: "It's a mechanical bug trapped in *egoism*." Charon puts away their scissors and says despondently. "You should forget about them. Some of the gems they collected were left behind and gifted to the Hair Salon. You can pick one as a keepsake."

C: 你浅尝辄止。
E: You try it out briefly.

C: 「我会让它的形式变得稍微…温和一些。」她绕过实验台，脚步宛如点水的蜻蜓。
E: "I'll make it take a slightly... milder form." She rounds the experiment bench in light footsteps.

C: 「基于归属权问题，任何威胁本机的行为，都将视作对星际和平公司的宣战——战斗模式启动。」
E: "Due to the ownership clauses, any threatening behavior towards this machine will be seen as a declaration of war against the IPC — battle mode activated."

C: 黑塔空间站。
E: Herta Space Station.

C: 「嘿嘿，我的毛茸茸。」你挠挠它的下巴，苍猿蜷缩成一小团，把你整个裹进厚重的毛发里，尾巴自在地在空中打转。
E: "Heh-heh, my fluffy." You scratch its chin. The ape curls into a ball, wrapping your entire body in a world of heavy fur, its tail whimsically twirling in the air.

C: 「我在搜集它们的信息素特征，理论上，可以在虫灾扩散前找到元凶。」
E: "I am collecting their pheromone signature. Theoretically, I should be able to find these culprits before the plague spreads."

C: 讲述惊奇的冒险。
E: Describe a wondrous adventure.

C: 好一块寿司！以豪情万丈的架势冲过了陨石障碍圈。当其他对手试图干扰它的飞行时，你隐约看到寿司里长出一只巨大的手臂，一拳将对方打得稀碎。
E: What a piece of sushi! Watch as it boldly speeds through the meteorite field. When other contestants try to obstruct its flying, you faintly see the sushi grow a massive arm and shatter its foes into splinters.

C: 飞船在原地一动不动，但引擎的火焰却没有消失。
E: The ship remains in place, but the flames from its engine just kept burning.

C: 「有趣的同僚。」愚者的身形跟着船体震荡摆动，「花色的面具，一场全宇宙的舞会，当然，是以游戏的形式，沿着以太网络，笑声传播的速度就像病毒。」
E: "Fun comrades." The figure of the Fool shivers and wobbles with the ship. "Multicolored masks. A ball for the entire universe. Of course, it's in the form of a game. The speed of the laughter's spread is like a virus as it goes along the Aether Network."

C: 你不甘示弱地迎头赶上，庞大的数据流渗透进泡沫，侵蚀数据风的舰船。一条紫色的狮子鱼游到你的面前，你惊恐地退后，在被毒刺扎中前，将它还原为代码。
E: As you also press forward, massive data streams infiltrate the foam, a data storm that corrodes the vessel. A purple lionfish swims before you. Startled, you step back, promptly turning it back into code before its poisonous spines reach you.

C: 你掉进粉色的果冻里，嘴角残留着蓝丝绒的味道。你挪动身子，四肢变得七倒八斜，像只哈哈镜里的水母，扭动的空心面条。
E: You sink into pink jelly, the taste of blue velvet still lingering on your palate. As you move your body, you find your limbs twisted like a jellyfish in a funhouse mirror and as crooked as macaroni.

C: 「这座城市曾有过两场伟大的骗局，第一次，愚弄众神的扎格列斯也在这里上当。第二次，无影无踪的偷儿为先王带来谜题。而现在，我将创造第三次奇迹！」国王揭开黑色的轻纱，七颗色彩相异的骰子在托盘里旋转。
E: "This city once bore witness to two grand deceptions. The first time, even Zagreus, who managed to fool the other gods, was themself deceived. The second, when a shadowless thief brought forth puzzles to the former king. And now, I shall create the third miracle!" The king pulls back the black veil, revealing seven dice in seven colors spinning on its tray.

C: 骰子停下，数字和你的猜测天差地别。你摸了摸自己的口袋，逐渐空空如也的它，仿佛谕示着你的人生。
E: The dice come to a halt, their numbers a far cry from your guess. You pat your own pockets — they have been gradually emptying out, a silent omen of your life's course.

C: 「谢谢你，小友。」他接下硬币，恋恋不舍地看向尚未被冥河淹没的尘世，消失在湍流深处。
E: "Thank you, young friend." He takes the coin, looks forlornly at the world still untouched by the River of Souls, and disappears into the torrential depths.

C: 木船不出意料地被撞得七零八碎，法吉娜的眷属们将你从水里捞起，嫌弃地扔到岸边。
E: As expected, the dinghy splinters into shreds. Phagousa's kins fish you from the water, tossing you onto the shore with disdain.

C: 「十二泰坦…有趣的『生命』。」阮•梅笑盈盈地将目光转向你，「不过，在那之前，还是先解开这些和『方程』纠缠在一起的数据，给你增加些助力好了。」
E: "The Twelve Titans... fascinating 'lifeforms'." Ruan Mei smiles as she turns to face you. "But before we dive into that, let's first untangle these data mixed with the 'Equations' and give you a bit of extra help."

C: 一切征服者的征服者，尼卡多利至此行走于世，并誓要征服诸神。
E: Nikador, the conqueror of all conquerors, thus strode across the land with a vow to overthrow the gods themselves.

C: 直到公正之秤的介入，由大地让渡出一半的领域，承载在天地间起舞的海洋，这场大雨才终于迎来休憩。
E: Only when the Scale of Justice intervenes, asking the land to concede half of their realm to carry the ocean between sky and earth, does the rain finally cease.

C: 它化身为一道光影，与工匠夜夜私会，可增长的爱慕，却令工匠多出了几分欲念。倘若能与恋人在白昼相见，向乡邻炫耀她的美丽……
E: Appearing nightly as a beam of light, Aquila meets the craftsman in secret. Yet, as affection deepens, so does the craftsman's desire — to meet his lover by day and boast of her beauty to his neighbors and friends.

C: 世人皆知，命运乃不可违抗之理。可在命运诞生之前，世界要怎样运行？原初的动力从何而来？混沌的世界到底是何模样？
E: It is universally acknowledged that fate is inevitable. But how did the world function before fate was born? What was the original force? What did a chaotic world look like?

C: 可无数门扉仍向你我敞开，为世间带来最后的指引。
E: Yet countless gates remain open to us, offering the last guidance to the world.

C: 这预言的数值也太高了。
E: That's some beefed-up prophecy.

C: 但在塔兰顿来说，衡量公平的唯一准则，只是将比较的两者放于托盘两侧，看看孰重孰轻而已。
E: But to Talanton, the only means of judging fairness is by weighing both sides of the scales and see which rises and which falls.

C: 吉奥里亚的祭司模仿鼹鼠的动作，把土壤挖开，将一抔麦种埋入土中。
E: Georios's priests mimicked the moles, tilling the soil to bury the first handful of wheat seeds.

C: 这听起来合乎理性。
E: This sounds pretty sensible.

C: 说明多不一定就好。
E: More is not necessarily merrier.

C: 对体检结果如有疑惑，请及时向医疗科科员咨询。
E: If you have any questions about the results, please consult the researchers in the medical department.

C: 哎哟哎哟，小年轻哟，你刚才是不是把一张光锥放回了收容柜呀？
E: My oh my, young {F#lady}{M#man}, did you just put a Light Cone back into the cabinet?

C: 柜子里依然没有光锥的踪影，你不禁想起了那个自称「老朽」的科员，你好奇他的兜里到底揣了多少光锥……
