E: There's no trace of a Light Cone in the cabinet. You can't help but recall that researcher calling himself "this old one" and wonder how many Light Cones he must have been carrying in his pocket...

C: 温馨提示：空间站内的套餐均有专人定量搭配，保证每个人吃得开心吃得放心。套餐虽好，请勿过量食用哦。
E: Friendly reminder: Meal packages in the space station are designed by specialists to ensure that everyone can enjoy their meal with peace of mind. Although the meal packages are high quality, please do not over-eat.

C: 检测到您的空间站权限有提升，当前计划内的套餐升级为「空间站高级科员专享至臻套餐」。
E: An upgrade has been detected with your space station permissions. The current package has been upgraded to the "Senior Researcher Exclusive — Supreme Meal Package."

C: 「如果不是他们的阻拦，我一定不会与你分别。」
E: "If they hadn't stopped me, I would never have parted with you."

C: 我认为，无尽的修改和返工，就是科研进程中最大的败笔。
E: You know what I think? Endless revision and doing the same work over and over again is the biggest failure of the research process!

C: 啊？我没有提这个修改需求的呀，你们不要乱讲哦。
E: What are you looking at me for? This revision business wasn't my idea.

C: 你仔细地观察了下这份榜单，你发现它只在空间站内流通，你决定就此停手。
E: You carefully look over the leaderboard, and discover that it only circulates around the space station — so you decide to stop.

C: 哎，我这是建立在扎实文献研究之上的合理推论！
E: Hey, it's a reasonable conclusion to reach based on solid research of the literature!

C: 流光忆庭的手段，能够窃取别人的记忆。为了保存记忆，他们用「意质」构建了外膜，把它收藏在像气泡一样的东西里，方便携带。
E: The Garden of Recollection has ways to steal the memories of others. To preserve memories, they created a Sentiention membrane to keep the memories wrapped up in it like a bubble, making it easy to carry memories around.

C: 一阵令人不适的眩晕感后，你被「新世界大门」带到了收容舱段。
E: After a period of uncomfortable dizziness, you are transported to the storage zone by the Door to A New World.

C: 多亏了你们，我们最近的活计都轻松了不少。
E: Thanks to you lot, everything's been going much more smoothly for us lately.

C: 莉亚轻轻哼笑，又将脸故意凑上来。「<unbreak>16</unbreak>号根本没这个功能，」你感觉到温润的气息扑打着你后颈的皮肤，「你在害羞吗？明明也是女孩子……」
E: Leah chuckles before inching her face closer. "No. <unbreak>16</unbreak> isn't capable of that." You can feel her warm breath caressing the back of your neck. "Are you blushing? C'mon, you are a girl too."

C: 「还有地震，」她清了清嗓子，「过去的一个月里，整个丹尼索瓦就已经震了三次。这意味着我们的宿主肠道活动变得频繁了——坏的那种……」
E: "There's also the earthquakes." She clears her throat. "In the past month, Denisova has had three seismic events. This means that there is increased activity within the host's intestines. Detrimental activity..."

C: 你靠近忆泡，感到一丝凉意。凉意温柔地穿过你的皮肤、骨肉，穿过更深层的……
E: You approach the bubble and experience a chilly sensation that gently pierces through your skin, flesh, and bones, then goes down deeper...

C: 出问题？怎么会…好像是有点神志不清了嗡。
E: Problems? But how... I'm starting to feel a little delirious.

C: 怎么受不了了？
E: Why is that?

C: 「无限之雅努斯」托梦告诉过我，后面什么都没有……
E: "Janus the Endless" told me through a dream that there is nothing else that comes thereafter...

C: {NICKNAME}，你的意思是……
E: {NICKNAME}, you mean...

C: 你明明还有其它选择…难道就这么甘于平庸吗？你难道就不好奇，那些看似不合情理的选择背后埋藏了多么美妙的意外吗？
E: You have other choices... Are you really willing to settle for something so average? Aren't you the least bit curious about what amazing surprises lurk behind unreasonable choices?

C: 对，我们刚才是在聊这个。
E: Yeah, we were just talking about him.

C: 好吧，偷偷告诉你，岩居蟹不属于十足目，它是一种——根据宇宙普遍的物种分类法——难以被归类的近似节肢生物。管它呢？反正是螃蟹就会吐泡泡，就像你现在也临近呕吐的边缘……
E: Alright. I'll tell you a little something. The Rock Crab isn't a decapod. It's actually a type of creature that — according to the common species classification system — is difficult to classify, but it's something like an arthropod. Who cares? It's a crab that spits bubbles, just like how you are on the verge of spitting up everything you've just eaten...

C: 你不清楚那龇牙咧嘴的怪物是从哪儿钻出来的…但你耳边回响起了那个魔术师女人的话：
E: You have no idea where that ferocious monster comes from, but... you recall the voice of the lady magician.

C: 不满意
E: Unsatisfactory

C: 采光和窗景——一般。
E: Lighting and view: Average.

C: {NICKNAME}
E: {NICKNAME}

C: 大功告成。
E: You're done.

C: 房间里似乎正有一男一女高声争执着什么。你屏息凝神，努力捕捉着空气中传来的破碎词句——
E: There seems to be a man and a woman arguing loudly about something. You concentrate as hard as you can to pick up the fragments of sentences coming from the room.

C: 永远……
E: Forever...

C: 好啊好啊！
E: Totally!

C: 你放心吧～我已经注意那位粉丝很久了——如果她图谋不轨，先前有的是下手的机会…何必特地让你跑一趟呢，对吧？
E: Relax~ I've been aware of that fan for quite a while now. If she had ill intentions, she has had more than enough opportunities to act on them. Why would she make you come here and take a photo, right?

C: 不对，墙似乎是凭空消失的…难道是黑潮要来了？必须赶快溜走喀！
E: No, the walls just vanished out of thin air... Don't tell me that's the black tide? I need to flee! Quickly!

C: 一束莲花开在这座塑像前，长势不错，很难想象它是如何在没有水的土地上存活的。
E: A cluster of lotus flowers bloomed in front of the statue. They are thriving, and it's hard to imagine how they survived on land without water.

C: 娜塔莎向你介绍了来龙去脉……
E: Natasha brings you up to speed.

C: 自从你来了贝洛伯格，便发觉自己可能与垃圾箱结下了不解之缘。现在，在捉迷藏游戏的生死关头，你再一次盯上了它。
E: Since arriving in Belobog, you've felt as if there is an inexplicable connection between you and dumpsters. Now, at this critical moment during hide-and-seek, you find yourself staring at the dumpster.

C: 大家都躲好了吗？我要来抓你们了哦！
E: Ready or not, here I come!

C: 确实，虎克也这么觉得！
E: It's true. I think so, too!

C: 你对着自然的伟大显像轻鞠一躬。现在，回去找那个女工头，让她帮忙鉴定这块地髓结晶的价值吧。
E: You give a slight bow to this marvel of nature. Now, it's time to find the supervisor and have her help appraise how much this chunk of Geomarrow crystal is worth.

C: 瞧啊，此番美景，真教虫不禁诗兴大发喀——
E: Ah! Such splendor before my eyes. I simply must wax poetic, crrk—

C: 那边是不是落了些尘土？
E: Is that a speck of dust?

C: 当若虫们填满这片柜台时，会有什么事情发生呢？
E: What will happen when the nymphs fill this counter?

C: 迷糊姐姐的圣兽真的很抢手嗡。刚才大家逃难的时候，第一时间想到的竟然是把柜子上的小海豹们一起带走……
E: Miss Daze's divine beast is really popular. Even during the chaos of the evacuation, the first thing people thought of was to grab those little seals from the shelves...

C: 唉，参天大树耗费多少年月才长出这样的枝桠，难道就要这样毁于一旦吗……
E: *sigh* How many years did it take for that towering tree to grow those branches... And now, it's all about to be destroyed...

C: 现在你们懂得我们不顾一切也要扑向火光的心情了吧！
E: Now you understand what it feels like to be a moth to the flame!

C: 穷极一生和流水较劲，这一切的一切，真的有意义吗……
E: A lifetime spent fighting the current... Was it really worth it?

C: 有一天，我突然意识到自己是一只物流机巧鸟。每天就是读取物流数据，将包裹送到仙舟各处，我认为这样的工作很没有美感。
E: One day, I suddenly became aware of the fact that I was a courier cycrane. Every day my tasks include reading logistics data and carrying packages throughout the Xianzhou. There was no aesthetics involved in work of this nature, I reckon.

C: 裸辞之后，我反而不知道自己应该干什么了。除了运送物流，我根本一无是处，于是我就忧郁了。
E: After leaving my job, I realized I didn't know what I should be doing. I knew nothing beyond making shipments. I became depressed.

C: 这样吧，我能拜托你帮我留个神吗？如果你在哪里又遇到了这些「有故障的机巧鸟」，请帮我把它们带回来，可以吗？
E: If that's the case, can I have you keep an eye out for me? If you come across any "malfunctioning cycranes," please bring them back. Is that OK?

C: 你干嘛瞪着我！虽说爷平易近人天生丽质，但是被你这样一直盯着，难免还是有点羞涩，你呀…居心不良。
E: What's the big idea staring at me? Sure, I'm approachable and naturally pleasing to the eye, but your staring has me feeling a bit shy. You... are up to no good.

C: 啧，原来我能被你发现，就是因为你被人派来找我呀。那这局赌约不算，这个人根本不是为了买东西来找你的！
E: Tsk, the only reason you found me is because someone sent you to find me. This game doesn't count then, as this isn't a real paying customer!

C: 简单，就这么办。
E: Easy, let's do it.

C: 出题
E: Get ready.

C: 它依旧在沉睡着，它将抢夺来的财富用作价值连城的睡床。你很清楚，对于一只恶龙来说，只要它还活着，它就会死死守着这些财宝，根本一毛都舍不得花。
E: Still sleeping, it uses the loot as its priceless implement of slumber. You know very well that a fierce dragon will stick to its treasure for as long as it's alive, unwilling to spend a single dime.

C: 明白了！我会回到鹤运物流！
E: Got it! I'm heading back to Heron Express!

C: 开拓之道…难怪，我听说列车最近又在银河里又开起来了。
E: The Way of Trailblaze... That makes sense. I heard the Express is running around in the cosmos again.

C: …呵呵。
E: ...Heh.

C: 我吃不下了…
E: I can't eat anymore...

C: 一切会在何时迎来终结？
E: When will all this come to an end?

C: 不许左顾右盼！
E: Don't look around!

C: 不能逃避，不能逃避…
E: Mustn't run away, mustn't run away...

C: 现在你们俩随便动一动吧。
E: Now, try moving something.

C: （应该已经处理妥当了…按景元将军说的，去向青镞汇报吧。）
E: (It should be done... Like General Jing Yuan said, update Qingzu regarding this.)

C: 哈哈，巧了，从某种意义上来，我也算是个「路人」。
E: Haha, what a coincidence. In some ways, I'm also a "passerby."

C: 噢，没什么的，他不是吹嘘工造司多好多好嘛，我就摆证据讲事实给辩驳回去。
E: Oh, nothing. He was boasting about how working for the Artisanship Commission is good, so I just told him some facts as a retort.

C: 可以确认，这便是故事里的七井盖之一，智识之井盖！
E: You can be certain that this is one of the Seven Manhole Covers from the stories. This is the Manhole Cover of Erudition!

C: 在有限的墙壁上，醒目的颜料互相攻伐，有如一场基于色彩的帮派战争。
E: On the wall's limited space, the striking paints clash for supremacy, like some kind of rainbow gang war.

C: 危险的无护栏设计，哪怕是在梦境，也属于典型的反面教材。
E: Even inside the Dreamscape, dangerous designs like missing guardrails are classic examples of what not to do.

C: 要不算了？
E: Maybe we should just forget it?

C: …试过才会死心嘛。
E: ...I won't know until I try.

C: 你要如何应对？
E: How do you respond?

C: 你听到《谐乐颂》自远方的光芒中传来，如此恢弘壮丽的协奏在深海之下也仿若摇篮曲。
E: You can hear the Odes of Harmony from the distant light — even the most glorious concerto is akin to a lullaby in the watery abyss.

C: 这是随了她父母吧…
E: She probably takes after her parents...

C: 朋友，你相信欧洛尼斯吗？
E: My friend, have you faith in Oronyx?

C: 说不定在某个平行时空里。
E: Maybe in another spacetime.

C: …不许拿帕姆的身高开玩笑！
E: ...There's no need to make jokes about my height, I'll have you know!

C: {NICKNAME}乘客，你来得正好，帕姆有事想问你——如果让你给帕姆打分，平心而论…你会给帕姆几分？
E: {NICKNAME}, you're just in the nick of time. Pom-Pom wanted to ask you something — if you were to give me a rating, in all fairness... How would you rate me?

C: 谢谢你，{NICKNAME}乘客。
E: Thank you, {NICKNAME}.

C: 是加入胡萝卜。
E: Add the carrots.

C: 太好了！那就麻烦{NICKNAME}乘客啦，不会耽误你太长时间的！
E: Great! Yes please, {NICKNAME}, Pom-Pom won't take up too much of your time!

C: 你的脑袋里成天在想些什么帕！
E: What's been going on in that head of yours all day, huh?

C: 气泡水…目前没备货，等我记一下帕！
E: Sparkling water... is currently unavailable. I'll jot it down first!

C: 不过没想到{NICKNAME}乘客这么关心帕姆，嘿嘿。看你那么着急的样子，我都有点不好意思了。
E: Still, Pom-Pom didn't expect you to be worried about me so much, {NICKNAME}. Pom-Pom feels kinda bad seeing you this anxious.

C: （询问关于落枕的问题）
E: (Ask about stiff neck)

C: {NICKNAME}乘客！不许在休息时间打扰帕姆！
E: {NICKNAME}, you shouldn't disturb me during my break time!

C: 能省下不少事，按理来说我该高兴才是，但不知为什么总觉得很在意。
E: It spares me a lot of trouble. I should be happy, but for some reason, I'm still quite bothered by it.

C: …呜呜，{NICKNAME}乘客说话太直接了！不过也算是发自内心的真实答案帕。
E: *sob* That's very direct of you, {NICKNAME}! Still, I appreciate your honesty.

C: 没啥感觉。
E: There's nothing special about them.

C: 书上说，进行全身有氧运动是最适合的，而在列车中最方便的有氧运动，就是跑步啦！
E: According to the book, full-body aerobic exercise is the most suitable for me. Jogging is the easiest sport I can do on the Express!

C: 这可是很科学的有氧锻炼方法！帕姆可是在书里看到的！不信你自己搜，书名是《成为人类好朋友的<unbreak>100</unbreak>种方法》！
E: This is a scientifically proven aerobic exercise I learned from a book! If you don't believe me, you can read it yourself! The title of the book is 100 Ways to Be a Good Friend to Humans.

C: 我最近也在思考这方面的内容。你要是问从前的我，可能会得到无数个听上去很专业的回答。
E: I've been thinking about this as well recently. If you ask the old me, you may get countless professional-sounding answers.

C: 关于帕姆：列车与旅途
E: About Pom-Pom: The Express and its journeys

C: 关于丹恒：不愉快的梦
E: About Dan Heng: Bad dreams

C: 哔——啵。封锁线后的大门被锁住了。
E: Beep — boop. The gate behind the blockade is locked.

C: 开始吧。
E: Let's begin.

C: 我只有两个技能而已。
E: I only have two abilities.

C: 这一次的演练目标是——击败「少校」。
E: The goal of this drill is to defeat the Major.

C: 笑话时间——「少校」很想减肥，他该怎么做？
E: Joke time: The Major wants to lose some weight. What should he do?

C: （那边的铁卫守着一架无人机…或许能派上用场？）
E: (The Guard over there is guarding some kind of drone... Maybe that could come in handy?)

C: 这一次，{NICKNAME}教官，就交由你来检验银鬃铁卫部队的成色！
E: This time, Drillmaster {NICKNAME}, I'll leave it to you to test the mettle of these Silvermane Guards!

C: 没错！哈！哈！哈！
E: That's right! Bwahaha!

C: 后会有期，{NICKNAME}。
E: We'll meet again, {NICKNAME}.

C: 话说回来，这「残响回廊」……
E: By the way, this Corridor of Fading Echoes...

C: 去击垮它们吧，{NICKNAME}。有我在这里把守，不必担心背后。
E: Go and defeat them, {NICKNAME}. I'll keep watch here, so don't worry about guarding your back.

C: 毕竟没有旅行者会把自己心爱的行李箱丢在路边——那么久——如果真有，想必那人一定经常丢三落四，或者至少…很有钱。
E: After all, no traveler would ever throw away their prized luggage on the roadside like that, at least, not for that long. And if this were somehow the case, then the person who left their stuff behind must be habitually forgetful or unbelievably rich.

C: 我是想说，这箱子里很有可能揣着一颗炸弹…或是一块价值连城的金表。不过，后者发生的概率比较小…也许。
E: What I'm trying to say is it could be a bomb in the suitcase... or a precious gold watch. But the possibility for the latter is rather slim... I think.

C: 看向南方。
E: Look to the south.

C: 呃，{NICKNAME}，请你停手吧…这里真没东西，我保证。
E: Uh, {NICKNAME}, please stop that... There's nothing here, I promise you.

C: 错误。你听到一阵沉闷的滋滋声，四个凹槽内的数字恢复到了初始的、无序的状态。糟糕——看来你得从头再试一次了。
E: Wrong. You hear a low buzzing sound as the numbers in all four slots return to their original random state. Shoot, looks like you gotta start all over again.

C: 哦豁，来了来了。每到一个世界，若不能体会一次当地的街头骗术，感受一下人性中的黑暗面，那简直是白跑了一趟。
E: Oh, there it comes! Every time I go off-world, I'll feel like it's a waste of time if I can't find any street cheats and experience a little about the dark side of humanity.

C: 「『妹妹，为什么丹鼎司的司鼎长得如此像你？』『什么？哥哥竟是天才飞行士？』『工造司的百冶登门造访，竟要给我贴身造甲？』一场交易，让他加入云骑离家数载。归来之时家中竟有大变，就连看似柔弱的未婚妻，竟也是个了不得的大人物！」
E: "'Sis, why do you look so similar to the Cauldron Master of the Alchemy Commission?' 'What? My brother is a genius pilot?' 'The Artisanship Commission's Furnace Master has come to visit and wants to make a personalized suit of armor for me?' A transaction made him join the Cloud Knights and leave home for several years. Upon his return, dramatic changes had happened in his family, and even his seemingly frail fiancee is a big shot!"

C: 嗯…甚好，这个味儿对了！我为你准备了谢礼。仙门已开，你径自来取吧。
E: Mmm... very well. That's exactly what I wanted! Here's a gift for you. The gates to the celestial realm are open. Come and get it.

C: 如此流畅的思路！看来你已经熟稔「开拓之道」了。那么就打开它一探究竟吧！
E: Such a smooth train of thought! Looks like you're already familiar with the Way of Trailblaze. Pop it open once and for all!

C: 这是您应得的酬劳，请您收下吧！
E: This is your well-deserved reward. Please accept it!

C: 我就是为这个来的…{NICKNAME}，这件事可真的要拜托你了～
E: That's why I'm here... {NICKNAME}, I'm counting on you for this matter.

C: 大衍穷观阵
E: Matrix of Prescience Ultima

C: 没问题啊，走吧。
E: No problem. Let's go.

C: …不过，您要是有空闲时间无处发挥的话，你懂的。
E: But anyway, if you have time to spare and nothing to do... You catch my drift?

C: 我们家族的仇人就在银行里，要是不靠近他，我要怎么复仇呢？
E: Our family's personal rival works in a bank. Keep your friends close, but your enemies even closer...

C: 大概只有我们爱凑热闹的店长才知道了。
E: I think only our mischievous friend the shopkeeper knows.

C: 想必是很幽默的家伙。
E: Sounds like a really funny guy.

C: 后来我在博识学会查阅了一些资料，才知道这种人被称作「假面愚者」…也许他们看见匹诺康尼这般景象，会创造出不一样的笑话？
E: Later on, I pulled some data at the Intelligentsia Guild only to discover that this kind of person is called a "Masked Fool"... Maybe they'll come up with some different jokes if they ever see Penacony.

C: 除非…对，孩子！孩子可以无忧无虑地玩耍，只要从没被那些东西浸染过…这样的孩子还剩下多少？
E: Unless... Yes, children! Children get to play without a care in the world, so long as they're never infected by those things... How many such children are there left out there?

C: 眼前这位女士闻言瞳孔骤缩、脸色惨白，彻底失去了原本的优雅从容。
E: When the woman heard this name, her pupils suddenly shrank and the blood drained from her face as she lost all previous sense of grace and bearing.

C: 可以摸摸你头上的绒球吗？
E: Can I touch the fluff ball on your head?

C: 该怎么形容呢？哈…在真实的世界中，您若是想要干涉、影响他人，就得小心翼翼地交流、潜移默化地引导。那可是个漫长且枯燥的活计。
E: How should I describe it? Ha... If you want to meddle with or influence someone else in the real world, you have to communicate with them ever so carefully, guiding them over time in imperceptible ways. That would a long and arduous job.

C: 可我还是个孩子。
E: But I'm still a child.

C: 等等，你该不会…真的信了她的鬼话吧？饶了我吧还是。
E: Hang on, you don't actually... believe her lies? Spare me, please!

C: 还好当初没有彻底落入事件视界，不然就只有星神知道会怎样了……
E: Luckily we didn't end up crossing the event horizon, otherwise only the Aeons know what might have happened...

C: 多次警告无果后，星际和平公司找上了巡海游侠，提议联手铲除这个作恶已久的祸害。最后，双方各自派出精锐战力，计划对韦兰的旗舰发动一次斩首行动。
E: After multiple unheeded warnings, the Interastral Peace Corporation reached out to the Galaxy Rangers about building an alliance to wipe out this enduring scourge. In the end, both sides contributed crack troops and planned to launch an operation to lop the head off Wyland's main battleship.

C: 要说回到现实躲一躲吧…我那房间位于楼梯边上，吵得要死，对面还偏偏放了盆花——那味儿熏得我难受，一出门就打喷嚏。
E: And if I get back to reality to hide from this feeling... My hotel room's next to the staircase and it's plucking noisy. It so happens that there's a pot of flowers right outside — so pungent that it's hard to take. I'm sneezing despite being barely out the door.

C: 现在没空交代来龙去脉了！
E: There's no time for the whole enchilada right now!

C: …只有这一份吗？
E: ...Is it just this one thing?

C: 当我们把什么东西奉为圭臬的时候，世界就会往我们所追捧的那个方向发展。如今的人们选择钱——长久以来的人们都选择了钱。
E: When we regard something as a guiding principle, the world will develop in whatever direction we pursue. People today tend to choose money — as they have for a long time.

C: 但大毛不是牲畜。它和我们一样，是拥有高级智慧的生物…我知道这说法有些奇怪，可当一头牛开始谈论灵魂与哲学时，真有人能把它单纯当作肉来看待吗？
E: But Hairy was no livestock. Just like us, Hairy was a creature of high intelligence... I know it's strange to say, but when a cow starts talking about spirits and philosophy with you, how can anyone treat it as just a piece of meat?

C: 你是怎么知道这些的？
E: How did you know about that?

C: 他们没认出你？
E: Didn't they recognize you?

C: 趁大伙都在休眠仓里睡觉时，我悄悄溜进驾驶室、放倒守卫，然后把所有人的清醒时间延迟了一整天——足够我把邀请函和其他值钱的东西带走了。
E: While everyone was sleeping in the cryosleep pods, I sneaked into the cockpit, knocked out the guards, and kept them unconscious for a day longer. I had more than enough time to take the invitation letter and other valuable items with me.

C: 借助匹诺康尼这个平台，我们一定可以大展拳脚…这座梦中城市将会是奇迹本杰明迄今为止最伟大的作品，毫不夸张。所有的新老粉丝都会迷上它的，我保证。
E: We believe we can unleash our full potential in Penacony... This city of dreams is bound to be the greatest work for Miracle Benjamin Studio. I'm not exaggerating that. I'm sure our fans, both new and old, will be mesmerized by it.

C: 我啊，一直以来，要听的太多，能讲的太少。
E: I've been listening to others so much... that I have little... to talk about myself.

C: 果然您也听说过他，我相信这位大善人的美名迟早会响彻寰宇！
E: I knew you would have heard of him! Sooner or later, he'll be famous across the entire universe!

C: 出示（使用错误的情况）
E: Show (incorrect use)

C: 不过这也不是长久之计，得找个机会自立门户才行。
E: But staying here isn't the way to go. I must try to set up my own enterprise as soon as possible.

C: 唔…确实不能让能力有所欠缺的高个子下决断。行吧，那我就给你指定几个「分析对象」……
E: Fine... I guess a tall fella with limited abilities just can't handle making decisions. Alright, I'll give you a few objects to analyze...

C: 咻咻…结论：该分析对象所涉及之原材料、供应链及相关技术无侵权风险。
E: *Beep*... Conclusion: The analyses regarding the raw materials, supply chain, and related technologies show no risk of infringement.

C: 啊？我没听错吧？
E: Huh? Did I hear it wrong!?

C: 男人似乎感受到了你的视线，架在他脖子上的沉重包袱缓缓抬起。
E: The man senses your gaze. The weight on his shoulders lifts slightly.

C: 我都说了，我和你不一样——很难理解吗？「胆小」、「腼腆」、「拧巴」，你难道认不得这几个词吗？
E: I told you we're different! Is it really that hard to understand the words "scaredy-cat" or "screw-up"?

C: 但我马上就会开始准备一份符合他想法的培养方案，让他明白我的诚意，拜托你帮帮我！
E: But I'll start working on a training program that aligns with his ideas right away. I'll show him how sincere I am. Please, help me out!

C: 我没办法亲自帮他实现那个梦想了，真是可惜，我大概会遗憾一辈子吧。
E: It's a shame that I can no longer help him in his pursuit. I'll probably regret it for the rest of my life.

C: 谢谢您的支持，代表纯美女神向您致敬。
E: Thank you for your support. I salute you on behalf of the Beauty.

C: 不用证明，唱你想唱的。
E: You don't need to prove anything. Just sing what you desire.

C: 唉，变了，拉洛丝变了！这是对我们这些老乐迷的冒犯！侮辱！背叛！
E: What a shame... Larose has changed! It's an offense to us, her greatest fans! It's an insult! A betrayal!

C: 我浪费过许多机会，做错过许多选择。我的人生就像一双沾满污泥的靴子，每一步都走得愈发沉重。
E: I've squandered many chances and made the wrong decisions many times. My life is like a pair of muddy boots that gets heavier with each step I take.

C: 可能是家族的特别关怀服务。
E: It might be a special counseling service provided by The Family.

C: 卢•阿彻嘴角上扬，不自然地笑着，似乎是苏乐达喝多了。
E: Lew Archer breaks into an unnatural grin. She seems to have had too much SoulGlad.

C: 打住！这也太变态了…
E: Stop! This sounds sick to me...

C: 但智械会哭。
E: But Intellitrons do cry.

C: 有时我就搞不明白了，明明宇宙中的宜居星球那么稀少，却总有人变着法子破坏它们——到底是图什么呢？
E: I'm baffled. There are already so few livable planets in this universe, yet there are always people finding ways to destroy them. What are they trying to achieve?

C: 你居然…真的带来了？
E: I'm surprised... that you actually did it.

C: 「回收模块已启动，请出示要处理的垃圾。」
E: "Trash disposal module activated. Please present the trash to be disposed of."

C: 你叫的人还没来吗？
E: Is the person you called for not here yet?

C: 啊…我还以为对于坐拥智库的星穹列车而言，这类知识等同于常识。
E: Ah... I assumed this was common knowledge with all the information the Astral Express possesses.

C: 我的忠诚得到了回报。家主将我带到了朝露公馆，听说了我的…「事迹」的人，全都对我敬畏三分。
E: My loyalty ended up paying off though. The family head brought me to Dewlight Pavilion and everyone who heard about my... "deeds" was in awe of what I'd done.

C: 这就是我组建基金会的初衷。
E: That's the original idea behind establishing this foundation of mine.

C: 望战争不再。
E: May war come nevermore.

C: 放心吧，报酬方面绝对不会少你的。
E: Don't worry. You definitely won't be getting the short end of the stick in terms of payment here.

C: 您好，需要帮助吗？
E: Hello. Need any help?

C: 谁作弊了？
E: Who cheated?

C: 我们认识吗？
E: Do we know each other?

C: 直到我在您身上看见了真正的「美」，从您的歌声中听见了宇宙的井然与和谐。
E: ...until I saw true beauty emanating from you, that I heard the universe's order and harmony from your voice.

C: 不好！
E: No can do!

C: 打开下一个木桶。
E: Open the next barrel.

C: 就此离去。
E: Leave.

C: 嘿哟，你可是大守护者的朋友、贝洛伯格的救星，怎么能算外人呢？
E: Oh no! You're a friend of the Supreme Guardian and savior of Belobog, how could I treat you as an outsider?

C: 没找到合适的角度自然看不到啾！学会倒立，世界会别有一番风味啾！
E: You just need the right angle, tweet! Learn to go upside down, and you'll see the world from a whole new perspective!

C: 一道可爱的身影出现在你身后。
E: A cute figure appears behind you.

C: 说的就是你，不许搞乱我的箱子！这都是我辛辛苦苦堆出来的！
E: Yes, you! Don't mess with my boxes! I've been painstakingly stacking them all up!

C: 这里只有我和你，肯定是你。
E: It's just you and me here. It has to be you.

C: 是吗？它能用来干什么呢？
E: You think? What could that be used for?

C: ...比起宝贝，它看起来更像施工剩下的废料。
E: ...Looks more like construction scrap than treasure.

C: 原以为下水道里装的会是苏乐达，结果就是普通的水嘛，真扫兴啾……
E: I thought the sewers were filled with SoulGlad. It turns out it was just water. What a bummer, tweet...

C: 折纸鸟向你眨动它亮闪闪的眼睛，不知是在抛出媚眼还是鸟类的习性。
E: The origami bird winks its bright eyes at you. You're unsure whether it's flirting with you or it's just the common bird behavior.

C: 咳、咳咳，本公子现在已经收敛很多了啾…
E: Ahem, ahem, I've already toned it down plenty, tweet...

C: 哼哼…没错，有个怕生的助手总喜欢躲进<color=#dbc291ff>只有小鸟才能钻进的小缝隙里</color>，说不定是钻进某个角落里去了啾！
E: Hehe... That's right. There's a helper who is afraid of strangers. It likes to hide <color=#dbc291ff>in crevices where only little birds can enter</color>. Maybe it is currently hiding in some corner, tweet!

C: 还有、还有…
E: And, and...

C: ——小小惊喜啾！
E: ...A little surprise for you, tweet!

C: 呼哇，助手们居然都来齐了~没想到本公子的电影这就可以开拍了啾！
E: Woah, all of my assistants actually came~! I can't believe I can already start filming, tweet!

C: 哼哼…没错，有个小帮手…不，应该称呼它为大导演！它是小镇中最厉害的导演，这次拍摄非它不可啾！快去<color=#dbc291ff>片场</color>找它吧！
E: Hmm... That's right, there is one assistant... No, I call them the great director! They are the most amazing director in all of Dreamville, I must have them for this shoot, tweet! Head to <color=#dbc291ff>the set</color> and find them quickly!

C: 居然不认识大哥？那可是美梦小镇数一数二的硬派鸟啾。
E: What, you don't know him? He's Dreamville's unrivaled Real Hardcore Bird, tweet.

C: 赤红我好哥们儿。
E: Red is my bro.

C: 为了您的安全，请勿舔舐栏杆。
E: For your own safety, do not lick this fence.

C: 猜猜你会在上面看到什么？两座巨大的——好险，差点就剧透了啾。
E: Guess what you can see on it? Two giant... That was close, I almost gave the answer away, tweet.

C: 砰！有没有被吓到啾？
E: Boo! Did that scare you, tweet?

C: 红、绿、蓝、黄，就是没有我的粉色啾。
E: Red, green, blue, yellow, but there just isn't my shade of pink, tweet.

C: 这些是小鸟矿里挖出来的小鸟币，有好多币种，收益各自不相同啾。
E: These little bird coins were dug up by from the bird mine. There are many types of coins, each having different earnings, tweet.

C: 嗯，所以我一定要找到他啾！
E: Yeah, so I have to find him, tweet!

C: 好吧，我交。
E: Alright, I'll pay.

C: 我本来想盖一个大大的窝，让我的同伴一起过来住的。
E: I wanted to build this big den so all my friends could come and live there.

C: 都老实点，我是景元。
E: I'm Jing Yuan. Behave yourselves!

C: 阿仁，让他做个好人吧…
E: You should give him a chance, Yong...

C: 那岂不是很危险？
E: Aren't they super dangerous?

C: 那本《开智之卷》上的鬼画符本质是一种逻辑回路，仅仅通过视觉传导就完善了我的基础功能……
E: The "weird symbols" on the Manuscript of Wisdom are actually a logical circuit that enlightens its readers through visual transmission alone...

C: 也许你给我足够多的数据和算力，我能像大衍穷观阵一样给你算出一个结论…但现在我应该是没办法告诉你下期彩票的号码。
E: Maybe with enough data and arithmetic power, I could come up with an answer for you, like what the Matrix of Prescience Ultima does... but for now, I'm afraid I can't give you the winning numbers.

C: 可丹枢已经不在了。
E: But Dan Shu is no longer of this world.

C: 阿幸嘴里念念叨叨，看来他正在酝酿情绪。他还没有准备好去迎接自己的命运。
E: A-Xing is muttering and trying to gather his courage. Apparently, he is not yet ready to unveil his fate.

C: 唔…确实是这个道理。
E: Well... I guess that's a good point.

C: 有没有可能是你设计如此？
E: Is this a part of your plan?

C: 没想到，真有人在这里听我演奏完，你也不想活了吗？
E: Oh, some people actually came to listen to my performance. Have you had enough of living, too?

C: 古琴的主人有未完成的曲子，完成琴曲的强烈愿望残留在这里。而我，吸收了这些情绪，也同样想完成这首曲子……
E: The guqin's owner has unfinished music to compose, and that strong desire to complete the music remains here. And I, absorbing that desire, would like to finish this song, too...

C: 开个玩笑，别害怕。也就在这种鬼地方，十王司能对我睁只眼闭只眼啦。
E: Just kidding. Don't be scared. It's only in a forsaken place like this that the Ten-Lords Commission can turn a blind eye to me.

C: 在传统的朱明花鼓戏里面呢，这出戏也是两个人唱的。这是为了塑造那种岁阳附身的诡异感。
E: Zhuming flower-drum opera is traditionally sung by two singers to produce that eeriness of being possessed by heliobi.

C: 我养了条狗名叫大黄。
E: My puppy's lick exceeds its bite.

C: 不要担心，我今天没有胃口的…当然，我知道这样的说法不能打消你的疑虑…我向燎原保证…不，我向燧皇保证，你不会有事的！
E: Don't worry about it. I have no appetite for today... Of course, I know just saying that won't dispel any suspicions... But I swear to Ignamar... No, I swear to the Flint Emperor, you'll be just fine!

C: 我只是随手摸摸…
E: I just happened to touch you in passing...

C: 再说了，咱们现实里谁认识谁啊？
E: Besides, does anyone here actually know each other in the real world?

C: 夏，你知道吗？最开始的那几年，我每晚都会在梦里见到你的背影。每次从梦里惊醒，我的心都会剧烈生疼。
E: Char, let me tell you. In those first few years, every night I would see you in my dreams, facing away from me. Every time I woke from those dreams, my heart would burn from the pain.

C: 我明白了，夏。恭喜你，恭喜你终于实现了梦想。
E: I understand, Char. Congratulations. Congratulations on making your dream come true.

C: 嗯…对不起，让您见笑了。
E: Yeah... I'm sorry. I know it's pathetic.

C: 您听过这个名字吗？
E: Have you heard this name before?

C: 要是实在缺钱了，就带着它去找<color=#dbc291ff>「斐迪南德」</color>，他在黄金的时刻，是个废零件商人。看到这个，他会给你开个好价钱的。
E: If you are ever low on money, take it to <color=#dbc291ff>Ferdinand</color> in the Golden Hour, he's a scrap parts dealer. He'll give you a good price when he sees this.

C: 喂，你怎么看？
E: Hey, what do you think?

C: 我不愿意。
E: I will not.

C: 有个好消息要与您分享。鉴于…您是本店尊贵的第八百八十八万位客人，此前的消费金额将悉数返还到您的账户，请您注意查收。
E: I have wonderful news to share with you. As you are the <unbreak>8,880,000</unbreak>th customer in our store, all previous purchases you have made will be refunded to your account. Please make sure you receive your funds.

C: 若是听这小曲，心里头实在喜欢，不妨留点打赏，小女子也好唱得更卖力些。
E: If this song of mine brings you joy, perhaps you could leave a small tip and I will put even more heart into my performance.

C: 这样说可能会让我显得很…难以形容，但我从第一天起就无法忘记它的样貌、它的身姿。
E: This might sound embarrassing, but I haven't been able to get it out of my mind since the day I saw it.

C: 所有可能危害到它的…都由我来打倒……
E: I'll get rid of... everything that might harm it...

C: 大鸟似乎把你的动静当作了摇篮的韵律，悠悠然地发出呓语，和梦里的机巧鸟举杯对饮。
E: It seems that the giant bird feels your stirring movements as nothing more than the gentle rhythm of a rocking cradle. It let out relaxed murmurings and raise a toast to the cycranes in its dreams.

C: 有倒是有。
E: I do, but...

C: 过奖了，只是在这方面略有涉猎。
E: You're too kind. I've just done a little reading into this kind of thing.

C: 我倒想消气，可那小杂种还借了我一千苜蓿币没还！
E: I'd love to calm down, but that little runt borrowed a thousand Alfalfa credits from me and hasn't returned it!

C: 好提议，等把这个案子办完，我就抽空去放松放松。
E: A fine suggestion. Once this case is solved, I'll make time to get some good rest in.

C: 那位巡海游侠…或者别的什么隐世高手。不知道她现在正身在何方？
E: The Galaxy Ranger... Or secret master or whatever. I wonder where she is right now?

C: 啊，能在这儿站一会什么也不做真是太好了，而且还是离因果殿这么远的地方，一想到要回去继续工作我就忍不住希望这一刻能永远永远永远持续下去……
E: It's so good to stand here and do nothing. And this is so far away from the Hall of Karma. The mere thought of having to return to mountains of criminal reports makes me wish I could stand here for ever and ever and ever...

C: 真高兴见到你，桶王的第二门徒。
E: I am happy to see you, Second Disciple of the King of Cans.

C: 那不是桶王。
E: That is not the King of Cans.

C: 所以我总结了经验教训，借鉴了现存星神的形象和宣传词，连夜赶制了这个全新版本。人形，好看，人气绝对低不了。
E: So I've summarized the lessons learned from my experience, and with reference to the existing Aeons' images and promotional messages, I burned the midnight oil to come out with this all-new version. With this charming appearance, their popularity can never be low.

C: 对吧！我们铁桶之神，也是要注重公众形象的。
E: Right! Even as a God of Iron Can, public image is important too.

C: 我要变成铁桶！
E: I want to turn into an iron can!

C: 老大，你终于回来了！根据你的建议，我们已经从抢劫犯毕业了！
E: Boss, yer finally back! Thanks to yer suggestion, we've finally moved on from bein' robbers!

C: 啊！这位{F#女士}{M#先生}，请允许我直视你的光辉，你的身躯比超新星还要耀眼，你的美德就连旅过千星的苦修者也无法企及。
E: Ah! {F#Madam}{M#Sir}, please allow me to get a good look at your brilliance! Your body is more dazzling than a supernova! Not even an ascetic who has traveled many stars could aspire to match your virtue!

C: 一看到你，我的心里就像下了场两百万年的雨，苦寒的坚冰也化作生机的雨林。
E: One look at you and it feels like two million years of rain has fallen on my heart, and what was once bitterly cold and frozen has thawed to form a vibrant rainforest!

C: 知更鸟哽住了。
E: Robin chokes on her words.

C: 想想，这才是你深切爱着知更鸟小姐的证明啊。你不收，有的是粉丝愿意收。
E: Think about it — this is how you can demonstrate your love for Miss Robin. If you don't want it, there are plenty of other fans who do.

C: 一切都刚刚好。
E: Everything worked out just fine in the end.

C: 包裹里塞满了匹诺康尼特产。你再三回忆，确信某些星球会将这种无故投递礼物的行为称为「投喂」，当地传统将之视为友谊的象征。
E: The package is stuffed full of Penacony specialties. After thinking about it for a while, you are certain that the natives of some planets call the unprompted act of delivering gifts "feeding." According to local customs, such behavior is viewed as a symbol of friendship.

C: 谨慎地接触。
E: Touch it cautiously.

C: 你愕然，究竟是骑枪带给你真实的温暖，抑或是星穹列车的同伴们带给你的暖意，抑或是身旁那位一刀足以斩碎夜空的黄泉…你无从得知，你只记得在心跳加速时那份暖意不曾散去。
E: You're stunned. Did that sensation of warmth come from your lance, your companions from the Astral Express, or from the woman whose blade could slice through the night sky — Acheron? You don't know. You only know that the warmth was there while your heart was racing.

C: 有趣的爱好…{NICKNAME}，需要帮你按下跳过键吗？
E: Interesting hobby, {NICKNAME}... Shall I press the skip button for you?

C: 正确的，大家都很喜欢你。
E: You're right. Many people like you.

C: 虽然逻辑稍显天马行空，但它好在足够简洁。书犯了错，被抓起来了，它本该早早出现，命运却和它开起了玩笑，它被抓进了你一开始无法前往的幽囚狱……
E: While this reasoning may seem fantastical, it holds a succinct truth. The book committed a crime and was captured. It should have appeared sooner, yet fate plays a cruel joke on it. It was confined in The Shackling Prison, a place you couldn't access at first...

C: 赤衣带着狱卒来到你所在的地方，顺利带走了逃犯。
E: Chiyi arrives at your location with the prison guards and uneventfully leads the fugitive away.

C: …这是在下的使命。
E: ...This is my duty to bear.

C: 赤衣带着狱卒来到你所在的地方，顺利将逃犯带走。
E: Chiyi arrives at your location with the prison guards and uneventfully leads the fugitive away.

C: 闭嘴。
E: Silence.

C: 十王司的人好像对我们在这里采集素材有些不满。
E: It seems like the people from the Ten-Lords Commission are unhappy with us gathering material here.

C: 在这里还喝什么苏乐达？你要喝鳞渊冰泉！
E: Why would you even drink SoulGlad here? You should be drinking Scalegorge Spring Water!

C: 我是一件行李！
E: That's right. I'm luggage!

C: 鉴于这充满艺术性的表现，我将这个程序命名为——演武仪典二十一响！
E: Given the artistic nature of this display, I've named this program... the "Wardance <unbreak>21</unbreak>-Gun Salute"!

C: 我是来修空调的。
E: I'm here to fix the AC.

C: 据说，你被仁科按着脑袋讲解阵法的视频，迅速窜上了各大门户网站的热搜榜。
E: Rumor has it that Renke holding your head while explaining the correct view to watch the display quickly became a trending topic on various popular sites.

C: 对付你？不。我修习的「补天神功」并不能用来战斗，只能用来防御。只要我不破功，就没人能伤我分毫。
E: Overpower you? No. I have mastered Skymending, but it cannot be used for offense, only defense. As long as I do not disrupt my technique, no one can harm me.

C: 六哥，咱们上吧。
E: Brother Six, let's go.

C: 正当你准备掏出球棍冲进去时，劫匪和被绑架的老者走了出来，而增援的云骑军也到了。
E: Just as you prepare to draw your bat and enter the room, the kidnapper and the tied hostage walk out of the room, just in time to be greeted by the Cloud Knight reinforcements.

C: 丽姬娅！
E: Ligeia!

C: 能确定的是，在折纸大学杂乱的房间里——一个酒瓶的演员梦，轻轻地碎了。
E: What is certain, is that in a cluttered room in Paperfold University, a bottle's acting dream has been softly smashed.

C: 一张平平无奇的纸张吸引了你的注意，上面记录着一串文字：「关注心理健康，保障平安巡航——列车组心理测试，『心理诊疗师』为您服务」。
E: A piece of plain paper catches your eye, with a message written on it: "For your mental well-being and safe travels — psychological assessment for the Express Crew. Psychotherapist at your service."

C: 所谓「时尚测验」，是根据受试者的穿搭偏好，测试受试者心象风景的心理测试手段。
E: The so-called Fashion Quiz is a psychological assessment that evaluates participants' inner landscape based on their tastes in outfits.

C: 看来「脑波扫描」果然还是个不大稳定的技术。
E: It seems that Brainwave Scan is still an unstable technology.

C: 果然，最适合人类的姿势还是躺着。
E: Lying down really is just the best position for a human.

C: 白厄为你包扎了根本没伤的手臂，带着歉意离开了……
E: Phainon bandages your completely unwounded arm for you, then leaves apologetically...

C: 还是相信自己吧！
E: It's better to believe in yourself!

C: 吼吼，有点幽默，但不太多。回答得太过宽泛，如此说来，尼卡多利的长矛岂非也是答案？
E: Ho-ho, it's a little funny, but not by much. And the answer's too general. If that's the case, wouldn't Nikador's lance also be the answer?

C: 「狮之口会欺骗你们吗？」奥赫玛的公民们摇头。「狮之口通晓奥赫玛所有的谜题与谜底吗？」奥赫玛的公民们点头。
E: "Does Bucca Leonis lie?" Okhema's citizens shake their heads. "Does Bucca Leonis know all the riddles and answers in Okhema?" Okhema's citizens nod their heads.

C: 吼，本狮还是揭晓正确答案吧，那就是——「房间里的大地兽」。
E: Ho, I shall reveal the correct answer then. It is... "a dromas in a room."

C: 与其自己想破脑袋，不如问问富有智慧的新朋友们吧！
E: Rather than tear your hair out, might as well ask your new friends brimming with wisdom!

C: 请你不要假扮成旁白！
E: Don't pretend to be the narrator, thank you very much!

C: 听起来还挺励志的…
E: Sounds pretty inspirational...

C: 你救了我，谢谢。但要是不忙的话，能否再给我点柴火？这地方很少会有人来，如果没被你发现，我可能就真要熄灭了。
E: Thank you for saving me. But if you're not too busy, can I have some more firewood? Not a lot of people come through here, and I might really have been extinguished if you didn't find me.

C: 没人比我更懂美梦…
E: No one understands dreams better than me...

C: 一阵窸窸窣窣的声音从黑暗中传来，可能是某种鬼怪在潜伏…也可能是风吹动了垃圾袋。
E: A scuffling sound travels through the darkness — could be lurking monsters... or maybe just the wind blowing at trashbags.

C: 你是不是魔怔了…
E: You seem rather obsessed...

C: 正确，虽然我并不提倡以暴制暴，但这是消除欺凌最直接的方案。
E: Correct. Although I don't advocate violence against violence, this is the most straightforward way to eliminate bullying.

C: （看看信的内容。）
E: (Take a peek at the letters.)

C: （好伙伴，能收到你的来信，我真的很高兴……）
E: (Dear pal, it fills me with joy to receive your letter...)

C: 生命花园的奇美拉都不带这么干活的。
E: Even the chimera from the Garden of Life wouldn't work this hard.

C: 是呀，还回了好多封迷！<color=#dbc291ff>他教会我打扫树屋，教会我修理信箱，教会我做好吃的，还告诉我好多外面的故事…就像当年一样。</color>
E: It is! He sent so many, memi! <color=#dbc291ff>He taught me how to clean the treehouse, how to fix the mailbox, how to cook delicious food, and told me so many stories about the outside world... just like before.</color>

C: 软乎乎的小海豹，在水池里一摇一摆，嘟嘟的，嘟嘟的…真是可爱到不行~
E: Soft and snuggy baby seal, splishing and splashing about, all chubby and pudgy... They're just too cuuute~

C: 它正在朝村庄的方向走去！
E: It's heading straight for the village!

C: 采取强硬手段。
E: Get tough.

C: 这么看来，在不同的时间，{NICKNAME}和丹恒的步履曾经与黑塔女士重叠。
E: Which means that at various moments, {NICKNAME} and Dan Heng's paths have overlapped with Madam Herta's.

C: 即便其主早已在「自我加冕」中身陨，那台权杖也仍未停止运作。可怖的算力潮汐于其中涌动，却从未向外界漾出一丝波澜。
E: Even though its operator had perished in "Self-Coronation," that scepter continued to function. Terrifying computational tides surged within it, yet not a single ripple escaped to the outside world.

C: 很难想象，运算了上百个琥珀纪的权杖，其内部会是多么疯狂的光景。
E: It's hard to imagine the madness within a scepter that has been extrapolating for over a hundred Amber Eras.

C: 而在启程前，如果{NICKNAME}有心情，<color=#dbc291ff>随时可以来找我</color>。人家会在这里一直等着你的♪
E: In case {NICKNAME} feels up to it before we set off, you <color=#dbc291ff>can come find me anytime</color>. I'll be waiting for you here~ ♪

C: 而我，将以此身投入天秤——
E: As for me, I shall give my body to tip the balance...

C: 呃…对不起，我刚从漫长的旅途中醒来，灵智不太清晰，缓缓……
E: Um... apologies. I've just awakened from an extended journey, and my thoughts are clouded. Just a moment...

C: 你敲了敲它的木壁，想知道究竟发生了什么。不多时，内部终于传来了回应。
E: You knock on its wooden wall, wondering what happened. Soon enough, a response sounds from within.

C: 希望吧。雅努斯指引前路，但归途如何始终是个未知数。
E: We can only hope. While Janus may light the path ahead, the journey home always remains uncertain.

C: 其余神驹都去往别的城邦了，就剩我留在这。往后你要有事，见到的就都是我了。
E: The other divine foals have all departed for different cities. I'm the only one still around, so I'll be your go-to helper from now on.

C: 拉冬是个寒冷的地方，地势很高，追逐着天空，荒凉土地间遍布着陷阱与暗算，可他们的人民确实善战。我们需要拉冬的力量。
E: Ladon lies cold and high, stretching all the way to the sky. Its desolate terrain riddled with traps and treachery, yet its people are fierce warriors. We could use their strength.

C: 哼，神驹独自在世间奔行，谁不曾忍受过旅途的孤寂？只因为有使命在身。
E: Hmph. Every divine foal gallops alone in the world, and all of us have experienced the biting pains of solitude. We bear it for our calling.

C: 飘渺的声音仍在空中回荡，但那匹木马早已不在身旁——它确实将你送达了新的场所。
E: The mysterious voice still lingers in the air, but the wooden horse has disappeared — having successfully transported you elsewhere.

C: 呼呼！活过来了！
E: Woohoo! Back to life!

C: 是时候去点亮其他活火了。
E: It's time to go and light the other Living Flames.

C: 离开
E: Leave

C: 不过……看你的眼神，似乎很好奇的样子。这种眼神可在大人里不多见了。
E: However... the curiosity in your eyes... I don't see that a lot in grown-ups' eyes.

C: 如果您感觉心理难受，我可以帮助您缓解一些压力。这也是我能为空间站做出的微薄贡献。
E: If you are not well mentally, I can help you relieve some stress. This is the least I can do for the space station.

C: 当然，年轻人。我们好像是第一次见？
E: Of course. I don't think we have met before, youngster.

C: 我还有些事情需要问你…
E: I've got something to ask you.

C: 你为什么不离开这里？
E: Why didn't you leave?

C: 更何况，寰宇之间，应该很难有比这里更加安全的地方了吧？
E: Besides, I don't think there's any other place in the universe safer than here.

C: 不难看出你果真有一双慧眼，善于发现问题最本质的痛点所在。
E: I can see you have sharp eyes and you are good at spotting the most essential pain point of the issue.

C: 幸好科技发展速度很快，我和她虽然见不到面，但可以用其他方式来往。
E: Thanks to technological development, although we don't get to see each other, we can communicate via other ways.

C: 既然对她而言，是幸福的体验，那时间长一些，也是一种享受吧？
E: Since it is such a happy experience for her, it must be enjoyable to stay there for a longer time, right?

C: 隔壁科室的混蛋是谁？
E: Who are the scoundrels from the department next door?

C: 唔，要不干脆把这两个奇物都送给波少吧？这样就不用担心他不喜欢了~
E: Hmm, why don't I give both Curios to him? That way I don't have to worry that he might not like it.

C: 哎呀，世玲真是最讨厌你这种刨根问底的新人啦！
E: Jeez, I hate newbies like you who always try to get to the bottom of everything!

C: 你看上去很忙。
E: You look busy.

C: 休息？哦…工作之外的时间我也有自己的私事要处理。主要是个人体能训练和资料学习。
E: Personal time? Oh... I do have things to take care of outside work, mostly studying and training.

C: 嗯好，那我们回头再聊！
E: All right, till next time then!

C: 空间站里可以网购吗？
E: Can you order stuff online at the station?

C: 怎么了，是遇到什么麻烦了吗？
E: Did you encounter some problems?

C: 你长得真高啊，感觉你一定很聪明，萍萍姐就比我高一点，但她知道的可真多……
E: You must be very smart given how tall you are. Wenfry is slightly taller and so much more knowledgeable than me...

C: 这算哪门子「传统」？
E: What kind of tradition is that?

C: 它抬起头瞪了瞪你，发现你无动于衷，于是低下头去当做什么也没发生过。
E: It looks up and glares at you. Seeing your indifference, it lowers its head and pretends nothing has happened.

C: 哎？又是你，说吧，找我是有何贵干？
E: Huh? It's you again. Just tell me what brings you here.

C: 阮•梅并不需要我这样的失败品，就算再独特，也始终是失败品！喵！是失败品！
E: Ruan Mei doesn't need a failure like me. No matter how special I am, I'm still a failure! Meow! A failure!

C: 什么预约？
E: Appointment?

C: 它对你眨了眨眼，话语里似乎别有深意。
E: It gives you a wink, and what it says seems to be hinting at something.

C: 我没什么想问的了。
E: I have no more questions.

C: 远程信号正常，检测到视野内有生命迹象。
E: Remote signals normal. Signs of life detected within the field of vision.

C: 别担心，不好的东西会睡去。接着，我们可以创造新的「故事」。不用感到遗憾…不用感到不舍。
E: Don't worry. The bad stuff will fall into slumber, and then we can create a new story. There's no need to feel regret or sorry...

C: （关闭终端。）
E: (Shut down the terminal.)

C: 哈哈，不是什么大事。您看，拼起来还能用，牢固着呢。
E: Haha, it's a minor setback. Look, you can still use it if you piece it back together. It's very durable.

C: 这、这…这是所谓化劲儿！
E: Th—The... shield was converting incoming force into its own!

C: （按照哈托努斯所说，击打普通盾牌试试矛的成色吧……）
E: (Do as Chartonus suggests and test the spear against a normal shield...)

C: 奥赫玛识字的公民都知道，阿卡索斯早已在黑潮中覆灭。你如何从一座不存在的城邦来？
E: As all who can read in Okhema know that Icatus was long since destroyed by the black tide. How could you have come from a city that does not exist?

C: 无意义的诡辩。你的提问无非是在混淆概念。
E: A meaningless argument. Your line of questioning is conflating different concepts with each other.

C: 秉着简洁的原则，我认为——<color=#dbc291ff>「阿卡索斯」并不存在</color>，能确定的只是*有个城邦*，仅此而已。
E: Based on the principle of simplicity, I think that... "Icatus" does not in fact exist, and all we can be certain of is that there is a city.

C: （驳斥：你在混淆概念。）
E: (Rebuttal: You are confusing separate concepts.)

C: （驳斥：你在虚设实体。）
E: (Rebuttal: You are creating a fictional entity.)

C: 哈！看起来，你似乎还未完全被说服？
E: Hah! I see that you are still not entirely convinced?

C: 谁知道它是否存在呢？我能做的，无非是提醒人们对未经思考的事物保持怀疑。无论那是阿卡索斯，是泰坦神明，亦或是…绝对正确的预言。
E: Who knows if it exists? All I can do is remind people to remain suspicious of any object that has not been thoroughly reflected upon. Whether that be Icatus, the Titans and gods, or even... A prophecy of absolute truth.

C: 然而就在昨天，我做了个梦…梦中我看见他们在争吵，在一个临时搭建的营地里…那或许就是他们当年失踪的地方——这、这想来必定是欧洛尼斯给予我的启示……
E: And then just yesterday I had this dream... where they were arguing in a makeshift camp they'd rigged together... which might be where they disappeared to back then — i—it had to be a revelation sent to me by Oronyx...

C: 在外期间，波瑟芬妮得知哈德斯与拉达曼勾结的真相，并因此受到威胁；她偷偷录下证据，想要借助游荡的泰坦眷属吸引他们的注意力并逃脱。但……
E: While outside the city, Possephone learned the truth about Hadez being in cahoots with Rhadaman, and she was threatened. She secretly recorded some evidence and planned on using wandering Titankin as a distraction to make her escape. However...

C: 腐朽的老贵族，连儿女的幸福也要没收。铭记历史令人明智，也令悲剧轮回。
E: Those depraved old aristocrats are stealing even their children's happiness. Remembering history makes us wise, but also repeats the cycle of tragedy.

C: 上一代的仇恨，会在我们这里终结。
E: Let the hatred of previous generations stop with us.

C: 我，会随你到天涯海角，我的宁芙……
E: I will follow you to the ends of the earth, my darling Nympha...

C: 抱歉要告诉你这个坏消息。
E: I hate to be the bearer of bad news.

C: 就是帮旁边那位跑个腿。
E: Just running an errand for the people beside me.

C: 出入多加小心。
E: Be careful coming and going.

C: 呃，我不好说……
E: Um, I can't really say...

C: 你们那还有没有……
E: Do you still have...

C: 但我看屏幕上…你看这里，这个舱段你们也确认过了？那怎么还亮着警示灯？
E: But on the screen here... look at this. Have you confirmed this zone yet? Why is the warning light still on?

C: …你…还…活着吗？喂喂……
E: ...Are you... still alive? Hey...

C: 嗟，来食——
E: Ho, eat —

C: 大地兽望向故乡的方向，发出低沉的悲鸣，可回应它的只有淡漠的云，以及空洞的风。
E: The dromas gazes towards the direction of its homeland, letting out a low, mournful cry. But the only response is indifferent clouds and hollow winds.

C: （那群悬锋族人真打算返乡吗…去奥赫玛的城门口看看吧。）
E: (Are those Kremnoans really planning to go back? Maybe I should check the gates of Okhema.)

C: 我承认这里存在着一些悖论，但按常识来说，埃德加不会认知到剧本外的世界。
E: I admit there are some paradoxes here, but by common sense, Edgar wouldn't be aware of a world beyond the script.

C: 从犯之责，我明白了，我接受。
E: As an accomplice. I understand. I accept.

C: 骗不到他，得想想别的办法……
E: We can't fool him. We need another approach...

C: 声源不应该那么近。
E: The voice is coming from way too close.

C: 是的，即将到来的是战斗环节。好在你身边的伙伴个个身怀绝技，你或许可以求助于他们？
E: Yes, the battle phase is about to begin. Fortunately, the surrounding companions are all skilled in their own ways, you might want to ask for their help?

C: 不过这要考验您的身法。假如不慎被追上，恐怕就免不了一场苦斗了。
E: But this will test your agility. If you're not careful and get caught, it's bound to turn into a tough fight.

C: 刻牢刻和克利克钻进草丛不见了，远处传来令人悚然的呼号，随后，泛着刺目红光的黑色乱流汹涌而来。
E: Kelok and Kilik disappeared into the bushes, vanishing from sight. In the distance, a chilling howl echoed, followed by a surge of black turbulence, glowing with an ominous red light, rushing forward.

C: 你突然想起来自己好像还缺些养成材料。你知道的，养成材料永远都不会嫌太多。
E: You suddenly remember that you still need some upgrade materials. You know how it is. There's no such thing as too many upgrade materials.

C: 呃…还是不要采取这么激进的战术吧？
E: Um... should we really take such an aggressive approach?

C: 曾有客人问我们，如果用「最强之矛」攻击「最强之盾」会发生什么。尝试的结果是，两者都一同化为齑粉。
E: A customer once asked what would happen if the Strongest Lance were to strike the Strongest Shield. We tested it — both items pulverized each other into dust.

C: 向天父起誓，我们一定全力以赴，不让诸位的努力白费。
E: By the sky father, we will do our utmost not to let everyone's efforts go to waste.

C: 我考虑过了，还是不行。
E: Thought about it. Still nope.

C: 全知伟大的天父啊，看看这些可怜的卫兵，看看你的子民吧！为什么永恒的圣城会出现死难者，难道你抛弃他们了吗？
E: All-knowing sky father! See your fallen guards, your people! Why does death stain the holy city? Have you abandoned them?

C: 站在这里，身形足够隐蔽，你摸了摸口袋里那枚石制的扩声器，想象着「好心的守卫叔叔」藏身在此回应希瑞雅的场景，做好了准备。
E: Standing there, you're well concealed enough. You grip the stone amplifier in your pocket and think of how "Mr. Nice Guard" responded to Serena hiding here. Then, you prepared yourself.

C: ……我明白了。
E: ...I understand.

C: 委托名「法吉娜大人在哪」，推演结果是「在水里，在水里」。
E: Request: "Where is Lady Phagousa?" - Extrapolation Result: "In the water, in the water."

C: 呵，情况我理解了，让我一试吧。
E: Well then, I've been briefed. I'll see what I can do.

C: 果然…法吉娜的权柄已经彻底消散了，事到如今，仅靠海洋的仪式，无法使它恢复分毫。
E: I suspected as much. Phagousa's authority entirely faded away. The Ocean's rituals alone cannot restore even the slightest bit of it now.

C: 先回到酿造区吧，这一次，也要麻烦阁下了。
E: Let's head back to the harvest zone. I'll need your help one more time.

C: 海瑟音大人唯一的嘱咐，便是将它交给她所等待的那一位——
E: She left just one request, that this bottle find its way to the person she's been waiting for—

C: 如果能观测到更短的波长，那可以当作论文的新选题…不过不是今天的重点啦。
E: If shorter wavelengths could be observed, it'd make for a good thesis... But that's not the focus of today.

C: 这个说法可能过于抽象，但这就是我刚刚见到你时的直观印象。休息时间能和好朋友偶遇，怎么说都是件开心的事。
E: ...And this might sound a little strange, but that's how I felt when I first met you, hehe. Anyway, whichever way you slice it, it's always nice to bump into a friend.

C: 若想要诊所的孩子们全身心地感受这风景…那就必须让他们来亲眼看看才行呢。
E: For the children in the clinic to truly know the feeling of this view, they'd have to be here to see it themselves.

C: 不过…虎克觉得，你们的列车也不比我们的诊所差！
E: Although... The Express looks almost as good!

C: 客气什么呀，这都是虎克应该做的！
E: No need for formalities — you deserve it!

C: 哦，对了！她还专门给我看了看她的杰作…那可真是太——酷啦！看得我实在手痒痒，可惜我也不好意思和人说能不能拆开看看……
E: Oh, and she showed me her masterpiece too. I gotta say: Soooo cool! It was hard to resist the urge to open it up and see what was inside, but I managed to control myself...

C: 都是朋友，来了就好。
E: We're friends, I'm just glad you could make it.

C: 如果铁卫有这样的列车……
E: If the Guards had a train like this...

C: 那还挺巧的…我带了些礼物给你们。
E: Is that so? Well, I've got something for you.

C: 这是铁卫全军为报答列车拯救了贝洛伯格，特意为你们准备的礼物。
E: This is a gift from the Silvermane Guards, to show our gratitude towards those who saved Belobog.

C: 你看我干啥！
E: Why are you looking at me?

C: 我明白了，这是习惯差异。朋克洛德没这传统，星核猎手一般也不这么做事。
E: I see, it's just a cultural difference. Punklorde doesn't have this custom, and the Stellaron Hunters don't generally observe this kind of tradition either.

C: 不过凭丹鼎司那些老家伙，他们就算想破脑袋也不会猜到我在哪儿。
E: ...I don't wanna give the Alchemy Commission time to discover my itinerary, that's all.

C: 嘿嘿，药嘛，有备无患，肯定能用得上。
E: Hehe, can't do without medicine. It's always better to be prepared.

C: 我没有别的事情想和你说了。
E: I don't have anything else to say to you.

C: 原本我还想着能多问几句的……
E: I did want to ask him a few more questions, but...

C: 你什么记性呀？当时你不也在场嘛！哎呀，世玲可不愿意再回忆一次痛苦的经历。
E: Don't you remember? You were there too! Ugh, I don't want to relive that terrible experience ever again.

C: 还是不打扰你了。
E: I better leave you alone then.

C: 哎，物是人非咯！
E: *sigh* How things have changed!

C: 我说的是咖啡——应该是叫这个名字吧？
E: I'm talking about coffee — is that what it's called?

C: 如果是查拉图斯特拉萨帕拉伊斯坎德拉山的话…恐怕也看不到吧。
E: I can hardly even see Mt. Zarathustrazapala Iskandra.

C: 唔，我的直觉不对吗？
E: Uhh, that is unless you're thinking of a different Himeko?

C: 我刚刚碰到三月七和丹恒了——之前只听说过他们跟你并肩作战的事，现在终于有机会见见本人了。
E: I just met March and Dan Heng — I'd heard about your adventures together but this is the first chance I got to meet them in the flesh.

C: 欢迎你常来。
E: You're welcome to visit more often.

C: 真理往往在兼看兼听之中，若是只能看到自己眼前的东西，那便是播穅眯目，难见大江大河了。
E: Truth often lies in seeing and listening to other perspectives. When one sees only what is in front of them, they are blind to the bigger picture.

C: 上好的狩原毛峰一两、波月莲子三钱、伏冬桑两钱、鳄蝽蜕一钱、草木灰少许。
E: One tael of top-tier Hunter Maofeng tea, three maces of lunarescent lotus seeds, two maces of frost mulberries, one mace of shed crocbug skin, and a pinch of plant ash.

C: 不得不说，如果这就是「咖啡」的味道…那我还挺同情那些花大价钱买新鲜的人的。
E: I have to admit, if this is the taste of coffee... I can't help but feel sorry for those who shell out a fortune for it.

C: 呃…你没事吧？
E: Uh... are you alright?

C: 可能是「开拓」之力在起作用。
E: It might be the power of the Trailblaze at work.

C: 是借助了星神的力量吗？原来如此……
E: So it's the power of the Aeon? I see...

C: 好多星星……
E: There are so many stars...

C: 什么决定？
E: Decided what?

C: 社恐真是太辛苦了。
E: Social anxiety can be tough sometimes.

C: 有时我也会过于心急。这绣面要勾勒出花鸟绰约之姿，就要不紧不慢，时刻调整呼吸。
E: At times, my eagerness gets the better of me. To truly capture the grace of the birds and flowers in the embroidery, one must be patient and adjust one's breathing.

C: 虽然我觉得味道不错，但就个人喜好而言，我还是倾向于更能体现食物本味的糕点。
E: The taste is pleasant, but I personally have a soft spot for pastries that showcase more... organic flavors.

C: 在你们的智库中，知识也是以数据的形式储存。
E: So, within your esteemed data bank, knowledge is reduced to mere bytes and bits?

C: 我笑了。这就是无名客？忙忙碌碌，从没停下的时候。
E: Hah. So this is the life of a "Nameless"? Eternally bustling about, never catching a moment's rest.

C: 嗯，这些困难打不倒我们。爷爷说过，困难和挑战是成为英雄必须要经历的事情。
E: That's right. Grandpa always said that facing difficulties is part of becoming a hero.

C: 别怀疑，请相信。
E: Don't doubt it. Believe in your intuition.

C: 哇！好有耐心，居然一层一层打开了！
E: Whoa! You're so patient — you really peeled off all the layers!

C: 哦！是那盆在不和谐音符下依然茁壮成长的盆栽。
E: Oh! You mean that bonsai that even thrives in disharmony.

C: 他没有姓名，也没有任何记忆，只凭借那一抹「纯美」心绪的指引不断向前……
E: He had no name or memories — he only relied on the guidance of that trace of Beauty to keep moving forward...

C: {NICKNAME}，列车上的星际和平播报，我可以打开一下吗？「老铁」好像有些好奇…
E: {NICKNAME}, can I turn on the Interastral Peace Broadcast on the Express? Old Mettle seems curious about it...

C: 巨无霸帕姆帕姆派！送给你！
E: Then here's a Giant Pom-Pom Pie for you!

C: 爷爷给我的零花钱肯定够我们大吃大喝一顿！不…三顿！
E: With the allowance Grandpa gave me, we'll be able to have a huge meal! No, three huge meals!

C: 群星间的品茗，令人回味……
E: Having this beverage surrounded by the stars brings back memories...

C: 好可爱的帽子……
E: Such a cute hat...

C: 是呀，我听说它就生活在咱们头顶上……
E: Yes. I heard it lives above our heads...

C: 你向下望去，一股强烈的危机感沿着脊椎攀爬至脑后，你默默握紧双拳。
E: As you look down, a strong sense of crisis creeps up your spine to the back of your head. You clench your fists in silence.

C: 「你已进入监控范围，眼看手勿动。」这警告是针对你的吗？从培养田里肆意生长的植物来看，标语牌在这儿停留了很长一段时间，显然是你想多了。
E: "This area is under surveillance. Look with your eyes, not your hands." Is this warning meant for you? Judging from the plants growing wildly in the cultivated field, the sign has been here for quite some time. Surely you are overthinking.

C: 我听说那里有一个房间，里面种了很多花花！
E: I heard there's a room there with lots and lots of flowers planted inside!

C: 他只是想跟你交朋友。
E: He just wants to make friends.

C: 华劳斯想和你做朋友。
E: Wallace wants to be friends with you.

C: 喝完水就要快点长高高帕！
E: More water for you to grow taller, taller, taller!

C: 嗯？你来啦，是见到了什么珍稀动物吗？
E: Oh, you're back. Seen any rare animal species?

C: 感觉如何？是不是有点累赘？
E: How's that feel? A little too wordy?

C: 买房就是一项投资，等到楼盘建好了再买，升值空间就小了。很多人买房都喜欢观望，结果呢，观望着房价就飞涨到压根买不起了。
E: A property is an investment. If you wait until the house is built before you buy it, that'll eat into your profit margin. I've seen lots of people who like to wait before making a purchase. By the time they made their decisions, the price had already gone out of their league.

C: 但现在这上下层即将连通，那势必要迎来一波购房热潮，房价自然要往上走——你想啊，这一来一回不是赚翻了？
E: But now that the Overworld and Underworld are going to be connected soon, people are going to be buying up property for sure. Naturally, housing prices are going to start climbing up. Then, people can make money hand over fist, right?

C: 所以房子都卖出去了？
E: So, did you sell the place?

C: 我是在、是在…是在鼓励人们说出自己的看法！对，如果您读完《雪国冒险奇谭》，觉得它应该被查禁，我也会鼓励您写下自己的观点！
E: I am, uh... merely encouraging people to express themselves. If you think the novel should be banned after reading it, by all means, please say so. I will encourage you to write down your opinion.

C: 大概就是因为这个，筑城者才要把这本书列作禁书吧…据说《雪国冒险奇谭》出版以后，后来一个月走进雪原的失踪人数翻了好几倍。
E: Maybe that's why the Architects insist on banning it... I heard that within a month of the book's publication, the number of people that ventured out into the snow and went missing had gone up exponentially.

C: 是也不是，小女子是歌剧院台柱——的御用配音，嘻嘻。
E: Yes and no. I'm the leading actress... the leading actress' voice-over at the theater, heehee.

C: 我是{NICKNAME}。
E: I'm {NICKNAME}.

C: 没事了，你先忙吧。
E: No worries. I'll leave you to it.

C: 老实说，我挺害怕的。不光是因为周围的环境在变糟，更多的是害怕自己真的会变得和那帮人没有区别，变成我最讨厌的样子。
E: To be honest, I'm scared. It's not just because the environment is getting worse. What's even more terrifying is that I will end up just like those people. I'll become the worst version of myself.

C: 可在经历了生活中各种糟心的事情后…我感觉已经找不到那种能让自己义无反顾投入热情的事了。
E: But after all the upsetting things I've experienced... I feel as if I'll never find something that I can completely throw myself into.

C: 怎么，让我戳到痛处了？你也该多培养下自己的共情能力，像我这样，把世间各种纷扰都尽收眼底……
E: Did I hit the nail on the head? You should develop some empathy so that you can see all the world's troubles like me...

C: 你是不是看谁都不爽？
E: You have a problem with everyone, don't you?

C: 桑博？哦，你说的是那个诈骗犯的假名吧？
E: Sampo? That con artist's alias?

C: 哟，这您可是提了个好问题！等我来给您翻翻……
E: Hmm, that's a good question! Let me see...

C: …啧，我还以为是个从上面来的大人物…你来找我干吗，有什么事吗？
E: ...Gee, I thought you were some big shot from above... So what's your deal?

C: 大守护者不会抛弃我们的，而银鬃铁卫也迟早会回来的，不信的话咱们走着瞧！
E: The Supreme Guardian will never abandon us. And the Silvermane Guards have to return some time. Just you wait and see!

C: 高大，宏伟，比地下的任何工程都要目光长远，承载着我们的希望。
E: It is large, grand, and requires greater foresight than any underground construction project. It is a vessel of our hope.

C: 我不过是再卖些无害的苔藓，我、我可没有招摇撞骗！
E: I'm just selling some harmless moss. I'm not tricking anyone!

C: 我这个说法也没问题吧？
E: I'm being honest, no?

C: 喔，那可太好了！难怪虎克老大会授予你荣誉队员称号呢。谢谢你，{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}！
E: Oh, that's great! No wonder Hook made you an honorary member. Thank you, {F#miss}{M#mister}!

C: 你不要跟着起哄了好吗？我是真的很急。
E: I'm seriously worried. Can you not make it worse?

C: 你可真事不关己，都怪你……
E: Wow, you look so relaxed. It was your fault, you know...!

C: 不知道希儿会怎么想…
E: I wonder what Seele will think...

C: …哎、哎？看我做什么？
E: Huh? What are you looking at me for?

C: 什么麻烦事？
E: What troubles?

C: 不过你得注意，别赶在首演日去，像《白衣之后》和《星尘玫瑰》这种粉丝多的，会把你挤到怀疑人生……
E: But be careful, don't go on their premiere day. For example, shows with many fans like Beneath the White Cloak and Stardust Rose will make the area totally over-crowded...

C: 过不了多久就能见到下层区的亲戚朋友们了…十几年过去了，大家肯定都变化很大吧？
E: Soon we'll be able to see friends and relatives from down in the Underworld again... Things must be quite different after a dozen or more years, right?

C: 哦，这是道冷菜！餐前开胃用的。
E: Oh, it's a cold dish, as an appetizer.

C: 不过，我倒是在考虑要不要重启这项业务……
E: However, I've been thinking about getting back into it...

C: 这一点，我跟你看法相同。但她所代表的势力，以及她展现出来的手腕，也让我们不得不心怀戒备。
E: This is something we agree on. Though the power that she represents and the calculated schemes that she has displayed have caused us to remain guarded.

C: 啊，说到这个…我们机械屋偶尔也会有「摇滚演出」——你要是感兴趣的话，不如来捧个场？
E: Ah, speaking of which... We sometimes put on rock gigs here at the workshop. Why don't you come check it out, if you like?

C: 最近还好吗？
E: How are things these days?

C: 看来你在工地干得不错？
E: Looks like work is coming along well?

C: 而且现在大伙可仰仗我了，每天来请教问题的工人比演唱会观众都多——虽然不太摇滚，但这感觉还真有点小爽。
E: Plus, everyone is seriously counting on me now. I get so many people asking me things every day. It's like a crowd at a concert! It may not be rock'n'roll, but it's kind of cool.

C: 能吃上一顿家里的饭，是件幸事。
E: Eating a home-cooked meal is indeed a fortunate thing.

C: 大守护者换人了，你怎么看？
E: The Supreme Guardian has been replaced. What do you think?

C: 呃，请个别大人……
E: Um, please don't...

C: …你最好是。
E: ...That'd better be the case.

C: 大家就靠克拉拉和史瓦罗的救济生活吗？
E: Everyone depends on Clara and Svarog's salvation, then?

C: 先聊到这里吧。
E: We'll end the talk here for now.

C: 孩子的眼里，冰川是牛奶结冰的产物
E: Kids think glaciers are just frozen milk

C: 可被风吹散的背影，不断嘲笑着我的寂寞
E: This tailwind, my head spins, laughing at my solitude

C: 你好啊{NICKNAME}，虎克这孩子承蒙你照顾了。
E: Hey there, {NICKNAME}. Thank you for taking care of Hook.

C: 哈哈哈，之前我还以为再也不能活着见到蓝天了呢。
E: Hahaha, yeah! I thought I'd never see the blue sky again.

C: …咳，别介意，我之前是负责用户体验改进的，对于这些方面比较在意……
E: ...Ahem, sorry, I used to work in the user experience department, so I'm a bit obsessed with these details...

C: 哼~哼哼...
E: Oink~ Oink oink...

C: …下次加油。
E: ...Better luck next time.

C: …你好，水先生！
E: ...Hello, Mr. Water!

C: 叫你们经理来！
E: I want to speak to your manager!

C: 贝、「贝洛伯格的夜」…？
E: Bel... Belobog Night...?

C: 那敢情好啊！我赶紧怂恿女儿考驾照去，这下采购可方便多了。
E: That's good news! I'll persuade my daughter to get her driver's license, that'll make my future shopping much more laborsaving.

C: 大守护者好像要颁布新政策了。
E: I think the Supreme Guardian is going to issue a new policy.

C: 我的论文又被打回来了……
E: My thesis was rejected again...

C: 听起来真是神秘啊。
E: Sounds really mysterious.

C: 呜呜呜…我就想要那个！
E: Boohoo... But that's the one I wanted!

C: …多嘴，他肯定能翻盘！
E: ...Enough of that. He'll surely turn the tide!

C: 哎，错了错了！
E: Oh, that was wrong!

C: 该不该求史瓦罗大佬……
E: Should I ask Boss Svarog for help...

C: 我也想参加比赛啊…
E: I also want to participate...

C: 废旧仪器的回收…
E: And recycle those worn devices...

C: 欢迎来到贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆，外来者。
E: Welcome to the Belobog History and Culture Museum, outsider.

C: 没准她还挺适合做这门工作的。
E: She's pretty suitable for a job like this.

C: 现如今，持明龙师也会派遣持明族中擅长云吟法术的青年参与冥差工作，协助维持幽囚狱的水障结构…十王司幽囚狱会永远感谢持明族的付出。
E: Even today, the Vidyadhara Preceptors would send Vidyadhara youths skilled in cloudhymn magic to join the spiritfarers in maintaining the prison's flood barriers... The Ten-Lords Commission and The Shackling Prison are eternally grateful for the Vidyadhara's contribution.

C: 玩具、门铃…停停停，你别光顾着拍手了，我这只是卖吆喝。您这一拍手，反倒是变成街头节目了。
E: Toys, doorbells... Wait, don't just clap along. I'm hawking for business. If you clap like that, people will think it's a street show.

C: 最近有本推理小说很火热，但是我没看过，自然没法向你仔细介绍。不过，你要是对内容感兴趣的话，买了就知道了。
E: There's a new suspense novel out that's very popular, but I haven't read it yet, so can't go over the exact details. But if you're interested in such stories, just buy it and you'll know for sure.

C: 我自己是习惯将书录入玉兆里。但总架不住有人喜欢「手捧书卷的感觉」。活得越久，人就越喜欢追求所谓的仪式感。
E: I personally like downloading and reading off my jade abacus, but there's always people who like the feeling of holding paper books in their hands. The longer people live, the more they crave this kind of ceremony.

C: 可我只是一朵蘑菇。
E: But I'm a mushroom.

C: 尽管我只是朵蘑菇。
E: Even though I'm just a mushroom.

C: 你们俩不要再吵啦！
E: You two: Quit arguing!

C: 你们这些制片，除了钱和人情之外还能不能多接触一点广阔的宇宙？
E: You producers... Besides money and favors, what else do you know about the ways of the world?

C: 您是不知道，我为了把脱落的毛发编织成绳子，付出了多少时间和心血！这东西要是放在外面，那不得卖个艺术品的价格啊！
E: You don't know how much time and effort I've put into weaving my shed hairs into a rope! If I were selling it outside, it would be sold as a piece of art!

C: 对啊，就算我在这里想破头也想不出来。不如下班之后玩几轮帝垣琼玉，边打牌的时候边考虑。
E: Yeah, I can't figure it out even if I rack my brain. I think I'll play a few rounds of Celestial Jade after work and think it through then.

C: 狱卒不管你们吗？
E: The prison guards let you do it?

C: 像吃剩的饭、掉下来的牙、甚至是身上搓下来的泥...这些外面人眼里的垃圾，在我这可都是珍贵的原材料。
E: Things like leftover food, teeth that fell out, or dirt scraped off someone's body... They may look like trash to an outsider, but they're all precious raw materials to us.

C: 这饼画得也太过分了…
E: Isn't that asking for too much?

C: 真是愁死我了…哎！
E: I'm at my wit's end here!

C: 建木居然又不长了…
E: The Ambrosial Arbor stops growing again...

C: 和情商低的人聊不来…
E: I can't deal with your attitude...

C: 升迁？
E: Promotion?

C: 别急，这不正要讲呢嘛。
E: Hold on! I was just about to tell you.

C: 您、您说？
E: Y—Yes?

C: 抱歉，你可能误会了。我真正的工作内容并不是「与闲人对话，并帮助{F#她}{M#他}消耗时间」。
E: I'm sorry, you must be mistaken. My job description isn't actually "chatting with an idler and helping them kill time."

C: 啧。上一个这么刺探的来使，已经在幽囚狱里服刑了。
E: Tsk, the last guy who came snooping around here with questions like that is still locked up in the Shackling Prison for espionage.

C: 整个罗浮…不，该说是整个仙舟联盟，恐怕都没几个人能洞察将军的心思吧。
E: Nobody on the entire Luofu... No, nobody in the entire Xianzhou Alliance can really read the general's mind.

C: 银河球棒侠的威名听说过没？
E: Have you ever heard of the great Galactic Baseballer?

C: 而且案牍库记录的可不止是身份信息——犯人们的生平经历、犯罪事实、口供证词、判决文书、服刑表现，事无巨细，统统都记录在案。
E: Plus, we log more than just personal information. Every minute detail is recorded from prisoners' life experiences, criminal records, oral testimonies, judgment documents, and even their performance in serving their sentence.

C: 那大人您请自便，有需要再喊我。
E: Then please feel free to look around, {M#sir}{F#ma'am}. Call me if you need anything.

C: 太卜说了，你是罗浮的贵客，要尽量满足你的要求。所以有任何需要都可以找我。
E: The master diviner tells me that you are an esteemed guest of the Luofu, and that we should do our best to comply with your requests. So if there's anything I can do for you, feel free to look for me.

C: …本来是我在问你，你反倒过来问我了，好吧。
E: ...I was just asking you that, but you asked me the same thing. Okay.

C: 我遇到赛博诈骗了！
E: I've been cyber-scammed!

C: 好像没有庶务相关的事情。
E: I don't think I have anything that's connected to general affairs.

C: 地衡司执事的正式回复。
E: The formal response from a Realm-Keeping Commission officer.

C: 这也太客气了…
E: You're too kind...

C: 你真没有添油加醋？
E: Are you sure you haven't embellished anything?

C: 哈哈，「主簿」这职称是不是听起来很厉害？其实呢，我就是幽囚狱的「笔杆子」。
E: Haha. Doesn't the title of "secretary" sound impressive? In actuality, I am the Shackling Prison's "penholder."

C: 您的脑海里都没有浮现起一张面孔吗？个子小小的，没事儿总在玩牌的那个……
E: Isn't there someone who pops into your mind straight away? Short, always playing tiles...

C: 你是没见过人脸皮厚的时候。
E: You have no idea how shameless some people can get.

C: 互相包容，你们还得一起共事。
E: Show tolerance to each other. After all, you still have to work together.

C: 很难想象你经历过怎样的职场，要么你很幸运，同事间相处愉快；要么你已经是身经百战的老油条，职场上发生的一切你都能接受。
E: It's hard to imagine what your workplace experience has been like. Either you're lucky enough to get on with your colleagues, or you're a seasoned veteran who's capable of accepting anything thrown at them at the workplace.

C: 能有多复杂？
E: How complicated can it be?

C: 外面发生了什么事吗？
E: What happened outside?

C: 「刑警」？莫要拿短生种的事务生搬硬套…我们对付的东西可危险得多。
E: "Police"? "Detective"? Please don't conflate us with the customs of short-life species... The things we handle are far more dangerous.

C: 可惜，药王秘传作乱后，云骑入驻此处，以「周护安全」为名，替代了护珠人的巡视。唉，我们虽百般不满，却也无用。
E: It's a shame that the Cloud Knights moved in after the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus rebelled. These Knights replaced our Pearlkeeper patrols in the name of "keeping the peace." Alas, our myriad of complaints amounted to naught.

C: 这段时间我一直在想，一直在想，但怎么想也想不通——我那时真的应该那么做吗……
E: These days I can't stop thinking about this all the time, but I can never get over it. That day, did I really have to do that...

C: 莫非您是来丹鼎司采购药材的？我这里也有地道的鳞渊境药材，你想要什么？鲛人泪，还是鳞渊天冬？龙鳞珊瑚，还是苍茯苓？
E: Could it be that you came to the Alchemy Commission to buy some medicine? I've got some genuine Scalegorge Waterscape medicine with me. What do you need? Draconic Tears, or perhaps Tian Dong? Dragon scale coral, or cyan poria maybe?

C: 这是我自个儿编的。不过按照习俗，持明蜕生便是将前世种种一笔勾销了。可说来也不奇怪，来这儿准备入海的人身上却总会带着一两件无法割舍的东西。
E: I just made that up myself. But our Vidyadhara tradition involves casting off everything from their previous lives. It's hardly a surprise that those submerging here may be carrying a few things with them that are difficult to let go of.

C: 具体什么事…呃，我自己都记不清了，但我一不会偷二不会抢，所以肯定犯的不是大事。
E: Ah... I don't really, uhhh, remember. But I'm not a robber or a thief, so it can't have been anything serious.

C: 听说你们和工造司的人不对付？
E: I heard that you guys are not on good terms with those from the Artisanship Commission.

C: 世界上哪有这种好事！这种话，我们自己调侃一下自己就算了，有一天我收到朋友发来信息问我「卜者真的有么清闲吗」，我真是无言以对。
E: There is no such thing in this world! When we say that about ourselves, we mean it as a joke. One day, I received a text message from a friend asking me whether diviners were really so free. I was speechless.

C: 我无意与你发生口角。我叫雾生，在这人生地不熟的仙舟上做生意，难免担心「隔墙有耳」，何况这里连墙都没有，我只是比较警惕罢了。
E: I have no intention of arguing with you. My name is Kiryu, and I'm a foreigner doing business on the Xianzhou, where people say "the walls have ears"... not to mention there aren't even any walls here. I was just being careful.

C: …刚才就算是打完招呼了，以后有的是机会可以好好做生意。请问，还有什么要聊的吗？
E: ...So, we're done exchanging pleasantries. There'll be plenty of opportunities for us to do business in the future. Is there anything else you want to discuss?

C: 劳务中介的工作有不能听的？
E: Are you saying an employment agent is involved in things I shouldn't know?

C: 听起来很美好对吧？这就是我所践行的放生理念。
E: Sounds great, right? That's why I release things.

C: 日记本也能放生？
E: Can diary books be "released"?

C: 但金人巷就是有一种说不出的味道，那种…老巷子，街坊邻里的人情味，懂吧？可能这就是所谓的「烟火气」吧。
E: But it's got an indescribable vibe... Like the feeling of "ordinary life and everyday neighbors" in an old alley, you know?

C: …或者，{F#小妹妹}{M#小兄弟}想和我再探讨一下美食吗？
E: ...Or, maybe you'd like to have another talk about food, {F#young lady}{M#young man}?

C: 现在金人巷时不常的就有各地的域外行商到访，个个手里都捏着些不好出手的稀罕玩意儿，跟我一样藏在大衣里面呢～
E: Nowadays outworld traveling merchants come here from time to time, all of them with rare goods that are hard to sell tucked under their coats...

C: 标准回答。
E: The official answer.

C: 是的，您可以向我提出任何问题，只要它们符合社会准则和道德标准，并且不违反任何法律规定。
E: Yes, you are free to ask me any questions you want as long as they are in line with social norms, ethical standards, and legal regulations.

C: 你都卖些什么？
E: What have you got for sale?

C: 在你看来，陶德是个什么样的人？
E: What do you think of Todd?

C: 我们杂技团把总部放到了金人巷，不过平时总要去各地演出，有时候还要去其他仙舟上演出，所以除非逢年过节，不然也不搞剧场，大家都撂地摆摊，各凭本事。
E: Although our headquarters are in Aurum Alley, more often than not, we travel all over to perform, and sometimes we even go to other Xianzhou ships. So, we rarely perform in theaters unless there's a big festival or something. Most of the time, we perform on the street and manage our business independently.

C: 何况最近一番历练，彦卿明白天外有天，人外有人。我的剑要对付的敌人不在罗浮之内…还是得早做准备啊。
E: Besides, from the recent trial I've gone through, I've learned that there's always a wider world out there with more powerful swordfighters than me. And my sword will eventually have to face enemies from beyond the Luofu... So I must be prepared.

C: 多亏龙女大人医术高明，调养了些时日，现在他已经能回神策府处理公文了。
E: Thanks to the Dragon Lady's excellent medical skills, Jing Yuan can now deal with paperwork at the Seat of Divine Foresight after having had plenty of rest.

C: 加油呀！你们一定能成功！
E: Good luck! I'm sure you guys can do it!

C: 但鳞渊境里那些声音遥远又模糊，总有一天，我会听清楚更多、更久远的声音。
E: But the voices in the Scalegorge Waterscape are distant and unclear. One day, I'll definitely hear clearer voices from even more ancient times.

C: 吾亦不是日日能见到小妹，有时也实在不知她过得怎样。小妹每次见到吾，又总是报喜不报忧，让吾担心她是否真的顺遂。
E: I don't see my sister every day, so I'm not always sure how she is, either. Moreover, she only ever brings favorable news whenever we meet, which makes me concerned if she's really doing fine.

C: 还记得我爹对我特别好，给我讲了好多人生的道理。但长大后回忆了一下，老头子好像是个大奸臣…他那些人生道理，我好像也只能取其精华了，哈哈。
E: I also remember my dad was a great man, he taught me a lot of life lessons. Although, as I grew up, I realized that my dad might've been a corrupt minister... I had to take all of his lessons with a pinch of salt, haha!

C: …雪衣大人已经没事了。
E: ...Madam Xueyi is okay now.

C: 我、我可能看上去挺没有威严的，但是十王司是一个有威、威严的部门。
E: I—I may not seem very authoritative, but the Ten-Lords Commission is a very, very serious department.

C: {NICKNAME}大人还有事找我吗？
E: Was there anything else you needed me for, {NICKNAME}?

C: 你是做什么工作的？
E: What do you do for a living?

C: 不过我现在没心情听你说话，一边儿呆着去。
E: I'm not in the mood for your chatter — go away!

C: 您看看，您总穿着这身行头啊，虽说黑金包边低调之中透露着些许奢华，但这不是仙舟式样，总归有些遗憾。
E: Look at your usual garb. Though underneath all that low-profile black and gold lies telltale signs of luxury, it is not Xianzhou clothes, and a pity at that.

C: 配合客人的演出而已。
E: I was merely playing along with a customer's act.

C: 鱼尾已经完全失去胶质了，即使再选用宁蜇去熬煮勾兑，也只是徒增烦恼……
E: The fish tail has completely lost its chewiness. Even if you stew it with jellyfish to blend the texture, it will only add to your troubles...

C: 别的不说，你要是吃过「至味盛苑」的菜品，估计你对这些劣质的食物也没有什么兴趣了。
E: If nothing else, once you've tried the dishes at the Garden of Gourmet, I'm sure you will lose interest in this subpar fare.

C: 「至味盛苑」做什么样的菜？
E: What kind of food does the Garden of Gourmet serve?

C: …不过嘛，现在开始认识也不赖。我叫锦余，很高兴认识你。
E: ...But we can start to get to know each other now. My name's Jinyu. Nice to meet you.

C: 你误会了，我其实很专一的。喜欢上一个人，就很难喜欢别人了。
E: You're mistaken, my heart can only belong to one. When I like someone, it's hard to like another.

C: 事迹传开后，很多人来找我看病。有些病我能治好，有些病我只能缓解症状，有些病凭我手头的工具根本无能为力。但不管怎么样，大家都信了我这个仙人。
E: After word of my feats got out of the town, many people came to me to treat their illnesses. Some I could cure, some I could only relieve, but some I couldn't do anything about with the tools I had on hand. It didn't matter though, for everyone believed in me.

C: 那这么大的狮子现在又在哪儿呢？
E: And where is this huge lion right now?

C: 你等等，「百步穿杨」？你说我站在离驭空大人一百零一步的地方，可以用手接住飞箭吗？
E: Hang on, "a hundred feet"? Are you saying if I stood <unbreak>101</unbreak> feet away, I could just pluck her arrows out of the air?

C: 好啊，就只是聊聊工作的话，我不太介意。
E: Alright. I don't mind if we're just talking about work.

C: 贪心长生的外来者，会被天舶司劝返，重罪者还有牢狱之灾。
E: Outworlders who covet immortality will be... peacefully deported by the Sky-Faring Commission. Hardened offenders will face prison time.

C: 嗯，那我们就下次再见吧。
E: All right, till next time then.

C: 不过，我不讨厌你这样的人。在生意场上，你这样的人比那些口腹蜜剑、城府颇深的人要好得多。
E: But I don't mind people like you in business. Your kind is still better than the two-faced backstabbers.

C: 再见，希望有朝一日，你也能成为被我认同的强者。
E: Goodbye. I hope that one day you can become formidable enough to earn my approval.

C: 我听说过仙舟是为了向丰饶「复仇」而巡猎银河…复仇？这都什么时候了，我实在不能理解。
E: I heard Xianzhou is cruising the cosmos for revenge against Abundance. Still seeking their revenge, in this day and age? I just don't understand that.

C: 区区彦卿而已，手下败将。
E: It's just Yanqing, someone who I once defeated.

C: 这是戏班的必经之路。
E: This is what any theater troupe performer needs to go through.

C: 买不买呢…
E: Should I buy it, or not?

C: 啊？怎么会这样啊…明明差一点就能混进仙舟，找到长生的秘密了……
E: Ah? How can this be... I was so close to stowing aboard the Xianzhou and learning the secret of longevity...

C: 不过咱也不白来，瞧您这{F#小姐妹}{M#小兄弟}的面相也是一表人才。现在，有一个饿得前胸贴后背的流浪汉站在你面前……
E: Not that this was a wasted trip anyway. Just look at you, {F#young miss}{M#young mister}. One glance at your countenance and I can tell you're not an ordinary person. Right now, there's a famished homeless person standing before you...

C: 动物有互助的本能，但罗浮的生活实在是太美好了。想想看吧！当大家都丰衣足食的时候，到底该如何让自己「互助的本能」得到满足呢？
E: Animals instinctively help one another, but life on the Luofu is too perfect. Just think about it! When everyone is fed and clothed, how can they satisfy their instinctual need to help?

C: 就说这要饭的对象，不能太光鲜，不然他铁定嫌弃你，也不能太穷酸，不然你还得倒贴他几块钱。
E: Take targets for begging, for example: They can't look too affluent, or they'll definitely snub you. But they also can't be too impoverished, or you'll end up giving him handouts instead.

C: 请给我来一杯可乐。
E: Please can I have a glass of cola?

C: 通常来说，这确实很难理解。一定是星槎的主人为这艘船投入了太多的感情。
E: Generally speaking, this is very hard to fathom. The owner of this starskiff must have invested so much into this ship.

C: 你也许不想做「新人杀手」，但是这对于我来说，就是好名声！
E: You may not want to be the "Newbie Killer," but it's an awesome nickname to me!

C: 我比较推荐你根据自己的喜好选择…如果还是不太清楚的，也许可以考虑一下不同的用香情景？
E: I would recommend that you select according to your own preferences... If you're not too certain, you can think about the different situations where you might use it?

C: 怎么才能像你一样有学问？
E: How can I become as knowledgeable as you?

C: 牌从门前过，不如摸一个。
E: If a tile's been passed, just draw another.

C: 必须局限在<unbreak>140</unbreak>字以内！
E: Must be confined to <unbreak>140</unbreak> characters or fewer!

C: 只有你们化外民这样想。
E: Only Outworlders like yourself think like that.

C: 我可是地衡司格斗第一！
E: I'm the best fighter in all of the Realm-Keeping Commission!

C: 你是说未来事情会好转？
E: Are you saying everything is going to turn out okay?

C: 你现在急也没有用。
E: There's no point in panicking now.

C: 它居然重新生长起来了，福祸难料啊。
E: But now that it's actually growing again, it's difficult to say whether it's a good or a bad thing.

C: 以前是这样命名的，自从和其他文明接轨后，咱们的算式都变了，都是文化入侵啊。
E: It used to be named thus, but since integration with other civilizations, our algorithm has changed. It's cultural invasion.

C: 这些里面装着是什么？
E: What's inside these?

C: 饕餮街里有什么历史…
E: What's the history of the Epicurean Street...

C: 你爸爸是寿考堂做药的？
E: Your father makes medicines at Longevity Hall?

C: 那陈婆豆腐里有陈婆吗？
E: Well, is Granny Chen inside Granny Chen's Tofu?

C: 水什么时候会流下去。
E: ...when the water would flow back.

C: 你刚刚先说了熔对吧？
E: You were gonna say "melt," didn't you?

C: 啊哈哈…塞涅俄丝大人很有天分的，假以时日，一定会成为一名优秀的医师！
E: Ahaha... Lady Seliose is very talented. With time, she'll definitely become an excellent physician!

C: 当然有——我的「后」棋。
E: Of course there is. My "Queen" piece.

C: 是啊，我曾经也有幸与「凯撒」对弈过一番，那确实是位深谋远虑的伟人。
E: Yeah, I once had the honor of playing a game with the Imperator. She is indeed a woman with impressive foresight and intricate strategies.

C: 即便这心愿再微小，但…这就是我希望看到你的样子！
E: No matter how small that wish may be... this is exactly how I wanted to see you!

C: 咦…那、那就多谢你们了。
E: Huh... Th—Thank you all.

C: 这份好意我心领了，如此珍馐，替我将它赏赐给诸臣子吧。吟风爵会喜欢这份礼物。
E: I appreciate the thought, but please gift such a treasure to my ministers instead. I'm sure Dux Carminum will cherish this gift.

C: 不妨更信任你的臣下吧。
E: You can try trusting your vassals more.

C: 呵呵…{NICKNAME}阁下，让您看到这难堪的一幕，着实让人窘迫。
E: Heh... my apologies, {NICKNAME}. You've had to witness such an unseemly quarrel.

C: 没记错的话应该有五年了吧…
E: If I remember correctly, I should still have five years...

C: 毕竟三比零。
E: It's three-to-zero after all.

C: 一时疏忽被她一剑重伤。
E: Wounded me heavily with one move.

C: 是空空如也的房间，还是罪无可恕的囚犯？你无从知晓。故事，嘶吼，石门隔绝了一切，只留下冰冷的沉默。
E: Is it an empty room, or does it house an unpardonable prisoner? There's no way for you to find out as the stone door isolates it from everything, leaving only a cold silence behind.

C: 她是如此深爱着自己的血亲，现在，她们终于能永远待在一起了
E: She loved her blood relative so deeply, now they can be together forever.

C: 猜～猜～我～是～谁？
E: Guess~ Who~ I~ Am~

C: 我是～碑中的歌者！
E: I am~ The singer in the stone!

C: 在你不存在的记忆中，仿佛看到了一位目光坚定的军人——永远沉静，能够看到别人看不到的更远的地方。
E: In your non-existent memory, you seem to see a soldier with a firm gaze — forever silent, able to see a faraway place that's unseen by others.

C: 一瞬间舰炮齐射，在炮弹的烟幕之中，敌我舰队都归于沉默。
E: The cannons fire in unison instantly, silencing both enemies and allied fleets with a cloud of smoke.

C: 不合适！
E: Of course not!

C: 很好。这些人中，有人目光如炬，有人目光呆滞，你应该起个带头作用。
E: Very good. Among them, some of their eyes shine with radiance, some others vacantly void. You should get them started off.

C: 很好，忘记你学的招数。
E: Great, forget the moves you've learned.

C: 只要打公司就是我亲兄弟！
E: As long as they are fighting the IPC, they are my brothers!

C: 听说巡海游侠都是高手！
E: I hear that the Galaxy Rangers are all experts!

C: 在「人气复活」页面投票！
E: Cast your votes on the "Popularity Revival" page!

C: 呜呜呜…
E: Boohoo...

C: 我要是也能安装铁臂…
E: I wish I could install an iron arm...

C: 我最喜欢红毛男了！
E: I love redhead men the most!

C: 失效的种子不声不响，它只是等待着命运的降临。
E: The failed seed does nothing but waits for its destiny quietly.

C: 「『战略投资部』，主管：『钻石』，董事会理事候补，下设使者团体『不良资产清算专家』。对联盟潜在危害：低。」
E: "Head of Strategic Investment: Diamond, a board member candidate, founded the subordinate organization 'Non-Performing Asset Liquidation Specialist.' Potential threat level to the Alliance: Low."

C: 我爱死这首歌了！
E: I love this song!

C: 可我想看音乐喷泉…
E: But I want to see the musical fountain...

C: 哎，竞选社团部长呢！
E: Oh, the run for the club president.

C: 转身离开。
E: Turn around and leave.

C: 这颗晶莹剔透的持明卵中有奇光游移，吸引着你的目光。
E: The glimmer of the crystal-clear Vidyadhara egg catches your eye.

C: 你缓缓抚摸持明卵的外壳，一种母性的温柔如暖水般裹住全身。你记得自己奉命看护鳞渊境中的持明卵，你是护珠人队伍的一员。
E: You caress the shell of the Vidyadhara egg slowly, as a motherly affection envelops you like warm water. You remember that you are responsible for watching the Vidyadhara egg in Scalegorge Waterscape as a member of the Pearlkeeper team.

C: 你为什么在颤抖？
E: Why are you shivering?

C: 那份纸质文件并没有完整地塞进文件袋里。你不必亲手将它拿起，便能看个七七八八了。
E: The document was not fully stuffed into the package, so you can make out most of its content without picking it up.

C: 「近几千年来，人们都认为自己穷尽了世上可能存在每一种方式，培育出了世上可能存在的每一种蓝玫瑰。」
E: "For millennia, people believed that they had tried every possible method and created every possible type of blue rose."

C: 报警呗，不然呢？
E: Call the police. What else is there to do?

C: 真是好人有好报，可喜可贺。
E: Good people will always get rewarded. All is well in this world.

C: 原来这就是当代艺术啊…
E: So, THIS is what people call contemporary art...

C: 哎哟，那可真是谢谢您捧场。那这样吧…您能不能请我吃顿饭？我也不挑嘴，按神策府宴请外宾那个标准就行。
E: Well, well, well, look at you being all supportive. My number one fan, huh? How about you treat me to dinner, then? Don't worry, I'm easy to please, but I'm not touching anything the Seat of Divine Foresight wouldn't touch.

C: 身为十王司不能迷信！
E: As a member of the Ten-Lords Commission, one must not be superstitious!

C: 「我在匹诺康尼很想你」——最下方的牌子上刻着这样一行小字。
E: "I am missing you in Penacony." A small line is inscribed at the bottom of the plaque.

C: 据说梦境中的许多物品都有自己的心智，眼前这座电话亭或许是不想让你进去。
