E: It's rumored that many objects in the Dreamscape possess minds of their own. Perhaps this particular phone booth before you does not want you to enter it.

C: 梦境中的垃圾桶。除了常规垃圾外，这里还存放着人们废弃的情绪。
E: A trashcan in the Dreamscape. Other than the usual trash, it is also a location for people's discarded emotions.

C: 「可是没了玩伴，这一切还有什么意义？」
E: "But what's the point of everything if we have no playmates?"

C: 嗝…来喝一杯吧，苏乐达…它真的很好喝！
E: *gulp*... Come have a drink, SoulGlad... It's really tasty!

C: 吊灯深深嵌进了地板里，它的重击足以让人从梦中醒来十次。
E: The chandelier is deeply lodged into the floor, its heavy impact enough to awaken one from a dream ten times over.

C: 「汪！我知道店主在哪，我们去把她找回来！！」
E: "Woof! I know where the bar owner is. Let's bring her back!"

C: 「下次别再让我跑空了，你这不务正业的调饮师！」
E: "Don't make me come here for nothing again, you lazy bartender!"

C: 看起来昂贵的木制柜台，不知为何留下了许多齿痕与爪印。
E: An expensive-looking wooden counter. For some reason, it is covered with bite marks and claw prints.

C: 看来它一定还在匹诺康尼的某处潜伏着——如果你想摆脱它的视线，恐怕得先找到它才行。
E: The Hound must still be lurking somewhere in Penacony. If you want to get rid of its gaze, you may need to locate its whereabouts first.

C: 贵宾启口，我定知无不言。
E: I'll tell you everything I know, honored guest.

C: 相比无趣的贵宾名流，我对那些选择孤注一掷的逐梦客更感兴趣。他们怀着不成功便成仁的决心来到这里，只为了追逐一个泡影。
E: Compared to the boring rich and famous, I'm more interested in the Dreamchasers who risk everything in their venture. It's all or nothing for them, and they're here to pursue something that might not be even real.

C: 真神奇…不知道为什么，在注视着你的时候我竟莫名感到平静……
E: How amazing... For some reason, I feel sense of tranquility when I look at you...

C: 但是现在看来，既顽固又愚蠢的居然只有我自己——什么「心灵测绘法」，根本就是毫无理论依据的歪门邪道而已……
E: In hindsight, I can see that I'm the only one who's stubborn and foolish. The so-called psychological topography is just an unorthodox method without any theoretical basis...

C: 就是说，为什么活着这么难呢？
E: Which is to say: Why is living so hard?

C: 你瞅瞅，口袋里都是。嘿嘿，很努力才弄到的…我做得还行吧？
E: Look, my pocket's full of them. Heehee, you have to work hard to get these... I'm not too shabby, eh?

C: 不知为何，辛格勒倏忽间陷入了沉默。她的眉眼低垂，似要吐露某个欲说还休的秘密。
E: For some reason, Singler suddenly sinks into silence. Her brows are sullen, as if she is about to spill some forbidden secret.

C: …哼，总有天，我要把家族的底全扒出来，丢到所有人面前，再踩上几脚。
E: ...Hmph, one day I'll dig up everything on The Family, throw it at the feet of everyone, and even trample on it for measure.

C: 前天在筑梦边境，我差点就抓住了他们的尾巴。可那群野狗突然冲出来，声称我在盗窃商业机密，顺手还砸了我的相机！这就是匹诺康尼的待客之道吗？！
E: Two days ago, at the Dream's Edge, I almost caught them slipping up. But those rabid dogs suddenly rushed me, claiming that I was stealing trade secrets! They even smashed my camera! Is that how Penacony guests are treated!?

C: 您看，当处于绝境之中时，人性的善恶往往会被放大到极致。在这样环境的重压下，人物的弧光与张力很容易便能够得到充分的体现…我已经忍不住想要开始构思故事了。
E: You see, in desperate plights, humanity's morality will be amplified to its extremes. In such a harsh environment, character development arcs and conflicts are more easily expressed... I already can't wait to start structuring this story.

C: 但偶尔我也会不禁思考，或许这二者之间本就并不存在本质上的区别…您觉得呢？
E: But I also can't help but think: These two portrayals are really two sides of the same coin... What do you think?

C: 所以求求您啦，再多和我说一些您的故事吧？
E: So, could you please tell me a few more of your stories?

C: 就比如…您听说过那个「梦境杀手」吗？据说它会以某种令人难以想象的方式收割梦中人的「灵魂」…可没人知道它究竟是什么样子。
E: For example... Have you heard of the Dreamscape Killer? People say it harvests souls in ways that words can't even describe... But no one knows what it is exactly.

C: 皮皮西人就了不起？
E: What's so great about the Pepeshi people?

C: 呜呜。
E: Woo-woo.

C: 再见。
E: Thank you.

C: 我的梦想是当一名调查记者，寻找宇宙间被掩盖的真相。让大家不再因信息差而受到误导。
E: My dream was always to be an investigative reporter, chasing down hidden truths throughout the cosmos so that people would no longer be misled by low-quality information.

C: 谁？
E: Who?

C: 我的梦想是当一名调查记者，寻找宇宙间被掩盖的真相。让大家不再因信息差而受到误导。
E: My dream was always to be an investigative reporter, chasing down hidden truths throughout the cosmos so that people would no longer be misled by low-quality information.

C: 哈哈，多少人想要这么厉害的父母都没处找去呢！
E: Haha, not everyone can have such amazing parents!

C: …也是诅咒。一旦我的灵感枯竭…包裹我的就只剩痛苦。
E: ...and a curse. As soon as my creativity wilts... only pain remains.

C: 所以，此行受邀来到匹诺康尼，正是想与此地最著名的工匠交流钟表技艺。我敢断定，这银河间一定有我未曾染指的新技术。
E: So, I accepted this invitation to come to Penacony because I wish to discuss the art of making timepieces with this land's most famous craftsman. I am certain that there must be new techniques in the cosmos that I have never been exposed to.

C: 记得收听「奇异果」电台的脱口秀演出啊！
E: Don't forget to tune in to the Kiwis' stand-up comedy show!

C: 但不要紧，我们会代替他们，成为麦克斯先生最忠实的伙伴。
E: Nonetheless, we will step in and become Maestro Max's most loyal companions.

C: 不过说实在的…我还真不怎么喜欢那种甜了吧唧的气泡糖浆，那玩意也就是广告营销做得好。
E: But honestly... I don't really like that saccharine, carbonated syrup. It's just advertised well.

C: 人啊，一旦开始习惯了享受，才真变成了「金钱的奴隶」呢。
E: Once people get accustomed to luxury, they become slaves to wealth.

C: 为了不让偌大家业毁于手中，这么多年来，我都在努力与「奢侈」保持距离。
E: To prevent the business from going under, I've been working hard to distance myself from luxury all these years.

C: 但最让我伤心的是…我曾经还以为喜爱谐乐的家族能尊重我们这些演奏家，没想到他们却亲手制造了这些东西…这个给你吧，我已经不想再听他们虚伪的歌曲了。
E: What breaks my heart is... the fact that I used to think that the harmony-loving Family respected us musicians. It has never occurred to me that they were the ones behind this... This one's for you, I can't bear to listen to their hypocritical songs anymore.

C: 店里的营收压力很大，家族那边也逼得紧，孩子的学费没着落，生活开销倒水涨船高。
E: The pressure for in-store sales is huge, and The Family's demands are pressing. My child's tuition is not settled and the cost of living is going through the roof.

C: 来，干了这瓶苏乐达！让我们一起拥抱「糖浆主义」！
E: Come, drink this SoulGlad! Let us embrace syrupism together!

C: 平田平次凝望着天空，怒目圆瞪。
E: Hirata Heiji stares into the sky, his eyes wide with anger.

C: 可以聊聊吗？
E: Are you up for a chat?

C: 钢琴家垂颈弓背、摇头晃脑、昏昏欲坠，似乎全凭一双手扎根琴键之上。
E: The pianist, with his neck bowed, his head swaying as if he has entered a trance, is rooted to the keys with only his hands.

C: 我喜欢研究这种让简单朴素的材料发生「质变」的规律与方法。我觉得这个过程非常…迷人。
E: To transform common ingredients into something extraordinary through certain rules and techniques... I find this process... fascinating.

C: 你们王室姓什么？
E: What's your royal family's last name?

C: 该不会是为了省钱吧？
E: Is it about saving money?

C: 需要帮助吗？
E: Do you need any help?

C: 只要把几台「一次性动力炮」绑在椅子上同时开火，就能得到足够的动力、一下子冲出星球了。
E: Just attach several Disposable Kinetic Cannons to a chair and fire them all at once, and you'll get enough power to launch yourself from the planet.

C: 你们不会溶化吗？
E: Don't you dissolve in water?

C: 记得。
E: I remember.

C: 美丽的伊德莉拉…真善的伊德莉拉……
E: O, beautiful Idrila... O, graceful Idrila...

C: …你挂断了电话。你感觉只要再多听到一次「伊德莉拉」这个名字，你的大脑就要红温、乃至爆炸了。
E: ...You hang up the phone, feeling overwhelmed. Hearing the name "Idrila" once more may make your brain explode.

C: 「在梦的最前线，追逐潮流的方向——厄皮洛斯服装秀场。」
E: "Always the trendsetter — Epirus Apparel Fashion Show."

C: 有什么企图直接说吧。
E: Just cut to the chase already.

C: 嗯。我必须先帮你把购车的钱挣回来，守护正义的事，以后再说吧！
E: Now, I must help you recoup the money you spent on me first. Upholding justice has to come later.

C: 那我吃什么呢？
E: What am I going to eat then?

C: *粗口*！要怎么布置你们怎么不早提？等你们的需求提过来，道具部的采购截止日期早就过了！
E: *Profanity*! Why didn't you say so earlier? By the time your requests came in, the procurement deadline had long passed!

C: 嘿嘿，好久没有过这样酣畅淋漓的对话了。
E: Hehe, it's been so long since I've been able to chat to my heart's content like this.

C: 康娜的脸上横添了一抹怒纹，额头紧皱成一团——这是洁癖者看到一地垃圾时的正常反应。
E: An angry frown streaks across Conna's face, her forehead scrunched up into wrinkly folds — that is the default reaction of someone obsessed with cleanliness who sees trash strewn all about.

C: 啊…抱歉，自顾自说了这么多，希望没影响到你的心情。祝你玩得开心！
E: Oh, forgive me for rambling on. I hope your mood isn't affected. Have a great time!

C: 嘶…家族之外，危机四伏啊！
E: Hmm... Dangers are lurking everywhere outside The Family!

C: 你别乱来！
E: Don't mess with me!

C: 当然没问题啦，滴答！钟表小子对朋友知无不言，滴答！
E: Of course we can, tick-tock! Clockie would tell his friends anything, tick-tock!

C: 猫头鹰老师和折纸小鸟们，他们建造了这座小镇，就像爱护自己的巢一样爱护着它，滴答！
E: Professor Owl and the origami birds... they created this town and they care for it like they would their own nests, tick-tock!

C: 结果这份工作根本就不是我想象中的样子…更糟糕的是，酒店的房费消耗了我大半身家，而如今的身体状况又不允许我重返竞技赛场……
E: In the end, this job was nothing like I imagined... What's worse, the hotel fees have used up the majority of my savings, and now my body is in no state to get back into the competitive arena...

C: 知更鸟的宣传海报，出于某种纪念意义而被收藏于此。
E: Robin's promotional posters. They've been collected here as some sort of keepsake.

C: 汪！饮料放在您桌上了！披萨跟我完全没关系哇！
E: Woof! The drinks are on your table! That pizza has nothing to do with me!

C: 想听听你对这家酒吧的看法。
E: I want to know what you think about this lounge.

C: 想听听你对怪物们的看法。
E: I want to know what you think about monsters.

C: 哇！疼疼疼疼疼疼疼——是谁干的！
E: Ouch! It hurts!! Who the heck did that!?

C: 筑梦者当如诗人与英雄，将梦境化作不屈的意志、斗争的武器，而非多愁善感的欢歌、无病呻吟的愁绪。
E: Dreambuilders are like poets and heroes, turning Dreamscapes into weapons of combat with indomitable wills — not odes of sentimental joy, nor melancholic moans of obscurantism.

C: <size=28>「懦夫只会向外逃去，口中却嚷着救赎之名——喔哦哦哦！」</size>
E: <size=28>"Only cowards flee while shouting the name of the redeemer — oh-yeah-yeah!"</size>

C: 什么「演技派」舞台，什么「枪火」的试炼，不过是用来填充流程的乏味环节，连打发时间都显得枯燥。
E: The "School of Acting" stage, the "Gunfire" trial... they're just boring fillers used to speed things up and make even killing time seem boring.

C: 急了？
E: You mad?

C: 这位女士不由分说开始了她的采访。此人谈吐幽默风趣，思路天马行空，却并不教人感到冒犯。
E: The lady begins her interview without any further explanation in a humorous style that is freewheeling but never offensive.

C: 红哨小姐发出一声刺耳、威胁的哨音。
E: Miss Red Whistle lets out a piercing, menacing whistle.

C: 不过也有坏处。时间久了，片场的所有人都只会用「红哨小姐」这个外号称呼我了…哪怕是我身边的人，知道我真名的也没有几个。
E: However, it has its drawbacks. After a while, everybody started calling me "Miss Red Whistle"... Not even the people in my team knew my real name.

C: 没成想，那些早期的作品居然会变成贯穿我整个职业生涯的黑历史！从我决定接下那些剧本的一刻起，成为大导演的理想就和我彻底无缘了……
E: I never thought that those early shows would become a stain on my entire career path! From the moment I decided to take them on, my dream of becoming a great director was over...

C: 然后，我的身边突然出现了一群…钟表小子，金属制的。它们已经严重锈蚀了，从表情到身体都歪歪扭扭…它们的叫声尖锐刺耳，就好像用指甲刮钢板一样…呃。
E: Then, a group of Clockies suddenly appeared around me... They were all made of metal. They were heavily rusted, and everything from their expressions to their bodies was warped and twisted... Their cries were ear-splitting, like nails on a chalkboard... Ergh.

C: 突然想起一件好笑的事情——我在这边给自己安排的假身份，是一个离家出走的叛逆少女。
E: I've just realized something funny... The false identity I gave myself here is that of a rebellious young girl that ran away from home.

C: 哟，你居然也对种田感兴趣？真是少见。
E: Oh, you're interested in farming, too? This is rare.

C: 更难顶的是，这地方一时半会儿又毁不掉。就像你明明得了绝症，却偏偏是早期，距离发作还有几年活头……
E: What's worse is that this place will still not be destroyed for a while. It's like being diagnosed with a terminal illness, but in the early stages. Like you still have a few years before it takes effect...

C: 我不明白，为什么总有人当着孩子的面对他们的努力冷嘲热讽！
E: I have never understood how there are people that can stare a child in the eye while mocking their hard work!

C: 时间宝贵，请尽可能长话短说。
E: Time is precious. Please keep it concise.

C: 许多人忽视了她的贡献，这绝对违反了学术的良心！
E: Many ignore her contributions, and this is an absolute violation of the academic conscience!

C: 这么巧，我也是！
E: Are you serious? Me too!

C: 丰饶……
E: Abundance...

C: 年轻人，那是属于肉体的赐福，而我早就已经是一个幽灵了……
E: Youngster, that is a blessing that belongs to the flesh, and I've long been a ghost...

C: 圆笛男爵嗓音嘹亮、音域宽广，它是位高贵的绅士，擅长典雅的乐曲——但他总是耽于自赏，妄想吹奏自己。你如果买走了他，得好好教会他什么叫做谦卑。
E: Baron Oboe has a sonorous singing voice and a broad range. He's a classy gentleman who's good with graceful tunes — but he's always making fun for himself and playing whatever music he likes. If you buy him, make sure you teach him a little bit about humility, first.

C: 有趣的客人…那可太多了，您不就是吗？
E: Interesting customers, eh... ? Too many of those to count. And don't you count yourself as one?

C: 你是谁？
E: Who are you?

C: 啾？看来你已经找到一半小鸟了。
E: Tweet? Looks like you've already found half of the birds.

C: 等训练完「汽水赛场」的这些小鸟，一定要和我比比谁飞得更快啾。
E: Wait till I finish drilling those birds at the Soda Racetrack, we must see who's the faster one, tweet.

C: 拜托客官了，如果您在剧场里看到了那些调皮的孩子，请让它们回大树这里，人家会好好奖励您的啾！
E: Please, if you see those mischievous kids in the theater, tell them to return to the Great Tree. I'll reward you handsomely, tweet!

C: 我先走了，拜拜。
E: I've got to go. Bye.

C: 我梦见奏乐者端坐空中楼阁，傲慢自得\n我梦见逐波者囚拘欲望枷锁，纵情声色
E: I dream of musicians seated atop floating pavilions, lofty and smug.\nI dream of seekers caught in shackles of desire, reveling in worldly wants.

C: 于是我蓦然惊醒——
E: And so I wake up in a start...

C: 而狭隘的公司不满苏萨先生纯真的梦想，将他投入狱中折磨，并在依诺哈尔上灭绝了所有的梦乐草，最初的苏乐达从此在宇宙中绝迹。
E: But the small-minded IPC was not pleased with Mr. Sousa's sincere dream. They tossed him in prison to be tortured and decimated all the Dreamleaves that were on Enohart. The original SoulGlad would forever be extinct from this universe.

C: 苏乐达集团的银河化战略终于迎来了阶段性的成果！
E: SoulGlad Enterprises' cosmic strategy has finally reached a milestone!

C: 大集团有大集团的好处，也有大集团特有的毛病。
E: Major groups have their advantages, as well as problems only unique to them.

C: 岁月不饶人啊，虽然我身子骨还硬朗，记性也是一天比一天差。
E: Time is a merciless mistress. My bones may still be sturdy, but my memory gets worse with each day.

C: 听起来很有意思。
E: Sounds very interesting.

C: 是的，我见过很多。
E: Yes, many of them.

C: 唉，生意越来越差了，要不要改行呢……
E: *sigh* Business is getting worse. Should I change occupations...

C: 如果你能从中了解到哈努努的故事，那就太好了。
E: It would be wonderful if you learned of Hanunue's life from it.

C: 咳…说实话，写《小小哈努兄弟》的时候，我还挺开心的。
E: Ahem... Truth be told, I was quite happy when I wrote Lil' Brother Hanu.

C: 你是什么人？
E: Who are you?

C: 现在…想必很快就能成真了？
E: And now... I think that my dreams might finally come true.

C: 啊…抱歉，等我很久了吗？
E: Oh, I'm sorry. Have you been waiting long?

C: 当与其他的草履虫相遇，并开始相处时，两个草履虫会短暂地结合在一起，从两个细胞变成同一个，并在一段时间重新分开。
E: When one paramecium interacts with another, they will conjugate and then divide. The two cells become a single entity for a moment before splitting apart again.

C: 最爱幻想的科研工作者，或许悲伤时也需要些实据。
E: Maybe even a researcher who indulges in fantasy needs data to support their sadness first.

C: 那就像是有某种意志，它能从微观层面随心所欲地操纵一切，并在几经尝试后，把自己心中最可怕的灾异化为了现实。
E: It's as if some kind of will freely manipulated everything at a microscopic level. Then, after some trial and error, isolated their deepest calamitous fear and made it real.

C: 悄然贯穿我们历史的微生物，也同样悄然被附着在了忆质上。
E: These include the microorganisms mankind have encountered throughout history, which are also capable of latching on to memoria.

C: 不过，另外两样，又何尝不是美食？
E: But what about the other two? You don't think they're gourmet?

C: 先前我没这么觉得，还总想着要是能抽中头等奖，我一定要好好享受假日。可我到现在才发现，「豪华」两个字真是…既麻烦又吓人。
E: It didn't occur to me back then. I thought I'd surely enjoy the vacation to the fullest if I were to win the grand prize. But it is only now that I realize "luxury" can be overwhelming and daunting.

C: 你可能想象不到，在五年前，我还只是个在便利店里打工的服务员。五年后，我竟然能来到「晖长石号 / 开拓之尾号 / 塔塔洛夫号 / 飞翔时针号」上，和众多名流贵客举杯相谈！
E: You'll never guess this, but five years ago, I was just a convenience store clerk. Fast-forward to today, I'm aboard The Radiant Feldspar / The Trailblaze's Stern / The Tatalov / The Soaring Clock Hand, mingling with social elites!

C: 咦，新面孔？很高兴认识你，我叫萨曼莎。呃…你是找我谈生意的话，无任欢迎，交朋友的话…那还是免谈吧。
E: Oh, a new face? Hi, I'm Samantha. Um... if you want to talk business, I'm all ears. But if it's friendship you're after, I'm afraid that's not on my agenda.

C: 成功永远属于那些敢于梦想、勇于追求的人。三年时间，我看着他们公司从高层换人到经营方向大改…嗐，这一路上真是太艰难了。
E: Success is always reserved for the those who dare to dream big. Over three years, I've seen their company undergo leadership changes and major business pivots... I guess they've really been through a challenging journey.

C: 人活得这么憋屈就算了，到开庭的时候、为自己争取权益的时候也这么憋屈…那还找我当律师干嘛？！真是搞不懂！
E: I have no say if they're fine with living an oppressed life, but when they let everyone walk all over them in court — a place where they can fight for their own rights... Is there even a point in hiring me!? I can never get what they're thinking!

C: 好的啾，那其他小鸟的事情还麻烦客官多留心了啾~
E: Alright, tweet. Then please look out for the other little birds, my dear guest. Tweet~

C: （沉默不语）
E: (Silence)

C: 船长，您特地过来就是为了看我一眼吗？还是说有什么事吗？别担心，您想说什么就说什么，您说啥我都爱听！
E: Captain, did you come here just to see me? Or do you need something? Don't worry, just speak your mind! I'm a great listener!

C: 好问题，汪！苏乐达我推荐买玻璃瓶装的，瓶身最好冰冻过，气泡绵密，喝起来才够冰爽，汪。
E: Great question, woof! I recommend getting the bottled SoulGlad, best if it has been chilled. The flurry of bubbles makes it extra refreshing, woof!

C: 深呼吸…吸气…吐气…不愧是我，果然冷静点了，手都不抖了。
E: Deep breaths... Breathe in, and out... Good job, me! I've calmed down a little already. Even my hands have stopped shaking.

C: 把你的脚背绷紧点，注意队形！还有你的扣子怎么扣错了？这点小事都做不好？
E: Keep your insteps tight and pay attention to the formation! Why are your buttons wrong? Can't you even do something this simple?

C: 记住，这里是旅游胜地，但我们不是游客！…呃，船长…您来啦？！
E: Remember, this may be a tourist destination, but we're not the tourists! ...Ah, captain! When did you arrive?

C: 个人从业经历与专业技能，与「晖长石号」过往招聘船员的要求并不一致，甚至彼此矛盾。
E: It means that their professional experience and abilities don't match — or may even contradict — past requirements for recruiting crew members of the Radiant Feldspar.

C: 你被他如此知趣的行为所震惊，不知道这究竟是这位新船员的自主行为，抑或是冷芯的教导成果。
E: You are astonished by their tact. Did they think of this themselves, or was it the result of Caldwick's mentorship?

C: 我们不是初次见面了。
E: This isn't the first time we've met.

C: 比如我的上级阿尔斯克，他的鼾声经常吵得大伙难以入睡，即便我没有睡眠的机能，每颗齿轮也会跟着颤动。
E: Take for example my superior, Alsk. His snoring made it difficult for everyone else to sleep. Even though I do not have the ability to sleep, my gears would tremble as he snored.

C: 再见。愿美好的记忆能填满您的梦境。
E: Goodbye. May your Dreamscape be filled with sweet memories.

C: 我看啊，以他那三分钟热度的性格，坚持不了多久就要退出咯。
E: If you ask me, I doubt he'll stick around in that band for long. Not when he loses interest in things so quickly.

C: 读过最新的《折纸时报》了吗？猜你就没有，我念给你听——
E: Have you read the latest issue of the Paperfold Times? I imagine not. Let me read it for you...

C: 你撤回吧。
E: Take it back.

C: 你要是撞见《折纸时报》的那个小编，打我电话，我马上到！
E: If you come across that Paperfold Times editor, give me a call, and I'll be there in a jiffy!

C: 你变得可真快。
E: Your mood changed quickly.

C: 是吗？看来你的涉猎范围也很广啊，等以后有空，我们来好好交流下。
E: Is that so? I see you have a vast scope of research. We should find time for a good discussion.

C: 都说好奇害死猫…
E: They say that curiosity killed the cat...

C: 没错！我也骂我自己！要是我再努点力，每天多想几个好玩的段子，是不是社团的人气就能更高些，就不用去接这些无聊的广告了？
E: That's right! I'm scolding myself, too! If only I worked harder and came up with a few more jokes, would the club have been more popular? Maybe then we wouldn't have to take on these boring ads.

C: 就快毕业了，但我还没想好离开学校后该去做什么，是找份正经的工作，还是留在学院里继续深造，或者…做个独立音乐人也不错？
E: It's almost time for graduation, but I haven't thought of what to do next. Do I find a decent job, stay in school for further education, or... become an independent musician?

C: 没有。相反，由于乐队排练占用了部分精力，她的成绩比以往更差了。
E: No. On the contrary, since band practice took up part of her attention, her grades dropped even more.

C: 关于谐乐学院代表…
E: About the Charmony Academy representative...

C: 可没办法啊，谐乐学院的教授们集体推举，说这个人选非我不可，还说彩梦校庆要是没了我的音乐，就会失色不少。我实在推脱不过，就答应了。
E: I didn't have much of a choice though. Charmony Academy's professors were unanimous in my recommendation, insisting that no one else could do it. They even said that the Dreamlight Anniversary would be lackluster without my music. They wouldn't take no for an answer, so I agreed.

C: 对、对不起，让我再好好考虑一下吧！在毕业之前，我会给你一个答复的！
E: S—Sorry, please let me think about it! I'll give you an answer before graduation!

C: 关于你的名字…
E: About your name...

C: 说吧，我会仔细聆听。
E: Go ahead. I'm all ears.

C: 据说家族会把一种迷因塞进保险柜，任何偷盗的行为都会招致它的惩罚。
E: Rumor has it that The Family will place some kind of memetic entity into their safe, and any manner of theft would incur their retribution.

C: 居然这么年轻，看这五官，感觉长得肯定很好看。真想亲眼见见船长…要是能合照签名就好啦……
E: {F#She's}{M#He's} actually so young? Looking at {F#her}{M#his} features, {F#she}{M#he} must be very good-looking. I really want to meet the captain in person... If only I can take a photo with {F#her}{M#him} and get {F#her}{M#his} autograph...

C: 不，你认识的剑士才不是这么记仇的家伙。这一定是某种巧合…大概。
E: No, the swordmaster you know isn't the type to hold grudges like this. This must be some kind of coincidence... probably.

C: 无需回首，向前吧。
E: No need to look back. Just keep moving forward.

C: 由可爱流线拼出的火箭设计图，只是这一次，它的结构多预留了十几个人的座位空间。
E: A rocket design traced in cute curves, but this time, with extra seating space reserved for a dozen more passengers.

C: 兄弟，行不行啊？
E: Bro, are you feeling okay?

C: 学历高有什么用？
E: What's the point of good school grades?

C: 这是梦里，别怕。
E: This is a dream. Don't worry about it.

C: 也在那座剧院演出过。
E: And I had performed in that theater too.

C: 你想好梦里的形象了？
E: Have you figured out what you want to be in your dream?

C: …美丽的歌剧院！
E: ...O, beautiful opera house!

C: 那苏乐达味的甜筒呢？
E: So, do you have SoulGlad-flavor ice cream cones?

C: 对！他还会说大象话！
E: Yeah! And he even talks elephant language!

C: 瞧这地方，纸醉金迷。
E: Just look around. This place is so lost in pleasure.

C: 我们不该来这儿！
E: We really shouldn't be here!

C: 一分信用点都没有了，明天就是退房截止日，又要回到现实了……
E: I've run out of credits... Tomorrow is the check-out day for my room, and I'll go back to reality...

C: 那好，我去准备看演出用的礼服。
E: Fine, I'll go prepare my outfit for the concert.

C: 原来我只觉得那些家伙多管闲事，但现在…和我在一起你真的开心吗？
E: I thought those people were just nosy, but now... are you really happy with me?

C: 知不知道时间就是金钱啊！啊？如果按分钟来算，我现在至少已经损失了<unbreak>21864</unbreak>苜蓿币了……
E: Don't you know time is money!? Huh? If I'm calculating by the minute, I've already lost <unbreak>21,864</unbreak> Alfalfa credits...

C: 老者身边的智械始终一言不发。或许他不能理解这种忧伤，又或是他找不出适合安慰的话语、唯有沉默。
E: The Intellitron by the old lady's side remained silent through this whole exchange. Perhaps he cannot comprehend this kind of sorrow, or perhaps he cannot find the words to comfort her and has nothing but silence to offer.

C: 再输下去，裤子都要赔光了。
E: If I keep losing, I'm gonna lose my pants too.

C: 广告比海选内容还长…
E: The ads are longer than the auditions...

C: 作为开赛前最大的黑马之一，却以迅雷不及掩耳之势，在第一场比赛就败给一位籍籍无名的新人。
E: For one of the biggest dark horses to lose to some unknown newcomer in the first audition, and by such a huge lead!

C: 我…只感觉做了一个好长的梦，但梦里的东西都想不起来了。
E: I... feel like I just had a really long dream, but I can't remember anything in it.

C: 没有吧，只是来了一部分。
E: I doubt it. Only some of them came.

C: 让我再检查一遍，可不能有任何闪失……
E: Let me double-check. Can't let anything go wrong...

C: 好吧，那就再玩一会儿。等爸爸谈完生意回来就要乖乖回房间哦。
E: Fine, you can play for a while more. But when Daddy comes back from his business talks, you have to go back to your room, okay?

C: 那么问题来了…
E: Therein lies the problem...

C: 这如黄金般的岁月啊…
E: These golden years...

C: 这桌子也太碍事了…
E: This table is blocking the way...

C: 听好了——没有什么比家人更强大。
E: Listen up — there's nothing stronger than family.

C: 嘘！别问不该问的事，现在只管鼓掌就行了！
E: Shh! Don't ask things you shouldn't. Just clap!

C: 眼前这人似乎是折纸大学的某位校董，亦或是匹诺康尼的某位大亨，你不确定——大街上的富人十个有九个都这么穿。
E: The person before you appears to be someone on Paperfold University's board, or perhaps a Penaconian magnate, but you're not sure — nine out of ten rich people on the streets dress exactly like he does.

C: 哈哈，不知道你是从哪听来的传闻。虽然…以前是有段时间，大家很努力地训练，想要拿到好的名次…但都是过去的事啦。
E: Haha, I don't know where you heard this. Though... there was such a time when everyone worked hard to train and obtain good results... but that was in the past.

C: 是啊，都搁这站好久了。
E: Yea, I've been standing here for quite a while.

C: 水温逐渐稳定，热气开始升腾……
E: The water temperature gradually stabilizes, and steam begins to rise...

C: 《完蛋，我被军团包围了！》
E: Oh No, I'm Surrounded by the Legion!

C: 你都已经花钱买了游戏，为什么还要花时间去玩呢？
E: You've already paid for the game, so why spend time playing it?

C: 不幸的是，过去的伟大冒险也让它内心伤痕累累，患上了名为{RUBY_B#不愿见人}广场恐惧症{RUBY_E#}的焦虑障碍。
E: Unfortunately, those arduous adventures have taken their toll on Asterion, causing a deep anxiety disorder known as {RUBY_B#Reluctance to Meet People}agoraphobia{RUBY_E#}.

C: 不过，为了它们将来的生计着想，我拟了一份非常有吸引力的简历，可以把它们包装成一对前所未有的双胞胎组合！来来来，我念给你听听：
E: However, in preparation for their future business, I've concocted a cool pitch that could make them the ultimate duo! Let me share it with you!

C: 我懂你！
E: I get where that comes from!

C: 呼…看来总算可以清净一阵子了。今天真是个好天气啊~
E: Phew... Finally, some peace and quiet. Ah, what a lovely day today.

C: 唔…如你所见，我不久前缔结了姻缘，但他们都觉得我的丈夫配不上我。
E: Well, you see, I recently got married, but everyone is convinced that I'm too good for my husband.

C: 当然啦，实际上这种金色来源于一种稀有矿石制成的染剂。但这并不影响金丝绸的价格非常昂贵，只有很少数的人才用得起哦。
E: In fact, its golden color comes from a dye made from a rare ore. But even so, the golden silk is quite pricey and only within reach for a select few.

C: 一口吨了。
E: Down it in one gulp.

C: 一口吨了。
E: Down it in one gulp.

C: 翁法罗斯也能有模因污染？
E: Can Amphoreus even get memetic pollution?

C: …自我介绍一下吧，我的名字是阿波罗尼娅，来奥赫玛避难之前，曾经在一个被黑潮吞没的小城邦里做数学和天文学的研究。
E: ...Let me introduce myself. I'm Apollonia. I used to research math and astronomy in a small city that was later overrun by the black tide.

C: 你好像并不在意世界的危机。
E: Looks like you're not too bothered about all the calamity.

C: 「学者与智者在欧瑞尼亚播撒知识与智慧之种；文学与艺术在米里奥斯结出的果实分外甘甜。」
E: "Aurelia's scholars sow wisdom's seed. Literature and art in Milios freed."

C: 暂时不想听了。
E: I've had my fill already.

C: 很抱歉，工作人员需要养活自己…再者说，如果太乱来，也不符合塔兰顿的教诲。
E: Sincerest apologies, but the staff here also need to earn a living... Also, it does not reflect well on Talanton's teachings if a good intention goes astray.

C: …我是不是，应该补充说明一下？
E: ...Should I... elaborate?

C: 可瞧啊——
E: But you see—

C: 想同你聊些事情。
E: I wish to discuss some things with you.

C: 冷静点，我只是个路人。
E: Calm down. I'm just a passerby.

C: 不过...你来得正好。我待会儿有个演讲，能帮个忙吗？
E: Although... Your timing is perfect. I have a speech shortly. Would you help me out?

C: 你是法吉娜的信徒？
E: Are you a disciple of Phagousa?

C: 能介绍下奥赫玛的情况吗？
E: Can you tell me a bit about Okhema?

C: 其中包括但不限于：雕像、印章、瓦罐、瓷盘、壁画、石板、刺绣、挂毯……
E: Including but not limited to: Statues, official seals, pottery, ceramic plates, frescoes, stone tablets, embroidery, tapestries...

C: 但我跟你说啊，这里头水其实可深了——新手容易买到高仿和次品不说，就算是正经货，想蹲个好价也不容易。
E: Let me warn you. There's a steep learning curve — beginners often end up buying imitation or faulty products. Even if they do get the real thing, getting it for a good price can be tough.

C: 听着是有些奇怪……
E: It sounds a little weird...

C: …看得出来，客人您一定闲得很。
E: ...I can see that you have a lot of time on your hands.

C: 「不，我无法接受你的心意，███。但我的确深爱着你。因为你与她的容颜一脉相承。」
E: "No, I cannot accept your love, ███. But I do love you, because you look like her."

C: 那就聊聊躺椅吧。
E: Tell me about the lounger, then.

C: 按照这个版本的故事，纷争世时期各城邦出现了元老院的制度，元老们为了从祭司手中夺取权力，将很多过去只有祭司才能使用的东西都推广到了民间——躺椅也在其中。
E: According to this version of the story, the Council of Elders began imposing restrictions across various cities during the Era Bellica in order to seize power from the priests. They took a number of items that were previously limited to priests and made them popular among regular citizens... Loungers were one of these items.

C: 善加利用这些东西，你就能从战场上活着回来。
E: Use these well, and you can return from the battlefield with your life.

C: 毕竟，唯有英雄的灵魂才能立于尼卡多利左右，弱者与懦夫只会被塞纳托斯拾走。
E: After all, only a heroic soul can stand alongside Nikador. The weak and cowardly will only be taken away by Thanatos.

C: 未曾见过，这等工艺。并无泰坦祝福，却也坚利。
E: Craftsmanship like this, seen before, I have not. No Titan's blessing it has, yet sharp and strong it is.

C: 海水被赐予「满溢之杯」的神力就成了秘酿，这份神力让畅饮者迷醉于大海的波涛与漩涡中。
E: The seawater infused with the divine power from the Chalice of Plenty turns into ambrosia, able to intoxicate those who drink it with surging waves and swirling currents of the sea.

C: 秘酿淡雅的风味滑过舌尖，海面波光粼粼——
E: The subtle flavors of the ambrosia glide across your tongue, the sea's surface a glistening crystalline...

C: 你誓死捍卫自己在浴场畅饮秘酿的权利，单方面与丹恒争得面红耳赤……
E: You swear to defend — to the death — your right to drink ambrosia in the bath, and engage in a one-sided argument with Dan Heng till you're flushed and furious...

C: 远处的灯光熄灭了……
E: The distant light has gone out...

C: 我…有些失态，还请{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}见谅。
E: I... was a little out of line. Please forgive me, {F#Miss}{M#Mister} {NICKNAME}.

C: 认为这样的讨论毫无意义，不过是思维的惰性。但实际上，整个翁法罗斯无不与之相关。
E: To think that such an argument lacks meaning is no more than mental laziness. In fact, this relates to everything we see in Amphoreus.

C: 要是你的先祖当时得到了某种神启，将城邦换个名字，「阿卡索斯」就不再存在，怎么能说这个概念可以和数学知识相类比呢？
E: If your ancestors had received divine inspiration and changed the name of the city, "Icatus" would not exist. How can you say that this concept is comparable to the truths of mathematics?

C: 并且…若是「阿卡索斯」不存在了，我…阿卡索斯的帕门弥德，该回哪去呢？
E: What's more... If "Icatus" were no longer to exist... Then where would I, Parmenides of Icatus, have to return to?

C: 我总觉得…要是哪天，我的眼睛痊愈了，就再也创造不出那么多令人心潮澎湃的作品了。
E: I sometimes think that if my eyesight were ever restored, I might not be able to produce as many deeply moving pieces as I do now.

C: 健身为什么会流行？
E: Why has fitness become so popular?

C: 其他的…「壁画颜料改良」、「大地兽的辅助鞍具」、「石板架」、「云石天宫的吉祥物娃娃」……
E: Other creations... "Improved mural paints," "Support saddles for dromases," "Slate racks," "Mascot dolls for the Marmoreal Palace..."

C: 大的…大的啊…说起来还真有那么一个，但，唉…我都有点不太愿意提。
E: A big one... a really big one... Now that you mention it, there is one, but... *sigh*... I'm almost reluctant to bring it up.

C: 孩子，你怎么又私自闯入这里？幸亏是我先发现了你，如果撞见你的是卫兵……
E: Child, what are you doing sneaking in here again? You're lucky it was me that found you and not one of the guards...

C: 我警告你，偷听是违反塔兰顿律法的行为，小心我把你给举报了！
E: I'm warning you, eavesdropping is against Talanton's law. Watch out, I might report you!

C: 嗯…看你的打扮是来自外乡，一定还没适应这边的环境吧？这本或许能让你对奥赫玛的印象更加轻松些。这是拓本，无需归还，拿着慢慢读吧。
E: Well... judging by your attire, you must be from out of town and haven't quite adjusted to the environment here yet? This book might make your impression of Okhema a bit more lighthearted. It's a rubbing, so you don't need to return it. Take it and read at your own pace.

C: 没事，其实比起和我这种老头聊天，书里能学到的东西更多…闲着就去转转吧。
E: It's fine. Actually, there's more to learn from books than from chatting with an old man like me... Feel free to wander around when you have time.

C: …忧伤么。初到奥赫玛的时候，我确实有些慌张。全知全能的刻法勒背负天空，搭建起的小小庇护所，其中是否有我的容身之处？我不知道。
E: ...Sorrow, was it? I do admit that when I first arrived in Okhema, I was a little anxious. A tiny shelter built beneath the sky that is borne by the omniscient, omnipotent Kephale. Would there be a place for me here? I did not know.

C: 但最近，随着奥赫玛要处理的现实问题越来越多，花园也会帮助居民们解决些实际麻烦，譬如照料大地兽啦，消除农作物的病害啦…之类的。
E: But in recent times, as Okhema has more realistic problems to resolve, the Garden has also become a haven to alleviate her people's worries. They can care for dromases and eliminate diseases from crops here, among other things.

C: 没关系，你先说吧。
E: It's fine. Go ahead.

C: 怎么会呢？ 浴池能让大家心平气和地坐在一块，这么好的地方，奥赫玛独此一家！
E: Not really? Everyone's calm and gathered in a bath. It's the most perfect place in all of Okhema!

C: 别就知道钱钱钱的好吗，你的短视让瑟希斯蒙羞！
E: Can you stop talking about money all the time? Your shortsightedness brings shame to Cerces!

C: 但你别说，我还真上过战场。先前对奥赫玛发起的特别行动中，欧利庞王征发了所有的士兵…我也只能被迫跟着去了。
E: Though I have deployed before. In that special operation against Okhema, King Eurypon mobilized the entire army... I was forced to tag along.

C: 下一秒，一股奇妙的感觉在你胸中弥散，仿佛扑面而来的海潮。你想起了在翁法罗斯经历的一切，以及曾在这里见证的那些、不存在的回忆。
E: In the next second, a strange feeling spreads across your chest, like a rising tide smacking you in the face. You remember everything you experienced in Amphoreus and those non-existent memories that you witnessed there.

C: 当然有。神驹能前往世界各处，为你取来想要的东西——只要付得起价钱。
E: Of course. Divine foals can travel the world and bring you whatever you need — so long as you can pay the price.

C: 环境扫描完成！正在建立房间数据模型...权限归属确认：{NICKNAME}。
E: Room scan completed! Setting up room details... Authorization confirmed: {NICKNAME}.

C: 你喊我小助理就好——至于原因，我只能说绝对不是因为「小呆呆」、「小呆呆<unbreak>123</unbreak>」，还有「天才」和「天才<unbreak>123</unbreak>」这几个名字都被抢注了！
E: You can just refer to me as "assistant" — and no, it's definitely not because names like "Dumb-Dumb," "Dumb-Dumb<unbreak>123</unbreak>," "Genius," and "Genius<unbreak>123</unbreak>" were all already taken!

C: 尊重！这不叫话痨，这叫人工智能！
E: Show some respect! I'm not being talkative — it's just me having Artificial Intelligence!

C: 像空间站的阿德勒科员，就托我给你带句话，他说他放弃对空间站怪谈的研究了，有份手稿——我检查过，是影印的复制品——要交给你。
E: Adler, a researcher from the space station, asked me to pass on a message. He's halted his research on the station's ghost tales and has a manuscript for you — it's a photocopy, which I've already verified.

C: 命运三女神在上，孩子，你还在犹豫什么？难道你对父亲的孝心就只是口中的空谈？
E: Praise to the Three Titans of Fate, child, what are you waiting for? Is your filial piety to your father no more than lip service, after all?

C: 但…现在我已经目睹过很多次其他人是如何求取神谕的了，他们都是如此…明码标价…甚至有时价高者得。
E: However... Now I have witnessed many times how it is people obtain their prophecies. The priests are all so... clear about needing payment... Some prophecies even end up as auctions.

C: 祭司笑眯眯地将你递出的东西收入囊中。那么，命运泰坦要如何占卜一处虚构之地的未来呢？你对此颇为好奇。
E: The priest stuffs the item you handed over into his pocket with a gleeful grin on his face. Well then, how will the Fate Titans divine a future for a place that you made up? Your curiosity is truly piqued.

C: 也许等些时间再来找他，就能得到有趣的答案了。
E: Perhaps if you give him some time, he will have an interesting answer waiting for you.

C: …所以我们今天也要好好努力才行呀～啊，有人来了。
E: ...So, let's make the most of today — oh, it looks like someone's approaching.

C: 我从小就在神殿附近长大，附近的人都认识我，你要是不放心，可以向他们打听打听。
E: I've lived near the temple my whole life, and everyone around here knows me. If you have any doubts, you're welcome to ask the locals about me.

C: 想聊几句吗？
E: Feel like talking for a bit?

C: 嗯，我确实听说最近会有圣女大人的贵客来访，如此就说得通了！很荣幸能认识您！
E: Ah, that would make sense. I recently learned that the Holy Maiden was expecting an esteemed guest. It's truly an honor to meet you!

C: 我都做到这个程度了，以后不准说奇美拉不可爱，嗷呜嗷呜！
E: I've gone this far, so from now on, don't you dare say chimeras are not cute! Awooo awooo!

C: 没想到吧，那个人就是我！
E: For your information, that taskmaster is me!

C: 不同部族的天空子民虽然都领受着艾格勒的祝福，彼此间却因信仰不同，总会产生不必要的冲突，直到一位伟大的黄金裔英雄现世……
E: Though all the Sky tribes received Aquila's blessings, their differing beliefs led to unnecessary conflicts, until the emergence of a great Chrysos Heir hero...

C: 昏光庭院呀…曾经，它是一个弥合阴晴晨昏的疗愈之所，天空后裔和谐共处的族群。
E: The Twilight Courtyard... once, it was a healing haven for bridging day and night, where the descendants of the Sky coexisted in harmony.

C: 一段时间以后，那位元老逝世了。再过了一段时间，听说元老们又递补了新成员——问题就出在这里！
E: A while later, the senator passed away. Not long after that, they appointed a new member. Here's where it gets weird!

C: 你看，那巨大的{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}奥体，它沉默不语地俯视着我们，如此的惊诧感，只有在黎明云崖才会感受得尤其深刻。
E: Look at that colossal {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}, who gazes down at us silently, and its imposing presence is uniquely profound here on Dawncloud.

C: 哦？你想引起我的注意吗？这招没用的。
E: Oh? Trying to catch my attention with this act? Sorry, but it won't work....

C: 「奥凯纳斯运动会」涵盖了你能想到的各种体育竞技，其中包括：田径、拳击、摔跤、角斗、赛马等几十种。
E: The Okeanas Games cover every kind of sports competition you can think of, including track and field, boxing, wrestling, gladiatorial combat, horse racing, and so on.

C: 「{NICKNAME}，一名开拓者。」
E: "{NICKNAME}, a Trailblazer."

C: 我，特阿诺，生前住在奥赫玛，在雅努萨波利斯度过了生命最后的三十年，美好地生，美丽地死。
E: I, Theano, lived in Okhema and spent my final <unbreak>30</unbreak> years in Janusopolis. I lived a good life and died a beautiful death.

C: 从我记事起就在圣殿侍奉。那时{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}还会经常显现神迹，回应信众的祷告……
E: I've served in the temple since I was little. Back then, {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} would often perform miracles, responding to the prayers of the faithful...

C: 可现在…哎，情况虽然不同了，但至少我还能为他人带去一点慰藉。
E: But now... Alas, things are different, but at least I can still offer some comfort to others.

C: …够了够了，谢谢你。
E: That's enough, thank you.

C: 不必介怀，这是贵族的义务。
E: No need to worry. It is a noble's duty.

C: 不同的祭仪代表着不同的含义，祭仪的每个动作、每句话语都有其深意，不可轻易更改——这些都是历代祭司传承下来的珍贵仪轨。
E: Each ritual carries its own meaning. Every gesture and every word are imbued with profound significance and must not be altered. These are the sacred traditions passed down through generations of priests.

C: 我现在的生活无非是坚持每日的祭仪，之后还要为信众诵读圣训，解答疑惑，没什么可聊的。
E: My life now simply consists of daily observance of rituals, followed by readings of the sacred text to the faithful and answers to their queries. There's little else to speak of.

C: 我找齐了这里的所有若虫。
E: I've found all the nymphs here.

C: 至于它们为什么出现在这里…阿格莱雅大人曾经说过一个解释，但我忘了……
E: As for why they appear here... Lady Aglaea once gave an explanation, but I've forgotten it...

C: 所以呢，也是为了我自己能冷静下来，我就这么做了。「再创世」应该和所谓的投胎差不多吧？还是希望，大家都能顺顺利利地转生……
E: So, partly to help myself stay calm, I started doing this. The Era Nova is probably like reincarnation, right? I just hope everyone can transition smoothly to their next life...

C: 据说黄金世里，许多城邦甚至会用它在浅滩搭建桥梁呢。我们来世一定也能用得上。
E: They say during the Golden Era, many city-states used them to build bridges across the shallows. We'll definitely need them in the next world.

C: 伏尔甘还好吗？
E: Is Vulcan doing okay?

C: 恰恰相反，我明白了，刻法勒虽然不再对人们说话，但它的庇护一刻也没有停止过。
E: On the contrary – I've realized Kephale's protection never ceased, though it no longer speaks to us.

C: 与你恰恰相反，我相信灵魂与心灵同样依靠躯体存在，身死灵魂即告消散，所以再跑也毫无意义。
E: Contrary to you, I think souls depend on flesh – death scatters both. Fleeing's meaningless.

C: 善语结善缘，恶言伤人心。
E: Kind words form friendly bonds, and harsh ones break the heart.

C: 唉，那我们还争辩些什么呢？事已至此，我们再没有地方可去了。
E: Then why debate? At this point, we have nowhere left to go.

C: 保护好自己，下次见。
E: Take care of yourself, and I'll see you next time.

C: 来，与我一同举杯！一杯敬过去快活的日子，一杯敬永不到来的明天！
E: Come, let's raise a toast! One glass to the happy days gone by, and another to the tomorrow that will never come!

C: 可不是！哈哈，我跟在这里的人已经决定了，要笑着迎接新世界的到来，这样就不会被先一步离开的人调侃了。
E: Exactly! Haha, those of us here have already decided to welcome the new world with a smile. That way, we won't be mocked by those who left before us.

C: 多谢你了，贵客，织者们在圣城会过得很愉快的。这些礼物就权当报酬收下吧。
E: Thank you so much, esteemed guest. The weavers will be very happy living in the holy city. Take these gifts as your payment.

C: 白厄，你小子！可算回来了。放着农活不干，跑哪儿去了？
E: Phainon, you brat! You're finally back. Skipping out on chores again, where did you go?

C: 喔，你瞧我，光顾着聊天都忘招待你了。
E: Ah! Look at me — got so caught up chatting I forgot my manners!

C: 是什么礼物？
E: What kind of gift?

C: 呵呵…到那时，记得给大家也讲讲自己的故事啊。
E: Hehe... when that day comes, don't forget to tell us your story, too.

C: 不想和有钱妖精说话！
E: I don't want to talk to any rich fairies!

C: 记忆永不落幕，贵客。
E: The curtains of memories never fall, my esteemed guest.

C: 等她醒。
E: Wait until she wakes.

C: {NICKNAME}是这么想的吗？但就算它长成了大地兽，应该也会很可爱。一定不止我一个人这么觉得。
E: Is that what you think? But even if it grows into a dromas, it should still be adorable. Surely I'm not the only one who feels this way.

C: 听说过天空英雄塞涅俄丝吧？她的直系血脉在来到大地后便创立了昏光庭院，我们闻讯后加入，这才结束了百号人的流离之苦。
E: You've heard of the sky hero Seliose, right? Her direct bloodline founded the Twilight Courtyard after descending to the land, and we joined them upon hearing the news. That's how the suffering of our scattered hundred finally ended.

C: 聊聊你们清洗者。
E: Let's talk about your Cleaners.

C: 但我之所以成为清洗者，是希望不再让黄金裔们掀起动乱。可在凯撒大人完成这番伟业后，她却仍恪守与黄金裔为敌的信条，反倒又一次掀起动乱……
E: But I became a Cleaner because I didn't want the Chrysos Heirs stirring trouble again. Yet, when the Great Imperator succeeded in her noble accomplishments, she stood by the belief that the Chrysos Heirs were her enemies. And thus, trouble brewed once again...

C: 吼~别，本狮真喝，喝不下了…呼嗝~
E: Roar~ No, I really can't... can't drink anymore... Burp~

C: 合理的决定，毕竟——有两类生物最好别去招惹：狮子、以及醉汉。
E: A reasonable decision. After all, there are two beings that you should never provoke: a lion, and a drunk.

C: 那就先尽情享受宴会吧。
E: Then enjoy the banquet to your heart's content.

C: 「还记得我们玩捉迷藏的时候，我曾问过你：假如有一天，身边的人突然消失了，我们该怎么做呢？」
E: "Do you remember? When we were playing hide-and-seek, I once asked you: What would we do if one day the people around us suddenly vanished?"

C: 多喝露水，多晒阳光，长出翠绿脆嫩的叶片、结实饱满的菜心，不要被隔壁菜地的绿球菜比下去迷！
E: Soak up that dew. Soak up that sun. Grow crisp, green leaves and strong, plump hearts. Don't let the greenie cabbage next door outshine you, mem!

C: 嘿嘿…等绿球菜大丰收，我就能大赚一笔，天天去餐馆吃饭了迷~
E: Hehe... once the greenie cabbage harvest comes in strong, I'll be rolling in money and dining out every day, mem~

C: 至终，至创世，重新流淌。
E: In the end, at the dawn of genesis, flowing once more.

C: 欸，哥们儿，不对吧？这茴香不是我俩前天一起进的货吗？大姐也是老主顾了，你不给她便宜便宜？
E: Eh, bro, this isn't right. Didn't we purchase this fennel together just two days back? This lady is a regular customer. Can't you give her a discount?

C: 现在的袍子真不行，我昨天逛了半天，那些所谓的最新设计，我真的看不过眼，太丑了……
E: Robes these days are just terrible. I was out shopping all day yesterday, but none of these so-called new designs pleased my eye. They were all hideous...

C: 啊，你喜欢做饭，好浪费…为什么我就不是山之民呢？
E: Ah, you like cooking? What a waste... Why can't I be a Mountain Dweller?

C: 圣女赐福过的神圣水果，价格公道，数量有限，先到先得~
E: Fruits blessed by the Holy Maiden! Reasonably priced, limited quantity! First come, first served~

C: 瑟希斯在上…
E: By Cerces above...

C: 咕咕…噢！有个爱跳舞的孩子，老和<color=#dbc291ff>跳舞的人偶</color>待在一起，要陪它跳一曲吗？
E: Hoot hoot... Oh! There's a child who loves to dance, and they're always with the <color=#dbc291ff>dancing puppets</color>. Care to dance with it?

C: 又见面了，最近你有没有发现什么新奇的小生物呢？
E: We meet again. Did you find any new creatures recently?

C: 我没什么要问了……
E: I don't have any other questions.

C: 你别看他现在这么阻挠他徒弟的爱情，当年的他，好家伙，那叫一个多情郎啊。
E: Don't be fooled by his seeming determination to prevent his apprentice from dating. You never could've guessed that he used to be quite the womanizer back in his younger days.

C: 我既然不顾死活地回到了神悟树庭，我的精神状态肯定也异于常人！
E: If I'm crazy enough to come back to the Grove of Epiphany despite the risks, my mental state must fall outside what's considered normal!

C: 前路还得自己找。
E: We'll have to find our own way forward.

C: 将那些迷途的若虫一一采撷，并带回属于它们的苗圃吧。就像你拯救我时一样。
E: Gather those disoriented nymphs one by one and bring them back to their nursery, just like when you saved me.

C: o((◣'ω´◢ ╬)o「必能叱咤洪水！」)∋
E: o((◣'ω´◢ ╬)o "I shall outroar the flood!" )∋

C: 麻烦倒算不上，就是我家那俩不省心的女儿，突然跟我说要转投曳石学派……
E: It's not really trouble, It's just that my two troublemaker daughters suddenly told me they want to change to the Helkolithist school...

C: …连我都安排好了是吧？还有，你骂谁呢！
E: ...You've given me a job without my consent, huh? Just exactly who do you think you're patronizing right now?

C: 啊，是你！又见面了——几位，这是{NICKNAME}，在树庭遭难后帮我调查的那位好心人，也是拯救翁法罗斯的大英雄！
E: Ah, it's you! We meet again. Everyone, this is {NICKNAME}, the kind soul who helped me investigate after the disaster at the Grove, and the great hero who saved Amphoreus!

C: 嗯，损毁得很严重，继续营业实在太过勉强了。
E: Hmm, the damage is pretty severe. It'd be pushing it to keep operating like this.

C: 伊克西翁，你说你要公布个秘密，现在人都到了，连大英雄也在这里，你就讲讲吧。
E: Ixion, you said you had a secret to reveal. Now that everyone's here, including our great hero, why don't you tell us about it?

C: 没有卫兵阻拦我，也没有人对我进行斥责！果然，我体内流淌着红色的金血啊——
E: No guards stopped me, and nobody scolded me! Just as I thought, red gold blood indeed flows through my veins!

C: 别卷了…
E: Stop being such a tryhard...

C: 言归正传，我打算重建织坊。把大家召集到这里，是希望你们能助我一臂之力。
E: Back to business. I plan to rebuild the weaving workshop. And the reason I gathered you here is that I hope you can lend me a hand.

C: 对这份邀请很意外吗？
E: Surprised by this invitation?

C: 听说丹恒一直在补充星穹列车的智库，要带往天外的话，我会推荐托勒密早年写作的百邦历史给你们。
E: I heard Dan Heng has been updating the Astral Express's data bank. If you're bringing some beyond the sky, I'd recommend Ptolemy's early writings on the History of a Hundred Nations.

C: 若是这么说，「救世主」不是皇冠或者印戒，并非独一无二的权力象征，抑或什么珍贵的雅称，而是将履行…或已履行的命运。
E: If that's the case, "Deliverer" is not a crown or a signet, not a unique symbol of power, nor some precious honorific. It is a destiny to be fulfilled... or one that has already been fulfilled.

C: 是不是海宝？
E: Maybe it was Hysie?

C: 除了缇宝老师，每次我和大家说话都要仰着脖子，但凯撒大人却特别地平易*近人*呢，嘿嘿，真是一位让人感到亲切的陛下。
E: I'm always craning my neck when I talk to others, aside from Lady Tribbie. But you're so "down-to-earth," Great Imperator, literally!

C: 有什么希望我铭记的东西吗？
E: Is there anything you want me to remember?

C: 缇宝老师，我想学变魔术。
E: Lady Tribbie, I want to learn how to do magic tricks.

C: 把手伸进水里…感受到了吗？风轻轻吹过水面，就会变成涟漪。
E: Put your hand in the water... Can you feel it? When the wind gently blows across the surface, it creates ripples.

C: 他们在聊什么？
E: What are they talking about?

C: 给织坊多招几个人吧。
E: Let's hire more people for the weaving workshop.

C: 该期待时装展览了。
E: Time to look forward to the fashion exhibition.

C: 头顶的星空，真美呀，一颗颗星星，像无数个会眨眼的灵魂。
E: The starry sky above is so beautiful, each star twinkling like countless blinking souls.

C: 最后的这段路，只需要像往常那样走过就好。
E: Just walk this final stretch like you always do.

C: 嗯…有位织者正动弹不得。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>受困于路边的草丛</color>，守候有人将它拯救呢。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who is stuck and can't move. The golden thread brings tidings: They're <color=#dbc291ff>trapped in the roadside grass</color>, waiting for someone to come to their rescue.

C: 愿我们在新世界相见，贵客。
E: May we meet in the new world, honored guest.

C: 如你所愿，史诗的道标已然显现。
E: As you wished, the saga's benchmark has revealed itself.

C: {F#她}{M#他}的内心生出一丝疑惑，却还是朝前方的屏幕走去。
E: {F#She}{M#He} felt a hint of doubt, but still walked towards the screen ahead.

C: 行走在无名之途上的人啊，离别之前，请允许我为你献上一句箴言……
E: O wanderer on the nameless path, before we part ways, allow me to offer you these words of wisdom...

C: 裂界中长出的奇怪结晶，对人体有侵蚀危害……
E: Weird crystals grown out of the Fragmentum, which can corrode and hurt humans...

C: 有最新的《冒险鼹鼠队》吗？
E: Do you have the latest Adventurous Moles?

C: 啊，那是商业街后面铁门的钥匙，现在已经没有人用得上了。
E: Ah, that's the key to the iron gate behind the business street. No one can use it now.

C: 好吧，我就大方告诉你吧。
E: Fine, I'll be generous this time.

C: 哼，小屁孩儿到一边玩儿去。
E: Hmph, you cheeky little brat.

C: 这不是我找到的，鼹鼠党每天都在大冒险，我可没有时间去找《冒险鼹鼠队》。
E: I didn't find it. I've been going on adventures with The Moles every day. I don't have time to look for The Adventurous Moles.

C: 有位年事已高的矿车工师傅打算退休了，但是吧…他和他现在的徒弟实在不对付。估计你也知道我想说什么了——徒弟不出师，师傅也难隐退嘛。
E: An elderly mine cart operator intends to retire, but... he's not really hitting it off with his current apprentice. I guess you already know what I'm getting at. If the apprentice can't complete his training, then the master won't be able to retire in peace.

C: 要是有你这种机灵的{M#小伙子}{F#小姑娘}在旁边刺激刺激这臭小子，他估计就能上点心咯。
E: With a smart {M#boy}{F#girl} like you to motivate him, that brat might actually put a bit more effort into things.

C: 可我就是忍不住偷懒…这也没什么吧？我还年轻，有的是时间……
E: But I just can't help being lazy... I mean, that's okay, right? I'm still young, so I still have plenty of time...

C: 哈哈，不错！来，先把报酬给你。
E: Haha, great! Come and get your reward.

C: 师傅说，这灯的意思是…什么来着？
E: What did the master say this light means again?

C: 滴答，到时候我也是宾客了，就让那些比我业绩好的同事来伺候我！
E: Tick-tock, and then I'll be a guest too. I'll let my coworkers who have better KPIs than me serve me instead!

C: 滴答，我刚刚好像说了很多奇怪的话……
E: Tick-tock, I think I just spoke a bunch of gibberish...

C: 滴、答！快走开，不然我现在跟你爆了！
E: Tick, tock! Get lost, or I'll blow you sky-high!

C: 滴、答…你知道暗中控制梦境的「蝴蝶人」吗？你知道梦境底层潜藏的「筑梦边镜」吗？你知道家族中不可告人的献祭仪式吗？
E: Tick, tock... Do you know about Babochka that controls the Dreamscape from the shadows? What of the Dream's Edge, hidden deep below the Dreamscape? Do you know about the top-secret Family sacrificial rituals?

C: 主动走向毁灭绝不是逃离痛苦的正确方法，我还需要继续修行……
E: Choosing to go down the Path of Destruction is never the right way to escape suffering. I must continue tempering myself...

C: 修好？呵呵…你认为我们是需要修复的失败品吗？
E: Fix? Heh-heh... You think we're failed products that need fixing?

C: 不用辩解了，我听说有位宾客在帮助组长「修复」我们，应该就是你吧？
E: No need to explain. I heard there was a guest helping the team leader "fix" us. I suppose that's you?

C: 大厅的节目表…好了，排好了。接下来所有表演都会正常进行，好好享受您在空艇上的快乐时光吧！
E: The schedule for the hall... Alright, it's been arranged. All the performances will go ahead as scheduled. Please enjoy a wonderful time on board the airship!

C: 软件的安装包我已经发送到您的移动设备上了，或者您也可以用我旁边这台终端进行测试。希望您玩得开心……
E: I saved the installation package onto your mobile device — or you can just keep using this testing terminal next to me. Hope you have lots of fun playing...

C: 呃，抱歉，我不清楚对方的长相，但入侵者应该不止一人。
E: Mmm, sorry but I don't know what they look like — only that there should be more than one of them.

C: 呃，马上就到重点了。
E: Oh, I'll get to the point shortly.

C: （按下后退键。）
E: (Press Backspace.)

C: 对话不一样了…
E: Now the words are different...

C: 「哟，你好啊，屏幕那边正在焦头烂额的朋友！」
E: "Hello there, distressed friend at the computer terminal!"

C: 来和您聊聊艺术。
E: I've come to talk art with you.

C: 不过，你倒是来得正好。鄙人刚完成了这幅风景画——贝洛伯格的远景——我准备给它起名为《晨曦》！
E: But you've got great timing. I've just finished with this landscape — a vista overlooking Belobog — and I'm gonna call it Ray of Dawn!

C: 现在，我要为下一幅作品寻找灵感去了。有缘再见，陌生人！
E: Now then, I'm off to search out some inspiration for my next masterpiece. May we meet again, stranger!

C: 之后，你就能在工业展馆看到我们复制的自动机兵模型了。放心，它们不会动起来的——
E: Later on, you'll be able to see a replica automaton over in our Industrial Hall. Don't worry. They won't move around —

C: {NICKNAME}，你来的正是时候。鲍里斯正在找你呢。
E: {NICKNAME}, you're right on time. Boris is looking for you.

C: 那就是命运使然——看来，这幅画像注定需要你的意见才能彻底完成……
E: That is fate, then — it seems that this portrait is destined to require your opinion in order to be fully completed...

C: 不过，你还可以再考虑一下——我们还有时间。
E: However, you can still think about it a little more — we have time.

C: 工业展馆的展品也已经全部集齐。现在，这座主题展厅终于可以对外开放了…我们博物馆能走到这一步，你功不可没。
E: The Industrial Hall is filled with exhibits and ready to be opened to the public. It's all because of you that our museum manages to go this far.

C: 《劳动者》，出自巡回艺术画派巨擘雷比尼之手，描绘了大矿区的景象。
E: The Laborers by Rebini, a paragon of the nomadism movement, depicts the scenery of the Great Mine.

C: 「星核拘束装置」的比例微缩模型，是这颗星球一切灾难的肇因。
E: A scale miniature of the Stellaron Imprisonment Device. It housed the reason the planet was plunged into calamity.

C: …消失了！你们看到了吗？幽灵星槎消失了！
E: ...It disappeared! Did you see it? The phantom starskiff disappeared!

C: …是的。我听人说起，我妈…呃，也就是驭空大人在几日前登上过这艘星槎。
E: ...Yes. I heard someone said my mother... Uhm, Madam Yukong had boarded the starskiff a few days ago.

C: 什、什么意思？
E: Wh—What do you mean?

C: （咱们坦率一些不成吗？）
E: (Why don't we get honest with her?)

C: 你们看！那是…晴霓小姐…的影子——？！
E: Look! Is that... Miss Qingni's... shadow!?

C: 嗯…看起来好眼熟啊……
E: Hmm... This looks really familiar...

C: （拍摄合照）
E: (Take a photo together)

C: 我忙得很，没有闲逛的功夫。
E: I'm too busy to wander around random places.

C: 有踩到什么雷吗？
E: Is there anything I should avoid?

C: 你吃吧，我不饿。
E: You can have it — I'm not really hungry.

C: …要不？我们先到码头上去看看吧。
E: ...How about we go see what's happening at the dock?

C: 你们是…商会的？
E: You're from... the Merchant Guild?

C: 我感觉金人巷也蛮繁华的？
E: Aurum Alley looks like it's flourishing though?

C: 连烟靠近店门，朝着店内小声地沟通了什么，没人听清她与会长的交谈。
E: Lianyan approaches the store's doorway and quietly conveys something to the one within. No one hears what she said to the president.

C: 你可以再给我讲讲吗？
E: Could you repeat that?

C: 唠唠叨叨，别再问了！
E: Alright, alright, enough already!

C: <size=28>我说，公司是、没、有、别、人、了、吗！</size>
E: <size=28>I said: The — IPC — should — send — someone — else!</size>

C: 商会从来没有拒绝和金人巷商铺合作。
E: The Merchant Guild has never refused to work with any shops in Aurum Alley.

C: 现在可不是开玩笑的时候呀。
E: Now's not the time for jokes.

C: 会长充分感谢各位付出的努力，也知道各位想问什么。
E: The president fully appreciates your efforts and knows what you want to ask.

C: …会长曾帮助金人巷实现繁荣，是「金人巷的英雄」。不过即便是英雄，也不会永远被人拥戴。
E: The president is still a hero to Aurum Alley — he helped it achieve prosperity... but a hero will not be embraced forever.

C: 会长收集的商铺意向调查，它整理了商铺们对不同经营理念的倾向。
E: The president conducted a poll to gather the shops' opinions on the future of the Alley.

C: 请各方代表提交投标文件，天舶司将审核经营范围、出资比例、注册资金等相关材料。
E: I hereby ask all parties to submit your support documents for evaluation. The documents should include scope of business, ratio of contributions, and registered capital.

C: 「美食街」金人巷竞争力十足。
E: The Alley's identity as a "food street" is what makes it so competitive.

C: 「罗浮第一夜市」？在公司注资后，仙舟罗浮上处处都会建起新的商业中心，人们为什么会专程来到你的金人巷呢？他们早就不在意谁才是「第一夜市」了。
E: "Best night market on the Luofu"? With the IPC's funding pouring in, hundreds of commercial centers will sprout. Why would people come to Aurum Alley when they have so many other options? Nobody cares about that title anymore.

C: 我听说，小少爷游学归来之后，比过去沉稳了不少。想必是那段在外的经历，让他得出了现在的思考。
E: I'd heard that Xiaohan had matured a lot since returning from his study abroad. It would appear the time he spent outside the Xianzhou really did make him a better person.

C: 朋友，我在码头上见过你。你代表商会和不少商户建立了合作，其实我也是做小本生意的，金人巷码头的福利能不能也让我沾沾光？
E: Friend, I saw you at the docks before. You rep a guild and have connections throughout the business world. Y'know, I'm something of a businessman myself. Can I get in on some of this Aurum Alley dock's hustle?

C: 你可来了！我听说你们商会希望商户们能够加入物流系统之中…我其实挺想加入的，不过我现在想加一个条件，你能不能帮我把这位青雀小姐请走呢？
E: You're here! I heard that your guild is trying to port merchants onto the logistics platform... I was actually thinking of signing up, but only on one condition: Can you please help me handle this Qingque lady?

C: 星际和平公司合作邀请函？
E: Collaboration Invitation from the IPC?

C: 原本一个月的工作，按照现在的规划，必须在半个月内完成。每一位太卜司卜者都成了这次「延误事件」的受害者……
E: According to the current plan, a month's work now has to be done in half a month. Every diviner at the Divination Commission has fallen victim to this "delayed workload"...

C: 金人巷真的能够停下星际货船？
E: How are interastral cargo ships supposed to dock? There isn't enough room.

C: 出示
E: (Present evidence)

C: 报上神策府策士的名字。
E: Tell me the name of the Seat of Divine Foresight counselor.

C: 救…救救我……
E: Save... Save me...

C: 我不了解这里的路况…看你好像很了解金人巷，你能帮我个忙吗？
E: I don't know my way around here... You seem to know Aurum Alley pretty well. Could you help me out?

C: …啊，我忘了，我搭档今天又忘记给我还原出厂设置了…我前后左右总是分不清，抱歉抱歉！
E: ...Ah, I forgot. And my partner forgot to restore me to factory settings... I always get my lefts and my rights mixed up. Sorry about that!

C: …就是说，我运送的货物也不在少数了，但臭成那样的包裹我还是头一回，当时我就想，这个味道莫不是腐烂的肉味？
E: ...I mean, I'd delivered quite a few packages, but that was the first time I ever came across a package with such an awful stench. I thought to myself, "could that stench be rotten meat?"

C: 哎呀，别提了，外卖单子多到我都忙不过来了，但最近却总是被客人投诉，我就纳闷了，我就说我这厨艺也没退步，怎么就天天吃差评了。
E: Oh, you know what? All the takeout orders are overwhelming these days, and so are the complaints from my customers. I've never received so many negative reviews before.

C: 感谢您的协助，十王司成功回收此处的「逸散岁阳」，谢礼就留在此地，希望大人笑纳。
E: Thank you for your assistance. The Ten-Lords Commission has successfully retrieved the dispersed heliobi at this area. I shall leave your reward here. I hope you receive it well.

C: 看来是时候对新的研究对象出手了！就选那个…那个那个「外宇宙之炎」吧！至于研究内容…嗯！就决定是你了《浅析外宇宙之炎的温度》！
E: So, it seems to be a good time for a new subject of research! How about that... that... "Blaze Out of Space"! As for the research title... Well, I suppose it should be "A Brief Analysis of the Thermal Properties of Extraterrestrial Blaze"!

C: 肯定是恶作剧呗！那些青春期的臭小鬼，最喜欢搞这种事。
E: Must be a prank by some of those teenage delinquents. They love pranks.

C: 要相信科学，这肯定是有人在搞鬼，我这就去报告铁卫！
E: Believe in the science! Someone must be behind this, I'll go ahead and make a report!

C: （拍打柜子）
E: (Thump the cabinet)

C: 哇！那是啥？是怪兽吗！好耶！我见过怪兽了！
E: Wooow! What's that? Is it a monster? Hooray! I saw a monster!

C: （这里是在进行什么科普讲座吗？对小孩子讲述这种理论，是不是太深奥了啊……）
E: (Is he giving a lecture? Preaching this to children... isn't it a little too deep?)

C: （雷金？这么一说好像确实有点像！虽然个人气质方面差别很大……）
E: (Regin? Now that they pointed it out, he does look like him! Even though the demeanor and personality seems heaven and earth...)

C: 我不喜欢战争啾，我希望大家早点握手言和。
E: I don't like conflicts, so I hope to see you guys making peace with each other soon.

C: 你明白，突破这最后的封锁，你和狱友就能与大部队汇合了。
E: You know that, once you break through this final blockade, you and your cellmate will be able to reunite with the main group.

C: 我们成功了。看，是哈努老大！哈努老大亲自来接应我们了！
E: We made it! Look, it's Boss Hanu! He's here to pick us up!

C: 等我再次抓到家族的把柄，{F#小姐}{M#先生}，我们还可以再次联手，彻底粉碎家族的阴谋。
E: Wait till I dig up more dirt on The Family, {F#miss}{M#mister}. We'll join forces again and shred The Family's conspiracies once and for all.

C: 呃…要不，你看这样，我带你去酒店房间里转转，那里有好多客人不要的东西。
E: Uh... Well, how about this? I'll take you to the hotel room. There's all sorts of stuff in there that guests don't want.

C: 作为「惊梦酒吧」的调饮师，处理好怪物间的关系是必修课。我可是在最开始就警告过你的哦？这里的调饮师不是那么好当的。
E: As a drinksmith at "Dreamjolt Hostelry," handling the monsters' interpersonal relationships is all part of the job. Didn't I tell you right when you started? Being a drinksmith here isn't a walk in the park.

C: 给您道歉了——对不起！！！！！
E: It's all my fault... I'm so sorry!!!!

C: 怎么办哇？新来的调饮师，你那么聪明，一定有办法的吧！
E: What should we do? You're a smart one, new drinksmith! So there must be something you can do!

C: 感谢你的付出。
E: Thank you for everything.

C: 怎么啦？你以前不是挺能说会道的嘛，到了重要时候，为什么突然变哑巴了呢？
E: What's wrong? You used to be so articulate, but when it really matters, why don't you say anything?

C: 我会撤去对内心的防护，请你用那种神奇的能力，将我的想法彻底展现在所有人面前。
E: I'll remove the protection for my heart. During this time, please use your magical ability to let everyone know how I'm really feeling.

C: 我记得和你约好的是，「惊梦酒吧」的所有者会协助鸢尾花家系的演艺事业，这里是怪物们的酒吧，所以由它们参与演出…有什么问题吗？
E: What we agreed was that the owners of Dreamjolt Hostelry would assist the Iris Family in their performances. Since this lounge belongs to those monsters, they'll be participating in the show... Is that a problem?

C: ——也让我看看，你的内心究竟是什么样的呢？
E: ...And show me what you're really like on the inside.

C: 你所经历的…一切，都化为开拓的…助力……
E: Everything you have experienced... will help support... Trailblaze...

C: 现在，你已经是一名成熟的无名客前辈了，将这份启程的「好运」传递下去吧！
E: Now, you are a veteran Nameless. Spread the luck of this departure!

C: 是的！
E: That's right!

C: 听说只要按动某些机关，就能触发他们留下的惊喜。
E: I heard that if you press the right mechanisms, you'll be able to trigger the surprises that they've left behind.

C: 不过，看来您已经凭借自己的实力找到了宝物之所在。这份线索交给您，或许能对您的寻宝之旅有所帮助。
E: However, it seems you managed to find the treasure all by yourself. This clue is for you. Maybe it'll help you along your treasure-hunting journey.

C: 我了解「钟表匠」的故事。
E: I'm familiar with the Watchmaker's story.

C: 天呐，一刀就能把整个影城砍成这样，那这个外来者可真是恐怖……
E: Holy moly, the outsider must be a scary figure to cause this much damage with just one slash.

C: 「钟表匠」说过，这里是格拉克斯教授的弟子「冯恩」设计的，质量绝对没问题。
E: According to the Watchmaker, this place was designed by Vaughn, a student of Professor Glaux. There shouldn't be any problem with the quality of the construction.

C: 是在拍摄电影的过程中遇到了什么困难吗？米莫萨在流梦礁担任过「钟表匠」的动画助手，非常熟悉钟表小子的故事，如果技术上有困难，也许你们可以交流……
E: Did you run into any problems during the production? Mimosa used to work as the Watchmaker's animation assistant here before, and she knows Clockie's story like the back of her hand. If it's a technical glitch, you can discuss it with her...

C: 您就是《美梦往事》的导演吧？事不宜迟，请先看看这次广告的脚本——
E: You're the director of Dreamjoy Memoir? Just in time. Please take a look at the script for this commercial...

C: 没问题，开拍！
E: No problem. Action!

C: 也是！也是！
E: That too! That too!

C: 非常完美！
E: It's been perfect!

C: 太好了，我相信导演你的实力与品味。
E: Wonderful. I place full trust in your ability and aesthetics.

C: 哼，<color=#dbc291ff>差强人意</color>，还算能用。
E: Hmph, <color=#dbc291ff>it was lacking something</color>, but it's still usable.

C: 不过，负责扮鸟的朋友有点调皮，学着动画片里的折纸小鸟藏起来了。小助手，麻烦你先把演员找出来吧！
E: But, the staff that's playing the bird is a little mischievous, learning to hide just like the origami bird in the animation. Please go look for the actor first!

C: 哇咔咔，钟表小子，我要狠狠把你的小鸟朋友蹂躏、羞辱、撕碎！
E: Mwahaha, Clockie, I will brutally pummel, shame, and tear your bird friends to shreds!

C: 这个钟表小子只能重复固定的台词，应该是鸢尾花制造的*道具*。
E: This Clockie can only repeat fixed lines. It might be a *prop* made by the Iris Family.

C: 没问题，开拍！
E: No problem. Action!

C: 哼！
E: Hmph!

C: 那我们继续——「石头老板在镇中无恶不作，只为得到宝贵的石头 / 美丽的垃圾 / 圆满的爱情。但他的行径越来越过分，镇民们压抑的怒火愈发高涨……」
E: Let's continue, then: "Boss Stone did all kinds of wicked deeds to the townsfolk, all so he could get precious stone / beautiful trash / wholesome love. But his behavior grew increasingly excessive, and the stifled rage of the townsfolk began to grow and grow..."

C: 再见，好导演，祝你在生活中不会遇到石头老板这样的坏蛋。
E: So long, maestro! I hope you'll never encounter for yourself a bad guy like Boss Stone.

C: 啾！好的，下次见啾！
E: Tweet! Alright, see you next time!

C: 美梦得到了秩序。
E: Sweet dreams became orderly.

C: 车里的内置影院…
E: A home theater system built into a car...

C: 这名号听起来怎么有点耳熟…
E: Now why does that name sound familiar...

C: 这名号听起来怎么有点耳熟…
E: Now why does that name sound familiar...

C: 他说得对，吃饱了才有力气迎接最后的挑战，我来买点吃的吧！
E: He was right, we need to fill up first before taking on this final challenge. This time it's on me!

C: 给，客气啦，不知道你喜不喜欢。
E: Here you go, don't mention it. I'm not entirely sure if you'll like it.

C: 我们要小心，别被那群怪物发现了。
E: Let's stay alert and make sure those monsters don't spot us.

C: 是影片的改变吗？
E: Was all this the result of being in the film?

C: 与你相伴的少女忽然消散，你面前仍是那张闪着金属光泽的录像带，那只神秘的眼睛仍在静静地望着你。
E: The girl who accompanied you suddenly dissolves, leaving behind the metallic gleam of a videotape before you. That enigmatic eye still gazes silently at you.

C: 影片接下来的情节，你不是已经见证过了吗——一轮白日在白日梦中陨落，一份信仰被另一份信仰击溃，真是一段精彩的故事。
E: You already know what will happen next, don't you? A blazing sun setting within a daydream, a shattered belief crumbling under the weight of another. It's truly a captivating tale.

C: 热砂假日
E: Scorchsand Vacation

C: 我该怎么做？
E: What should I do?

C: 请跟我来吧。因为空间站是黑塔的私人财产，差分宇宙的测试场所另在他处。为此，我动用了一些「银河贵宾」的特权。
E: Now, please come with me. Since the space station is Herta's personal asset, I have arranged the test site for the Divergent Universe elsewhere, utilizing some of my "Cosmic VIP" privileges.

C: 我好像已经明白三月七学剑的动力是什么了。
E: I think I've figured out what's motivated March to learn swordplay.

C: 既然两位师父都认可了，那我还有一个小小的请求，我想给两位师父敬拜师茶，两位师父记得要用手指在桌上叩几下……
E: Now that you've both given your approval, I have another small request. I want to perform a tea ceremony to honor you as my masters. Remember, you'll need to tap the table a few times with your fingers...

C: 不要叫我客人，你的眼里根本就没有我这个客人。我要「不烫也不凉，口感刚刚好」的茶水，结果你上的茶要么凉了，要么烫嘴，你们仙舟真是太会待客啦！
E: Stop, don't call me a "guest." You're not even treating me as one. I want my tea just right, not too hot, not too cold, but the tea you served was either freezing or scalding! Is this how you treat your guests on the Xianzhou? How fantastic!

C: 我看你们是完全不懂哦。
E: Looks like you guys are totally clueless.

C: 过了不久，罗浮之上某个阴暗的角落里……
E: Moments later, in a dark corner on the Luofu...

C: 查清楚了，那个姑娘也是星穹列车上的无名客，实力不可小觑。斯科特专员，您看这赌约是不是有些风险？
E: Yeah, that girl is one of the Nameless on the Astral Express. She's no pushover. Don't you think this bet's a bit too risky?

C: 这次你好像没有上次那么自信？
E: You don't seem as confident as last time. What's up?

C: 彦卿师父，你是不想教了？
E: Is it that you don't want to teach her anymore, Master Yanqing?

C: 嗯，没错，就让斯科特见识见识他瞧不起的仙舟剑术！
E: Yeah! I'll show Skott the power of the Xianzhou swordplay that he despises!

C: 我明白了，就这样做吧！想要击败他，何必非要剑术呢？
E: I see, let's give it a shot! Who says we have to rely purely on swordplay to beat him?

C: 呸呸呸，好心当成了驴肝肺，你想要，老子还不愿帮呢！
E: Bah, and here I was trying to be nice! Even if you wanted it, I wouldn't help you now!

C: 岁阳专挑演武仪典的选手袭击，不出意外，你们遇上了不速之客……
E: The heliobus is focused specifically on attacking Wardance contestants. As expected, you encountered an undesired guest...

C: 上次三月七小姐说有话要说……
E: You had something you wished to say last time...

C: 当时我想要让尾巴大爷帮忙，让我学个一招半式的，不过嘛，有些难以启齿……
E: I wanted to have Mr. Tail help me out then, to at least learn a move or two. But I was too embarrassed to admit it...

C: 没人能抵挡「走捷径」的诱惑。
E: No one can withstand the temptation of a shortcut.

C: 呜…我输了……
E: Argh... I've lost...

C: 愿赌服输，你少威胁我。
E: A deal is a deal! You think I'm scared of your threats?

C: 啊，这好像是他爹。他们人类好像经常「要用一生治愈童年」，斯科特可能也不例外？
E: Oh, this guy looks just like his old man. Humans spend decades trying to heal their childhood traumas, and Skott might be no different.

C: 听你夸奖完，我真的好生气。{NICKNAME}，我可以趁他站不起来，再打他一顿吗？
E: Your compliments make me so mad. Can I give him another beating while he's down, {NICKNAME}?

C: 苏乐达给了你多少钱？
E: How much did SoulGlad pay you?

C: 我可不会什么剑斗啊，如果不是打牌的话，我好像没有什么能够帮你的。
E: But I know nothing about swordplay or duels. Now, if you're talking about playing Celestial Jade, that's something I might be able to help with.

C: 斯科特，你有没有想过你其实也可以慢下来，从茶叶、茶水、茶文化开始了解，那时你将得到一个新的爱好，体会一种全新的生活方式。
E: Skott, have you ever thought about slowing down and exploring things like tea and tea culture? It could be a new hobby and a whole new way of life for you.

C: 哈哈哈哈，我早就听闻星穹列车的无名客行事多荒诞不经，既然这位小姐是三月七，另一位肯定就是{NICKNAME}了。
E: Hahahaha, I have long heard of the many shenanigans of the Astral Express's Nameless. If the lady is March 7th, this must be {NICKNAME}.

C: 既然你们撞上了我，就不必再另寻他处了。
E: Since you have run into me, you shall not have to look any further.

C: 对哦，这里是丹鼎司，灵砂大人就任的地方。
E: Oh, yeah. This is Alchemy Commission where Lady Lingsha works.

C: 没错，本姑娘已经发下毒誓，决心以后要过上只喝奶茶的寡淡人生。
E: That's right, I've sworn an oath that I'll only live a bland life of drinking milk tea, and nothing more.

C: 我不做人了！椒椒！让我喝吧！
E: I shall cast off my human shell then! Jiaojiao! Let me drink it!

C: 三月小姐请不必担心，如果您为了对付斯科特而需要帮助的话，请随时到丹鼎司来找鄙人，鄙人一定会帮上你的。
E: Please do not worry, Miss March. If you need help defeating Skott, please feel free to look for me at the Alchemy Commission. I will definitely help you out.

C: 太卜司书库收藏了关于云骑军武技的各式孤本、残本，涉猎繁多，无所不包。
E: The Divination Commission repository holds many sole copies and fragmented records on Cloud Knights martial arts techniques covering all sorts of topics.

C: 比起「断掉一只手臂后，在剑冢前学会了无敌剑术」这种故事，我觉得还是「平平淡淡地过好了完整的一生」的故事是我想要的。
E: I think a story of "living a complete, yet unremarkable life" is far more appealing to me than "cutting someone's arm off and mastering a perfect sword technique before the blade tomb."

C: 在下次采样前，我去把拍到的这些离散忆质收容一下。先校验一下收容的可行性。
E: Before I send you out for more sampling, I'm going to try and store this scattered memoria. I need to test whether containment is possible.

C: 这个我擅长。
E: This is my specialty.

C: 我不是我没有，你不要过来！
E: I didn't! It wasn't me! Don't come any closer!

C: 来咯，亲爱的伙伴{NICKNAME}！你是来助我一臂之力的吗？
E: You came! My dear {NICKNAME}, have you come to fight by my side once more?

C: 毕竟是异星文明…
E: It's an alien civilization after all...

C: 胜者是——「铁臂」卢卡！
E: And the winner is... Luka "Strongarm"!

C: 速战速决吧。
E: Let's end it quickly.

C: 满意了吧？那我们走啦，明天要是没事再来找你玩。
E: Satisfied now? Then we'll be off. We'll come find you tomorrow if we're free.

C: 不是，我来给那几位云骑弟兄开点跌打损伤药。
E: No, I came here to help my Cloud Knight coworkers get medication for their bruises and swelling.

C: 从造影结果来看，你的脑袋似乎没有任何问题。卢卡先生，你最近吃了什么特别的东西吗？
E: From the exam results, it looks like there's nothing wrong with your brain. Mr. Luka, have you been eating anything unusual lately?

C: 哦对了！和素裳小姐打完比赛之后，我喝了一瓶「好梦气泡饮」！但那之前我已经开始出现幻觉了啊？
E: Oh right! After the match against Miss Sushang, I drank a bottle of Sweet Dreams Soda! But I think I was already hallucinating before that?

C: 妾身突然想起来，还有个小东西能帮你缓解症状…请稍等片刻。
E: I'm suddenly reminded of something that might help alleviate your symptoms... Please wait a moment.

C: 你明白我意思就行！
E: You know what I mean!

C: 没错。墓志铭的生平里明确了，拳击手伊戈尔•哈夫特曾在军团入侵前离开过雅利洛-Ⅵ，但后来他回到了家园，参加抵抗军团入侵的战争。
E: That's right. The epitaph on the tombstone confirms that hypothesis — the fighter Igor Haft once left Jarilo-VI before the invasion, and then he returned home to join the resistance against the aggressors.

C: 另外，如果能借此机会与仙舟联盟建立简单的往来，也可以让我们在面对公司时多一些筹码。
E: Also, if we can leverage this opportunity to establish an amicable exchange with the Xianzhou Alliance, it may provide us with more bargaining power when dealing with the IPC.

C: 加油啊卢卡选手！打败波提欧然后交给我，赏金咱俩对半分！
E: Go for it Luka! Defeat Boothill and hand him over to me. We'll split the bounty in half!

C: 呃，波提欧先生，我们只是切磋而已，点到为止就好，倒也不必以命相搏……
E: Uh, Mr. Boothill, we're just sparring, that's all. Let's not risk our lives.

C: 他这次确实太过分了。
E: He really went overboard this time.

C: 该上哪里找那么厉害的岁阳呢？
E: Where would we even find such a heliobus?

C: 谢谢尾巴大爷！
E: Thank you, Mr. Tail!

C: 不过，刚才发生了什么…怎么绿光一闪，卢卡选手就振作起来了？这疗法是不是有些…太快了？
E: But, what happened just now... Luka just came to his senses after that green flash of light? This treatment is a little too... effective, isn't it?

C: 哈哈哈哈哈！他呜呜伯的，有点胆色！枪弹无眼，你别怪我心狠啊！
E: Hahahaha! Screwubbaboo, you've got some guts! Bullets don't have eyes, so don't blame me for bein' ruthless!

C: 笨死你算了！老子问你一个问题，你好好回答——
E: You might as well be a single-celled organism! Let me ask you a question, and answer it properly...

C: 我会在演武仪典的擂台上，用我的拳头，重新书写伊戈尔的故事。
E: With my fists, I'll rewrite Igor's story in the Wardance's ring.

C: 还是免了吧。
E: I'll pass.

C: 他宝贝了个腿的，这小子好强啊！
E: Son of a fudge, now that boy is strong!

C: …这里的氛围倒是和我们贝洛伯格差不多。
E: ...The vibe of this place is similar to Belobog.

C: 「我！卢卡！一定会赢的！我一定会打败彦卿的！」
E: "I! Luka! Will be the winner! I will defeat Yanqing!"

C: 比赛的结局究竟会走向何方？让我们拭目以待！
E: What will be the final result of this match? Let's watch and find out!

C: 你没听到吗？贝洛伯格的卢卡，所有人都在为你欢呼。
E: Can't you hear? Everyone's cheering for you, Luka.

C: 将军？
E: General?

C: 走到这里，已容不得我退却了。为了丹轮寺的僧众和孩子们，我必须打败您和未来所有与我为敌的对手…哪怕为此破犯嗔戒也在所不惜。
E: I've come so far, and there is no turning back. For the monks and children at Claretwheel Temple, I have to defeat you and any future opponents that cross me... Even if it means breaking my vows to desist from hate.

C: 这个机器人是怎么回事？不行，眼下必须先控制住赛场的秩序。喂，大铁壳！冲这儿来！
E: What's wrong with this robot? No, we must keep order in the arena. Hey, Ironshell! Come here!

C: 我、我只想在演武仪典上向仙舟请愿……让你们听听丹轮寺的声音。如果我以本来面目出现，只怕连登上罗浮也不可能。
E: I... I only wished to plead to the Xianzhou during the Wardance... To let you hear the voices of Claretwheel Temple. If I appeared in my true form, I would not be able to even step foot on the Luofu.

C: 提议：供词作为语言的延伸，传递效率太过原始。我将用更高效的方式向各位同步我的数据。
E: Suggestion: As a linguistic extension, confession is inefficient for transmission. I will synchronize my data with you all in a more optimal manner.

C: 否定：检测到有机生命，覆盖以上结论。
E: Negative: Organic life detected. Overwrite last conclusion.

C: 你走吧。我们不会趁你背对我们时动手的。
E: Go. We will not do anything behind your back.

C: …你有没有感觉到，盔甲上的机巧零件，它们僵住了……
E: ...Do you feel that, the intricate ingenia on the gray armor... They're frozen...

C: 说实话那也不怪他们呀…
E: Honestly, I can't blame them...

C: 小孩姐啊？没劲。
E: It's a kid? How boring.

C: 稍作准备。
E: Make some preparations.

C: 作为参赛方，我认为我们不适宜对比赛规则进行评价。我只能表示，比赛结果就是这样，而且我们接受它。
E: As a participant, I don't think it is appropriate for us to comment on the tournament's regulations. I can only say that this is the outcome of the match, and we accept the outcome.

C: 看来比赛前景不容乐观啊，加油{NICKNAME}教练，加油卢卡！
E: Looks like you have a bleak outlook on the subsequent matches. Keep your heads up, Coach {NICKNAME} and Luka!

C: 我记得啊，一碗小米粥加半个煎饼啊。
E: I do. A bowl of millet porridge and half a pancake.

C: 说实话，刚到雅利洛-Ⅵ时，我就意识到了，大机器人就是帅啊！
E: Honestly, when I first arrived in Jarilo-VI, I realized that big robots are really cool!

C: 我没什么要解释的…
E: No explanation is required...

C: 卢卡有没有换个功率加倍的机械臂呢？或者有没有做过「空手夺白刃」的训练呢？你的战术准备好了吗？
E: Did Luka change to a more powerful robot arm? Or does he have prior training to catch blades with his bare hands? Have you prepared your battle tactics?

C: 早就等不及了，赶紧开始吧。
E: I can't wait. Let's get this started.

C: 不，我不能退缩……
E: No, I won't back down...

C: 呸呸！真是令人作呕，亏我以前还信了铄金的鬼话。
E: Ugh! It's truly nauseating. I can't believe I used to fall for Shuojin's lies.

C: （唯有沉默）
E: (Remain Silent)

C: 你把「祖宗」当句号用了？
E: You end every sentence with "top dog"?

C: 呵，这一整套交感幻戏的系统都是我开发的，他们不让我出来露个脸，那不成卸磨杀驴了吗？
E: Heh, I developed this entire Empathic Immersia system. It'd be absurd if they didn't even allow me to show my face, would it?

C: 音乐述说着最纯粹的梦，这才是匹诺康尼作为*梦想之地*的真实含义。
E: Music conveys the purest of dreams, and this is the true meaning of Penacony as the Land of the Dreams.

C: 喔！阁下很有潜力啊！
E: Oof! The Sound Master has a knack for this!

C: （乱破确实在很认真地构思乐曲，还是别打扰她了。）
E: (Rappa really is churning her creative juices. I'd better not bother her.)

C: 诸位——我等乃是「缭乱乐团 / 缭乱众 / 缭乱号飞艇 / 缭乱忍徒旅店 / 缭乱流派对」！如刃尖般划破旧时代帷幕的音律•忍者流派是也！
E: Everyone! We are Dazzling Band / Dazzling Collective / Dazzling Airship / Dazzling Initiate Hotel / Dazzling School Party! The Sound Ninja school that will slash open the decrepit curtains of old like a sharp blade!

C: 哎呀，对我们来说，当然是希望办得越久越好啦。
E: As for us, of course, we'd like it to last as long as possible.

C: ——盛会巨星！乱破大人还没有回来，我先把舞台这边的情况稳住！
E: — Festive Superstar! Rappa is not back yet. Let me handle the situation on stage first!

C: ——拜托了，炒冷饭机器人！
E: ...Please, Fried Cold Rice Robot!

C: 你来到希露瓦指示的地点，却没有见到任何与乐队有关的内容。最显眼的是摆在路旁的几个垃圾桶，它们的色泽光鲜，棱角分明。
E: You arrive at the location with Serval's directions, but don't see anything relevant to a band. The most conspicuous things are several trashcans lying by the roadside. Their luster is shiny, their angles crisp and clean.

C: 不如翻翻看吧！
E: Might as well give them a rummage!

C: 桶友！我要发问——你愿意把剩余的人生交给我们吗？
E: Trashfriend! I'm gonna ask — are you willing to leave the rest of your life in our hands?

C: 主公，「缭乱乐团 / 缭乱众 / 缭乱号飞艇 / 缭乱忍徒旅店 / 缭乱流派对」的音律•狩猎圆满达成目标，我等能取得此番大捷，主公功不可没。
E: Sound Master, Dazzling Band / Dazzling Collective / Dazzling Airship / Dazzling Initiate Hotel / Dazzling School Party's Sound Hunt has been completed smoothly. Our success is all thanks to your great contributions, oh Sound Master.

C: 大家为何支支吾吾？
E: Why are you all so hesitant?

C: 我从入学开始就期待着这场演出，许多闻名梦境的乐手都是在音乐派对上成名的。而无论是天赋还是技巧，我都是最适合乐队核心的学生。
E: I have looked forward to this performance since the moment I entered the academy. So many famous Dreamscape musicians made their name here, at the music party. When it comes to talent or skill, it's obvious that I am most suited to being a band leader.

C: 当然，我没有任何退出乐队的打算，从前没有，以后也绝不会有。等处理完学院的事情，我肯定会回来继续排练。相信我，财富学院从来不骗人。
E: Of course, I don't plan on leaving the band, not now, not ever. Once I've taken care of the academy business, I will absolutely come back and continue practicing! Believe me, Fortune Academy would never lie.

C: 噢，对对。我差点都忘了，就是…呃，我向学院申请，推迟了交换的时间。
E: Oh, yeah, that's right. I almost forgot. It's just... Uhh, I asked the school to push back my exchange dates.

C: 最有艺术性的。
E: The most artistic.

C: 至于那个弹吉他的，只能说，最初的梦想，本就与你无关。
E: As for that guitarist... All I can say is that she was never part of the original dream.

C: 学院会给予那位学员相应的补偿，足以弥补未能参加此次演出的损失。
E: The academy will provide appropriate compensation to the other student to make up for not being able to join in with the performance.

C: 急了？现在带着检讨书来找我认错，也不是不能原谅你们。
E: Panicking? I might forgive you all if you come forth with an essay on self-reflection and apologize.

C: …说实话，我原本以为自己不会回到这个舞台了。这样的想法出现过两次。
E: ...Honestly, I actually thought I would never return to this stage. This thought popped into my head twice.

C: 别太灰心，毕竟折纸大学是我的主场，就当是专门给我定制的胜利吧。
E: Don't be too discouraged. Paperfold University is my home ground after all — my win is probably inevitable.

C: 艾尔菲用极其复杂的眼神望着你，仿佛在思考是否应该再离你远点。
E: Arfey stares at you with a very complicated expression, as if she is thinking about whether to back away from you.

C: 是我们该出场的时候！
E: It's time for us to shine!

C: 看看我们的厉害！
E: We'll show you what we're made of!

C: 您来啦。今天要准备的材料是<color=#dbc291ff>雷之眼</color>和<color=#dbc291ff>金属</color>，听着就刺激。开始吗？
E: You're here. The materials that need to be prepped today are the <color=#dbc291ff>Eyes of Lightning</color> and <color=#dbc291ff>Metal</color> — sounds intense. Shall we begin?

C: 什么，材料不够？没事，等你准备好了，随时回来啊。
E: What, not enough materials? Don't worry. I'll wait for you to get some. Come back anytime.

C: 聊聊这单生意。
E: Let's talk about this deal.

C: 来吧。
E: Bring it on.

C: 帕姆需要传达通知和警报，更大功率的喇叭可以节省些力气。不错吧？
E: Pom-Pom needs to deliver notices and announcements, and a more effective megaphone will save them some strength. Not bad, eh?

C: 老老实实清理积水。
E: Suck it up and dry the floor normally.

C: 清炒西瓜皮，糖熬生姜片，水煮咖啡豆…这么修改，应该没有什么痕迹吧？
E: Sautéed Watermelon Skin, Sugar-boiled Ginger Slices, Poached Coffee Beans... You think she would notice if I made these changes?

C: 我想想，给你们放哪一部动画比较好呢？
E: Let's see. Which animation do I put on for you?

C: 怎么每个人进来都要切歌？帕姆已经一整天都没完整听完任何一首歌了帕！帕姆生气了！今天谁都不许再碰留声机了！
E: Why does everyone keep changing songs? I haven't listened to a complete song the entire day! Ooh, I'm mad! No one is allowed to touch the phonograph today!

C: 太耀眼了，姬子乘客！
E: Simply dazzling, Himeko!

C: 嘿嘿，不管怎么说，多谢你们啦！我会好好珍惜这只耳机的～就算把自己弄丢了，都不会把它弄丢的！
E: Heehee, it doesn't matter. Thank you! I will cherish this earpiece... I won't lose it, even if I lose myself!

C: 瓦尔特先生，原来我们都被你骗了。看来，现在是你与我的决战了。
E: Mr. Yang, I can't believe we were all fooled by you. Looks like it's a showdown between you and me.

C: 难道，{F#她}{M#他}抽中的身份牌是…被投票出局就会立刻获得胜利的——
E: Don't tell me, the role card {F#she}{M#he} pulled was... the one that would instantly win the game if {F#she}{M#he} was voted out...

C: 因此，带来的不便之处，各位请多体谅。目前发现了以下问题。部分车厢没有配置消防器材，风险位置没有张贴警示，易燃易爆物品没有严格保存……
E: So please forgive me for this inconvenience. We have currently found the following problems: Some carriages aren't outfitted with firefighting equipment, risky areas do not have warning signs, flammable and explosive items have not been stored according to stringency...

C: 还是相信一下科技的力量吧。
E: We should trust in the power of technology.

C: 好吧…看来保护列车，还是得靠我们自己！大家去各节车厢巡逻一下，在风暴来临之前消除所有安全隐患帕。
E: Okay... It appears that we only have ourselves to rely on to protect the Express! Everyone head to the different carriages to survey the situation. We must eliminate all safety risks before the storm approaches.

C: 这个简单——起因、经过、结果，道歉、反思、改正，最后再夸奖一番帕姆，大功告成～
E: That's easy — the origin of the cause, what happened, result, apology, self-reflection, correction of behavior, end with a compliment for Pom-Pom. Mission accomplished!

C: 脸，脸要笑僵了……
E: M—My face is getting numb from smiling too long...

C: 我想到接下来拍什么了。走，咱们过去看看！
E: I know what to take next. C'mon, let's take a look over there!

C: 按你们的说法…想要拍摄我的雕像，探究「摄影术的极限」？有点意思。雕像能作为「教具」，也算是物尽其用。
E: What you're saying... is that you want to take a photo of my statue to explore the "limits of photography"? Interesting. Using a statue as an academic tool... that is certainly maximizing its potential.

C: 竟然连我们都有人冒充…看来是时候注册个商标了！
E: I can't believe even WE have someone impersonating us... It seems it's time to register a trademark!

C: 「演员的自我修养」。
E: "An Actor Prepares."

C: 钟表小子为伙伴准备了谢礼，请收下吧~滴~答！
E: I have prepared a gift for you. Please accept it, tick-tock!

C: 久违的演出…人家的演技还没有生疏呢。
E: A long-awaited performance... Still got the chops for acting.

C: 感应到了，就在前边不远的地方！
E: I can feel it. It's not far ahead!

C: 这也能感应到吗？
E: You can actually sense it?

C: 嘿嘿，谢谢大家！咱们来拍合影吧~
E: Hee-hee, thank you everyone! Let's take a group photo!

C: 螺丝咕姆你别走！
E: Don't go, Screwllum!

C: 没想到，今天竟然有机会领教天谴之矛的战术，我要将其补充进我的理论中。请您多指点！
E: I never thought I would have the chance to receive battle guidance from the Lance of Fury. I shall hone my theories with your advice. We'll be in your care!

C: 晨昏之眼看见一切，其目光如天穹般深远……
E: The Eye of Twilight is all-seeing, its vision as far-reaching as the sky dome...

C: 卷轴上的符文亮起，回应着你的来意；信徒们齐声念诵，赞词在你的脑海中回响——
E: The runes on the scroll are glowing, responding to your intent. Disciples chant in unison, their praises echoing in your mind...

C: 因为，眼目并无立场，更无目的，惟有观测的职责。
E: Because eyes have no stance nor purpose, only the duty of observance.

C: 啊，我啥都不会。
E: Ah, I don't know anything.

C: 你来奥赫玛的时间不久，我就先做个说明吧。<color=#dbc291ff>这些奇美拉受生命花园的统一管理，分成若干个小队，会帮城里的居民做些简单的工作。</color>
E: You haven't been in Okhema long, so I'll just give you a brief explanation: <color=#dbc291ff>These chimeras are managed by the Garden of Life, and divided into smaller squads that help out this city's residents with simple tasks.</color>
