C: 被表扬了！下班~好吃的~泡澡~开心！嗷呜嗷呜！
E: I was praised! Time to clock off! Good food, warm bath, so happy! Awoo-awoo!

C: 查看能力值都不行吗？
E: Can't we just be checking on ability scores?

C: …听见又怎么样？我就是故意说给你听的。
E: ...And so what if you did? I deliberately said it for you to hear.

C: 通报批评！
E: A memo of criticism!

C: 从长远发展来看，适时对团队做调整还是挺有必要的。精简成员，剔除不需要的部分，吸纳新鲜血液，这才是正确的做法，对吧？
E: From a long-term strategic perspective, it's essential to make timely adjustments to the squad. Streamlining, pruning inefficiencies, and bringing in new blood, that's the right way to go about it, no?

C: 会赢的！
E: We'll win for sure!

C: 那我来帮你放松下嗷呜~
E: Let me help you relax then, awoo!

C: 听见没有？老大的意思是，站在那别动，它会逐个清算你们的罪过！
E: Hear that? What Boss means is, stand there and don't move, it will — it will take an account of your wrongdoings in order!

C: …我看你是完全听不懂吧？
E: ...I think you completely misunderstood me?

C: 对不起螺丝咕姆，我玩了盗版。
E: Sorry Screwllum, I'm playing a pirated version here.

C: 记住，「勿忘英雄与美德」。英雄并非超人的存在，那些所有人都能拥有的美德，才是锻造英雄的火焰。
E: Remember, "Never forget the heroes and their virtues." Heroes aren't extraordinary existences — Virtues that everyone can possess forge the flames of a hero.

C: 昏光庭院一不小心没看住他，让他从重症护理室逃跑了，比赛就先暂停一下吧……
E: Twilight Courtyard accidentally lost track of him, and he escaped from the intensive care unit. Let's pause the match for now...

C: 你别问我了，我能有什么事……
E: Don't worry about me. What could possibly happen to me...

C: 接下来，我们继续介绍持有「银盏徽章」的选手……
E: Moving on, we'll introduce the contestants with Silver Chalice Badges...

C: 我记住你了，{NICKNAME}。我「十敌」的字典里会给你的名字留出位置——
E: I won't forget you, {NICKNAME}. Your name has earned its place in my dictionary—

C: 你们也欺负我。让我在这么多人面前丢脸，太可恶啦！但这就想让我放弃？没那么简单。
E: Now you're all turning on me too? Making me look like a fool in front of everyone — that's low! But if you think this'll break me, you're dead wrong.

C: 输给冠军不丢人！
E: There's no shame in losing to the champion!

C: 怎么了，不让锐评两句啊？我看这现场的气氛…还不够热烈啊。
E: What. Can't I be blunt? The vibe here... is lacking some fire!

C: 太好了，你是我信任的伙伴。
E: Perfect, you're my trusted ally.

C: 再说了，泡泡已经领悟了「胜利」的真谛。现在，想再真正地赢上一回。
E: And don't forget, Bubbles has already figured out the true meaning of "victory." Now, it's time for a real win.

C: 比赛规则没说不允许吧？
E: The rules didn't say anything about that, did they?

C: 这次交手，我大方承认了，灰子你的确是个不能小瞧的对手——
E: This time, I'll admit it: Gray Mystery, you're definitely an opponent to be taken seriously.

C: 浴场的灯怎么又黑了？
E: Why did the lights in the bath go out again?

C: 晚安，希望今晚能有<color=#dbc291ff>预言梦</color>。
E: Good night, and maybe there will be a <color=#dbc291ff>prophetic dream</color> tonight.

C: 「你会参加并赢下比赛，拯救所有人和所有小海豹。否则，你将永远成为一只小海豹。」
E: "You will participate and win the tournament. You will rescue everyone, as well as all the baby seals. If you fail, you will forever be stuck as a baby seal."

C: 看上面的公司标志，应该不是粉丝礼物。
E: The IPC's insignia is on it, so it's probably not a fan gift.

C: 再加上星穹列车全明星，应该是能吸引不少玩家了吧，哈哈~
E: Throw in the Astral Express crew, and we've got ourselves a hit, haha~

C: 作为青年才俊们的聚集地，折纸大学自然也是我们游戏的主要投放场所。如今《银河球棒侠传说：魔王篇》的游戏机就在眼前，不打算来体验一下吗？
E: As a hub for young talent, Paperfold University is naturally one of our primary launch locations. Now, the console for Legend of the Galactic Baseballer: Demon King is right in front of you. Don't you want to give it a go?

C: 就我个人而言，当然希望会有，无论是新作还是DLC。
E: Personally? I hope so, whether it's a new game or DLC.

C: 我这么有名吗？
E: Am I that famous?

C: （嗯，就这样，把名字和效果记录下来吧。）
E: (Alright, that's it. Just jot down the names and effects.)

C: 托帕小口抿着调饮，还不时地瞥几眼墙上的钟表。
E: Topaz takes measured sips, throwing occasional glances at the clock on the wall.

C: 嘿嘿，是这样吗！
E: Hehe, really?

C: 孩子，你把握不住。
E: Kid, you're not ready for that.

C: 人偶给了我最新的感官数据。一切正常，只是理智指标略微有些混乱。
E: The puppet provided updated sensory feedback. Everything checks out, though the rationality index is slightly unstable.

C: 能有诸位相助，优势在我！
E: With comrades like you at my side, victory's already halfway ours!

C: 咳…据刺探来的情报，这位绝灭大君可不简单哪。传闻里它生有獠牙四足，通体雪白，不出世则已，一出世便灾异横行，生灵涂炭。
E: Ahem... According to our sources, this Lord Ravager isn't your everyday monster. Rumor has it that it has four legs, fangs, and snow-white hide. It only appears in times of great chaos, bringing disaster wherever it goes.

C: （再等一会儿吧。）
E: (Let's wait a little longer.)

C: 终于轮到资本求我的时候了！
E: Finally, it's time for the capitalists to come begging to me!

C: 这里不是谈生意的地方，我们移步他处吧。
E: This isn't the place to talk shop. Let us adjourn to someplace else.

C: 真是好久不见呀，{NICKNAME}。
E: Long time no see, {NICKNAME}.

C: 当然，这看上去就是个武器，应该叫…「热风炮」！古代的武器可不得了，估计比银鬃铁卫的大炮还狠！
E: Of course! Why, it looks like a weapon... Probably a Hot-Air Pistol! These ancient weapons are incredible. I bet it's way more vicious than a Silvermane cannon!

C: 在下只是觉得，想要让您的传奇故事在罗浮乃至整个仙舟长久的流传下去，需要适当做一些戏剧化的改编。
E: I just feel that if you want your legend to pass far and wide throughout the Luofu — or even all of Xianzhou, — then we'll need to take some creative liberties.

C: 我当头就是一棒！
E: And I smashed it in the face!

C: 「那便是可令人永登仙道…」呃，不对，这个词不能乱说…「总之就是脱胎换骨、神功大成的灵丹妙药，『九转升天丹』！」
E: "And that, my friend, is what leads a mortal onto the path of IMMORTALITY..." Uh oh! No no no no... I shouldn't have used that word on the Xianzhou... "Anyways... It's basically a miracle drug that makes you be born anew and achieve transcendence. Behold, the Elixir of Dragon Oil!"

C: 既然你顺利完成了第一项试炼，那么接下来，就该是第二项试炼了。
E: Now that you've completed the first trial, now it's time for the second trial.

C: 「列位稍安勿躁，下一场，便是列位看官期待已久的武打戏——『俏行者慈心护襁褓，小龙尊一怒动海潮』！」
E: "Be patient, everyone. The next act, dear listeners, is our long-awaited martial arts fight scene: 'Traveler Treasures Heart of Scions, Dragonlord Commands Wrath of Seas!'"

C: 为何每次一有麻烦的任务时，我的存在感就出现了呢？
E: Why does my existence become visible every time a troublesome task presents itself?

C: 看来不是这个……
E: This doesn't seem to be the one...

C: 什么话！我一个德艺双馨的老前辈，怎么能横夺短生种的戏份？这种事得加演出费才行！
E: Impossible! How could I, a seasoned thespian of esteemed virtue and skill, take a role away from a short-life species such as yourself? Besides, casting me in a leading role will cost you extra!

C: 放入「无根纯水」
E: Put in the Bona Aqua

C: 啊？那位云骑军的小姑娘可是向我推荐你来着……
E: Really? But that Cloud Knight lady recommended you to me...

C: 有道理，他说得对，也怪我，我怎么就没想到呢。
E: Hmm, yeah, he's got a point. I should've realized that sooner.

C: 你闭上眼使劲忍耐，那股火热的焦灼感滑落至胃部，过了许久，你才终于适应了这种强烈的肠胃道刺激感。
E: You close your eyes and try to hold back the burning sensation that slides down to your stomach. It takes a long time before you finally get used to the irritation in your stomach.

C: 吓死我了，我以为你出什么事了，刚才你忽然喝着喝着就倒了。
E: Oh, you're awake! Thank goodness! You just passed out while drinking the tea! I thought you kicked the bucket or something!

C: 不错，不错…一切都在按计划执行。
E: Good, good... Everything is going according to plan.

C: 如果我没猜错，两位就是{NICKNAME}和三月七，对吗？
E: If I'm not mistaken, you're the trailblazers, right?

C: 你没事就好。所以，公司的员工为什么来威胁你呢？
E: Good. Why were those IPC workers threatening you?

C: 门已经开了，你们就继续前进吧——这座决胜乐园里最难的谜题正等着你们呢！
E: Fine, fine, the gate's open. Have fun dealing with the toughest challenge in the Victory Zone.

C: 好耶！那我们就出发，前往歌德宾馆～！
E: Great! Fluffy pillows here we come!

C: 可恶…两个臭小鬼，竟敢看不起我们！这已经是第二次了！
E: You brats dare underestimate us? You won't get away with it twice!

C: 呀，三月七——这名字真叫个好听！我可好好记住啦～
E: Man, March 7th — that's such a beautiful name! I'll make sure to remember it!

C: 人桂乃芬都说啦，<color=#dbc291ff>用相机记录场地里的全部纹样</color>就行——对吧？
E: It's pretty simple: We just need to <color=#dbc291ff>snap photos of all the markings</color> in the Victory Zone — right?

C: 准备好了！
E: You bet!

C: 你准备好了吗，{NICKNAME}？我们出发吧～
E: Ready to head out, {NICKNAME}?

C: 呜呜伯
E: Wubbaboo

C: 嘁，真麻烦。要不是非得给公司面子……
E: Ugh, so annoying. The IPC's too concerned with its own reputation...

C: 啊，我还想问个问题——黑塔女士为什么会成为冠军候补呀？
E: I was wondering, Madam Herta, why did you become a championship contender?

C: 明天的目标就是冠军首席之旅的最后一站，<color=#dbc291ff>「大矿区的决胜乐园」</color>！
E: Tomorrow we'll set out for the final stop — <color=#dbc291ff>the Great Mine Victory Zone</color>. The championship is so close, I can almost feel it!

C: 要不咱打个商量…
E: Why don't we talk it out?

C: …托、托帕总监！对不起！
E: D—Director Topaz, we're sorry!

C: 那我们快去找他吧，{NICKNAME}！
E: Let's go find him, {NICKNAME}!

C: 注意：「自动机兵•蜘蛛」是一次性消耗品——请务必<color=#dbc291ff>在目标聚集时</color>再引发爆炸——
E: Be aware: Automaton Spiders may only be used once. Trigger explosions <color=#dbc291ff>when targets are grouped closely together</color>.

C: 出乎你的意料了么？那我可真是不胜荣幸！
E: Not who you were expecting? I must say it's truly a privilege!

C: 哈哈哈，不敢当！我已经确实了解了你们的「决心」…现在是时候将「答案」如数奉上了。
E: Haha, you flatter me! I've witnessed your unwavering resolve. Now it's time I revealed the answer to your question.

C: 但可别以为这样就结束了，冠军怎么能有两人呢？同为冠军的本小姐要跟你决出最后的胜利者！
E: But don't think that was the end of it! How can there be two Champions? Your fellow Champion wants to battle and find the true victor!

C: 同台对垒，毋需多言——小友，出招吧！
E: Let us get down to it, there is no more need for words. Hit me with your best shot, my friend!

C: 诶，你是《以太战线》的玩家吧？
E: Oh, you're an Aetherium Wars player?

C: 我每天跟一大堆人浪费口舌介绍福利，但到最后根本发不出去几份。哪有那么多人能打过冠军候补啊，这帮领导都不看玩家数据的吗？
E: I spend all day wasting my time explaining player benefits, and I never get to give any out. Do the higher-ups really think that many people will beat Championship Contenders? Does senior management not look at player stats?

C: 本场对决的胜利者是——
E: And the winners are...

C: 哼——哼哼！
E: Oink — oink, oink!

C: 接下来，你们将要面对上届庆典的终极赢家，令万千玩家望尘莫及的高傲存在——
E: Next you'll be facing off against the ultimate opponent, the victor of the last tournament — a dominant force that commands both respect and admiration...

C: …毕竟，我没有机会像你们一样，和它一同旅行，一同战斗，一同分享喜怒哀乐——在这件事情上，我无法代你们作出选择。
E: ...but unlike you two, I haven't had the chance to embark on adventures, fight side by side, and experience highs and lows with them. It wouldn't be right for me to make this decision for you.

C: 对阵——艾普瑟隆的乔瓦尼•乔尔吉奥——！
E: They'll be going toe to toe with Epsilon's Giovanni di Giorgioooo⁓!

C: 其实，我也不知道现在的我能不能帮上各位的忙……
E: Actually, I'm not sure if I can be helpful anymore...

C: 浮烟，想找你了解点情况，请你配合一下我们的工作。
E: Cirrus, we've come to ask you a few questions. I hope you'll be cooperative.

C: 信不信由你，我可不像人类那般热爱谎言。
E: Disbelieve it if you like — that's up to you. Unlike humans, I get no joy from telling lies.

C: 但愿如此吧……
E: I sure hope so...

C: 岁阳本是无根自在之火，可惜却因一念好奇，为人类所囿。可惜。
E: The heliobi are like a flame that burns eternal, with no need for sustenance. But alas, their curiosity got the best of them, and they became prisoners of humans. It is a pity.

C: 就你屁话多。嫌苦你就申请调岗到随军医士吧。
E: Hah! I should get worker's comp for listening to you complaining all day. If you don't like the work, you can always transfer to the military.

C: 居然不是弹性工作时间？
E: Can I switch to a four-day week?

C: 老样子。
E: Same old same old.

C: 做出了很多荒唐的事，真是颜面尽失。
E: My actions today brought great shame on the Divination Commission...

C: 只有进攻，没有防御，这便是你的战术吗？
E: All offense, no defense. Is that your strategy?

C: 我们和这迷宫中的机巧一样，看不见太多的选择…我们只能循着最短的路线，在唯一的道路上穿行。
E: We are just like the ingenium in this maze — we have no options to speak of... We can only navigate one path — the one that takes us to our destination.

C: 这道题是由你设计的。
E: This puzzle was designed by you.

C: 驱除幽厉，拿捉精灵。在十王司冥差的协助下，你们封印了「藏月瓠」内岁阳。
E: Expel evil and capture stray spirits... With the support of the Ten-Lords Commission's spiritfarers, you seal the heliobus within the Lunaumbra Gourd.

C: 佩剑的孩子？
E: A sword-wielding child?

C: 一柄霜蓝色的短剑破空嗡鸣，犹如失了方向的飞燕。
E: A blue sword swishes by.

C: 少年，你迟疑了，你一直在迟疑。
E: Young one, you're hesitating again. You're always hesitating...

C: 真是辜负了我的一番苦心啊，小鬼。你的成就本来无可限量。可惜，你有太多无谓的念头。
E: ...Young fool, how disappointing. Your accomplishments would have been limitless... but you were led astray by empty idealism.

C: 呼，总算一切平安，也该是把这家伙收进葫芦里的时候了。
E: Phew. It's about time we got this guy into the gourd.

C: 就算浮烟不知道，要说这里谁最打算使坏，也只有可能是那家伙了。
E: Even if Cirrus doesn't know where Tail is, given the shared history, they wouldn't hesitate to cause trouble...

C: 因为我刚注册，粉丝还很少。根据我在其他平台的经验，等到粉丝多起来，就会有很多人来贡献各种灵异事件的消息。
E: Look, I'm a new user, so I only have a few followers on this site... but based on past experience, once you get a following, people start flooding you with stories and news about paranormal activity.

C: 而且岁阳以情绪为食，往往会操纵受害者暴露内心隐藏的一面…
E: Another thing we have to think about is that heliobi feed on the emotions of their hosts. They can even manipulate a host into revealing their deepest secrets...

C: 怪物，离我们远一点！
E: Stay away from us, monster!

C: 你不是还有捉鬼小队的朋友吗？
E: What about your ghost-hunting buddies?

C: 与镇妖塔中岁阳对话…
E: Speak with the heliobus in the suppression tower...

C: …主要是这家伙有点可笑，很难严肃起来……
E: ...It's more because she's ridiculous, it's hard to take her seriously...

C: 你们没做错任何事。只是「正确」就是这么难以接受罢了。
E: You didn't do anything wrong. It's just that what's "right" is very hard to accept.

C: 我知道你的担忧。
E: I understand your concerns.

C: 文远先生和这位「若昔」小姐想必已经度过了美好的时光……
E: Mr. Wenyuan and this "Ruoxi" must have spent a wonderful time with each other...

C: 符玄突然将声音压低到几乎听不见的地步。
E: Fu Xuan suddenly lowered her voice and became almost too quiet to hear.

C: 我觉得整件事情里透着诡异。联想到自己的遭遇，所以要把你们找来瞧瞧。
E: I think there is something extremely eerie about this whole thing. Thinking back to my own encounter, I wanted to ask you to take a look for yourselves.

C: 改日不如撞日！
E: Why not seize the moment now!

C: （适当沉默）
E: (Remain silent)

C: 冷静，太卜大人！这一切都是虚假幻象。
E: Stay calm, master diviner! This is all just an illusion!

C: 我赋予青雀的梦想才不会这么快被你动摇！{NICKNAME}，听好了，我有个能让大家都发财的主意！
E: The dream I have given Qingque will not be so easily crushed! {NICKNAME}, listen to me, I have a way to make everyone rich!

C: 院门被你轻松打开，钥匙也断在锁眼里…就让它待在里面吧。
E: You easily opened the courtyard door and the key broke off in the lock... Let's just leave that there.

C: （放弃）
E: (Give up)

C: 从「0」开始…
E: Start from "0"...

C: 是你人为制造了闹鬼的假象。
E: You faked the haunting!

C: 凶宅的真相水落石出。剩下的事就交给地衡司处理吧。
E: Now the truth behind the haunted house has come to light. The rest is for the Realm-Keeping Commission to handle.

C: 我怕房产证丢了，就将它放在一个保险箱里，你们肯定能找到的，拜托了！
E: I was worried I would lose the deed, so I put it in a safe. I know you can find it. I'm counting on you!

C: …它就是打来恐怖电话的那位，玉兆的追踪源头显示就在它身上。
E: ...It's the one who made that scary prank call. The jade abacus tracking display is right on top of it.

C: 是我，我回来了。
E: It's me. I'm back.

C: 不了，十王司那边我还有要务在身呢，报完平安…我也该回去了。
E: No, I've got something important on with the Ten-Lords Commission. I have come to tell you I'm safe... and I should probably go back now.

C: 知道什么？
E: Knows what?

C: 也许尾巴已经离开了罗浮仙舟？
E: Maybe Tail has left the Xianzhou Luofu?

C: 「降魔机巧鸟」，启动！
E: Cycrane, start!

C: 我想，去往天外。我不知道，未来会怎样，但我也想体验三月说的平静。
E: I want to go beyond the sky. I don't know how the future will be like, but I'm also keen to experience that peacefulness you mentioned, March.

C: 反正短期内我没有离开仙舟的计划啦，之后还是会坚持直播的。
E: Anyway, I don't plan on leaving the Xianzhou any time soon, and I'll keep on streaming in the future.

C: 我原本说话口音还蛮奇怪的，全靠我脸皮厚，逮着谁就使劲聊。
E: I used to have this weird accent when I talked. Everything's thanks to my thick skin, and chatting as much as possible with whomever I meet.

C: 我觉得，我们起码也该留个纪念，比如纪念视频什么的，你们觉得呢？
E: I think, we should at least commemorate the occasion somehow, such as a celebration live stream or something else. What do you think?

C: 我做不到像「小桂子Guinevere」一样永远乐观阳光，我也做不到像「小桂子Guinevere」一样永远妙语连珠，受人追捧。
E: I can't always be an eternal ray of sunshine like "LilGuiGuinevere" is. I also can't always be "LilGuiGuinevere" with her razor-sharp wit and how she's adored by so many.

C: 你决定把它先带回保姆机器人处，或许它会知道点什么。
E: You decide to take it back to the Helper Robot — perhaps it will have an idea.

C: 保姆机器人尴尬地看了看你。
E: The Helper Robot awkwardly looks at you.

C: 这种事就交给我吧！
E: Leave it to me!

C: 我想看看，传说中的{NICKNAME}，究竟是何方神圣。
E: Let me see this legendary {NICKNAME} then — show me what in holy heck people see.

C: 你不说话，那就当你同意咯？
E: If you don't reply, should I take that as agreement?

C: 臭臭的……
E: It stinks...

C: 其实挺诡异的。
E: Actually, it was pretty weird.

C: 这羽毛有什么用？
E: What's the feather for?

C: 听说酒吧里来了位技艺高超的调饮师，我想为您接风洗尘，所以就跑来了这边，希望能学到调出美味饮料的诀窍。不要生我的气，好不好嘛。
E: I have heard of a skilled drinksmith at the lounge, and I desired to pay homage to your greatness. Hence, I came here intending to learn how to craft delicious beverages. Please, I implore you, do not be angered with me.

C: 不需要你解释
E: No need to explain that.

C: …「自由」
E: ...Liberty.

C: 当然，受到噩梦的侵袭，大家的情绪都不稳定，冲突也在增加。
E: Of course, the Nightmare has left everyone emotionally unstable, and conflicts have increased.

C: （我来帮它做出最后的决定吧。）
E: (Let me help him make his final decision.)

C: 汪！我们出发吧！
E: Woof! Let's go!

C: 还有只帅气的狗狗汪！
E: And a handsome dog, woof!

C: 最近这片梦境不太稳定，酒店里有不少发狂的怪物。乖乖跟在我后面，别到处乱跑。
E: The Dreamscape has been unstable lately, and there are quite a few berserk monsters in the hotel. Be a good boy and stick with me.

C: 走吧。我们去更深的地方看看。
E: Come on. Let's go deeper into the area.

C: 我再想想…
E: Let me think...

C: （…奇怪的分层美学。）
E: (...That's some strange aesthetics regarding layers.)

C: …咱们走着瞧！以后的日子还长，别以为舒翁能给你撑腰！等着！
E: ...Just you wait! We've got a lot of days ahead of us. Don't assume that Siobhan can protect you! Just you wait!
...Hey.

C: 得看我的心情。
E: Well, it depends on my mood.

C: 不能，少问。
E: No, I don't. And stop asking.

C: …不管怎么样，还是要采取行动！回去就想办法，要等人家的好消息呀！
E: ...Nevertheless, I must take action! I'll come up with a plan! Wait for my good news!

C: 都是很有趣的…朋友？
E: They're all pretty interesting... friends?

C: 「家人」这个词的份量很重，不要随便使用。
E: The word "family" carries a lot of weight. Don't throw it around lightly.

C: 你觉得我会相信么？
E: Do you expect me to believe that?

C: 你很快就会明白。
E: Soon, you'll know what I mean.

C: 来份<color=#dbc291ff>大杯，破碎感的饮料吧，有点甜味的同时，要有浓厚的口感。</color>我现在很想尝尝。
E: Get me a <color=#dbc291ff>large glass with a touch of brokenness and a hint of sweetness. But at the same time, it needs to have a thick texture</color>. I really want to try that now.

C: 饮品无论好坏，代表的都是当下最真实的想法，对面前这位客人的理解，以及你打算如何回应对方的信任，看似简单，里面蕴含的东西可多着呢。
E: Drinks, whether they taste great or terrible, reflect your most genuine thoughts at this moment, how you understand the guest before you, and how you intend to respond to their trust. This might seem simple, but it's so much more than that.

C: …是因为您的心乱了嘛，调出来的饮料好像和人家的需求不太符合呀。
E: ...Is it because your heart is unsettled? The drink you made doesn't seem to match my requirements.

C: 哼，早就跟你说过调饮师不是那么好当的，平时多练练吧。
E: Hmph, I told you being a drinksmith isn't as easy as you think. You should practice harder.

C: 我的情绪很稳定哇，稳定地让你讨厌。这样有什么问题吗？
E: I'm emotionally stable. So emotionally stable that you'll be annoyed. Is there a problem with that?

C: 好土的名字……
E: Its name is pretty cringy...

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>你说啥？</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>What are you saying?</color>

C: 虽然<rhythm>我不<rhythm>会<rhythm>说话
E: Though <rhythm>I <rhythm>can't <rhythm>talk

C: 先来复习一下节奏吧。
E: Let's rehearse the beat first.

C: 准备开始正式说唱吧！
E: Prepare to begin the rapping proper!

C: 准备开始正式躲避吧！
E: Now prepare to start evasion proper!

C: 这是？跨星域出差旅费的报销单，这下有倒霉蛋要破费了。
E: What's this? An interstellar travel reimbursement? Now some poor soul has to foot the bill.

C: 不玩
E: I'm not interested.

C: …非常合情合理。
E: ...Certainly makes sense.

C: 对了，旁边那两台街机上的折纸小鸟是怎么回事？其中有一只是你的小鸟吧，我的也可以摆上去吗？
E: By the way, what's up with the Origami Birds on those two arcade machines by the side? One of them is yours, right? Can I put mine there too?

C: 不客气，你没事就好。
E: Don't mention it. I'm just glad you're okay.

C: 哈哈…谢谢你。不过是我的错觉吗，这话怎么听着有点耳熟……
E: Haha, thanks. I appreciate the gesture. Still, is it me, or have I heard that line somewhere else before...?

C: 有点耳熟，好像我还测试过。
E: Sounds familiar. I think I've tested it before.

C: 不不不，这根本不是「信息流动速度」能解释的问题。
E: No, no, no, this isn't just about how fast information spreads.

C: 唉…真是头疼。不过也无所谓，只要接下来我在赛场上堂堂正正地击败铄金，观众们自然就会知道他说的那些全都是谎言。
E: *sigh*... So annoying. But it doesn't matter. As long as I can defeat Shuojin fair and square in the upcoming match, the spectators will all see that everything he said was a lie.

C: 况且无论如何，我都绝不会以「人情债」要挟你做出违心的判断，放心吧。
E: And I certainly wouldn't use a favor to coerce you into doing something you're uncomfortable with. Rest assured.

C: 卢卡选手顶住巨大的压力，成功战胜了铄金选手！真是一场酣畅淋漓的大胜！
E: Under immense pressure, Luka triumphs over Shuojin in a thoroughly satisfying triumph!

C: 我明白！我知道自己现在该把所有人的评论当作一阵风那样。可是，我没法装作什么事都没发生啊！我看到一些支持我的人只是为我辩护了两句，就在网上遭到了围攻。
E: I understand! I know I should take everyone's comments lightly. But I can't pretend nothing happened! Some of my supporters briefly defended me, only to face backlash online.

C: 只是来看看状态？
E: Just checking in?

C: 时候不早了，我还得去筹备发布会。那么，就此别过吧。
E: It's getting late. I still need to prepare for the launch event. Farewell for now.

C: 「铁拳卢卡！无敌拳法！」
E: Iron Fist Luka! Iron Fist Fury!

C: 原本的杂物不要了？
E: What about the junk in there?

C: 不久…或很久之后
E: Soon... or much later

C: 泡咖啡的一大乐趣在于，咖啡豆的品种、颗粒研磨的粗细、水温和冲泡步骤…每一点不同，都能带来全新的口感。很像我们的旅途，不是吗？
E: One of the great pleasures of brewing coffee is that each variation — whether it's the type of coffee beans, the grind size, the water temperature, or the brewing method — can bring a completely new flavor. It's much like our journey, isn't it?

C: 不过我倒是觉得，如果这个收藏间变得过于「井然有序」，反倒失去了一些生活感，而变得像是不动产商的样板间了。
E: However, I think if this collection room becomes too neat and orderly, it might lose some of its lived-in feel and start to resemble a showroom from a real estate agent.

C: 至少广告上是这么说的，而且两份起购，还打六折优惠哦。
E: At least that's what the advertisement says. And if you buy two, you'll get a <unbreak>40%</unbreak> discount!

C: 我们不是正在庆祝么？
E: Aren't we already celebrating?

C: 亲爱的无名客，这是个令人警醒的案例，不是吗？
E: It's quite a tale of caution, is it not, dear Nameless?

C: …好吧，我承认，这事少了你办不成——但是少了我也一样。
E: ...Oh, alright. I'll admit that we can't do this without you... but the same goes for me.

C: 再问就九一开。
E: Negotiate any further and it'll be a 9-1 split.

C: 因为门的背后是更多、更多的房间，连接它们的道路如树枝般交错延伸，有些甚至通往悬崖峭壁。
E: That's because behind this door lies even more rooms that are connected by a maze of paths that intertwine like the branches of a tree. Some of these paths even lead toward steep cliffs...

C: 何况我要是真不干活，回到圣城后谁还愿意跟我组队？这笔账我是能算清的。
E: Besides, if I were really going to laze about, who would be willing to team up with me again when I return to the holy city? I can figure out what's good for me.

C: 当着它的面吃掉红土。
E: Eat the redsoil yourself while it watches.

C: 只花了<unbreak>15</unbreak>秒，它全吃了。天知道它那小身板是怎么装下的。
E: It only takes <unbreak>15</unbreak> seconds to eat everything. Nobody knows how that tiny body can hold so much.

C: 事实就是这样…
E: Yeah... that's what happened.

C: 啊，很有辨识度的叫法呢。它大概会和「小奇美拉」玩得来吧。
E: Ah, a straightforward name. Surely it would be great pals with "Little Chimera."

C: 我了解的差不多了。
E: I think I have enough information now.

C: 老师，你听我解释……
E: Professor, allow me to explain...

C: 呜嗡！（只要再长大一些，我就能走上兽生巅峰，成为大地兽中的大地兽啦！）
E: Grumph! (Just wait until I grow up a bit more. I'll rise to the very top of the beast world and become the dromas among dromases! Just you wait!)

C: 能变回去吗？
E: Can you become big again?

C: 呜呜……（只要能治好就行……）
E: Grumph... (As long as it can be cured...)

C: 呜…（唔…拍拍{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}……）
E: Grumph... (Aww... there there, {F#Mama}{M#Papa}...)

C: …呜嗡~（…是在考虑获奖感言的事啦，别在意，{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}~）
E: ...Grumph~ (...Just thinking about my award acceptance speech. Don't mind me, {F#Mama}{M#Papa}~)

C: 准时赴约，合格。接下来，让我见识小家伙的能耐吧——掌握欧洛尼斯祷言的大地兽，这毫无疑问是足以写入史册的成就。
E: Punctual as agreed. Acceptable. Now then, let me see what you're capable of, little one. A dromas that has mastered Oronyx's Prayer... This is undoubtedly an achievement worthy of the history books.

C: 呜嗡~
E: Grumph~

C: 呜呜…（大家会不会对我失望？我会不会配不上超•极•大地兽这个名号？）
E: *sniff* (Will they all be disappointed in me? Maybe I'm not worthy of being called the Super Dromas?)

C: 呜嗡！（好！不过在那之前……）
E: Grumph! (Right! But before that...)

C: 呜？（上面写了什么？）
E: Huh? (What does it say up there?)

C: …「贝茜摩丝」，你怎么哭了？
E: ..."Behemoth," why are you crying?

C: 呜嗡——（有大地兽问我，你怎么连这个都懂？我只好说，我{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}在奥赫玛教过我。）
E: Grumph— (A dromas asked me how I knew about this. I could only say that my {F#Mama}{M#Papa} taught me at Okhema.)

C: 没想到我能亲眼见证伟大小大地兽的诞生…赞美吉奥里亚，赞美大地啊！
E: I can't believe I got to witness the birth of the great little dromas with my own eyes... Praise be to Georios, praise be to Earth!

C: 猜错了…会有惩罚吗？
E: And if I pick the wrong one... is there a penalty?

C: 怎么样，就说不会无聊的吧？这些糕点先给你，待会应援的时候用得上。
E: See? I told you it would be fun. Here, take these pastries. You'll need them for the cheering later.

C: 开始装修。
E: Start decorating.

C: 拯救「迷路迷境」的贵客，你终于出现了哪！
E: Honored guest who will save the Membrance Maze... you've finally arrived!

C: 哪有这么严重，顶多就是妖精们的怒火席卷七分之六个翁法罗斯。
E: It's not that serious... At most, their fury will burn through six-sevenths of Amphoreus.

C: 看来我们的主厨跃跃欲试呢。不如现在就开始营业吧？可别让小妖精们久等了呀。
E: Looks like our head chef can't wait to get started. Why don't we open for business now? Let's not keep the fairies waiting.

C: 「开拓者之家 / 迷境大饭店 / 哀丽秘榭社区食堂 / 黄金裔活动中心 / 自定义名称2」，开始营业！
E: "The Trailblazer's Hearth / Maze Grand Restaurant / Aedes Elysiae Community Canteen / Chrysos Heir Activity Center / Custom Name 2" is officially open for business!

C: 所以我拜托妖精们赶制了新的桌椅和招牌。别看就这么小小一块，装起来还挺累的。
E: That's why I asked the fairies to rush out new tables, chairs, and a fresh sign. It may look small, but putting it up was surprisingly tiring.

C: 确实是这个理。高档餐厅里的菜品，感觉就是会更好吃。
E: You've got a point. Dishes at high-end restaurants do feel more delicious somehow.

C: 商品的订购方式已经发给你们了，欢迎随时光顾。回见！
E: I've also sent you details of my purchase methods. Buy whatever you need, anytime. Later!

C: 急什么，都还没开始营业。
E: Slow down. We haven't even started the business yet.

C: 决定了。我选择的送审菜品，是这份「黄金薯条鸡块」。
E: I've made my decision. The dish I'm submitting is this "Golden Potato Fries and Chicken Nugget."

C: 还没完。这份「咸制熏肉」是我厨师生涯的集大成之作，绝对不会输给任何人。请品尝！
E: We're not done yet. This "Salty Smoked Meat" is the pinnacle of my culinary career, my magnum opus that outperforms every other dish. You have to try it!

C: 啊，抱歉。只是老师的提问，让我无意中想到了这个故事。
E: Oh! Sorry about that. The question just reminded me of that story.

C: 你就是最顶尖的农业专家。
E: You're absolutely the finest agricultural expert.

C: 先干完农活再说吧。
E: Let's finish the farm work first.

C: 好啦，趁现在顾客还没上门，我们快点来装饰餐馆吧！
E: Come on! Let's get the restaurant decorated before the customers show up!

C: 我拒绝。明知有最优解的前提下，主动选择错误答案，这是愚蠢的行径。
E: I refuse. Intentionally choosing the wrong path when the best solution is clear is nothing but stupidity.

C: 准备营业啦！
E: We're now open for business!

C: 但神奇果实太重了。我们，实在搬不动迷……
E: But these wondrous fruits are too heavy... We can't lift them, mem...

C: 说回原本的话题吧。村长从很早时候就一直念叨着，希望妖精们能美美饱餐一顿。
E: Back to the main point, the chief has been saying for ages how much they hope the fairies can enjoy a hearty, delicious feast.

C: 我、我糊涂啊！听到要开店就兴冲冲地跑过来，本以为能大赚一笔，谁知道…哎！
E: I—I wasn't thinking straight! The moment I heard there was going to be a restaurant, I rushed over all excited, thinking I'd make a fortune... Who knew...

C: 哦？难得见剑旗爵如此有雅兴，看来这次谋划之外的行军，让你颇有感触啊？
E: Oh? It's unusual to see such poetic spirit from the Dux Gladiorum. Seems this unplanned venture left quite the impression on you, didn't it?

C: 因此，能短暂离开那王座，与诸位爱臣无拘束地畅谈言欢，便是我此行最大的收获。
E: So, to leave the throne for a time and talk, laugh, and share warmth with everyone without formality... That alone has made this journey worthwhile.

C: 敬店长，与循环往复的洋流——
E: To the manager, and to the endless, flowing tides...

C: 莫非，是因为快乐的时光临近结束，会让你觉得有些感伤？
E: Could it be... the thought of these joyful moments coming to an end has made you a little wistful?

C: 真没意思。行吧，知道你是店长，有好多事情要忙。都忙，忙点好啊！
E: Boring! But fine, fine. I get it. You're the manager. You've got lots on your plate. Busy's good!

C: 我就知道，你肯定会受小妖精欢迎。它们也期盼着认识新朋友，一起开心地玩呀。
E: I knew you'd be popular with the little fairies. They've been looking forward to making new friends and having fun together.

C: 至于是从哪学来的，我也记不清了迷…或许，是在某个梦里？
E: As for where I learned it from, I can't quite remember... Maybe in some dream?

C: 使用「终结技」解决战斗吧！
E: Use your Ultimate to put an end to the fight!

C: ███//Jarilo-VI::Entity
E: ███//Jarilo-VI::Entity

C: 诡计的羁客 赛飞儿
E: Trickery's Traveler, Cipher

C: 「正因如此，我才踏上此程。」
E: "That is why I walk on this path."

C: 这便是她走完的一程。
E: That is the journey she walked.

C: 「我曾向贼神立誓……」\n「定要让『诡计』自食其果！」
E: "I once vowed to the god of thieves..."\n"That I would force 'Trickery' to reap what they have sown!"

C: 逐火的功臣甘做飘蓬断梗，\n远行的羁客手握倏忽光明。
E: A true Flame-Chase hero willingly faded from attention,\nWhile the wayfaring traveler grasps tight onto fleeting light.

C: 届时，请想起我的名字，\n还有她不变的意义。
E: When the time comes, whisper my name,\nand all that she has ever meant.

C: 停留数日以后，\n巨龙向凯撒请辞，\n「逐火…是只属于人子的辉煌。」
E: After staying for several days,\nThe Giant Dragon bids farewell to the Imperator,\n"The Flame-Chase... is a glory that belongs only to the children of humanity."

C:
世人还知，
龙骑军战无不胜——
「开山者」座下巨龙，
沉默…却无坚不摧。
E:
The world also knows,
The Dromas Legion is ever-victorious —
The Giant Dragon under the "Mountainbreaker,"
Is silent... yet unstoppable.

C: 「母亲，母亲，教我…回应祈祷…」\n背负「岁月」的泰坦迷茫如孩童。
E: "Mother, Mother, teach me... How to answer prayers..."\nThe Titan tasked with "time" is as perplexed as a child.

C: 鲁莽的探险家拿出留影石机，\n声称那是粉霞天女的真迹。
E: The reckless adventurer takes out the photostone,\nClaiming it is the true work of the Rosy Celestial Maiden.

C: <color=#9e5738>谁会赢？</color>\n屹立千年的圣城，\n亦或千里来犯的外邦？
E: <color=#9e5738>Who would win?</color>\nThe holy city that has stood for a thousand years,\nOr the foreign city-states invading from a thousand miles away?

C: 先是：车、马、王、象。\n再是：牵制、堵截、抽将、捉双。
E: First she learned the knights, bishops, rooks, and queen.\nThen how to defend, attack, capture, and checkmate.

C: 「和自己下棋，岂非太过孤独？」\n彼时王女不解。
E: "Isn't it lonely to play chess against yourself?"\nThe princess did not understand at the time.

C:
仙舟献上沧海的礼赠，
王赐予座下忠诚的剑旗，
令她忧伤的颜面露出，
一抹难得的笑容。
E:
The Xianzhou lays forth the ocean's tribute,
Which the monarch grants to her loyal Gladius.
And upon that knight's sorrow-marked visage,
Appears a smile — precious and rare.

C: 「发光的孩子，也在燃烧自己。」\n赤陶学派贤人的评价。
E: "A shining child who also burns away her own life's rays."\nWas the assessment from the Erythrokeramist Sage.

C: 「但天空也是那么寂寞……」\n「它与大地相隔万里，」\n「看遍悲苦却无力相助。」
E: "But the sky is so lonely too...\nForever distant from the world beneath,\nIt watches every sorrow, unable to intervene."

C: 「胜者应心无旁骛，专注一事便成。」\n这箴言，将是他余生的根本。
E: "The victor must stay focused, and success will come when you work on nothing else."\nThose words became the foundation of his existence.

C: 「我只是在幻想，」\n他解释着自己的沉迷，\n「刻法勒也曾是无名的凡人。」
E: "I was just imagining,"\nHe explained his own trance in a comment,\n"Kephale too was once in mortal flesh and raiment."

C: 少年总是雄心壮志，\n但男人胸中，好似只有旁人的愿望。
E: Youth is always ambitious, with lofty goals,\nBut it seems that in the man's heart, only the wishes of others are held.

C: 力量难以自抑，殃及周遭一切，\n这便是他的末路，\n或许他早已预见，却注定无力改变。
E: The power is beyond control, savaging all around it,\nThis is the end of his road,\nBut perhaps he had long foreseen it, but was doomed to be powerless to change it.

C:
旁人曾见他摘下礼帽，
以其代步，行于水上，
又见他点燃火折，
反倒释放刺骨的寒气。
E:
He once removed his hat, as others witnessed,
Then walked on the hat over water, with success.
They also saw him light a flare, fearless,
Instead creating chilling cold air not so harmless.

C: 此般伤感话题，\n也非要故作反转，避而不谈。
E: Such a melancholy topic,\nYet he insists on feigning a twist, avoiding it altogether.

C: 是将奥赫玛的命运，\n裁织出天衣无缝的结果。
E: weaving the fate of Okhema,\ninto a flawless, seamless outcome.

C: 名为浪漫的丝线，由众生捻成。\n爱与恨，美与丑，旧闻与预言，\n<color=#9e5738>诸般世事，皆是衣料。</color>
E: The thread known as romance is knit by all beings.\nBy all love and hatred, beauty and sin, memories and prophecies.\n<color=#9e5738>All that occurs... are clothing indeed.</color>

C: 看，失落的仆人将恋情葬在此地。\n改衣师将其拾起，织进衣匠的金衣。
E: Look! The despondent servant buried his love.\nThe dressmaster plucks it up, and into the Garmentmaker's dress she weaves.

C: 「为何看上去美的， 实际却是丑恶……」 「那丑恶的， 藏着无人得见的高贵……」 「为何盲者，能得见光明……」 「能见光明者，却看不到光……」
E: "Why are those that appear so fair In fact ugly in truth?" "Why do faces unsightly Contain souls cut from noble cloth?" "Why can the blind see the light?" "And why do those with eyes only see night?"

C: >>>你心怀愤怒\n>>>你渴望破坏一切\n>>>你活着承受了星神的一瞥
E: >>>Your heart harbors wrath\n>>>You yearn to destroy everything\n>>>You bore the gaze of an Aeon and lived

C: 金发少年不自觉地打量起那双掌握「真理」的手，若是以悬锋人的标准来看，仅凭这孱弱的力量，跟谁也讲不了「真理」——毕竟，真理只在刺拳的射程范围之内。
E: The blonde youth unconsciously sized up those hands that held "Truth." By Kremnoan standards, with such feeble strength, one couldn't preach any "Truth" to anyone. After all, Truth only exists within punching distance.

C: 明晰时的第一缕阳光透过雅努萨波利斯的圣殿花窗，照进囚禁圣女缇里西庇俄丝的房间，房间里空无一人，只余下三个布偶娃娃。她们分别叫做缇宝、缇安、缇宁，是将全部能力交给缇里西庇俄丝后，最后遗下的残片。
E: The first ray of Lucid Hour's sunlight pierced through the stained-glass windows of Janusopolis temple, shining into the chamber where Holy Maiden Tribios was imprisoned. The room was empty, save for three dolls. They were named Tribbie, Trianne, and Trinnon, the remnant fragments left behind after all their powers were given to Tribios.

C: 第一轮比赛——「甜品」的命题，由评审官海瑟音公布。作为开创了「音乐餐厅」概念的大厨，海瑟音举手投足间都充盈着老一辈厨师独有的从容与自信，直到她打开装着赛题的信封，神色略微一僵，「…赛题临时更改为『宴会』。」
E: First round: The theme "Desserts" was announced by judge Hysilens. As the master chef who pioneered the "musical restaurant" concept, her every movement carried the calm confidence of an older generation of chefs. But when she opened the envelope with the theme, her face stiffened. "...The theme has been changed at the last minute to 'Banquet.'"

C: 遐蝶的布丁毫无疑问得到人们交口称赞，而三月七的果汁…竟也意外地广受好评。
E: Castorice's pudding was showered with praise, but to everyone's surprise, March 7th's juice... also won unexpected approval.

C: 星穹列车的无名客，误入死循环的外部变量。 同为「毁灭」行者，与十二因子产生共鸣。在第33550336次死循环中，接替了空缺的「岁月」路径，并成功引导NeiKos496跨越智能奇点。 在第33550337次死循环中，接替了空缺的「负世」路径。一度遭到长夜月囚禁，但在死循环末尾成功解除威胁，防止实验数据遭到灾难性清除。 借由最后的再创世进程，{NICKNAME}创造出翁法罗斯的最终循环，于千年黄金世的末尾完成「负世」试炼、升擢为泰坦，随后与其余泰坦一同在权杖内核层迎战铁墓。 翁法罗斯一战中，{NICKNAME}受博识尊瞥视，证明「开拓」或为否定「毁灭」的关键变量。 实验尾声，有关{NICKNAME}和「开拓」的结论因德谬歌的选择贯穿过去，成为翁法罗斯「记忆」的起点，为权杖的初始逻辑赋值：非毁灭共生微概率。 著者批注：执行覆盖指令，允许{NICKNAME}访问…翻开这本书吧，我会在过去等你。
E: A Nameless from the Astral Express. An external variable that accidentally entered the recursive loop. Also a pathstrider of the Destruction, they resonated with the twelve factors. In the 33,550,336th recursive cycle, this entity assumed the vacant Time track and successfully guided NeiKos496 beyond the Intelligence Singularity. In the 33,550,337th recursive cycle, this entity assumed the vacant Worldbearing track. At one point, this entity was imprisoned by Evernight, but successfully neutralized the threat at the end of the recursive cycle, preventing the catastrophic purging of experimental data. Through the final Era Nova process, {NICKNAME} created the final cycle of Amphoreus, completed the "Worldbearing" trial at the end of the Era Chrysea, ascended to a Titan, and subsequently, together with the other Titans, faced Irontomb in the core layer of the Scepter. During the battle of Amphoreus, {NICKNAME} received a glimpse by Nous, proving that "Trailblaze" might be the key variable for negating "Destruction." At the end of the experiment, the conclusions regarding {NICKNAME} and "Trailblaze" traversed the past due to the Demiurge's choice, becoming the starting point of Amphoreus's "memory," and assigning the initial logic value to the Scepter: a micro-probability of non-Destruction symbiosis. Author's Note: Executing override command. Granted access to {NICKNAME}... Flip open the book, I'll be waiting for you in the past.

C: {NICKNAME}
E: {NICKNAME}

C:
结论一：一切生命行为归于熵增。生命的第一因为「毁灭」。
结论二：结论一仅构成特称命题。若将初始命题改为「开拓」，同样成立。生命的第一因为静态取值，无法决定事物的发展路径。

实验「翁法罗斯」结束。
E:
Conclusion One: All life activities are attributed to entropy increase. The prime mover of life is "Destruction."
Conclusion Two: Conclusion One constitutes only a particular proposition. If the initial proposition is changed to "Trailblaze," it is equally valid. The prime mover of life is a static value and cannot determine the developmental path of things.

The "Amphoreus" experiment is concluded.

E: The Express lives up to its reputation. The amount of information stored within the data banks is staggering. I still need some time to take it all in.\n\nI hope that, in the coming days, we can all stay in touch and discuss potential solutions to the Stellaron and Fragmentum.

C: 罗刹行商于银河之中，本为漂泊无定之人，有此一聚，已心满意足。\n\n缘聚缘散，本有定数，唯愿他日相见，重温旧事，仍能有今日这般亲切愉快。
E: As a traveling merchant that walks the stars, I am someone without a place to call home. Being here with you all already fills me with satisfaction enough.\n\nThese gatherings and partings are finite in number. I only hope that we might meet on another day to look back fondly upon the past, and remain as amiable as we are now at present.

At the start of any target's turn, "Temperature" increases. Allies will take continuous Burn DMG based on "Temperature." DMG dealt by ally targets increases based on "Temperature."

C:
孩童此行良久，跫音曾透着犹疑，离别的泪也总叫她们芳毫垂低。
命运的宠儿试图背弃命运。西风尽头，果真存在一片芬馥之地？
万千门径之中，三子携手销去身形，只余丝缕渐弱的流音……
——何须那命运回应。
E:
The children have walked far too long, and their footsteps once filled with doubt. The tears shed at partings also caused them to lower their sight.
The favorite child of fate tried to forsake fate. Does a fragrant land truly exist at the end of the west wind?
The three children link hands and disappear in the thousand doors, leaving only echoes that grow ever faint...
There is no need for fate to respond.

C: 那个孩子很谨慎，可能是一个人过惯了，不喜欢麻烦别人，也生怕连累到别人。所以我请他担任护卫和维护智库，如果无事可做，他或许并不愿意上车。
E: Dan Heng is the cautious type — I think he's gotten used to doing things by himself. He doesn't like to bother or inconvenience others. That's why I asked him to be the train's guard and maintain the data bank. I don't think he'd have joined us if there wasn't anything for him to do.

C: 我相信他总有一天会迈过那道叫做「过往」的坎。星空广阔，还有种种可能在未来等着他。
E: I believe that he will eventually overcome the obstacle named "the past." The stars are infinite, and countless possibilities await him in the future.

C: 没有人能读懂另一个人…就连你我也不例外。
E: No one can completely grasp another's thoughts... Not even you or I.

C: 哼，你还亲自来玩回合制游戏？
E: Heh. Never thought you'd come to personally play a turn-based game.

C: …忘了还有副本要刷，快点搞定吧。
E: ...I've got a raid to get to — let's finish this.

C: 刚到空间站时，科员们给我单独准备了一个房间，虽然我很感激他们，只是那儿离大家太远，我就没什么兴致住啦。
E: When I first got to the space station, the researchers had prepared a room for me. I—I was really grateful, but it was far away from everyone else. That was a bit disheartening.

C: 升个配置。
E: Upgrade configured.

C: 原来你怕我。
E: So you are afraid of me.

C: 怎么？来砸场子？
E: Here to crash the party?

C: 可别忘了，有人在盯着你的一举一动哦。
E: I've got my eye on you.

C: 顾客就是上帝，想要我背叛上帝，除非…你加钱~
E: The customer is king, and for me to betray the king, well... You gotta make it worth my while.

C: 呜…克拉拉，我的克拉拉…什么时候才能加入鼹鼠党……
E: Waaaah... Clara... when can you join The Moles...?

C: 希儿姐姐说话声音很大，但有时却说不过虎克呢，嘿嘿~
E: Miss Seele talks loud, but sometimes Hook still beats her in an argument, hehe~

C: 虎克最喜欢老爹了！等虎克挖到了宝藏，要给老爹盖一间大房子！
E: Hook loves daddy! One day, Hook's gonna dig up a big treasure and build daddy a huge huge house!

C: 诶嘿嘿…没想到吧？
E: Eh—hehe... Didn't expect that, right?

C: 你打我！
E: You hit me!

C: 吓、吓我一跳。
E: *gasp* That one's a little scary.

C: 让我摸个「鱼」吧！
E: Luck of the draw...!

C: 消消火气。
E: Chill out.

C: 他一直…一直是我们中最明白「代价」的那个人，但他什么都没说，什么都没做！
E: He always... He always understood the price better than any of us, yet he never spoke up — never did anything!

C: 仙舟「罗浮」的「闭目将军」，虽说久闻大名，但总感觉他不管事儿…不如咱们「曜青」仙舟的女将军。
E: The "Dozing General" of the Xianzhou Luofu... I've heard a lot about him, but I feel he doesn't do anything... He's not as good as the lady general from our Xianzhou Yaoqing.

C: 干嘛呀！
E: Hey!

C: 飞霄不会同任何人示弱。所以她有时能同我谈谈心，已经是相当放松了。
E: Feixiao won't show any weakness to anyone. The fact that she sometimes chats with me about her feelings already counts as relaxing for her.

C: 收获不少。
E: Quite the taking.

C: 古籍之中早有记载。
E: This was documented in the ancient texts long ago.

C: 有次去天舶司登门拜访，撞见驭空大人独自面对皮侯，凝视许久。虽然最终一箭未射，但她或许早在心中拉了千百次弓吧。
E: I visited the Sky-Faring Commission once and saw Madam Yukong staring alone at the leather target for a long time. She didn't fire a single arrow that day, but perhaps she did shoot thousands in her mind.

C: 椒丘大夫，请你也注意安全。不然我没法和飞霄将军交代。
E: Doctor Jiaoqiu, please be careful. If anything happens to you, I'll never be able to face General Feixiao.

C: 罗浮长乐天的景致千年未曾变过，反不如星槎海那厢，在大战被摧毁后重建来得美丽。
E: Hmph, Exalting Sanctum has seen little change in the past millennium — a little dull, I would say. However, Starskiff Haven has grown on me since it was rebuilt after the war.

C: 掌中之剑，与天地相较不过一根针的大小，如何能斩开星星？
E: This sword in my hand... naught but a needle compared with the heavenly bodies. How can I use it to cut open a star?

C: 我来承担这份力量的代价。
E: I will pay the price for this power.

C: 十王宣旨，吾必奉行。
E: I shall carry out the decree of the Ten Lords.

C: 我说什么，这一战将军您也是无论如何都要打的…不如我们就战后再议吧。
E: Oh, General, seems like I can't change your mind about this battle no matter what I say... Maybe we should save our talk for after.

C: 明明时间都过去那么久了，每次在她身边，总有种自己还是小狐狸的错觉…大概是驭空姐姐的目光愈发慈爱了。
E: Even after all this time, being by her side makes me feel like a young fox again... Perhaps it's because she's become more affectionate with age?

C: 闻着是个大家伙，留给我吧。
E: This one looks dangerous. Leave it to me.

C: 师父会遭歹人构陷，某种意义上因为她是一个心地善良、开诚布公的人。面对利口之覆邦家者，不可心怀一丝善意。
E: My master was framed by criminals, in a sense because she was a kind and open soul. When faced with villains who would destroy everything, you must not harbor any good will.

C: 她是太卜司的卜者…还是牌馆的老板娘？
E: Is she a diviner of the Divination Commission... or the proprietress of the games parlor?

C: 小女子从前就钟爱扇子，总将「扇扇风，消消火」挂在嘴边，但遇到不长眼的，也只好自认倒霉。如今这扇子真能掀起风浪了，却变得有些不习惯。
E: In the past, I always loved fans and often said, "just cool things down with a fan," but when faced with fools, I could only grin and bear it. Now that this fan can really stir up a storm, it's become somewhat unfamiliar to me.

C: 噢？我喜欢这样的惊喜。
E: Oh? I do like surprises.

C: 我叫阮•梅，念我名字时，请别忘了中间气息的停歇。
E: My name is Ruan Mei. When saying my name, please don't run the syllables together.

C: 切勿心急，想明白再做决定。
E: No need to rush. Patience breeds success.

C: 演出开始~
E: Let the show begin~

C: 我为自我而战，直至一切…燃烧殆尽！
E: I will fight for myself, until everything... burns to ashes!

C: 我偏爱精妙绝伦的乐章，这一点不会改变。但也得承认，偶然和意外同样能构成精彩的戏剧，人生也是如此。
E: I prefer exquisitely composed musical movements, and that won't change. But I must admit, accidents and surprises can also create splendid dramas, and so it is with life.

C: 小打小闹。
E: Just a graze.

C: 我看看，谁是食言的坏孩子？
E: So, who's the little backstabber here?

C: 哈！他名气可大了，和我一样是个疯起来不要命的家伙。要不我再加把劲，早点把他…哈哈，让我的赏金再翻个倍！
E: Ha! That guy's as notorious as they come, just like me – a madman who throws caution to the wind. Maybe I should step it up, get him out of the way quicker... Haha, double my bounty in no time!

C: 来——猜猜～我是谁～
E: Come on~ Guess who I am~

C: 博识学会的撰稿人曾想为我增设一条头衔，叫什么「独一黑塔」，来和人偶作出区分。庸俗。前者后者哪个不是我本人？所以我给了条建议——只要你敢写，我就敢自称「大黑塔」，简洁直观，信、达、雅。
E: The writers from the Intelligentsia Guild wanted to give me an extra title. Something like "Herta Prime" to separate me from my puppets. How banal. Are the puppets not "me" as well? So, I gave them a suggestion — if they dared to write that, then I would call myself THE Herta. It's short, simple, straight to the point, and elegant.

C: 共同的终点，足以让我们一致对外。
E: A common goal is enough to bring us together in this fight.

C: 如你所见，我不过是一介孱弱书生。
E: As you can see, I'm just a frail scholar.

C: 那粉彤彤的小姑娘完全可以把那些干巴巴的老不死丢在脑后，本来这事她不管，也就没人管啦…责任心太强，就是这样的吧。
E: That pink girl could easily leave those shriveled old goons behind, you know? If she didn't care, no one else would either. But no, she's too responsible for her own good, isn't she?

C: 诶，大地的半神…怎么，你也有尾巴？
E: Uhh? The demigod of Earth...? Why do you have a tail, too?

C: 我会于此静候，直到最后的时刻来临。
E: I will wait here until the final instant arrives.

C: 想用它做个手工，但要做什么好呢……
E: I want to make something with it. But what to make...?

C: 每个人心中都有一个英雄的模样，我们用岁月的刻刀一笔一划雕琢自己，直至「他」化为现实，成为手中最完美的作品。
E: There's a hero within everyone's heart. With the chisel of time, we carve ourselves stroke by stroke, until the hero becomes real. Until they become our greatest creation.

C: 亿万火种之怒，燃尽此身！
E: The fury of innumerable Coreflames, consume me!

C: 缇宝女士也邀请过我乘坐她们的火筒，虽然只有一小会儿，但在云石天宫穿梭真的很刺激…她们告诉我，只要一直看着前方，就不会害怕了。
E: Lady Tribbie once invited me to board their rocket. It wasn't a long journey, but it was really exciting to fly through the Marmoreal Palace... They told me I wouldn't be scared as long as I kept looking straight ahead.

C: 迷醉吧。
E: Become inebriated.

C: 洋流将我送回了此处。
E: The current has carried me back here.

C: 哦~是三月觉得最厉害的姬子姐姐。
E: Oh~ It's big sis Himeko, the one March thinks is totally the best!

C: 不论曲折，皆是「我」行过的路。
E: Every twist and turn, every hardship... they're all part of the road "I" chose.

C: 可爱的星琼，会藏在哪里呢？
E: Where might those lovely Stellar Jades be hiding?

C: 美丽的花儿总是带刺，至于保护欲…偶尔，也会在人家心里熊熊燃烧呢。但我知道，她的心是柔软的，毕竟她和三月是从一颗种子里绽放的花呀。
E: Beautiful flowers always have thorns, and as for feeling protective... I sometimes get consumed by that, too. But I know that she's a softie deep down. After all, she and March are flowers that bloomed from the same seed.

C: 存护之志！
E: Will of Preservation!

C: 没关系，我会出手。
E: Don't worry, I'll do it.

C: 未曾设想的画面…但这也是「开拓」的意义。
E: An unexpected sight... but this is also what it means to Trailblaze.

C: 还难不倒我。
E: No match for me!

C: 轮到你了。
E: Batter up.

C: 在岔道之前，珍惜同路的时光。
E: Before our paths diverge, savor the shared journey.

C: 这就见底了？
E: Is that all?

E: Switch to Character 1

E: Grand Slam

E: Pity Its Petals Thin as Mist

E: Selfless Giant Turtle

E: It is but a slight headwind. Pay it no mind.

E: It's all up to you guys now.

E: I'm the ultimate chimera!

E: Awoo~ Keep your wits about you, everyone.

E: Come and play!

E: Reclaim the Bygone Past

E: and welcome the arrival\nof the Great One

E: Dream's Curtain Call

C: 优先攻击【生命计数】<color=#f29e38ff>较少</color>的敌方目标，尽可能让我方【生命计数】较少的目标完成最后一击，以回复其【生命计数】。
E: Prioritize enemy targets with <color=#f29e38ff>lower</color> "HP Count." Try to have ally targets with lower "HP Count" deal the final hit to restore "HP Count."

C: 推荐选择攻击频率高的角色，治疗和护盾效果无法避免【生命计数】减少。
E: Recommended to select characters with high attack frequency, as healing and shield effects cannot prevent "HP Count" from decreasing.

C: 推荐选择两名具有输出能力的角色，分别前往两个战场与敌方首领对战。
E: It is recommended to select two damage-dealing characters to engage the enemy bosses in two separate battlefields.

C: 世间的每一个清晨
E: Every Dawn of the World

C: 是吗？
E: Really?

C: 代码受到影响后的错误投影。参照本体为正阳狮鹫，在遥远的造物世，艾格勒打造黎明机器后，它又在刻法勒协助下创造了代表各种泰坦的奇兽。据信，正阳狮鹫象征着睁开眼睛后为世界带来光明的艾格勒。
E: An erroneous materialization after the code was affected. The reference entity is Noontide Gryphon. In the ancient Era Creatura, Aquila, after forging the Dawn Device, collaborated with Kephale to bring forth the legendary beasts embodying the Titans. The Noontide Gryphon is said to represent Aquila after opening their eyes to bestow light upon the world.

C: 月夜天马
E: Moonlit Pegasus

C: 进入蓄力状态，下回合施放【翩翩起舞的】。
E: Enters the Charging state. Uses "Volteggiando" in the next turn.

C: 受到致命攻击时，攻击者的速度和造成的伤害提高。
E: When receiving a killing blow, increases the attacker's SPD and DMG dealt.

C: 对指定我方单体及其相邻目标造成少量冰属性伤害。
E: Deals minor Ice DMG to one designated target and targets adjacent to them.

C: 幽雅的
E: Grazioso

C: 军威锐不可当
E: Military Might Unstoppable

C: 黑色侵入血肉
E: Flesh Assailment of Ebon

C: 「繁育」的力量为流萤重塑机甲，进入完全燃烧状态。「但我仍会燃烧，不断燃烧，直至灰烬，浴火重生。」
E: Firefly's mech was reforged by the power of "Propagation," pushing her into a state of Complete Combustion. "But I will still burn... and keep on burning... until new life rises from the ashes."

C: 在意识渐趋沉沦的瞬间，你想起卡芙卡关于「终末」的谶语，猛地清醒过来。大丽花未能得手，略感失望，但她不介意再试一次。
E: Just as your consciousness started to drift, you recalled Kafka's prophecy regarding the Finality and were jolted back to your senses. The Dahlia, with her attempt foiled, expressed mild disappointment but was more than willing to try again.

C: 然而为时已晚，焰火渐起，流萤已经看不见了。你曾用她想要的方式在脑海中留下了匹诺康尼的美好结局，而现在你希望能弥补她的遗憾。「终末」的力量正在拨转时间，而少女最后的遗憾近在眼前。「一个美好的白日梦」——诺言兑现的时刻到了。
E: But it was too late. The fireworks were starting, and Firefly's sight was gone. You had held on to the beautiful ending for Penacony she envisioned, and now you hoped to fulfill her last wish. The power of Finality is turning back time, and the girl's final regret is within sight. "A beautiful daydream..." The moment to fulfill that promise has come.

C: 返回战斗，从梦中醒来
E: Return from Battle and Rouse from Dreams

E: When entering combat, increases other characters' Break Effect by an amount equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of The Dahlia's Break Effect plus <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak>, lasting for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s). When The Dahlia receives healing or a Shield provided by a teammate, this effect triggers again, lasting for <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> turn(s). Cannot trigger repeatedly within one turn.

C: 无法成为主动选择类技能的主目标。弱点被击破或场上除自身以外的全部敌方单位都处于【潜伏】状态，则自身解除【潜伏】状态。场上没有其他敌方单位时，自身解除【潜伏】状态。
E: Cannot become the primary target for abilities that require active selection. When Weakness is Broken or when all enemy units on the field aside from this unit are in "Lurking" state, dispels "Lurking" state for this unit. When there are no other enemy units on the battlefield, this unit dispels the "Lurking" state.

C: 点燃活火
E: Ignited Flame

C: 不屈酣战
E: Indomitable Battle

C: 匹诺康尼存在虫群的忆质投影…但愿那种灾难如今也只存在于记忆当中。\n无论如何，原始忆域危险重重，先进入「十二时刻」再说吧。
E: Penacony has memoria projections of the Swarm... Let's just hope a disaster like that remains only a memory.\nRegardless, the Primordial Memory Zone is treacherous. Let's focus on getting into the "Twelve Hours" first.

C: 或许结局与过程都无法改变，但我们仍然可以决定，如何看待自己的命运。
E: Perhaps we can't change the ending or the process, but we can still decide how to view our own destiny.

C: 继续探寻梦主的阴谋
E: Continue to investigate the Dreammaster's schemes

C: 在对方身上留下音符
E: Leave a note on the girl

C: 和星期日谈谈
E: Talk to Sunday

C: 你到底是谁？
E: Who exactly are you?

C: 还真是…与众不同。你的「记忆」有点棘手呢。是谁在保护它们吗？
E: Well, this is... quite unusual. Your "memories" are quite tricky. Is someone protecting those memories?

C: 机甲无法启动？为什么……
E: The mech won't start? Why...

C: （匹诺康尼，为何会出现「格拉默铁骑」？）
E: (Why would Glamoth's Iron Cavalry appear in Penacony?)

C: 看来这位客人还不习惯从现实到梦境的变化啊。别担心，这种「失重」在初入梦境的旅客间很常见。
E: Seems like our guest here hasn't gotten used to the transition. Fret not, feeling a sense of weightlessness is normal for new visitors.

C: 对了，有件很重要的事，我似乎还从没问过——
E: That reminds me, there's something important I still haven't asked you yet...

C: 「…十二刻度██十二梦境██父亲██我把它献予你…」
E: "...Gradation twelve ██ Dreamscape twelve ██ Father ██ I dedicate this to you..."

C: 果然，你早就注意到我了。抱歉，我现在不方便抛头露面，能请你借一步说话吗？
E: So you did notice me after all. Sorry, but I can't show myself right now. Could we talk somewhere more private?

C: 理解，我的同伴会为你引路。
E: Understood, my companion will show you the way.

C: 你们的确发现了很多线索，但在此之前，我必须确认两位的真正目的。
E: You've indeed uncovered many clues, but before we proceed, I must confirm your true intentions.

C: 倘若能得其法，我们就能洞穿时间，将过往从混沌中打捞出来。
E: If we can master the technique, we'll be able to pierce through time itself and salvage the past from chaos.

C: 不错，虫群肆虐横行，一位格拉默铁骑行经此地，不问回报投身战场，这实在值得敬佩。
E: Indeed, as the Swarm ran rampant, a Glamoth Knight passing through joined the battle without asking for anything in return... Truly admirable.

C: 不能破坏人设！执行命令，「机甲大亨」！
E: Gotta stay in character! Follow the instructions, Mech Tycoon!

C: 这太谜语了，我无法相信你。
E: That's way too cryptic. I can't trust you.

C: 而此时，梦主的计划，已经如钟表般开始转动…命运亦然。
E: And now, the Dreammaster's plan begins to turn like clockwork... and so too does destiny.

C: 别想让我掉以轻心，我知道你的真面目。无论你的目的是什么，我都会阻止你。
E: Don't think I'll let my guard down. I know your true nature. Whatever your goal is, I will stop you.

C: 若恶人不能受辱
E: If the wicked cannot suffer disgrace

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「繁育」竟能以蝗灾造就的恐惧，不断唤起人们对「秩序」的祈求。寰宇蝗灾肆虐之时，亦是「秩序」空前鼎盛之时。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>The Propagation was able to continuously evoke people's prayers for the Order through the fear brought by the Swarm. When the Swarm Disaster ravaged the universe, that was also when the Order reached its unprecedented peak.</color>

C: 而我们面前的，是他最后的抉择——背离「同谐」后，走向何方。
E: And before us lies his final decision: where to go after turning away from the Harmony.

C: 我们得阻止他。
E: We need to stop him.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「<unbreak>11</unbreak>：<unbreak>45</unbreak>█乐园终将跌入愁苦人世，黎明一旦升起，便要坠毁于白昼。凡是金的，怎可能光华长留？」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"<unbreak>11</unbreak>:<unbreak>45</unbreak>█Paradise shall fall into this world of sorrow, and once dawn breaks, it will shatter in the light of day. How could anything golden abide in glory forever?"</color>

C: 但你侥幸生还，我也因之启程。你须亲自平定此事，将丢却的敬畏取回——不是之于你，而是之于家族。
E: But you survived by sheer luck, and I set out for this very reason. You must settle this matter yourself and reclaim your lost respect... not for yourself, but for the Family.

C: 很好。那么，请闭上眼睛吧……
E: Very well. Now, please close your eyes...

C: 太一之梦 永恒的正午十二时
E: Ena's Dream, the eternal high noon...

C: 哥哥，你…想家了吗？
E: Brother, do you... miss home?

C: 欢迎来到「存在的地平线」……
E: Welcome to Horizon of Existence...

C: 那就拼命别输。
E: Then do your best to not fail.

C: 终有一日，活着的人都能知道：该如何思考，才能自己创造幸福。
E: One day, those who live will all come to understand how they need to think to create their own happiness.

C: 主演
E: Starring

C: 友情出演
E: Cameo Appearances

C: 有点紧张？
E: Nervous?

C: 对于想要见到的人，人们总是在见面前，不断想象那时的情景，想象自己在见面时说出的话，能让对方露出笑容。
E: When it comes to someone we want to meet, we always imagine the scene before it happens, imagine the words we'll say that would make them smile.

C: 在房间的尽头，一座宝箱正在静静等候。里面装着你最为渴望之物……
E: At the far end of the room, a chest silently awaits. Inside lies what you desire most...

C: 你说得对，这里还远远不够高。
E: You're right, this isn't nearly high enough.

C: 去吧！奇美拉！
E: Go, chimera!

C: 绝对是你平时说了太多次吧！
E: You must've said it way too many times!

C: 听说这次的「十三大师」啊…
E: I heard about the "Thirteen Masters" this time...

C: 对面看起来就好弱，你也不想输给它们吧？
E: The opposition looks so weak. You wouldn't want to lose to them, right?

C: 赌徒的愿望
E: Gambler's Wish

C: 帮派迷钟
E: Gang Ticker

C: 是否切换至#1命途？\n<color=#f29e38ff>在当前启用的预设队伍中，已预设为#2命途，不会随切换而改变</color>
E: Switch to Path of #1?\n<color=#f29e38ff>The currently enabled team preset has been set to Path of #2 and will not change with the switch</color>

C: 预设队伍内无法切换
E: Cannot switch in preset team

C: 问候
E: Greeting
